> **摘要**: 大脑基础模型将基础模型范式引入神经科学领域。与语言和图像基础模型一样，它们是在大规模数据集上进行预训练的通用人工智能系统，可以轻松适应下游任务。然而，与基于文本和图像的模型不同，它们训练大脑数据：脑电图、功能磁共振成像和其他神经数据类型的大型数据集，这些数据集历史上在严格管理的临床和研究环境中收集。本文认为，神经数据训练基础模型开辟了新的规范领域。鉴于神经数据源自身体的性质以及临床和研究环境中的历史治理，神经数据比文本或图像具有更强的保护期望和主张。然而，基础模型范式使它们受到大规模重新利用、跨上下文拼接和开放式下游应用的实践的影响。此外，在治理分散且不明确的背景下，包括商业开发商在内的更广泛的参与者现在可以使用这些实践。为了绘制这一领域的地图，我们首先描述大脑基础模型的技术基础和训练数据生态系统。然后，我们利用人工智能伦理学、神经伦理学和生物伦理学来组织对隐私、同意、偏见、利益分享和治理的关注。对于每个领域，我们都会随着该领域的成熟提出议程设定问题和基线保障措施。
> **Abstract**: Brain foundation models bring the foundation model paradigm to the field of neuroscience. Like language and image foundation models, they are general-purpose AI systems pretrained on large-scale datasets that adapt readily to downstream tasks. Unlike text-and-image based models, however, they train on brain data: large-datasets of EEG, fMRI, and other neural data types historically collected within tightly governed clinical and research settings. This paper contends that training foundation models on neural data opens new normative territory. Neural data carry stronger expectations of, and claims to, protection than text or images, given their body-derived nature and historical governance within clinical and research settings. Yet the foundation model paradigm subjects them to practices of large-scale repurposing, cross-context stitching, and open-ended downstream application. Furthermore, these practices are now accessible to a much broader range of actors, including commercial developers, against a backdrop of fragmented and unclear governance. To map this territory, we first describe brain foundation models' technical foundations and training-data ecosystem. We then draw on AI ethics, neuroethics, and bioethics to organize concerns across privacy, consent, bias, benefit sharing, and governance. For each, we propose both agenda-setting questions and baseline safeguards as the field matures.

【7】Beyond Translation: Cross-Cultural Meme Transcreation with Vision-Language Models
- **标题**: 超越翻译：利用视觉语言模型进行跨文化模因创译
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02510
> **作者**: Yuming Zhao,Peiyi Zhang,Oana Ignat
> **摘要**: 模因是一种普遍的在线交流形式，但其文化特殊性给跨文化适应带来了重大挑战。我们研究跨文化模因创译，这是一项多模式生成任务，旨在保留交流意图和幽默，同时适应特定文化的参考。我们提出了一种基于视觉语言模型的混合创译框架，并引入了中国和美国模因的大规模双向数据集。我们利用人类判断和自动评估，分析了 6,315 个模因对并评估跨文化方向的创译质量。我们的结果表明，当前的视觉语言模型可以在有限的程度上执行跨文化模因创译，但表现出明显的方向不对称：美中创译始终比中美创译质量更高。我们进一步确定幽默和视觉文本设计的哪些方面可以跨文化转移，哪些方面仍然具有挑战性，并提出一个评估跨文化多模式生成的评估框架。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/AIM-SCU/MemeXGen 上公开获取。
> **Abstract**: Memes are a pervasive form of online communication, yet their cultural specificity poses significant challenges for cross-cultural adaptation. We study cross-cultural meme transcreation, a multimodal generation task that aims to preserve communicative intent and humor while adapting culture-specific references. We propose a hybrid transcreation framework based on vision-language models and introduce a large-scale bidirectional dataset of Chinese and US memes. Using both human judgments and automated evaluation, we analyze 6,315 meme pairs and assess transcreation quality across cultural directions. Our results show that current vision-language models can perform cross-cultural meme transcreation to a limited extent, but exhibit clear directional asymmetries: US-Chinese transcreation consistently achieves higher quality than Chinese-US. We further identify which aspects of humor and visual-textual design transfer across cultures and which remain challenging, and propose an evaluation framework for assessing cross-cultural multimodal generation. Our code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/AIM-SCU/MemeXGen.

【8】CodeGuard: Improving LLM Guardrails in CS Education
- **标题**: CodeGuard：改进 CS 教育中的 LLM 护栏
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02509
> **作者**: Nishat Raihan,Noah Erdachew,Jayoti Devi,Joanna C. S. Santos,Marcos Zampieri
> **摘要**: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 越来越多地嵌入计算机科学 (CS) 课堂中，以实现代码生成、反馈和评估的自动化。然而，他们对对抗性或恶意提示的敏感度威胁着学生的学习和学术诚信。为了解决这个重要问题，我们评估了现有的现成法学硕士在处理计算机科学教育领域内不安全和不相关的提示方面的能力。我们发现了现有法学硕士护栏的重要缺陷，这促使我们提出 CodeGuard，这是一个用于教育人工智能系统的综合护栏框架。 CodeGuard 包括 (i) 首创的提示分类法； (ii) CodeGuard 数据集，涵盖整个分类的 8,000 个提示的集合； (iii) PromptShield，一种轻量级句子编码器模型，经过微调以实时检测不安全提示。实验表明，PromptShield 达到了 0.93 F1 分数，超越了现有的护栏方法。此外，进一步的实验表明，CodeGuard 可将潜在有害或违反策略的代码完成率减少 30-65%，而不会降低合法教育任务的性能。代码、数据集和评估脚本免费向社区提供。
> **Abstract**: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly embedded in Computer Science (CS) classrooms to automate code generation, feedback, and assessment. However, their susceptibility to adversarial or ill-intentioned prompts threatens student learning and academic integrity. To cope with this important issue, we evaluate existing off-the-shelf LLMs in handling unsafe and irrelevant prompts within the domain of CS education. We identify important shortcomings in existing LLM guardrails which motivates us to propose CodeGuard, a comprehensive guardrail framework for educational AI systems. CodeGuard includes (i) a first-of-its-kind taxonomy for classifying prompts; (ii) the CodeGuard dataset, a collection of 8,000 prompts spanning the taxonomy; and (iii) PromptShield, a lightweight sentence-encoder model fine-tuned to detect unsafe prompts in real time. Experiments show that PromptShield achieves 0.93 F1 score, surpassing existing guardrail methods. Additionally, further experimentation reveals that CodeGuard reduces potentially harmful or policy-violating code completions by 30-65% without degrading performance on legitimate educational tasks. The code, datasets, and evaluation scripts are made freely available to the community.

【9】Motivation, Attention, and Visual Platform Design: How Moral Contagions Spread on TikTok and Instagram in the 2024 United States Presidential Election
- **标题**: 动机、注意力和视觉平台设计：2024 年美国总统选举中道德感染如何在 TikTok 和 Instagram 上传播
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02479
> **作者**: Ni Annie Yuan,Ho-chun Herbert Chang
> **摘要**: 视觉社交媒体平台已成为政治话语的主要场所，但我们对道德化在不同平台和主题上的运作方式有何不同知之甚少。通过分析 2024 年美国总统大选期间的 2,027,595 个 TikTok 和 1,126,972 个 Instagram 帖子，我们证明问题不一定是本质上道德化的，而是受众人口统计、平台架构和党派框架的产物。我们利用时间供需分析和道德基础评分（eMFD）来研究关键选举问题的动态。出现了三个关键发现。首先，道德化模式因平台而异：尽管供应量较低，TikTok 的算法仍使道德化堕胎和移民内容得以病毒式传播，而 Instagram 则放大了调整供需的经济话语。其次，传统上“务实”的经济问题变得道德化——加密货币话语比任何其他话题都更强烈地援引忠诚和权威基础，将监管视为政府的越权行为。第三，平台对不同事件做出了反应：哈里斯提名所有主题后，TikTok 股价飙升（供应波动性降低 96%），而 Instagram 则围绕加密货币政策发展飙升。语义网络分析显示，TikTok 的循环拓扑可以实现跨领域曝光，而 Instagram 的碎片化结构则将哈里斯与经济话语隔离开来。这些发现表明，理解政治道德化需要检查特定平台的生态系统，其中架构、人口统计和内容策略相互作用，以确定哪些问题被道德化以及道德内容如何传播。
> **Abstract**: Visual social media platforms have become primary venues for political discourse, yet we know little about how moralization operates differently across platforms and topics. Analyzing 2,027,595 TikToks and 1,126,972 Instagram posts during the 2024 US presidential election, we demonstrate that issues are not necessarily inherently moralized, but a product of audience demographics, platform architecture, and partisan framing. Using temporal supply-demand analysis and moral foundations scoring (eMFD), we examine the dynamics of key electoral issues. Three key findings emerge. First, moralization patterns diverge dramatically by platform: TikTok's algorithm enabled viral spread of moralized abortion and immigration content despite lower supply, while Instagram amplified economic discourse that aligned supply and demand. Second, traditionally "pragmatic" economic issues became moralized-cryptocurrency discourse invoked loyalty and authority foundations more strongly than any other topic, framing regulation as government overreach. Third, platforms responded to different events: TikTok surged after Harris's nomination across all topics (96% reduction in supply volatility), while Instagram spiked around cryptocurrency policy developments. Semantic network analysis reveals TikTok's circular topology enables cross-cutting exposure while Instagram's fragmented structure isolates Harris from economic discourse. These findings demonstrate that understanding political moralization requires examining platform-specific ecosystems where architecture, demographics, and content strategy interact to determine which issues get moralized and how moral content spreads.

【10】The Verification Crisis: Expert Perceptions of GenAI Disinformation and the Case for Reproducible Provenance
- **标题**: 验证危机：专家对 GenAI 虚假信息的看法以及可复制来源的案例
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02100
> **作者**: Alexander Loth,Martin Kappes,Marc-Oliver Pahl
> **摘要**: 生成人工智能（GenAI）的发展已将虚假信息的生产从手动制造转变为自动化的大规模操纵。本文介绍了人工智能研究人员、政策制定者和虚假信息专家参与的第一轮纵向专家认知调查 (N=21) 的调查结果。它检查多模式威胁（文本、图像、音频和视频）的感知严重性，并评估当前的缓解策略。结果表明，虽然深度伪造视频具有直接的“震撼”价值，但大规模文本生成会带来“认知碎片”和“综合共识”的系统性风险，特别是在政治领域。该调查揭示了人们对技术检测工具的怀疑，尽管存在实施障碍，但专家们还是倾向于来源标准和监管框架。 GenAI 虚假信息研究需要可重复的方法。当前的挑战是衡量：如果没有标准化基准和可重复性检查表，跟踪或对抗合成媒体仍然很困难。我们建议将信息完整性视为具有严格数据来源和方法可重复性的基础设施。
> **Abstract**: The growth of Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) has shifted disinformation production from manual fabrication to automated, large-scale manipulation. This article presents findings from the first wave of a longitudinal expert perception survey (N=21) involving AI researchers, policymakers, and disinformation specialists. It examines the perceived severity of multimodal threats -- text, image, audio, and video -- and evaluates current mitigation strategies. Results indicate that while deepfake video presents immediate "shock" value, large-scale text generation poses a systemic risk of "epistemic fragmentation" and "synthetic consensus," particularly in the political domain. The survey reveals skepticism about technical detection tools, with experts favoring provenance standards and regulatory frameworks despite implementation barriers. GenAI disinformation research requires reproducible methods. The current challenge is measurement: without standardized benchmarks and reproducibility checklists, tracking or countering synthetic media remains difficult. We propose treating information integrity as an infrastructure with rigor in data provenance and methodological reproducibility.

【11】DrawSim-PD: Simulating Student Science Drawings to Support NGSS-Aligned Teacher Diagnostic Reasoning
- **标题**: DrawSim-PD：模拟学生科学绘图以支持符合 NGSS 的教师诊断推理
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01578
> **作者**: Arijit Chakma,Peng He,Honglu Liu,Zeyuan Wang,Tingting Li,Tiffany D. Do,Feng Liu
> **摘要**: 发展诊断推理方面的专业知识需要对不同的学生工件进行练习，但隐私法规禁止大规模共享真实的学生作品以促进教师专业发展（PD）。我们推出了 DrawSim-PD，这是第一个模拟符合 NGSS 的学生式科学绘图的生成框架，该框架表现出可控的教学缺陷，以支持教师培训。我们方法的核心是能力概况——结构化的认知状态，编码每个表现水平的学生可以和不能展示什么。这些配置文件确保生成的输出之间的跨模式一致性：(i) 学生式的绘图，(ii) 第一人称推理叙述，以及 (iii) 面向教师的诊断概念图。使用涵盖 K-12 的 100 个精选 NGSS 主题，我们构建了一个包含 10,000 个系统结构化工件的语料库。通过基于专家的可行性评估，K--12 科学教育工作者验证了这些工件与 NGSS 期望的一致性（核心项目的积极性超过 84%）以及解释学生思维的实用性，同时确定了针对年级范围极端情况的改进机会。我们发布这个开放的基础设施是为了克服视觉评估研究中的数据稀缺障碍。
> **Abstract**: Developing expertise in diagnostic reasoning requires practice with diverse student artifacts, yet privacy regulations prohibit sharing authentic student work for teacher professional development (PD) at scale. We present DrawSim-PD, the first generative framework that simulates NGSS-aligned, student-like science drawings exhibiting controllable pedagogical imperfections to support teacher training. Central to our approach are apability profiles--structured cognitive states encoding what students at each performance level can and cannot yet demonstrate. These profiles ensure cross-modal coherence across generated outputs: (i) a student-like drawing, (ii) a first-person reasoning narrative, and (iii) a teacher-facing diagnostic concept map. Using 100 curated NGSS topics spanning K-12, we construct a corpus of 10,000 systematically structured artifacts. Through an expert-based feasibility evaluation, K--12 science educators verified the artifacts' alignment with NGSS expectations (>84% positive on core items) and utility for interpreting student thinking, while identifying refinement opportunities for grade-band extremes. We release this open infrastructure to overcome data scarcity barriers in visual assessment research.

## 数据库(cs.DB:Databases)

【1】Meta Engine: A Unified Semantic Query Engine on Heterogeneous LLM-Based Query Systems
- **标题**: 元引擎：基于 LLM 的异构查询系统的统一语义查询引擎
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01701
> **作者**: Ruyu Li,Tinghui Zhang,Haodi Ma,Daisy Zhe Wang,Yifan Wang
> **摘要**: 随着多模态数据的使用越来越广泛，语义查询在数据管理系统中的需求越来越大，这是访问和分析多模态数据的重要方式。作为非结构化数据，多模态数据（文本、图像、视频等）的大部分信息隐藏在语义中，无法通过 SQL 等传统数据库查询来访问。鉴于大型语言模型（LLM）在理解语义和处理自然语言方面的强大功能，近年来提出了几种基于LLM的语义查询系统，以支持对非结构化数据的语义查询。然而，这种快速增长产生了一个支离破碎的生态系统。由于 (1) 不同语义查询系统的不同 API 以及 (2) 专业化和通用性之间的基本权衡，应用程序面临着重大的集成挑战。许多语义查询系统都是高度专业化的，在单一模态中提供最先进的性能，但在处理多模态数据时却遇到了困难。相反，一些“一体式”系统可以处理多种模式，但与特定模式下的专用系统相比，通常表现出次优的性能。本文介绍了 Meta Engine，一种新颖的“查询系统上的查询系统”，旨在解决上述挑战。 Meta Engine 是一个统一的语义查询引擎，集成了异构的、基于 LLM 的专业查询系统。其架构包括五个关键组件：(1) 自然语言 (NL) 查询解析器、(2) 运算符生成器、(3) 查询路由器、(4) 一组适配器和 (5) 结果聚合器。在评估中，Meta Engine 始终优于所有基线，在大多数情况下产生 3-6 倍的 F1，在特定数据集上高达 24 倍。
> **Abstract**: With the increasingly use of multi-modal data, semantic query has become more and more demanded in data management systems, which is an important way to access and analyze multi-modal data. As unstructured data, most information of multi-modal data (text, image, video, etc) hides in the semantics, which cannot be accessed by the traditional database queries like SQL. Given the power of Large Language Model (LLM) in understanding semantics and processing natural language, in recent years several LLM-based semantic query systems have been proposed, to support semantic querying over unstructured data. However, this rapid growth has produced a fragmented ecosystem. Applications face significant integration challenges due to (1) disparate APIs of different semantic query systems and (2) a fundamental trade-off between specialization and generality. Many semantic query systems are highly specialized, offering state-of-the-art performance within a single modality but struggling with multi-modal data. Conversely, some "all-in-one" systems handle multiple modalities but often exhibit suboptimal performance compared to their specialized counterparts in specific modalities. This paper introduces Meta Engine, a novel "query system on query systems", designed to resolve those aforementioned challenges. Meta Engine is a unified semantic query engine that integrates heterogeneous, specialized LLM-based query systems. Its architecture comprises five key components: (1) a Natural Language (NL) Query Parser, (2) an Operator Generator, (3) a Query Router, (4) a set of Adapters, and (5) a Result Aggregator. In the evaluation, Meta Engine consistently outperforms all baselines, yielding 3-6x higher F1 in most cases and up to 24x on specific datasets.

## 分布式、并行和集群计算(cs.DC:Distributed, Parallel, and Cluster Computing)

【1】Exploiting Multi-Core Parallelism in Blockchain Validation and Construction
- **标题**: 在区块链验证和构建中利用多核并行性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03444
> **作者**: Arivarasan Karmegam,Lucianna Kiffer,Antonio Fernández Anta
> **摘要**: 区块链验证器可以通过利用多核 CPU 来减少块处理时间，但确定性执行必须保留给定的总顺序，同时尊重事务冲突和每个块的运行时间限制。本文系统地研究了验证器如何在块构建和执行过程中利用多核并行性而不违反区块链语义。我们形式化了两个验证器端优化问题：（i）在\（p \）个核心上执行已经排序的块，以最小化完工时间，同时确保与顺序执行等效； (ii) 在运行时间限制\(B\)下选择和调度内存池交易的子集，以最大化验证者奖励。对于这两者，我们开发了精确的混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 公式来捕获冲突、顺序和容量约束，并提出可扩展到实际工作负载的快速确定性启发法。使用以太坊主网跟踪，并包括用于有序块调度的 Solana 启发的声明访问基线 (Sol) 和用于块构建的简单奖励贪婪基线 (RG)，我们凭经验量化了最优性和运行时间之间的权衡。
> **Abstract**: Blockchain validators can reduce block processing time by exploiting multi-core CPUs, but deterministic execution must preserve a given total order while respecting transaction conflicts and per-block runtime limits. This paper systematically examines how validators can exploit multi-core parallelism during both block construction and execution without violating blockchain semantics. We formalize two validator-side optimization problems: (i) executing an already ordered block on \(p\) cores to minimize makespan while ensuring equivalence to sequential execution; and (ii) selecting and scheduling a subset of mempool transactions under a runtime limit \(B\) to maximize validator reward. For both, we develop exact Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) formulations that capture conflict, order, and capacity constraints, and propose fast deterministic heuristics that scale to realistic workloads. Using Ethereum mainnet traces and including a Solana-inspired declared-access baseline (Sol) for ordered-block scheduling and a simple reward-greedy baseline (RG) for block construction, we empirically quantify the trade-offs between optimality and runtime.

【2】Building a Correct-by-Design Lakehouse. Data Contracts, Versioning, and Transactional Pipelines for Humans and Agents
- **标题**: 建造一座设计正确的湖屋。人类和代理的数据契约、版本控制和事务管道
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02335
> **作者**: Weiming Sheng,Jinlang Wang,Manuel Barros,Aldrin Montana,Jacopo Tagliabue,Luca Bigon
> **摘要**: Lakehouse 是分析和人工智能的默认云平台，但当不受信任的参与者同时对生产数据进行操作时，它们就会变得不安全：上下游不匹配仅在运行时出现，并且多表管道可能会泄漏部分影响。受软件工程的启发，我们设计了 Bauplan，这是一个代码优先的湖屋，旨在使用熟悉的抽象使（大多数）非法国家无法表示。 Bauplan 沿着三个轴发挥作用：使管道边界可检查的类型表契约、用于审查和可重复性的类似 Git 的数据版本控制以及保证管道级原子性的事务运行。我们报告轻量级正式交易模型的早期结果，并讨论由反例推动的未来工作。
> **Abstract**: Lakehouses are the default cloud platform for analytics and AI, but they become unsafe when untrusted actors concurrently operate on production data: upstream-downstream mismatches surface only at runtime, and multi-table pipelines can leak partial effects. Inspired by software engineering, we design Bauplan, a code-first lakehouse that aims to make (most) illegal states unrepresentable using familiar abstractions. Bauplan acts along three axes: typed table contracts to make pipeline boundaries checkable, Git-like data versioning for review and reproducibility, and transactional runs that guarantee pipeline-level atomicity. We report early results from a lightweight formal transaction model and discuss future work motivated by counterexamples.

## 离散数学(cs.DM:Discrete Mathematics)

【1】Vigemers: on the number of $k$-mers sharing the same XOR-based minimizer
- **标题**: Vigemers：关于共享相同基于 XOR 的最小化器的 $k$-mers 的数量
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03337
> **作者**: Florian Ingels,Antoine Limasset,Camille Marchet,Mikaël Salson
> **摘要**: 在生物信息学中，最小化器已成为处理从 DNA 或 RNA 测序中提取的 $k$-mers（固定大小 $k$ 的单词）的不可避免的方法，无论是采样、存储、查询还是分区。根据 $m$-mer 上的某些固定顺序 ($m<k$)，$k$-mer 的最小者被定义为其最小的 $m$-mer —— 并充当其指纹。尽管最小化器广泛用于分区目的，但几乎没有关于所得分区的质量的理论工作。例如，几十年来，人们已经知道，词典顺序在经验上会导致高度不平衡的分区，在实践中无法使用，但直到最近，这一观察结果才在理论上得到证实。对字典顺序的拒绝导致社区诉诸使用哈希函数的（伪）随机顺序。在这项工作中，我们将与通过词典顺序获得的分区相关的理论结果扩展到一个（指数）大的哈希函数族，即 $m$-mers 与固定键进行异或运算。更准确地说，提供一个关键 $γ$ 和​​一个 $m$-mer $w$，我们研究计算有多少 $k$-mers 承认 $w$ 作为其最小者的函数（即，其中 $w\oplusγ$ 在所述 $k$-mers 的所有 $m$-mers 中是最小的）。这个数字用 $π_k^γ(w)$ 表示，表示在所有可能的 $k$-mers 都被看到并分区的情况下，与 $w$ 关联的桶的最大大小。我们将文献的（字典顺序）方法适应我们的框架，并提出组合方程，允许使用动态规划在 $O(km^2)$ 时间和 $O(km)$ 空间中计算 $π_k^γ(w)$。
> **Abstract**: In bioinformatics, minimizers have become an inescapable method for handling $k$-mers (words of fixed size $k$) extracted from DNA or RNA sequencing, whether for sampling, storage, querying or partitioning. According to some fixed order on $m$-mers ($m<k$), the minimizer of a $k$-mer is defined as its smallest $m$-mer -- and acts as its fingerprint. Although minimizers are widely used for partitioning purposes, there is almost no theoretical work on the quality of the resulting partitions. For instance, it has been known for decades that the lexicographic order empirically leads to highly unbalanced partitions that are unusable in practice, but it was not until very recently that this observation was theoretically substantiated. The rejection of the lexicographic order has led the community to resort to (pseudo-)random orders using hash functions. In this work, we extend the theoretical results relating to the partitions obtained by the lexicographical order, departing from it to a (exponentially) large family of hash functions, namely where the $m$-mers are XORed against a fixed key. More precisely, provided a key $γ$ and a $m$-mer $w$, we investigate the function that counts how many $k$-mers admit $w$ as their minimizer (i.e. where $w\oplusγ$ is minimal among all $m$-mers of said $k$-mers). This number, denoted by $π_k^γ(w)$, represents the maximum size of the bucket associated with $w$, if all possible $k$-mers were to be seen and partitioned. We adapt the (lexicographical order) method of the literature to our framework and propose combinatorial equations that allow to compute, using dynamic programming, $π_k^γ(w)$ in $O(km^2)$ time and $O(km)$ space.

## 数据结构和算法(cs.DS:Data Structures and Algorithms)

【1】On the Complexity of Maximal/Closed Frequent Tree Mining for Bounded Height Trees
- **标题**: 有限高度树最大/闭频繁树挖掘的复杂性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03436
> **作者**: Kenta Komoto,Kazuhiro Kurita,Hirotaka Ono
> **摘要**: 在本文中，我们解决了枚举所有频繁最大/闭树的问题。这是数据挖掘中的一个经典且核心的问题。尽管针对这个问题已经开发了许多实用算法，但其在树高“现实假设”下的复杂性尚未阐明。更具体地说，虽然众所周知，当树高至少为 60 时，挖掘问题会变得困难，但树高较小的情况的复杂性尚未阐明。我们通过在多种设置下建立这些树挖掘问题的结果来解决这一差距，包括有序和无序树，以及最大和封闭变体。
> **Abstract**: In this paper, we address the problem of enumerating all frequent maximal/closed trees. This is a classical and central problem in data mining. Although many practical algorithms have been developed for this problem, its complexity under ``realistic assumptions'' on tree height has not been clarified. More specifically, while it was known that the mining problem becomes hard when the tree height is at least 60, the complexity for cases where the tree height is smaller has not yet been clarified. We resolve this gap by establishing results for these tree mining problems under several settings, including ordered and unordered trees, as well as maximal and closed variants.

【2】Learning-augmented smooth integer programs with PAC-learnable oracles
- **标题**: 使用 PAC 可学习预言机的学习增强平滑整数程序
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02505
> **作者**: Hao-Yuan He,Ming Li
> **摘要**: 本文研究了平滑整数规划的学习增强算法，涵盖了 MAX-CUT 和 MAX-k-SAT 等典型问题。我们引入了一个框架，该框架结合了预测预言来构建目标的线性替代项，然后通过线性规划和舍入过程来解决该替代项。至关重要的是，我们的框架确保解决方案质量一致且平滑，避免出现预测错误。我们证明这种方法有效地将易处理的近似从经典致密区域扩展到近致密区域。此外，我们通过建立 PAC 的可学习性来超越预言机存在的假设。我们证明归纳算法类具有有界伪维数，从而确保可以使用多项式样本学习具有接近最佳预期性能的预言机。
> **Abstract**: This paper investigates learning-augmented algorithms for smooth integer programs, covering canonical problems such as MAX-CUT and MAX-k-SAT. We introduce a framework that incorporates a predictive oracle to construct a linear surrogate of the objective, which is then solved via linear programming followed by a rounding procedure. Crucially, our framework ensures that the solution quality is both consistent and smooth against prediction errors. We demonstrate that this approach effectively extends tractable approximations from the classical dense regime to the near-dense regime. Furthermore, we go beyond the assumption of oracle existence by establishing its PAC-learnability. We prove that the induced algorithm class possesses a bounded pseudo-dimension, thereby ensuring that an oracle with near-optimal expected performance can be learned with polynomial samples.

【3】A polynomial-time algorithm for recognizing high-bandwidth graphs
- **标题**: 识别高带宽图的多项式时间算法
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01755
> **作者**: Luis M. B. Varona
> **摘要**: $n$ 节点上的无权无向图 $G$ 被认为具有最多 $k$ 的 \emph{bandwidth}，如果其节点可以从 $0$ 标记到 $n - 1$，使得没有两个相邻节点的标签相差超过 $k$。我们知道，可以使用动态规划技术在$O(n^k)$时间和$O(n^k)$空间内决定$G$的带宽是否至多$k$。对于接近 $0$ 的小 $k$，此方法实际上是多项式，但随着 $k$ 随 $n$ 缩放，它变成超指数，需要高达 $O(n^{n - 1})$ 时间（其中 $n - 1$ 是最大可能带宽）。在本文中，我们针对足够大的 $k \ge \lfloor (n - 1)/2 \rfloor$ 重新表述了二分匹配问题，使我们能够使用霍尔婚姻定理来开发一种算法，该算法在 $O(n^{n - k + 1})$ 时间和 $O(n)$ 辅助空间（超出输入图的存储）中运行。这会产生接近 $n - 1$ 的大 $k$ 的多项式复杂度，表明只要 $k$ 或 $n - k$ 保持较小，带宽识别问题就可以在多项式时间内解决。
> **Abstract**: An unweighted, undirected graph $G$ on $n$ nodes is said to have \emph{bandwidth} at most $k$ if its nodes can be labelled from $0$ to $n - 1$ such that no two adjacent nodes have labels that differ by more than $k$. It is known that one can decide whether the bandwidth of $G$ is at most $k$ in $O(n^k)$ time and $O(n^k)$ space using dynamic programming techniques. For small $k$ close to $0$, this approach is effectively polynomial, but as $k$ scales with $n$, it becomes superexponential, requiring up to $O(n^{n - 1})$ time (where $n - 1$ is the maximum possible bandwidth). In this paper, we reformulate the problem in terms of bipartite matching for sufficiently large $k \ge \lfloor (n - 1)/2 \rfloor$, allowing us to use Hall's marriage theorem to develop an algorithm that runs in $O(n^{n - k + 1})$ time and $O(n)$ auxiliary space (beyond storage of the input graph). This yields polynomial complexity for large $k$ close to $n - 1$, demonstrating that the bandwidth recognition problem is solvable in polynomial time whenever either $k$ or $n - k$ remains small.

【4】A $5$-Approximation Analysis for the Cover Small Cuts Problem
- **标题**: 覆盖小切口问题的 5 美元近似分析
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01462
> **作者**: Miles Simmons,Ishan Bansal,Joe Cheriyan
> **摘要**: 在 Cover Small Cuts 问题中，我们给出一个有向（无向）图 $G=(V,E,u)$ 和一个阈值 $λ$，以及一组末端节点为 $V$ 的链接 $L$，以及每个链接 $\ell\in L$ 的非负成本；目标是找到一组最小成本的链路，使得小于 $λ$ 的每个非平凡的容量削减都被一个链路覆盖。 Bansal、Cheriyan、Grout 和 Ibrahimpur（arXiv：2209.11209，Algorithmica 2024）表明，由于 Williamson、Goemans、Mihail 和 Vazirani（Combinatorica，1995）的贡献，WGMV 原对偶算法对于 Cover Small Cuts 问题实现了 16 美元的近似率；他们的分析使用了满足组合性质的柔韧集合族的概念。后来，Bansal (arXiv:2308.15714v2, IPCO 2025) 和 Nutov (arXiv:2504.03910, MFCS 2025) 证明了相同的算法达到了 6$ 的近似率。我们证明，通过使用更强的概念，即满足对称性和结构子模性的柔韧集合族，相同的算法可以实现近似比 $5$。
> **Abstract**: In the Cover Small Cuts problem, we are given a capacitated (undirected) graph $G=(V,E,u)$ and a threshold value $λ$, as well as a set of links $L$ with end-nodes in $V$ and a non-negative cost for each link $\ell\in L$; the goal is to find a minimum-cost set of links such that each non-trivial cut of capacity less than $λ$ is covered by a link. Bansal, Cheriyan, Grout, and Ibrahimpur (arXiv:2209.11209, Algorithmica 2024) showed that the WGMV primal-dual algorithm, due to Williamson, Goemans, Mihail, and Vazirani (Combinatorica, 1995), achieves approximation ratio $16$ for the Cover Small Cuts problem; their analysis uses the notion of a pliable family of sets that satisfies a combinatorial property. Later, Bansal (arXiv:2308.15714v2, IPCO 2025) and then Nutov (arXiv:2504.03910, MFCS 2025) proved that the same algorithm achieves approximation ratio $6$. We show that the same algorithm achieves approximation ratio $5$, by using a stronger notion, namely, a pliable family of sets that satisfies symmetry and structural submodularity.

【5】Benchmarking of algorithms for set partitions
- **标题**: 集合划分算法的基准测试
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01350
> **作者**: Arnav Khinvasara,Alexander Pikovski
> **摘要**: 集合分区是将不同的对象排列成组。列出所有集合分区的问题在各种设置中都会出现，特别是在组合优化任务中。经过简短的回顾后，我们给出了用于确定小集和大集大小的集分区数量的实用近似公式。回顾了用于枚举所有集合分区的几种算法，并进行了基准测试。德约基奇等人的算法。建议实际使用。
> **Abstract**: Set partitions are arrangements of distinct objects into groups. The problem of listing all set partitions arises in a variety of settings, in particular in combinatorial optimization tasks. After a brief review, we give practical approximate formulas for determining the number of set partitions, both for small and large set sizes. Several algorithms for enumerating all set partitions are reviewed, and benchmarking tests were conducted. The algorithm of Djokic et al. is recommended for practical use.

【6】Fast $k$-means Seeding Under The Manifold Hypothesis
- **标题**: 快速$k$-意味着流形假设下的播种
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01104
> **作者**: Poojan Shah,Shashwat Agrawal,Ragesh Jaiswal
> **摘要**: 我们对 $k$-means 问题的最坏情况分析进行了研究，目标是对实践中出现的 $k$-means 的典型实例进行建模。现有的理论方法在某些假设下为 $k$ 均值的最优解决方案提供了保证，这使得它们难以在实践中验证。我们提出流形假设，其中在环境维度 $D$ 中获得的数据集中在内在维度 $d$ 的低维流形周围，作为建模现实世界聚类实例的合理假设。我们使用最佳量化理论中的技术，根据量化指数 $\varepsilon = 2/d$ 确定具有理论上可预测的缩放定律的数据集的关键几何属性。我们展示了如何利用这些规律来设计一种名为 $\operatorname{Qkmeans}$ 的快速播种方法，该方法及时为 $k$-means 问题提供 $O(ρ^{-2} \log k)$ 近似解 $O(nD) + \widetilde{O}(\varepsilon^{1+ρ}ρ^{-1}k^{1+γ})$；其中输入参数 $ρ< 1$ 的指数 $γ= \varepsilon + ρ$。这使我们能够获得新的运行时质量权衡。我们在各个领域进行了大规模的实证研究，以验证我们的理论预测和算法性能，以架起理论和实践的桥梁，以超越最坏情况的数据聚类。
> **Abstract**: We study beyond worst case analysis for the $k$-means problem where the goal is to model typical instances of $k$-means arising in practice. Existing theoretical approaches provide guarantees under certain assumptions on the optimal solutions to $k$-means, making them difficult to validate in practice. We propose the manifold hypothesis, where data obtained in ambient dimension $D$ concentrates around a low dimensional manifold of intrinsic dimension $d$, as a reasonable assumption to model real world clustering instances. We identify key geometric properties of datasets which have theoretically predictable scaling laws depending on the quantization exponent $\varepsilon = 2/d$ using techniques from optimum quantization theory. We show how to exploit these regularities to design a fast seeding method called $\operatorname{Qkmeans}$ which provides $O(ρ^{-2} \log k)$ approximate solutions to the $k$-means problem in time $O(nD) + \widetilde{O}(\varepsilon^{1+ρ}ρ^{-1}k^{1+γ})$; where the exponent $γ= \varepsilon + ρ$ for an input parameter $ρ< 1$. This allows us to obtain new runtime - quality tradeoffs. We perform a large scale empirical study across various domains to validate our theoretical predictions and algorithm performance to bridge theory and practice for beyond worst case data clustering.

## 新兴技术(cs.ET:Emerging Technologies)

【1】Governance at the Edge of Architecture: Regulating NeuroAI and Neuromorphic Systems
- **标题**: 架构边缘的治理：监管 NeuroAI 和神经形态系统
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01503
> **作者**: Afifah Kashif,Abdul Muhsin Hameed,Asim Iqbal
> **摘要**: 当前的人工智能治理框架，包括准确性、延迟和能源效率的监管基准，是为冯·诺依曼硬件上的静态、集中训练的人工神经网络构建的。神经人工智能系统体现在神经形态硬件中，并通过尖峰神经网络实现，打破了这些假设。本文探讨了 NeuroAI 当前人工智能治理框架的局限性，认为保证和审计方法必须与这些架构共同发展，将传统监管指标与物理、学习动态和类脑计算的具体效率相结合，以实现技术上可靠的保证。
> **Abstract**: Current AI governance frameworks, including regulatory benchmarks for accuracy, latency, and energy efficiency, are built for static, centrally trained artificial neural networks on von Neumann hardware. NeuroAI systems, embodied in neuromorphic hardware and implemented via spiking neural networks, break these assumptions. This paper examines the limitations of current AI governance frameworks for NeuroAI, arguing that assurance and audit methods must co-evolve with these architectures, aligning traditional regulatory metrics with the physics, learning dynamics, and embodied efficiency of brain-inspired computation to enable technically grounded assurance.

## 形式语言和自动机理论(cs.FL:Formal Languages and Automata Theory)

【1】Deciding Reachability and the Covering Problem with Diagnostics for Sound Acyclic Free-Choice Workflow Nets
- **标题**: 通过诊断确定健全非循环自由选择工作流网络的可达性和覆盖问题
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02447
> **作者**: Thomas M. Prinz,Christopher T. Schwanen,Wil M. P. van der Aalst
> **摘要**: Petri网理论中的一个核心决策问题是可达性，询问是否可以从初始标记到达给定标记。相关的是覆盖问题（或子标记可达性），它决定是否存在至少覆盖给定标记中的令牌的可达标记。对于实时和有界自由选择网络以及健全的自由选择工作流网络，这两个问题的计算复杂度都是多项式的。本文将声音非循环自由选择工作流网络类的复杂性细化为二次多项式，更具体地说为 $O(P^2 + T^2)$。此外，本文还展示了准确解释为什么给定标记可达或不可达的可行性。这可以通过三个新概念来实现：可接受性、最大可接受性和发散过渡。可接受性要求给定标记中的所有位置都是成对并发的。最大可接受性规定，在可接受的标记中添加标记位置将使其不可接受。发散转换是最初“产生”导致给定标记的并发标记的转换。在本文中，我们提供了所有这些概念的算法，并基于并发和后支配前沿的概念（编译器构造中众所周知的概念）详细解释了它们的计算。为此，我们提出了解决（子标记）可达性的直接实现。
> **Abstract**: A central decision problem in Petri net theory is reachability asking whether a given marking can be reached from the initial marking. Related is the covering problem (or sub-marking reachbility), which decides whether there is a reachable marking covering at least the tokens in the given marking. For live and bounded free-choice nets as well as for sound free-choice workflow nets, both problems are polynomial in their computational complexity. This paper refines this complexity for the class of sound acyclic free-choice workflow nets to a quadratic polynomial, more specifically to $O(P^2 + T^2)$. Furthermore, this paper shows the feasibility of accurately explaining why a given marking is or is not reachable. This can be achieved by three new concepts: admissibility, maximum admissibility, and diverging transitions. Admissibility requires that all places in a given marking are pairwise concurrent. Maximum admissibility states that adding a marked place to an admissible marking would make it inadmissible. A diverging transition is a transition which originally "produces" the concurrent tokens that lead to a given marking. In this paper, we provide algorithms for all these concepts and explain their computation in detail by basing them on the concepts of concurrency and post-dominance frontiers - a well known concept from compiler construction. In doing this, we present straight-forward implementations for solving (sub-marking) reachability.

## 图形(cs.GR:Graphics)

【1】Pi-GS: Sparse-View Gaussian Splatting with Dense π^3 Initialization
- **标题**: Pi-GS：具有密集 π^3 初始化的稀疏视图高斯泼溅
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03327
> **作者**: Manuel Hofer,Markus Steinberger,Thomas Köhler
> **摘要**: 新颖的视图合成发展迅速，从神经辐射场发展到 3D 高斯分布 (3DGS)，它提供实时渲染和快速训练，而不影响视觉保真度。然而，3DGS 严重依赖于准确的相机位姿和高质量的点云初始化，这在稀疏视图场景中很难获得。虽然传统的运动结构 (SfM) 管道在这些设置中经常失败，但现有的基于学习的点估计替代方案通常需要可靠的参考视图，并且对姿态或深度错误保持敏感。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用 π^3（一种无参考点云估计网络）的鲁棒方法。我们将 π^3 的密集初始化与旨在减轻几何误差的正则化方案相结合。具体来说，我们采用不确定性引导的深度监督、正态一致性损失和深度扭曲。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 Tanks 和 Temples、LLFF、DTU 和 MipNeRF360 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。
> **Abstract**: Novel view synthesis has evolved rapidly, advancing from Neural Radiance Fields to 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), which offers real-time rendering and rapid training without compromising visual fidelity. However, 3DGS relies heavily on accurate camera poses and high-quality point cloud initialization, which are difficult to obtain in sparse-view scenarios. While traditional Structure from Motion (SfM) pipelines often fail in these settings, existing learning-based point estimation alternatives typically require reliable reference views and remain sensitive to pose or depth errors. In this work, we propose a robust method utilizing π^3, a reference-free point cloud estimation network. We integrate dense initialization from π^3 with a regularization scheme designed to mitigate geometric inaccuracies. Specifically, we employ uncertainty-guided depth supervision, normal consistency loss, and depth warping. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Tanks and Temples, LLFF, DTU, and MipNeRF360 datasets.

【2】WebSplatter: Enabling Cross-Device Efficient Gaussian Splatting in Web Browsers via WebGPU
- **标题**: WebSplatter：通过 WebGPU 在 Web 浏览器中启用跨设备高效高斯泼溅
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03207
> **作者**: Yudong Han,Chao Xu,Xiaodan Ye,Weichen Bi,Zilong Dong,Yun Ma
> **摘要**: 我们推出了 WebSplatter，这是一个用于异构 Web 生态系统的端到端 GPU 渲染管道。与朴素的端口不同，WebSplatter 引入了一种无等待的分层基数排序，避免了 WebGPU 中全局原子的缺乏，确保跨不同硬件的确定性执行。此外，我们提出了一个不透明度感知的几何剔除阶段，该阶段可以在光栅化之前动态修剪图块，从而显着减少过度绘制和峰值内存占用。评估表明，WebSplatter 始终比最先进的 Web 查看器实现 1.2$\times$ 到 4.5$\times$ 的加速。
> **Abstract**: We present WebSplatter, an end-to-end GPU rendering pipeline for the heterogeneous web ecosystem. Unlike naive ports, WebSplatter introduces a wait-free hierarchical radix sort that circumvents the lack of global atomics in WebGPU, ensuring deterministic execution across diverse hardware. Furthermore, we propose an opacity-aware geometry culling stage that dynamically prunes splats before rasterization, significantly reducing overdraw and peak memory footprint. Evaluation demonstrates that WebSplatter consistently achieves 1.2$\times$ to 4.5$\times$ speedups over state-of-the-art web viewers.

【3】Genus-0 Surface Parameterization using Spherical Beltrami Differentials
- **标题**: 使用球面 Beltrami 微分进行 Genus-0 表面参数化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01589
> **作者**: Zhehao Xu,Lok Ming Lui
> **摘要**: 球面参数化是几何处理和成像科学中的基本工具。对于 gens-0 闭合曲面，许多高效的算法可以将曲面映射到球体；因此，一类广泛的任务驱动的 genus-0 映射问题可以简化为构建高质量的球形自映射。然而，现有方法经常面临满足任务目标（例如，地标或特征对齐）、保持双射性和控制几何失真之间的权衡。我们引入了球面贝尔特拉米微分（SBD），这是球体拟共形自映射的两图表示，并建立了其与球面同胚直至共形自同构的对应关系。在光谱贝尔特拉米网络（SBN）的基础上，我们提出了一种神经优化框架 BOOST，该框架优化半球立体图上的两个贝尔特拉米场，并通过显式的接缝感知约束强制执行全局一致性。大变形地标匹配和基于强度的球形配准的实验证明了我们提出的框架的有效性。我们进一步将该方法应用于大脑皮质表面配准、对齐脑沟标志并联合匹配皮质脑沟深度图，显示出通过受控失真和稳健的双射行为提高了任务保真度。
> **Abstract**: Spherical surface parameterization is a fundamental tool in geometry processing and imaging science. For a genus-0 closed surface, many efficient algorithms can map the surface to the sphere; consequently, a broad class of task-driven genus-0 mapping problems can be reduced to constructing a high-quality spherical self-map. However, existing approaches often face a trade-off between satisfying task objectives (e.g., landmark or feature alignment), maintaining bijectivity, and controlling geometric distortion. We introduce the Spherical Beltrami Differential (SBD), a two-chart representation of quasiconformal self-maps of the sphere, and establish its correspondence with spherical homeomorphisms up to conformal automorphisms. Building on the Spectral Beltrami Network (SBN), we propose a neural optimization framework BOOST that optimizes two Beltrami fields on hemispherical stereographic charts and enforces global consistency through explicit seam-aware constraints. Experiments on large-deformation landmark matching and intensity-based spherical registration demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework. We further apply the method to brain cortical surface registration, aligning sulcal landmarks and jointly matching cortical sulci depth maps, showing improved task fidelity with controlled distortion and robust bijective behavior.

## 计算机科学与博弈论(cs.GT:Computer Science and Game Theory)

【1】Toward a Sustainable Federated Learning Ecosystem: A Practical Least Core Mechanism for Payoff Allocation
- **标题**: 迈向可持续的联邦学习生态系统：一种实用的最小核心回报分配机制
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03387
> **作者**: Zhengwei Ni,Zhidu Li,Wei Chen,Zhaoyang Zhang,Zehua Wang,F. Richard Yu,Victor C. M. Leung
> **摘要**: 新兴网络范例和应用程序越来越依赖联邦学习 (FL) 来实现协作智能，同时保护隐私。然而，这种协作环境的可持续性取决于公平、稳定的收益分配机制。本文着眼于联盟稳定性，引入了基于最小核心（LC）概念的收益分配框架。与传统方法不同，LC 通过最小化所有潜在子群体之间的最大不满来优先考虑联盟的凝聚力，确保没有参与者有脱离的动力。为了使这种博弈论概念适应实际的大规模网络，我们提出了一种基于堆栈的剪枝算法的简化实现，有效地平衡了计算效率和分配精度。联合入侵检测的案例研究表明，我们的机制正确识别了关键贡献者和战略联盟。结果证实，实用的 LC 框架促进了稳定的协作并培育了可持续的 FL 生态系统。
> **Abstract**: Emerging network paradigms and applications increasingly rely on federated learning (FL) to enable collaborative intelligence while preserving privacy. However, the sustainability of such collaborative environments hinges on a fair and stable payoff allocation mechanism. Focusing on coalition stability, this paper introduces a payoff allocation framework based on the least core (LC) concept. Unlike traditional methods, the LC prioritizes the cohesion of the federation by minimizing the maximum dissatisfaction among all potential subgroups, ensuring that no participant has an incentive to break away. To adapt this game-theoretic concept to practical, large-scale networks, we propose a streamlined implementation with a stack-based pruning algorithm, effectively balancing computational efficiency with allocation precision. Case studies in federated intrusion detection demonstrate that our mechanism correctly identifies pivotal contributors and strategic alliances. The results confirm that the practical LC framework promotes stable collaboration and fosters a sustainable FL ecosystem.

【2】Internet of Agentic AI: Incentive-Compatible Distributed Teaming and Workflow
- **标题**: 代理人工智能互联网：激励兼容的分布式团队和工作流程
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03145
> **作者**: Ya-Ting Yang,Quanyan Zhu
> **摘要**: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 启用了一类新型代理 AI 系统，可以通过调用外部工具进行推理、计划和操作。然而，大多数现有的代理架构仍然是集中式和单一的，限制了可扩展性、专业化和互操作性。本文提出了一个可扩展的代理智能框架，称为代理人工智能互联网，其中分布在云和边缘基础设施上的自治、异构代理动态地形成联盟来执行任务驱动的工作流。我们形式化了代理协作的网络原生模型，并引入了一种激励兼容的工作流联盟可行性框架，该框架集成了能力覆盖范围、网络局部性和经济可实施性。为了实现可扩展的协调，我们制定了一个最小努力的联盟选择问题，并提出了一种去中心化的联盟形成算法。所提出的框架可以作为模型上下文协议（MCP）之上的协调层运行。医疗保健案例研究展示了领域专业化、云边缘异构性和动态联盟形成如何实现可扩展、有弹性且经济可行的代理工作流程。这项工作为代理人工智能互联网新兴时代的原则性协调和可扩展性奠定了基础。
> **Abstract**: Large language models (LLMs) have enabled a new class of agentic AI systems that reason, plan, and act by invoking external tools. However, most existing agentic architectures remain centralized and monolithic, limiting scalability, specialization, and interoperability. This paper proposes a framework for scalable agentic intelligence, termed the Internet of Agentic AI, in which autonomous, heterogeneous agents distributed across cloud and edge infrastructure dynamically form coalitions to execute task-driven workflows. We formalize a network-native model of agentic collaboration and introduce an incentive-compatible workflow-coalition feasibility framework that integrates capability coverage, network locality, and economic implementability. To enable scalable coordination, we formulate a minimum-effort coalition selection problem and propose a decentralized coalition formation algorithm. The proposed framework can operate as a coordination layer above the Model Context Protocol (MCP). A healthcare case study demonstrates how domain specialization, cloud-edge heterogeneity, and dynamic coalition formation enable scalable, resilient, and economically viable agentic workflows. This work lays the foundation for principled coordination and scalability in the emerging era of Internet of Agentic AI.

【3】Stable Matching with Predictions: Robustness and Efficiency under Pruned Preferences
- **标题**: 与预测的稳定匹配：修剪偏好下的鲁棒性和效率
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02254
> **作者**: Samuel McCauley,Benjamin Moseley,Helia Niaparast,Shikha Singh
> **摘要**: 在本文中，我们研究了在双边匹配市场中寻找稳定匹配的基本问题。在经典变体中，假设市场双方都提交了另一方所有代理商的排名列表。然而，在国家住院医师匹配计划（NRMP）等大型匹配市场中，医院对每位住院医师进行访谈或相互排名是不可行的。在本文中，我们研究了截断偏好列表的稳定匹配问题。特别是，我们假设，根据历史数据集，每家医院都有其可能匹配的预测排名，并且仅对该预测周围有限区间内的居民进行排名。我们使用带有预测的算法框架，并表明用于计算稳定匹配的经典延迟接受（DA）算法对于此类截断具有鲁棒性。我们提出了两种算法，并从理论上和实证上评估了它们的性能。我们的结果表明，即使有相当准确的预测，也可以显着减少实例大小（偏好列表的长度）以及提出的建议数量。这些结果解释了 DA 算法的实际成功，并将市场设计与新兴的算法理论和预测联系起来。
> **Abstract**: In this paper, we study the fundamental problem of finding a stable matching in two-sided matching markets. In the classic variant, it is assumed that both sides of the market submit a ranked list of all agents on the other side. However, in large matching markets such as the National Resident Matching Program (NRMP), it is infeasible for hospitals to interview or mutually rank each resident. In this paper, we study the stable matching problem with truncated preference lists. In particular, we assume that, based on historical datasets, each hospital has a predicted rank of its likely match and only ranks residents within a bounded interval around that prediction. We use the algorithms-with-predictions framework and show that the classic deferred-acceptance (DA) algorithm used to compute stable matchings is robust to such truncation. We present two algorithms and theoretically and empirically evaluate their performance. Our results show that even with reasonably accurate predictions, it is possible to significantly cut down on both instance size (the length of preference lists) as well as the number of proposals made. These results explain the practical success of the DA algorithm and connect market design to the emerging theory of algorithms with predictions.

【4】Efficiently Solving Mixed-Hierarchy Games with Quasi-Policy Approximations
- **标题**: 使用准策略近似有效解决混合层次博弈
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01568
> **作者**: Hamzah Khan,Dong Ho Lee,Jingqi Li,Tianyu Qiu,Christian Ellis,Jesse Milzman,Wesley Suttle,David Fridovich-Keil
> **摘要**: 多机器人协调通常呈现层次结构，一些机器人的决策取决于其他机器人的计划行为。虽然博弈论为此类交互提供了原则框架，但现有的求解器很难处理结合同时（纳什）和分层（斯塔克尔伯格）决策的混合信息结构。我们研究了 N 机器人森林结构的混合层次博弈，其中每个机器人充当其子树上的 Stackelberg 领导者，而不同分支中的机器人通过纳什均衡进行交互。我们推导了此类博弈的 Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) 一阶最优条件，并表明随着层次深度的增长，它们涉及机器人最佳响应策略的高阶导数越来越多，使得直接解决方案变得棘手。为了克服这一挑战，我们引入了一种准策略近似，它消除了高阶策略导数，并开发了一种不精确的牛顿方法来有效地求解所得的近似 KKT 系统。我们证明了所提出的算法对于具有非二次目标和非线性约束的游戏的局部指数收敛性。该方法在高度优化的 Julia 库 (MixedHierarchyGames.jl) 中实现，并在模拟实验中进行评估，展示了复杂混合层次结构信息结构的实时收敛。
> **Abstract**: Multi-robot coordination often exhibits hierarchical structure, with some robots' decisions depending on the planned behaviors of others. While game theory provides a principled framework for such interactions, existing solvers struggle to handle mixed information structures that combine simultaneous (Nash) and hierarchical (Stackelberg) decision-making. We study N-robot forest-structured mixed-hierarchy games, in which each robot acts as a Stackelberg leader over its subtree while robots in different branches interact via Nash equilibria. We derive the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) first-order optimality conditions for this class of games and show that they involve increasingly high-order derivatives of robots' best-response policies as the hierarchy depth grows, rendering a direct solution intractable. To overcome this challenge, we introduce a quasi-policy approximation that removes higher-order policy derivatives and develop an inexact Newton method for efficiently solving the resulting approximated KKT systems. We prove local exponential convergence of the proposed algorithm for games with non-quadratic objectives and nonlinear constraints. The approach is implemented in a highly optimized Julia library (MixedHierarchyGames.jl) and evaluated in simulated experiments, demonstrating real-time convergence for complex mixed-hierarchy information structures.

## 人机交互(cs.HC:Human-Computer Interaction)

【1】TactDeform: Finger Pad Deformation Inspired Spatial Tactile Feedback for Virtual Geometry Exploration
- **标题**: TactDeform：指垫变形激发空间触觉反馈，用于虚拟几何探索
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03476
> **作者**: Yihao Dong,Praneeth Bimsara Perera,Chin-Teng Lin,Craig T Jin,Anusha Withana
> **摘要**: 空间触觉反馈可以增强虚拟现实应用中几何探索的真实感。当前的振动触觉方法经常面临渲染不同 3D 几何形状所需的空间和时间分辨率的挑战。受到探索 3D 物体和表面时指垫自然变形的启发，我们提出了 TactDeform，这是一种使用手指佩戴的电触觉界面渲染时空触觉图案的参数化方法。该系统基于交互上下文（接近、接触和滑动）和几何上下文（几何特征和纹理）动态渲染电触觉图案，模拟现实世界触摸探索期间发生的变形。用户研究的结果\rr{(N=24)}表明，与基线相比，所提出的方法能够实现高纹理辨别和几何特征识别。根据免费 3D 几何探索阶段的结果，我们提供可为未来触觉界面设计提供信息的见解。
> **Abstract**: Spatial tactile feedback can enhance the realism of geometry exploration in virtual reality applications. Current vibrotactile approaches often face challenges with the spatial and temporal resolution needed to render different 3D geometries. Inspired by the natural deformation of finger pads when exploring 3D objects and surfaces, we propose TactDeform, a parametric approach to render spatio-temporal tactile patterns using a finger-worn electro-tactile interface. The system dynamically renders electro-tactile patterns based on both interaction contexts (approaching, contact, and sliding) and geometric contexts (geometric features and textures), emulating deformations that occur during real-world touch exploration. Results from a user study \rr{(N=24)} show that the proposed approach enabled high texture discrimination and geometric feature identification compared to a baseline. Informed by results from a free 3D-geometry exploration phase, we provide insights that can inform future tactile interface designs.

【2】How do people watch AI-generated videos of physical scenes?
- **标题**: 人们如何观看人工智能生成的物理场景视频？
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03374
> **作者**: Danqing Shi,Lan Jiang,Katherine M. Collins,Shangzhe Wu,Ayush Tewari,Miri Zilka
> **摘要**: 人工智能生成的真实视频在媒体平台上日益盛行，事实与虚构之间的界限日益模糊，削弱了公众的信任。了解人们如何观看人工智能生成的视频，为改进人工智能检测和指导视频生成的进步提供了以人为本的视角。然而，现有研究尚未调查人类对人工智能生成的物理场景视频的注视行为。在这里，我们收集并分析了 40 名参与者在视频理解和 AI 检测任务中的眼球运动，这些任务涉及现实世界和 AI 生成的视频的混合。我们发现，鉴于人工智能生成的视频具有高度真实性，注视行为较少受视频的实际真实性驱动，而更多地受观看者对其真实性的感知所驱动。我们的结果表明，仅仅意识到潜在的人工智能生成可能会将媒体消费从被动观看转变为主动寻找异常现象。
> **Abstract**: The growing prevalence of realistic AI-generated videos on media platforms increasingly blurs the line between fact and fiction, eroding public trust. Understanding how people watch AI-generated videos offers a human-centered perspective for improving AI detection and guiding advancements in video generation. However, existing studies have not investigated human gaze behavior in response to AI-generated videos of physical scenes. Here, we collect and analyze the eye movements from 40 participants during video understanding and AI detection tasks involving a mix of real-world and AI-generated videos. We find that given the high realism of AI-generated videos, gaze behavior is driven less by the video's actual authenticity and more by the viewer's perception of its authenticity. Our results demonstrate that the mere awareness of potential AI generation may alter media consumption from passive viewing into an active search for anomalies.

【3】Exploring the Role of Tracing in AI-Supported Planning for Algorithmic Reasoning
- **标题**: 探索追踪在人工智能支持的算法推理规划中的作用
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03197
> **作者**: Yoshee Jain,Heejin Do,Zihan Wu,April Yi Wang
> **摘要**: 人工智能驱动的规划工具有望在编码之前对编程学习者的思维过程提供早期的、形成性的反馈，从而为编程学习者提供支持。然而，迄今为止，大多数人工智能支持的规划工具都依赖于学生的自然语言解释，使用法学硕士来解释学习者对其算法意图的描述。在基于法学硕士的系统出现之前，计算机科学教育研究广泛研究了纸笔环境中基于轨迹的规划，证明通过具有明确状态转换的逐步执行进行推理有助于学习者建立和完善程序行为的心理模型。尽管追踪具有潜力，但人们对追踪如何与人工智能介导的反馈相互作用以及将追踪集成到人工智能支持的规划工具中是否会导致与单独基于自然语言的规划相比是否会导致不同的学习过程或交互动态知之甚少。我们研究要求学习者使用人工智能支持的规划工具产生明确的执行轨迹如何影响他们的算法推理。在一项有 20 名学生参加的跨学科研究中，追踪使学习者从类似代码的逐行描述转向更多以目标驱动的关于程序行为的推理。此外，它导致了更一致的部分正确解决方案，尽管最终的编码性能在不同条件下仍然具有可比性。值得注意的是，追踪并没有显着影响法学硕士生成的反馈的质量或可靠性。这些发现揭示了将跟踪与人工智能支持的规划相结合的权衡，并为集成自然语言、跟踪和编码以支持整个编程过程中的迭代推理提供了设计指南。
> **Abstract**: AI-powered planning tools show promise in supporting programming learners by enabling early, formative feedback on their thinking processes prior to coding. To date, however, most AI-supported planning tools rely on students' natural-language explanations, using LLMs to interpret learners' descriptions of their algorithmic intent. Prior to the emergence of LLM-based systems, CS education research extensively studied trace-based planning in pen-and-paper settings, demonstrating that reasoning through stepwise execution with explicit state transitions helps learners build and refine mental models of program behavior. Despite its potential, little is known about how tracing interacts with AI-mediated feedback and whether integrating tracing into AI-supported planning tools leads to different learning processes or interaction dynamics compared to natural-language-based planning alone. We study how requiring learners to produce explicit execution traces with an AI-supported planning tool affects their algorithmic reasoning. In a between-subjects study with 20 students, tracing shifted learners away from code-like, line-by-line descriptions toward more goal-driven reasoning about program behavior. Moreover, it led to more consistent partially correct solutions, although final coding performance remained comparable across conditions. Notably, tracing did not significantly affect the quality or reliability of LLM-generated feedback. These findings reveal tradeoffs in combining tracing with AI-supported planning and inform design guidelines for integrating natural language, tracing, and coding to support iterative reasoning throughout the programming process.

【4】Is It Possible to Make Chatbots Virtuous? Investigating a Virtue-Based Design Methodology Applied to LLMs
- **标题**: 聊天机器人有可能变得善良吗？研究应用于法学硕士的基于美德的设计方法
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03155
> **作者**: Matthew P. Lad,Louisa Conwill,Megan Levis Scheirer
> **摘要**: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）的快速发展，对其社会影响的批评也随之增加。 Responsible AI (RAI) 的工作重点是开发旨在减少伤害的人工智能系统。为了回应 RAI 的批评以及将智慧传统带入 HCI 的需要，我们将 Conwill 等人的美德引导技术设计方法应用于法学硕士。我们为法学硕士列出了新的道德设计模式，并通过与技术专家的访谈对其进行了评估。参与者认为这些模式提供了更高的准确性和稳健性、更好的安全性、新的研究机会、增加的访问和控制以及减少的浪费。他们担心这些模式可能容易被越狱，过于广泛地推广模型，并且存在潜在的实施问题。总体而言，参与者反应积极，同时也承认道德法学硕士设计所涉及的权衡。
> **Abstract**: With the rapid growth of Large Language Models (LLMs), criticism of their societal impact has also grown. Work in Responsible AI (RAI) has focused on the development of AI systems aimed at reducing harm. Responding to RAI's criticisms and the need to bring the wisdom traditions into HCI, we apply Conwill et al.'s Virtue-Guided Technology Design method to LLMs. We cataloged new ethical design patterns for LLMs and evaluated them through interviews with technologists. Participants valued that the patterns provided more accuracy and robustness, better safety, new research opportunities, increased access and control, and reduced waste. Their concerns were that the patterns could be vulnerable to jailbreaking, were generalizing models too widely, and had potential implementation issues. Overall, participants reacted positively while also acknowledging the tradeoffs involved in ethical LLM design.

【5】Intelligent Front-End Personalization: AI-Driven UI Adaptation
- **标题**: 智能前端个性化：AI驱动的UI适配
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03154
> **作者**: Mona Rajhans
> **摘要**: 前端个性化传统上依赖于静态设计或基于规则的适应，无法完全捕捉用户行为模式。本文提出了一种人工智能驱动的动态前端个性化方法，其中 UI 布局、内容和功能根据预测的用户行为实时调整。我们提出了三种策略：使用用户路径预测的动态布局适应、通过强化学习进行内容优先级以及人工智能驱动与基于规则的个性化的比较分析。提供技术实现细节、算法、系统架构和评估方法来说明可行性和性能增益。
> **Abstract**: Front-end personalization has traditionally relied on static designs or rule-based adaptations, which fail to fully capture user behavior patterns. This paper presents an AI driven approach for dynamic front-end personalization, where UI layouts, content, and features adapt in real-time based on predicted user behavior. We propose three strategies: dynamic layout adaptation using user path prediction, content prioritization through reinforcement learning, and a comparative analysis of AI-driven vs. rule-based personalization. Technical implementation details, algorithms, system architecture, and evaluation methods are provided to illustrate feasibility and performance gains.

【6】Behind the Feed: A Taxonomy of User-Facing Cues for Algorithmic Transparency in Social Media
- **标题**: Feed 背后：社交媒体算法透明度的面向用户线索的分类
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03121
> **作者**: Haoze Guo,Ziqi Wei
> **摘要**: 使用社交媒体的人们正在了解运营这些平台的公司如何通过每个社交媒体网站界面 (UI) 中的视觉指示器来决定谁可以看到什么内容。这些指示器对于每个平台来说都是不同的，并且并不总是位于网站上易于找到的位置。因此，人们很难比较不同的社交媒体平台或确定透明度是否会带来更大的责任，还是只会增加理解。我们开发了一种新的分类系统，以帮助提供一种标准的分类方式，算法通过 UI 元素呈现，以及公司是否提供了任何类型的解释来解释它们的特色。这个新的分类系统包括以下三个发展领域：设计形式、信息内容和用户代理。这个新的分类系统可以应用于当前可用的六个社交媒体平台，并用作识别每个社交媒体平台用户界面中常见功能原型的参考数据库。新的分类系统将有助于确定算法的透明度是否按照其开发时的预期方式发挥作用，并提供未来的设计思路，有助于提高算法的可检查性、可操作性和可竞争性。
> **Abstract**: People who use social media are learning about how the companies that run these platforms make their decisions on who gets to see what through visual indicators in the interface (UI) of each social media site. These indicators are different for each platform and are not always located in an easy-to-find location on the site. Therefore, it is hard for someone to compare different social media platforms or determine whether transparency leads to greater accountability or only leads to increased understanding. A new classification system has been developed to help provide a standard way of categorizing the way, that an algorithm is presented through UI elements and whether the company has provided any type of explanation as to why they are featured. This new classification system includes the following three areas of development: design form, information content, and user agency. This new classification system can be applied to the six social media platforms currently available and serves as a reference database for identifying common archetypes of features in the each social media platform's UI. The new classification system will assist in determining whether or not the transparency of an algorithm functions the way that it was intended when it was developed and provide future design ideas that can help improve the inspectibility, actionability, and contestability of algorithms.

【7】"I'm happy even though it's not real": GenAI Photo Editing as a Remembering Experience
- **标题**: “即使这不是真实的，我也很高兴”：GenAI 照片编辑作为一种记忆体验
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03104
> **作者**: Yufeng Wu,Qing Li,Elise van den Hoven,Baki Kocaballi
> **摘要**: 生成人工智能 (GenAI) 越来越多地集成到个人设备上的照片应用程序中，使编辑照片变得比以往更容易，同时可能影响它们所代表的记忆。这项研究探讨了人们如何以及为何使用 GenAI 编辑个人照片，以及这如何塑造他们的记忆体验。我们对 12 名参与者进行了一项两阶段的定性研究：使用 GenAI 工具进行照片编辑，该工具以记忆体验 (RX) 维度为指导，随后进行半结构化访谈，参与者反思编辑过程和结果。研究结果表明，参与者优先考虑的是感觉记忆而不是事实准确性。对于不同的照片元素，环境很容易修改，但如果涉及到人物的身份，编辑就被认为是不可接受的。编辑过程带来了积极和消极的影响，它本身也成为了一种记忆经历。我们进一步讨论了 GenAI 编辑用于记忆目的的潜在好处和风险，并提出了负责任的 GenAI 的设计含义。
> **Abstract**: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) is increasingly integrated into photo applications on personal devices, making editing photographs easier than ever while potentially influencing the memories they represent. This study explores how and why people use GenAI to edit personal photos and how this shapes their remembering experience. We conducted a two-phase qualitative study with 12 participants: a photo editing session using a GenAI tool guided by the Remembering Experience (RX) dimensions, followed by semi-structured interviews where participants reflected on the editing process and results. Findings show that participants prioritised felt memory over factual accuracy. For different photo elements, environments were modified easily, however, editing was deemed unacceptable if it touched upon a person's identity. Editing processes brought positive and negative impacts, and itself also became a remembering experience. We further discuss potential benefits and risks of GenAI editing for remembering purposes and propose design implications for responsible GenAI.

【8】Gen-Diaolou: An Integrated AI-Assisted Interactive System for Diachronic Understanding and Preservation of the Kaiping Diaolou
- **标题**: Gen-碉楼：人工智能辅助的综合互动系统，用于了解和保护开平碉楼的历时性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03095
> **作者**: Lei Han,Yi Gao,Xuanchen Lu,Bingyuan Wang,Lujin Zhang,Zeyu Wang,David Yip
> **摘要**: 开平碉楼和村落被联合国教科文组织列为世界遗产，是移民文化塑造的中西混合建筑的典范。然而，建筑遗产参与经常面临真实性争论、资源限制和有限的参与方式。本研究探讨了利用人工智能 (AI) 处理建筑遗产的当前挑战，以及人工智能辅助交互系统如何促进文化遗产理解和保护意识。我们进行了一项形成性研究（N=14），以揭示遗产利益相关者为设计提供信息的经验见解。这些见解为根碉楼的设计提供了参考，这是一个支持遗产理解和保护的集成人工智能辅助交互系统。试点研究 (N=18) 和博物馆实地研究 (N=26) 提供了一致的证据，表明根碉楼可以支持游客的历时理解和保护意识，并共同为未来数字文化遗产参与的人机协作系统提供设计启示。更广泛地说，这项工作弥合了人机交互领域被动遗产系统和不受约束的创意工具之间的研究差距。
> **Abstract**: The Kaiping Diaolou and Villages, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, exemplify hybrid Chinese and Western architecture shaped by migration culture. However, architectural heritage engagement often faces authenticity debates, resource constraints, and limited participatory approaches. This research explores current challenges of leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI) for architectural heritage, and how AI-assisted interactive systems can foster cultural heritage understanding and preservation awareness. We conducted a formative study (N=14) to uncover empirical insights from heritage stakeholders that inform design. These insights informed the design of Gen-Diaolou, an integrated AI-assisted interactive system that supports heritage understanding and preservation. A pilot study (N=18) and a museum field study (N=26) provided converging evidence suggesting that Gen-Diaolou may support visitors' diachronic understanding and preservation awareness, and together informed design implications for future human-AI collaborative systems for digital cultural heritage engagement. More broadly, this work bridges the research gap between passive heritage systems and unconstrained creative tools in the HCI domain.

【9】From Speech-to-Spatial: Grounding Utterances on A Live Shared View with Augmented Reality
- **标题**: 从语音到空间：通过增强现实将话语扎根于实时共享视图
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03059
> **作者**: Yoonsang Kim,Divyansh Pradhan,Devshree Jadeja,Arie Kaufman
> **摘要**: 我们引入了 Speech-to-Spatial，这是一种指代消歧框架，可将口头远程协助指令转换为基于空间的 AR 指导。与依赖额外提示（例如手势、凝视）或专家手动注释的现有系统不同，语音到空间仅从语音参考（语音输入）推断预期目标。在我们对语音引用模式的形成性研究的推动下，我们描述了人们指定目标的重复方式（直接属性、关系、记忆和链接），并将它们基于我们以对象为中心的关系图。给定一个话语，所指线索会被解析并呈现为持久的原位 AR 视觉引导，从而减少远程引导期间的迭代微引导（“再向右一点”、“现在，停止。”）。我们通过远程指导协助和意图消歧场景展示了我们系统的用例。我们的评估表明，与传统的纯语音基线相比，Speechto-Spatial 提高了任务效率，减少了认知负荷，并增强了可用性，将无形的口头指令转变为实时共享视图上的视觉上可解释的、可操作的指导。
> **Abstract**: We introduce Speech-to-Spatial, a referent disambiguation framework that converts verbal remote-assistance instructions into spatially grounded AR guidance. Unlike prior systems that rely on additional cues (e.g., gesture, gaze) or manual expert annotations, Speech-to-Spatial infers the intended target solely from spoken references (speech input). Motivated by our formative study of speech referencing patterns, we characterize recurring ways people specify targets (Direct Attribute, Relational, Remembrance, and Chained) and ground them to our object-centric relational graph. Given an utterance, referent cues are parsed and rendered as persistent in-situ AR visual guidance, reducing iterative micro-guidance ("a bit more to the right", "now, stop.") during remote guidance. We demonstrate the use cases of our system with remote guided assistance and intent disambiguation scenarios. Our evaluation shows that Speechto-Spatial improves task efficiency, reduces cognitive load, and enhances usability compared to a conventional voice-only baseline, transforming disembodied verbal instruction into visually explainable, actionable guidance on a live shared view.

【10】Towards Considerate Embodied AI: Co-Designing Situated Multi-Site Healthcare Robots from Abstract Concepts to High-Fidelity Prototypes
- **标题**: 迈向体贴的具体化人工智能：从抽象概念到高保真原型共同设计定位多站点医疗机器人
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03054
> **作者**: Yuanchen Bai,Ruixiang Han,Niti Parikh,Wendy Ju,Angelique Taylor
> **摘要**: 协同设计对于在现实环境中落地人工智能 (AI) 系统至关重要，尤其是医疗保健等高风险领域。虽然之前的工作探索了多学科协作、迭代原型设计以及对非技术参与者的支持，但很少有人将这些融入到持续的协同设计过程中。此类努力通常针对一种背景和低保真度阶段，限制了研究结果的普遍性并模糊了参与者想法的演变。为了解决这些局限性，我们与由 22 名参与者组成的多学科团队举办了为期 14 周的研讨会，重点讨论了人工智能如何减少三个医疗机构中的非增值任务负担：急诊科、长期康复设施和睡眠障碍诊所。我们发现，在教育支架的支持下，从抽象的头脑风暴到高保真原型的迭代过程使参与者能够理解现实世界的权衡并生成更多可部署的解决方案。我们提出了八项指导方针，用于共同设计更周到的具体人工智能：适应环境、响应社会动态、牢记期望、扎根于部署。项目页面：https://byc-sophie.github.io/Towards-Considerate-Embodied-AI/
> **Abstract**: Co-design is essential for grounding embodied artificial intelligence (AI) systems in real-world contexts, especially high-stakes domains such as healthcare. While prior work has explored multidisciplinary collaboration, iterative prototyping, and support for non-technical participants, few have interwoven these into a sustained co-design process. Such efforts often target one context and low-fidelity stages, limiting the generalizability of findings and obscuring how participants' ideas evolve. To address these limitations, we conducted a 14-week workshop with a multidisciplinary team of 22 participants, centered around how embodied AI can reduce non-value-added task burdens in three healthcare settings: emergency departments, long-term rehabilitation facilities, and sleep disorder clinics. We found that the iterative progression from abstract brainstorming to high-fidelity prototypes, supported by educational scaffolds, enabled participants to understand real-world trade-offs and generate more deployable solutions. We propose eight guidelines for co-designing more considerate embodied AI: attuned to context, responsive to social dynamics, mindful of expectations, and grounded in deployment. Project Page: https://byc-sophie.github.io/Towards-Considerate-Embodied-AI/

【11】Invisible Users in Digital Health: A Scoping Review of Digital Interventions to Promote Physical Activity Among Culturally and Linguistically Diverse Women
- **标题**: 数字健康中的隐形用户：促进文化和语言多元化女性身体活动的数字干预措施范围审查
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02982
> **作者**: Yilin Ke,Yun Suen Pai,Burkhard C. Wuensche,Angus Donald Campbell,Mairi Gunn
> **摘要**: 数字健康在促进身体活动 (PA) 方面具有巨大潜力，但干预措施往往无法维持文化和语言多元化 (CALD) 女性的参与。先前的审查侧重于短期功效或表面本地化，而以设计为导向的深层文化适应和长期策略的综合仍然有限。这项范围界定审查系统地筛选了 1968 年的记录，分析了 18 项研究，并确定了一个关键的设计悖论：技术解决方案主义系统忽视了社会和文化障碍，而社交支持功能往往在低活跃度的社交网络中失败。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了文化嵌入互动框架，整合了五个维度：基于文化的测量、多模态互动、情境和时间适应性、嵌入的社会编织和理论引导的文化适应。该框架通过将行为理论映射到支持持续和文化多元化参与的设计机制，超越了以可访问性为中心的方法。我们提供可行的设计原则，帮助人机交互研究人员和从业者从一刀切的模型转向适应性强、基于理论和文化可持续的设计。
> **Abstract**: Digital health has strong potential for promoting physical activity (PA), yet interventions often fail to sustain engagement among culturally and linguistically diverse (CALD) women. Prior reviews focus on short-term efficacy or surface-level localisation, while a design-oriented synthesis of deep cultural adaptation and long-term strategies remain limited. This scoping review systematically screened 1968 records, analysed 18 studies and identified a critical design paradox: techno-solutionist systems overlook social and cultural barriers, while social-support features often fail in low-activity social networks. To address this gap, we propose the Culturally Embedded Interaction Framework, integrating five dimensions: culturally-grounded measurement, multi-modal interaction, contextual and temporal adaptability, embedded social weaving, and theory-guided cultural adaptation. The framework advances beyond accessibility-focused approaches by mapping behavioural theory to design mechanisms that support sustained and culturally plural participation. We provide actionable design principles to help HCI researchers and practitioners move from one-size-fits-all models toward adaptive, theory-informed, and culturally sustaining design.

【12】Simulating Human Audiovisual Search Behavior
- **标题**: 模拟人类视听搜索行为
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02790
> **作者**: Hyunsung Cho,Xuejing Luo,Byungjoo Lee,David Lindlbauer,Antti Oulasvirta
> **摘要**: 根据听觉和视觉提示$\unicode{x2013}$定位目标，例如在拥挤的停车场找到汽车或在虚拟会议中识别发言人$\unicode{x2013}$需要在不确定性下平衡精力、时间和准确性。现有的视听搜索模型通常孤立地对待感知和行动，忽视了人们如何适应性地协调运动和感官策略。我们提出 Sensonaut，一种体现视听搜索的计算模型。核心假设是，人们以他们认为最有效地提高定位目标机会的方式部署他们的身体和感觉系统，在感知约束下权衡时间和精力。我们的模型将其表述为部分可观察性下的资源理性决策问题。我们根据新收集的人类数据验证了该模型，表明它可以在任务复杂性、遮挡和干扰以及特征人为错误的情况下再现搜索时间和工作量的自适应缩放。我们对类人资源理性搜索的模拟为视听界面的设计提供了信息，从而最大限度地减少搜索成本和认知负荷。
> **Abstract**: Locating a target based on auditory and visual cues$\unicode{x2013}$such as finding a car in a crowded parking lot or identifying a speaker in a virtual meeting$\unicode{x2013}$requires balancing effort, time, and accuracy under uncertainty. Existing models of audiovisual search often treat perception and action in isolation, overlooking how people adaptively coordinate movement and sensory strategies. We present Sensonaut, a computational model of embodied audiovisual search. The core assumption is that people deploy their body and sensory systems in ways they believe will most efficiently improve their chances of locating a target, trading off time and effort under perceptual constraints. Our model formulates this as a resource-rational decision-making problem under partial observability. We validate the model against newly collected human data, showing that it reproduces both adaptive scaling of search time and effort under task complexity, occlusion, and distraction, and characteristic human errors. Our simulation of human-like resource-rational search informs the design of audiovisual interfaces that minimize search cost and cognitive load.

【13】Smell with Genji: Rediscovering Human Perception through an Olfactory Game with AI
- **标题**: 与源氏一起嗅觉：通过人工智能嗅觉游戏重新发现人类感知
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02785
> **作者**: Awu Chen,Vera Yu Wu,Yunge Wen,Yaluo Wang,Jiaxuan Olivia Yin,Yichen Wang,Qian Xiang,Richard Zhang,Paul Pu Liang,Hiroshi Ishii
> **摘要**: 嗅觉在人类感知中发挥着重要作用，但其主观性和短暂性使其难以在个体之间表达、比较和共享。日本熏香游戏“源氏香”等传统做法提供了一种通过共同解释来构建嗅觉体验的方法。在这项工作中，我们展示了 Smell with Genji，这是一种人工智能介导的嗅觉交互系统，它将 Genji-ko 重新解释为人类与人工智能协作的感官体验。通过集成游戏设置、移动应用程序和配备嗅觉感知和基于法学硕士对话的法学硕士驱动的共同嗅觉伙伴，该系统邀请参与者比较气味并构建源氏门模式，通过对话促进反思，突出人类和机器感知之间的一致性和差异。这项工作说明了传感型人工智能如何与用户一起参与嗅觉体验，为人机交互中人工智能支持的感官交互和反射指明了新的可能性。
> **Abstract**: Olfaction plays an important role in human perception, yet its subjective and ephemeral nature makes it difficult to articulate, compare, and share across individuals. Traditional practices like the Japanese incense game Genji-ko offer one way to structure olfactory experience through shared interpretation. In this work, we present Smell with Genji, an AI-mediated olfactory interaction system that reinterprets Genji-ko as a collaborative human-AI sensory experience. By integrating a game setup, a mobile application, and an LLM-powered co-smelling partner equipped with olfactory sensing and LLM-based conversation, the system invites participants to compare scents and construct Genji-mon patterns, fostering reflection through a dialogue that highlights the alignment and discrepancies between human and machine perception. This work illustrates how sensing-enabled AI can participate in olfactory experience alongside users, pointing toward new possibilities for AI-supported sensory interaction and reflection in HCI.

【14】Ethical Asymmetry in Human-Robot Interaction - An Empirical Test of Sparrow's Hypothesis
- **标题**: 人机交互中的道德不对称——对斯帕罗假设的实证检验
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02745
> **作者**: Minyi Wang,Christoph Bartneck,Michael-John Turp,David Kaber
> **摘要**: 人机交互（HRI）的伦理学已经基于三个传统框架进行了广泛的讨论：道义论、结果主义和美德伦理学。我们进行了内部/之间的混合实验，以研究斯帕罗提出的人类对待机器人的道德不对称假说。行为的道德允许性（MPA）被作为受试者分组变量，美德类型（审慎、正义、勇气和节制）被作为受试者内部因素进行控制。我们使用在线问卷测试了道德刺激，并以感知道德行为许可（PMPA）和感知美德得分（PVS）作为反应措施。 PVS 衡量标准基于已建立的基本美德调查问卷 (QCV) 的改编，而 PMPA 则基于 Malle 等人的研究。 [39] 工作。我们发现 MPA 显着影响 PMPA 和感知美德得分。描述 PMPA 和 PVS 之间关系的最佳拟合模型是立方模型，它本质上是对称的。我们的研究没有证实斯帕罗的不对称假设。在等待额外的心理测量属性评估之前，QCV 的改编预计将对未来的研究有用。
> **Abstract**: The ethics of human-robot interaction (HRI) have been discussed extensively based on three traditional frameworks: deontology, consequentialism, and virtue ethics. We conducted a mixed within/between experiment to investigate Sparrow's proposed ethical asymmetry hypothesis in human treatment of robots. The moral permissibility of action (MPA) was manipulated as a subject grouping variable, and virtue type (prudence, justice, courage, and temperance) was controlled as a within-subjects factor. We tested moral stimuli using an online questionnaire with Perceived Moral Permissibility of Action (PMPA) and Perceived Virtue Scores (PVS) as response measures. The PVS measure was based on an adaptation of the established Questionnaire on Cardinal Virtues (QCV), while the PMPA was based on Malle et al. [39] work. We found that the MPA significantly influenced the PMPA and perceived virtue scores. The best-fitting model to describe the relationship between PMPA and PVS was cubic, which is symmetrical in nature. Our study did not confirm Sparrow's asymmetry hypothesis. The adaptation of the QCV is expected to have utility for future studies, pending additional psychometric property assessments.

【15】Exploring Collaborative Immersive Visualization & Analytics for High-Dimensional Scientific Data through Domain Expert Perspectives
- **标题**: 通过领域专家的视角探索高维科学数据的协作沉浸式可视化和分析
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02743
> **作者**: Fahim Arsad Nafis,Jie Li,Simon Su,Songqing Chen,Bo Han
> **摘要**: 跨学科团队越来越多地使用高维科学数据集，但分散的工具链和对共享探索的有限支持阻碍了协作。之前的沉浸式可视化和分析研究强调个人交互，而如何支持大规模的多用户协作则尚未确定。为了填补这一关键空白，我们对来自不同学术、政府和行业背景的 20 名领域专家进行了半结构化访谈。使用演绎-归纳混合主题分析，我们确定了四个以协作为中心的主题：工作流程挑战、采用认知、预期功能以及预期可用性和道德风险。这些发现表明当前的生态系统如何破坏协调和共享理解，同时强调有效的多用户参与的机会。我们的研究为高维科学数据可视化和分析的协作实践提供了实证见解，为增强下一代协作沉浸式平台的协调、相互意识和公平参与提供了设计启示。这些贡献指向未来的环境，能够在高维科学数据上实现分布式、跨设备的团队合作。
> **Abstract**: Cross-disciplinary teams increasingly work with high-dimensional scientific datasets, yet fragmented toolchains and limited support for shared exploration hinder collaboration. Prior immersive visualization and analytics research has emphasized individual interaction, leaving open how multi-user collaboration can be supported at scale. To fill this critical gap, we conduct semi-structured interviews with 20 domain experts from diverse academic, government, and industry backgrounds. Using deductive-inductive hybrid thematic analysis, we identify four collaboration-focused themes: workflow challenges, adoption perceptions, prospective features, and anticipated usability and ethical risks. These findings show how current ecosystems disrupt coordination and shared understanding, while highlighting opportunities for effective multi-user engagement. Our study contributes empirical insights into collaboration practices for high-dimensional scientific data visualization and analysis, offering design implications to enhance coordination, mutual awareness, and equitable participation in next-generation collaborative immersive platforms. These contributions point toward future environments enabling distributed, cross-device teamwork on high-dimensional scientific data.

【16】Framing Responsible Design of AI Mental Well-Being Support: AI as Primary Care, Nutritional Supplement, or Yoga Instructor?
- **标题**: 构建人工智能心理健康支持的负责任设计：人工智能作为初级保健、营养补充剂还是瑜伽教练？
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02740
> **作者**: Ned Cooper,Jose A. Guridi,Angel Hsing-Chi Hwang,Beth Kolko,Beth McGinty,Qian Yang
> **摘要**: 现在，数百万人使用 ChatGPT 等非临床大型语言模型 (LLM) 工具来获得心理健康支持。本文研究了负责任地设计此类工具意味着什么，以及如何在设计和评估中履行这种责任。通过采访专家和分析相关法规，我们发现负责任地设计LLM工具涉及：（1）阐明其保证的具体利益以及为谁提供。它是否能保证特定的、经过验证的缓解，如非处方药，或者提供最低限度的保证，如营养补充剂？ (2) 指定LLM工具用于改善福祉的“活性成分”，以及它是否保证其有效交付（如初级保健提供者）或不保证其有效交付（如瑜伽教练）。这些规范概述了 LLM 工具的相关风险、适当的评估指标以及 LLM 开发人员、工具设计者和用户各自的责任。这些类比——法学硕士工具作为补充剂、药物、瑜伽教练和初级保健提供者——可以构建关于其负责任设计的进一步对话。
> **Abstract**: Millions of people now use non-clinical Large Language Model (LLM) tools like ChatGPT for mental well-being support. This paper investigates what it means to design such tools responsibly, and how to operationalize that responsibility in their design and evaluation. By interviewing experts and analyzing related regulations, we found that designing an LLM tool responsibly involves: (1) Articulating the specific benefits it guarantees and for whom. Does it guarantee specific, proven relief, like an over-the-counter drug, or offer minimal guarantees, like a nutritional supplement? (2) Specifying the LLM tool's "active ingredients" for improving well-being and whether it guarantees their effective delivery (like a primary care provider) or not (like a yoga instructor). These specifications outline an LLM tool's pertinent risks, appropriate evaluation metrics, and the respective responsibilities of LLM developers, tool designers, and users. These analogies - LLM tools as supplements, drugs, yoga instructors, and primary care providers - can scaffold further conversations about their responsible design.

【17】ADx3: A Collaborative Workflow for High-Quality Accessible Audio Description
- **标题**: ADx3：用于高质量可访问音频描述的协作工作流程
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02684
> **作者**: Lana Do,Shasta Ihorn,Charity Pitcher-Cooper,Juvenal Francisco Barajas,Gio Jung,Xuan Duy Anh Nguyen,Sanjay Mirani,Ilmi Yoon
> **摘要**: 音频描述 (AD) 使盲人和低视力 (BLV) 观众可以访问视频内容，但制作高质量的描述需要占用大量资源。自动化 AD 提供了可扩展性，之前的研究表明，人机交互编辑和用户查询可以有效改善旁白。我们介绍 ADx3，这是一个集成了以下三个模块的新颖框架：GenAD，通过可访问性通知提示引导的现代视觉语言模型（VLM）升级基线描述生成； RefineAD，支持 BLV 和视力正常的用户通过包容性界面查看和编辑草稿；和 AdaptAD，支持按需用户查询。我们在一项研究中评估了 GenAD，七名无障碍专家使用专业指南审查了 VLM 生成的描述。研究结果表明，通过定制提示，VLM 可以生成符合基本标准的良好描述，但优秀的描述需要人工编辑 (RefineAD) 和交互 (AdaptAD)。 ADx3 展示了可访问内容创建的协作工作流程，其中组件相互加强并实现持续改进：编辑指导未来基线，用户查询揭示人工智能生成和人类创作的描述之间的差距。
> **Abstract**: Audio description (AD) makes video content accessible to blind and low-vision (BLV) audiences, but producing high-quality descriptions is resource-intensive. Automated AD offers scalability, and prior studies show human-in-the-loop editing and user queries effectively improve narration. We introduce ADx3, a novel framework integrating these three modules: GenAD, upgrading baseline description generation with modern vision-language models (VLMs) guided by accessibility-informed prompting; RefineAD, supporting BLV and sighted users to view and edit drafts through an inclusive interface; and AdaptAD, enabling on-demand user queries. We evaluated GenAD in a study where seven accessibility specialists reviewed VLM-generated descriptions using professional guidelines. Findings show that with tailored prompting, VLMs produce good descriptions meeting basic standards, but excellent descriptions require human edits (RefineAD) and interaction (AdaptAD). ADx3 demonstrates collaborative workflows for accessible content creation, where components reinforce one another and enable continuous improvement: edits guide future baselines and user queries reveal gaps in AI-generated and human-authored descriptions.

【18】Talking Inspiration: A Discourse Analysis of Data Visualization Podcasts
- **标题**: 谈论灵感：数据可视化播客的话语分析
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02397
> **作者**: Ali Baigelenov,Prakash Shukla,Phuong Bui,Paul Parsons
> **摘要**: 数据可视化从业者经常激发灵感，但我们对它如何在公共对话中构建知之甚少。我们对五个流行数据可视化播客的 31 集进行了话语分析。播客面向公众，本质上具有表演性：嘉宾管理印象、阐明价值观，并为广大受众树立“良好实践”的榜样。我们使用这种表演环境来研究社区谈话中如何协商合法性、身份和实践。我们表明，“灵感谈话”是可操作的而不是装饰性的：演讲者使什么重要、谁重要以及工作如何进行合法化。我们的分析提出了四个可调整的评估标准，通过这些标准来判断灵感——新颖性、权威性、真实性和情感——以及三个允许不同实践的操作隐喻——火花、力量和资源库。我们认为，将灵感视为边界对象有助于解释为什么这些框架跨上下文共存。研究结果提供了一个词汇表，用于检查如何在可视化实践中调动灵感，并对评估、教学法以及展示灵感示例的画廊和存储库的设计产生影响。
> **Abstract**: Data visualization practitioners routinely invoke inspiration, yet we know little about how it is constructed in public conversations. We conduct a discourse analysis of 31 episodes from five popular data visualization podcasts. Podcasts are public-facing and inherently performative: guests manage impressions, articulate values, and model "good practice" for broad audiences. We use this performative setting to examine how legitimacy, identity, and practice are negotiated in community talk. We show that "inspiration talk" is operative rather than ornamental: speakers legitimize what counts, who counts, and how work proceeds. Our analysis surfaces four adjustable evaluation criteria by which inspiration is judged-novelty, authority, authenticity, and affect-and three operative metaphors that license different practices-spark, muscle, and resource bank. We argue that treating inspiration as a boundary object helps explain why these frames coexist across contexts. Findings provide a vocabulary for examining how inspiration is mobilized in visualization practice, with implications for evaluation, pedagogy, and the design of galleries and repositories that surface inspirational examples.

【19】The hybrid confirmation tree: A robust strategy for hybrid intelligence
- **标题**: 混合确认树：混合智能的稳健策略
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02375
> **作者**: Julian Berger,Pantelis P. Analytis,Frederik Andersen,Kristian P. Lorenzen,Ville Satopää,Ralf HJM Kurvers
> **摘要**: 将人类和人工智能 (AI) 相结合是提高决策准确性的潜在强大方法。然而，很少有这样的方法能够有效地整合两种类型的情报，同时保持人类的能动性。在这里，我们介绍并评估混合确认树，这是一种简单的聚合策略，可以比较人类和人工智能的独立决策，如果分歧触发第二次人类决胜局。通过分析推导，我们表明混合确认树可以匹配并超过三人多数投票的准确性，同时需要更少的人类输入，特别是当人工智能准确性与人类准确性相当或超过人类准确性时。我们通过分析证明，当人类和人工智能的准确性相似并且他们的决策不是过度相关时，混合确认树实现互补性的能力（优于人类个体、人工智能和多数投票）就会最大化。对六个真实世界数据集（涵盖皮肤癌诊断、深度造假检测、地缘政治预测和刑事再逮捕）的实证重新分析验证了这些发现，表明混合确认树将多数投票的准确性提高了多达 10 个百分点，同时将决策成本降低了 28--44$\%$。此外，与层次结构和多元结构等固定的仅限人类的启发式方法相比，混合确认树在正确和假阳性权衡方面提供了更大的灵活性。混合确认树作为一种实用、高效且稳健的混合集体智慧策略而出现，可维持人类的能动性。
> **Abstract**: Combining human and artificial intelligence (AI) is a potentially powerful approach to boost decision accuracy. However, few such approaches exist that effectively integrate both types of intelligence while maintaining human agency. Here, we introduce and evaluate the hybrid confirmation tree, a simple aggregation strategy that compares the independent decisions of both a human and AI, with disagreements triggering a second human tiebreaker. Through analytical derivations, we show that the hybrid confirmation tree can match and exceed the accuracy of a three-person human majority vote while requiring fewer human inputs, particularly when AI accuracy is comparable to or exceeds human accuracy. We analytically demonstrate that the hybrid confirmation tree's ability to achieve complementarity -- outperforming individual humans, AI, and the majority vote -- is maximized when human and AI accuracies are similar and their decisions are not overly correlated. Empirical reanalysis of six real-world datasets (covering skin cancer diagnosis, deepfake detection, geopolitical forecasting, and criminal rearrest) validates these findings, showing that the hybrid confirmation tree improves accuracy over the majority vote by up to 10 percentage points while reducing the cost of decision making by 28--44$\%$. Furthermore, the hybrid confirmation tree provides greater flexibility in navigating true and false positive trade-offs compared to fixed human-only heuristics like hierarchies and polyarchies. The hybrid confirmation tree emerges as a practical, efficient, and robust strategy for hybrid collective intelligence that maintains human agency.
