【20】When more precision is worse: Do people recognize inadequate scene representations in concept-based explainable AI?
- **标题**: 当精度越高越差时：人们是否认识到基于概念的可解释人工智能中场景表示的不足？
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02298
> **作者**: Romy Müller,Wiebke Klausing
> **摘要**: 可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 旨在帮助发现人工智能模型内部表示中的缺陷。但人们能从其解释中得出正确的结论吗？具体来说，他们是否认识到人工智能无法区分相关和不相关的特征？在本研究中，模拟人工智能将铁路侵入者的图像分类为危险或非危险。为了解释它使用了哪些功能，显示了数据集中的其他图像，它们以类似的方式激活人工智能。这些概念图像在三个相关特征（即人到轨道的距离、方向和动作）和一个不相关特征（即场景背景）上有所不同。当人工智能在决策中使用某个特征时，该特征会保留在概念图像中，否则图像会对其进行随机化（例如，相同的距离、不同的背景）。当人工智能保留相关功能时，参与者对它的评价更高。对于不相关的功能，他们一般不介意，有时甚至宁愿保留。这表明，当人工智能模型依赖不相关的特征来做出决策时，人们可能无法识别。
> **Abstract**: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) aims to help uncover flaws in an AI model's internal representations. But do people draw the right conclusions from its explanations? Specifically, do they recognize an AI's inability to distinguish between relevant and irrelevant features? In the present study, a simulated AI classified images of railway trespassers as dangerous or not. To explain which features it has used, other images from the dataset were shown that activate the AI in a similar way. These concept images varied in three relevant features (i.e., a person's distance to the tracks, direction, and action) and in an irrelevant feature (i.e., scene background). When the AI uses a feature in its decision, this feature is retained in the concept images, otherwise the images randomize over it (e.g., same distance, varied backgrounds). Participants rated the AI more favorably when it retained relevant features. For the irrelevant feature, they did not mind in general, and sometimes even preferred it to be retained. This suggests that people may not recognize it when an AI model relies on irrelevant features to make its decisions.

【21】CHOMP: Multimodal Chewing Side Detection with Earphones
- **标题**: CHOMP：使用耳机进行多模式咀嚼侧面检测
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02233
> **作者**: Jonas Hummel,Maximilian Burzer,Felix Schlotter,Michael Küttner,Tobias King,Qiang Yang,Cecilia Mascolo,Michael Beigl,Tobias Röddiger
> **摘要**: 咀嚼侧偏好（CSP）已被确定为颞下颌疾病（TMD）和行为表现的危险因素。尽管 TMD 影响了全球约三分之一的人口，但评估主要依赖于临床检查和自我报告，对日常颌骨功能的了解有限。持续的 CSP 监测可以为功能不对称性提供客观的替代指标。然而，之前的可穿戴方法大多使用专门的外形尺寸，并且表现出有限的性能。因此，我们推出了 CHOMP，这是第一个使用耳机进行咀嚼侧面检测的系统。使用 OpenEarable 2.0，我们收集了 20 名参与者的数据，这些参与者配备了麦克风、骨导麦克风、IMU、PPG 和压力传感器，涉及 11 种食物、5 种非咀嚼活动和 3 种噪声条件。我们将连续小波变换应用于每种传感模式，并使用生成的多通道尺度图作为基于 CNN 的分类器的输入。麦克风实现了最强的单传感器单元性能，在留一食物排除 (LOFO) 中的 F1 中位数为 94.5%，在留一受试者排除 (LOSO) 交叉验证中为 92.6%。融合传感模式进一步将 LOFO 的性能提高至 97.7%，将 LOSO 的性能提高至 95.4%，噪声干扰下的额外评估表明性能稳健。我们的研究结果使耳机成为持续 CSP 监测的实用平台，使临床医生和患者能够评估日常生活中的下颌功能。
> **Abstract**: Chewing side preference (CSP) has been identified both as a risk factor for temporomandibular disorders (TMD) and behavioral manifestation. Despite TMDs affecting roughly one third of the global population, assessment mainly relies on clinical examinations and self-reports, offering limited insight into everyday jaw function. Continuous CSP monitoring could provide an objective proxy for functional asymmetries. Prior wearable approaches, however, mostly use specialized form factors and demonstrate limited performance. We therefore present CHOMP, the first system for chewing side detection using earphones. Employing OpenEarable 2.0, we collected data from 20 participants with microphones, a bone-conduction microphone, IMU, PPG, and a pressure sensor across eleven foods, five non-chewing activities, and three noise conditions. We apply the Continuous Wavelet Transform to each sensing modality and use the resulting multi-channel scalograms as inputs to CNN-based classifiers. Microphones achieve the strongest single-sensor unit performance, with median F1 scores of 94.5% in leave-one-food-out (LOFO) and 92.6% in leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) cross-validations. Fusing sensing modalities further improves performance to 97.7% for LOFO and 95.4% for LOSO, with additional evaluations under noise interference indicating robust performance. Our results establish earphones as a practical platform for continuous CSP monitoring, enabling clinicians and patients to assess jaw function in everyday life.

【22】See2Refine: Vision-Language Feedback Improves LLM-Based eHMI Action Designers
- **标题**: See2Refine：视觉语言反馈改进基于 LLM 的 eHMI 操作设计器
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02063
> **作者**: Ding Xia,Xinyue Gui,Mark Colley,Fan Gao,Zhongyi Zhou,Dongyuan Li,Renhe Jiang,Takeo Igarashi
> **摘要**: 自动驾驶车辆缺乏与其他道路使用者的自然沟通渠道，因此外部人机界面 (eHMI) 对于在共享环境中传达意图和维持信任至关重要。然而，大多数 eHMI 研究依赖于开发人员制作的消息-操作对，这很难适应多样化和动态的流量环境。一种有前途的替代方案是使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 作为生成上下文条件 eHMI 操作的操作设计器，但此类设计器缺乏感知验证，并且通常依赖于固定提示或昂贵的人工注释反馈来进行改进。我们提出了 See2Refine，这是一个无人参与的闭环框架，它使用视觉语言模型 (VLM) 感知评估作为自动视觉反馈来改进基于 LLM 的 eHMI 动作设计器。给定驾驶环境和候选 eHMI 操作，VLM 评估该操作的感知适当性，并且此反馈用于迭代修改设计人员的输出，从而无需人工监督即可进行系统改进。我们跨三种 eHMI 模式（灯条、眼睛和手臂）和多个 LLM 模型大小评估我们的框架。在各种设置中，我们的框架在基于 VLM 的指标和人类受试者评估中始终优于仅提示的 LLM 设计者和手动指定的基线。结果进一步表明，改进适用于各种模式，并且 VLM 评估与人类偏好非常一致，支持 See2Refine 在可扩展行动设计方面的稳健性和有效性。
> **Abstract**: Automated vehicles lack natural communication channels with other road users, making external Human-Machine Interfaces (eHMIs) essential for conveying intent and maintaining trust in shared environments. However, most eHMI studies rely on developer-crafted message-action pairs, which are difficult to adapt to diverse and dynamic traffic contexts. A promising alternative is to use Large Language Models (LLMs) as action designers that generate context-conditioned eHMI actions, yet such designers lack perceptual verification and typically depend on fixed prompts or costly human-annotated feedback for improvement. We present See2Refine, a human-free, closed-loop framework that uses vision-language model (VLM) perceptual evaluation as automated visual feedback to improve an LLM-based eHMI action designer. Given a driving context and a candidate eHMI action, the VLM evaluates the perceived appropriateness of the action, and this feedback is used to iteratively revise the designer's outputs, enabling systematic refinement without human supervision. We evaluate our framework across three eHMI modalities (lightbar, eyes, and arm) and multiple LLM model sizes. Across settings, our framework consistently outperforms prompt-only LLM designers and manually specified baselines in both VLM-based metrics and human-subject evaluations. Results further indicate that the improvements generalize across modalities and that VLM evaluations are well aligned with human preferences, supporting the robustness and effectiveness of See2Refine for scalable action design.

【23】Are Semantic Networks Associated with Idea Originality in Artificial Creativity? A Comparison with Human Agents
- **标题**: 语义网络与人工创造力中的想法原创性相关吗？与人类代理的比较
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02048
> **作者**: Umberto Domanti,Lorenzo Campidelli,Sergio Agnoli,Antonella De Angeli
> **摘要**: 生成式人工智能在创造力支持工具（CST）中的应用提出了连接两个黑匣子的挑战：用户的思想和机器引擎。根据《人工认知》，这一挑战涉及为研究人类创造力而开发的理论、方法和结构。一致地，本文研究了大型语言模型中语义网络组织与想法原创性之间的关系。数据是通过对 ChatGPT-4o 和 81 名心理学学生进行一组标准化测试来收集的，这些学生分为较高和较低创造力的个体。 ChatGPT-4o 与具有更高创造力的人类之间的比较证实了预期的关系。然而，尽管拥有更严格的网络，ChatGPT-4o 却比创造力较低的人类更具原创性。我们将这种差异归因于人类动机过程和模型超参数，从而推进了人工创造力研究的研究议程。总之，我们说明了这种结构在设计和评估 CST 方面的潜力。
> **Abstract**: The application of generative artificial intelligence in Creativity Support Tools (CSTs) presents the challenge of interfacing two black boxes: the user's mind and the machine engine. According to Artificial Cognition, this challenge involves theories, methods, and constructs developed to study human creativity. Consistently, the paper investigated the relationship between semantic networks organisation and idea originality in Large Language Models. Data was collected by administering a set of standardised tests to ChatGPT-4o and 81 psychology students, divided into higher and lower creative individuals. The expected relationship was confirmed in the comparison between ChatGPT-4o and higher creative humans. However, despite having a more rigid network, ChatGPT-4o emerged as more original than lower creative humans. We attributed this difference to human motivational processes and model hyperparameters, advancing a research agenda for the study of artificial creativity. In conclusion, we illustrate the potential of this construct for designing and evaluating CSTs.

【24】Situated Brushing and Linking in Virtual and Augmented Reality
- **标题**: 虚拟和增强现实中的定位刷卡和链接
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02023
> **作者**: Carlos Quijano-Chavez,Benjamin Lee,Nina Doerr,Wolfgang Büschel,Michael Sedlmair,Dieter Schmalstieg
> **摘要**: 在传统的视觉分析中，刷动和链接通常用于使用突出显示技术在视觉上连接多个视图。然而，刷选和链接很少用于情境分析，情境分析使用可视化在物理参照物的背景下分析数据。在情境分析中，数据表示必须以视觉方式链接到现实世界的对象。之前的工作已经评估了超市场景的虚拟现实模拟中的场景刷牙和链接。在这里，我们通过研究增强现实在实际物理空间中的刷动和链接来复制和扩展以前的方法，同时进一步改进突出显示技术。使用视频透视显示器，我们将增强现实与虚拟现实进行比较。结果表明，AR 在时间和准确性方面表现更好，但该技术的有效性因条件而异。这些结果为现实世界刺激在情境分析中的重要性提供了一个新的框架。
> **Abstract**: In traditional visual analysis, brushing and linking is commonly used to visually connect multiple views using highlighting techniques. However, brushing and linking has rarely been used in situated analytics, which uses visualizations to analyze data in the context of physical referents. In situated analytics, data representations must be visually linked to real-world objects. Previous work has assessed situated brushing and linking in a virtual reality simulation of a supermarket scenario. Here, we replicate and extend the previous approach by studying brushing and linking in an actual physical space with augmented reality, while further improving the highlighting techniques. Using a video see-through display, we compare augmented reality with virtual reality. Results suggest that AR performs better in time and accuracy, but the effectiveness of the techniques varies by condition. These results provide a new framing of how the real-world stimuli matter in situated analytics.

【25】Belief Updating and Delegation in Multi-Task Human-AI Interaction: Evidence from Controlled Simulations
- **标题**: 多任务人机交互中的信念更新和委托：来自受控模拟的证据
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01986
> **作者**: Shreyan Biswas,Alexander Erlei,Ujwal Gadiraju
> **摘要**: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 越来越多地支持单一界面中的异构任务，要求用户跨具有不同可靠性配置文件的领域形成、更新对一个系统的信念并采取行动。因此，了解这些信念如何在任务之间传递并塑造委托对于多用途人工智能系统的设计至关重要。我们报告了一项预先注册的实验（N=240；7,200 次试验），其中参与者与受控 AI 模拟进行交互，包括语法检查、旅行计划和视觉问答，每个模拟都具有固定的、典型领域的准确度水平。授权被实施为二元依赖决策：接受人工智能的输出与独立行动，并根据贝叶斯基准评估信念动态。我们发现三个主要结果。首先，参与者不会重置任务之间的信念：新任务中的先验取决于前一个任务的后验，增加 10 点预示后续先验会高出 3-4 点。其次，在任务中，信念更新遵循贝叶斯方向，但基本上是保守的，以大约规范贝叶斯速率的一半进行。第三，授权主要是由对人工智能准确性的主观信念而不是自信驱动的，尽管当信念保持不变时，信心独立地减少了依赖。总之，这些发现表明，用户对多用途人工智能系统形成全局的、路径依赖的期望，保守地更新它们，并主要基于主观信念而不是客观表现来依赖人工智能。我们讨论了期望校准、可靠性设计以及部署的基于 LLM 的接口中的信念溢出风险的影响。
> **Abstract**: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly support heterogeneous tasks within a single interface, requiring users to form, update, and act upon beliefs about one system across domains with different reliability profiles. Understanding how such beliefs transfer across tasks and shape delegation is therefore critical for the design of multipurpose AI systems. We report a preregistered experiment (N=240; 7,200 trials) in which participants interacted with a controlled AI simulation across grammar checking, travel planning, and visual question answering, each with fixed, domain-typical accuracy levels. Delegation was operationalized as a binary reliance decision: accepting the AI's output versus acting independently, and belief dynamics were evaluated against Bayesian benchmarks. We find three main results. First, participants do not reset beliefs between tasks: priors in a new task depend on posteriors from the previous task, with a 10-point increase predicting a 3-4 point higher subsequent prior. Second, within tasks, belief updating follows the Bayesian direction but is substantially conservative, proceeding at roughly half the normative Bayesian rate. Third, delegation is driven primarily by subjective beliefs about AI accuracy rather than self-confidence, though confidence independently reduces reliance when beliefs are held constant. Together, these findings show that users form global, path-dependent expectations about multipurpose AI systems, update them conservatively, and rely on AI primarily based on subjective beliefs rather than objective performance. We discuss implications for expectation calibration, reliance design, and the risks of belief spillovers in deployed LLM-based interfaces.

【26】Hacking Flow: From Lived Practices to Innovation
- **标题**: 黑客流程：从实践到创新
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01979
> **作者**: Fabio Stano,Max L Wilson,Christof Weinhardt,Michael T Knierim
> **摘要**: 在数字知识工作中，流程不仅能保证生产力，还能保证生产力。它提供了一条通向幸福的途径。然而，尽管对人机交互进行了数十年的流程研究，但我们对如何设计支持它的数字干预措施知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们将生活干预措施（工人已经用来促进心流的日常实践）放在首位，以发现被忽视的机会并为数字干预设计制定新的方向。具体来说，我们报告了两项研究的结果：（1）对开放式调查回复（n = 160）进行反思性主题分析，提出了跨越四个类别的 38 项生活干预措施：环境、组织、任务塑造和个人准备情况； (2) 一项定量在线调查（n = 121），该调查验证了这些内容，确定了哪些干预措施得到了广泛认可，哪些干预措施出现了两极分化，并引发了技术支持的愿景。我们对数字工作者如何培养心流提供实证见解，将这些生活干预措施置于现有文献中，并为未来的数字心流干预措施提供设计机会。
> **Abstract**: In digital knowledge work, flow promises not just productivity; it offers a pathway to well-being. Yet despite decades of flow research in HCI, we know little about how to design digital interventions that support it. In this work, we foreground lived interventions - everyday practices workers already use to foster flow - to uncover overlooked opportunities and chart new directions for digital intervention design. Specifically, we report findings from two studies: (1) a reflexive thematic analysis of open-ended survey responses (n = 160), surfacing 38 lived interventions across four categories: environment, organization, task shaping, and personal readiness; and (2) a quantitative online survey (n = 121) that validates this repertoire, identifies which interventions are broadly endorsed versus polarizing, and elicits visions of technological support. We contribute empirical insights into how digital workers cultivate flow, situate these lived interventions within existing literature, and derive design opportunities for future digital flow interventions.

【27】Boosting metacognition in entangled human-AI interaction to navigate cognitive-behavioral drift
- **标题**: 增强人类与人工智能纠缠交互中的元认知，以应对认知行为漂移
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01959
> **作者**: Ezequiel Lopez-Lopez,Christoph M. Abels,Philipp Lorenz-Spreen,Stephan Lewandowsky,Stefan M. Herzog
> **摘要**: 人们使用线索、启发法和其他策略来应对复杂的环境，这些策略通常在稳定的环境中具有适应性。然而，随着人工智能日益渗透到社会的信息环境中，这些环境变得更具适应性和不断发展：基于法学硕士的聊天机器人参与扩展的交互，维护对话历史，反映社交线索，并且可以超定制响应，从而不仅决定了访问哪些信息，还决定了如何提出问题、如何解释证据以及何时采取行动。在这里，我们提出了一个持续的人机交互框架，该框架依赖于人类认知和人机交互的不变特征，并以三个相互关联的现象为中心：用户和人工智能系统之间的纠缠，重复交互中认知和行为漂移的出现，以及元认知在这些动态的意识和调节中的作用。当对话代理提供人们视为信息丰富的线索（例如流畅性、连贯性、反应性）时，主观信心和行动准备度可能会增加，而认知可靠性却没有相应的增益，从而使得漂移难以检测和纠正。我们从微观、中观和宏观层面描述这些动态。该框架确定了四个元认知干预点和提供元认知支架（促进和自我推动）的心理干预措施。最后，我们概述了科学预见的长期研究议程。
> **Abstract**: People navigate complex environments using cues, heuristics, and other strategies, which are often adaptive in stable settings. However, as AI increasingly permeates society's information environments, those become more adaptive and evolving: LLM-based chatbots participate in extended interaction, maintain conversational histories, mirror social cues, and can hypercustomize responses, thereby shaping not only what information is accessed but how questions are framed, how evidence is interpreted, and when action feels warranted. Here we propose a framework for sustained human-AI interaction that rests on invariant features of human cognition and human--AI interaction and centers on three interlinked phenomena: entanglement between users and AI systems, the emergence of cognitive and behavioral drift over repeated interactions, and the role of metacognition in the awareness and regulation of these dynamics. As conversational agents provide cues (e.g., fluency, coherence, responsiveness) that people treat as informative, subjective confidence and action readiness may increase without corresponding gains in epistemic reliability, making drift difficult to detect and correct. We describe these dynamics across micro-, meso-, and macro-levels. The framework identifies four metacognitive intervention points and psychologically informed interventions that provide metacognitive scaffolding (boosting and self-nudging). Finally, we outline a long-horizon research agenda for scientific foresight.

【28】When Workout Buddies Are Virtual: AI Agents and Human Peers in a Longitudinal Physical Activity Study
- **标题**: 当锻炼伙伴是虚拟的时：纵向体育活动研究中的人工智能代理和人类同伴
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01918
> **作者**: Alessandro Silacci,Mauro Cherubini,Arianna Boldi,Amon Rapp,Maurizio Caon
> **摘要**: 缺乏身体活动仍然是一个关键的全球健康问题，但可持续激励的可扩展策略却很少。设计为模拟锻炼同伴（SEP）的对话代理代表了一种有前途的替代方案，但其长期影响尚不清楚。我们报告了一项为期 6 个月的随机对照试验 (N=280)，对单独锻炼的个体、与人类同伴或与大型语言模型驱动的 SEP 进行比较。结果揭示了一个伙伴关系悖论：人类同伴唤起了更强的社会存在感，而人工智能同伴则提供了更稳定的鼓励和更可靠的工作联盟。人类通过真实的比较和责任来激励，而人工智能同行则提供一致的、低风险的支持。这些互补的优势表明人工智能代理不应模仿人类的真实性，而应增强其可靠性。我们的研究结果推进了人机交互研究，并指出了混合设计，其中人类的存在和人工智能的一致性共同维持身体活动。
> **Abstract**: Physical inactivity remains a critical global health issue, yet scalable strategies for sustained motivation are scarce. Conversational agents designed as simulated exercising peers (SEPs) represent a promising alternative, but their long-term impact is unclear. We report a six-month randomized controlled trial (N=280) comparing individuals exercising alone, with a human peer, or with a large language model-driven SEP. Results revealed a partnership paradox: human peers evoked stronger social presence, while AI peers provided steadier encouragement and more reliable working alliances. Humans motivated through authentic comparison and accountability, whereas AI peers fostered consistent, low-stakes support. These complementary strengths suggest that AI agents should not mimic human authenticity but augment it with reliability. Our findings advance human-agent interaction research and point to hybrid designs where human presence and AI consistency jointly sustain physical activity.

【29】When Feasibility of Fairness Audits Relies on Willingness to Share Data: Examining User Acceptance of Multi-Party Computation Protocols for Fairness Monitoring
- **标题**: 当公平审计的可行性依赖于共享数据的意愿时：检查用户对用于公平监控的多方计算协议的接受程度
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01846
> **作者**: Changyang He,Parnian Jahangirirad,Lin Kyi,Asia J. Biega
> **摘要**: 根据欧盟人工智能法案的规定，公平监控对于检测算法偏差至关重要。由于此类监控需要敏感的用户数据（例如种族），因此《人工智能法案》仅允许在符合 GDPR 的情况下采用严格的隐私措施（例如多方计算 (MPC)）进行处理。然而，这种安全监控协议的有效性最终取决于人们共享数据的意愿。人们对不同的 MPC 协议设计如何影响用户接受度知之甚少。为了解决这个问题，我们对欧洲的 833 名参与者进行了一项在线调查，考察用户对用于公平性监控的各种 MPC 协议设计的接受程度。研究结果表明，用户在直接评估中优先考虑风险相关属性（例如隐私保护机制），而在模拟选择中优先考虑利益相关属性（例如公平目标），其接受程度取决于他们的公平和隐私取向。我们得出了以促进知情同意并符合用户期望的方式部署和传达隐私保护协议的含义。
> **Abstract**: Fairness monitoring is critical for detecting algorithmic bias, as mandated by the EU AI Act. Since such monitoring requires sensitive user data (e.g., ethnicity), the AI Act permits its processing only with strict privacy measures, such as multi-party computation (MPC), in compliance with the GDPR. However, the effectiveness of such secure monitoring protocols ultimately depends on people's willingness to share their data. Little is known about how different MPC protocol designs shape user acceptance. To address this, we conducted an online survey with 833 participants in Europe, examining user acceptance of various MPC protocol designs for fairness monitoring. Findings suggest that users prioritized risk-related attributes (e.g., privacy protection mechanism) in direct evaluation but benefit-related attributes (e.g., fairness objective) in simulated choices, with acceptance shaped by their fairness and privacy orientations. We derive implications for deploying and communicating privacy-preserving protocols in ways that foster informed consent and align with user expectations.

【30】Risk, Data, Alignment: Making Credit Scoring Work in Kenya
- **标题**: 风险、数据、一致性：让信用评分在肯尼亚发挥作用
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01824
> **作者**: Daniel Mwesigwa,Steven J. Jackson,Christopher Csikszentmihalyi
> **摘要**: 信用评分是数据和人工智能治理中日益重要和有争议的领域，通常被视为评估不同经济和政治背景下风险的中立和客观方法。基于肯尼亚内罗毕为期九个月的信用评分实践民族志，我们研究了数字借贷中数据科学的社会技术和制度工作。虽然成熟的地区电信公司和银行正在利用专有数据开发数字贷款产品，但新的参与者、技术和不断变化的法规正在改变算法信用评分。我们的研究结果展示了从业者如何使用技术和法律解决方法构建替代数据，通过多种解释制定风险，以及通过技术和政治手段协商模型性能。我们认为，算法信用评分是通过持续的协调工作来实现的，这种协调工作可以在持续不确定的情况下稳定风险，采取认知、建模和情境形式。扩展人机交互中的对齐工作，我们展示了它如何作为双向转换运行，其中模型被制作为“对世界安全”，而这些世界被重塑为“对模型安全”。
> **Abstract**: Credit scoring is an increasingly central and contested domain of data and AI governance, frequently framed as a neutral and objective method of assessing risk across diverse economic and political contexts. Based on a nine-month ethnography of credit scoring practices in Nairobi, Kenya, we examined the sociotechnical and institutional work of data science in digital lending. While established regional telcos and banks are leveraging proprietary data to develop digital loan products, algorithmic credit scoring is being transformed by new actors, techniques, and shifting regulations. Our findings show how practitioners construct alternative data using technical and legal workarounds, formulate risk through multiple interpretations, and negotiate model performance via technical and political means. We argue that algorithmic credit scoring is accomplished through the ongoing work of alignment that stabilizes risk under conditions of persistent uncertainty, taking epistemic, modeling, and contextual forms. Extending work on alignment in HCI, we show how it operates as a two-way translation, where models are made "safe for worlds" while those worlds are reshaped to be "safe for models."

【31】CritiqueCrew: Orchestrating Multi-Perspective Conversational Design Critique
- **标题**: CritiqueCrew：编排多视角对话式设计评论
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01796
> **作者**: Xiaojiao Chen,Jiahuan Zhou,Yunfeng Shu,Ruihan Wang,Qinghua Liu
> **摘要**: UI 设计师在用户需求、业务目标和工程约束的交叉点上面临着不断增长的认知负荷和跨职能摩擦。现有的自动化工具通常提供静态的“问题​​列表”，缺乏可操作的修复路径并扰乱创意流程。我们推出 CritiqueCrew，这是一款 Figma 工具，可通过对话式批评为设计师提供支持。 CritiqueCrew 通过对不同的专家角色（UX、PM、工程师）进行多角度编排，生成多方面的见解。它通过上下文反馈和交互式补救将抽象批评转化为具体行动。在两项独立对照研究（总计 N=48）中，与传统静态检查器相比，CritiqueCrew 显着提高了设计质量和主观体验。此外，我们的结果证实，专家角色的结构化编排（而不是统一的模型）是促进信任和创造力支​​持的关键。我们的工作展示了人工智能如何通过将多视角对话与交互式修复相结合，从“问题审核员”转变为“解决方案共同创造者”，为未来的创意工具提供设计启示。
> **Abstract**: UI designers face growing cognitive load and cross functional friction at the intersection of user needs, business goals, and engineering constraints. Existing automated tools often deliver static "problem lists", lacking actionable repair paths and disrupting creative flow. We introduce CritiqueCrew, a Figma tool that supports designers through conversational critique. CritiqueCrew generates multi-faceted insights by implementing a multi-perspective orchestration of distinct expert roles (UX, PM, Engineer). It translates abstract critiques into concrete actions via in context feedback and interactive remediation. Across two independent controlled studies (Total N=48), CritiqueCrew significantly improved both design quality and subjective experience compared to a traditional static checker. Furthermore, our results confirm that the structured orchestration of expert roles-rather than a unified model-is key to fostering trust and creativity support. Our work demonstrates how AI can shift from a "problem auditor" to a "solution co-creator" by integrating multi-perspective dialogue with interactive repair, offering design implications for future creative tools.

【32】Cost-Aware Bayesian Optimization for Prototyping Interactive Devices
- **标题**: 用于交互设备原型设计的成本感知贝叶斯优化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01774
> **作者**: Thomas Langerak,Renate Zhang,Ziyuan Wang,Per Ola Kristensson,Antti Oulasvirta
> **摘要**: 决定哪个想法值得原型化是迭代设计的核心问题。当预期改进较高且成本较低时，应生产原型。然而，这很难决定，因为成本可能相差很大：简单的参数调整可能需要几秒钟，而制造硬件会消耗材料和能源。这种不对称可能会阻碍设计师探索设计空间。在本文中，我们提出了成本感知贝叶斯优化的扩展，以考虑不同的原型设计成本。该方法建立在贝叶斯优化的基础上，只需要对采集函数进行最小的修改。关键思想是利用设计师估计的成本来指导采样以获得更具成本效益的原型。在技​​术评估中，该方法实现了与成本无关的基线相当的效用，同时仅需要 ${\approx}70\%$ 的成本；在严格的预算下，它的表现是基准的三倍。一项由 12 名参与者参与的真实操纵杆设计任务的受试者内研究也证明了类似的好处。这些结果表明，考虑原型设计成本可以使贝叶斯优化与现实世界的设计项目更加兼容。
> **Abstract**: Deciding which idea is worth prototyping is a central concern in iterative design. A prototype should be produced when the expected improvement is high and the cost is low. However, this is hard to decide, because costs can vary drastically: a simple parameter tweak may take seconds, while fabricating hardware consumes material and energy. Such asymmetries, can discourage a designer from exploring the design space. In this paper, we present an extension of cost-aware Bayesian optimization to account for diverse prototyping costs. The method builds on the power of Bayesian optimization and requires only a minimal modification to the acquisition function. The key idea is to use designer-estimated costs to guide sampling toward more cost-effective prototypes. In technical evaluations, the method achieved comparable utility to a cost-agnostic baseline while requiring only ${\approx}70\%$ of the cost; under strict budgets, it outperformed the baseline threefold. A within-subjects study with 12 participants in a realistic joystick design task demonstrated similar benefits. These results show that accounting for prototyping costs can make Bayesian optimization more compatible with real-world design projects.

【33】Streamlined Facial Data Collection based on Utterance and Emotional Data for Human-to-Avatar Reconstruction
- **标题**: 基于言语和情感数据的简化面部数据收集，用于人形重建
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01729
> **作者**: Seoyoung Kang,Seokhwan Yang,Hail Song,Boram Yoon,Jinwook Kim,Kangsoo Kim,Woontack Woo
> **摘要**: 本研究探索了一种用于对话环境的简化面部数据收集方法，解决了现有方法的局限性，这些方法通常需要大量数据集，并将技术指标优先于用户感知和体验。我们系统地研究哪些面部表情数据对于重建逼真的化身至关重要，以及如何有效地捕获它们。我们的研究采用两阶段方法来确定有效的面部数据收集策略并评估其有效性。在第一阶段，我们进行面部数据采集并使用言语数据和情感数据评估重建性能。在第二阶段，我们进行了全面的用户评估，比较了三种渐进条件：仅话语、话语和情感数据以及涉及大量数据的控制条件。参与模拟面对面对话的 24 名参与者的研究结果表明，有针对性的话语和情感数据可实现可比的感知真实性、自然性和临场感水平，同时与广泛的数据收集方法相比，可以减少培训时间和数据使用。这些结果表明，有针对性的数据输入可以实现高效的头像面部重建，为 AR/VR 远程呈现等实时应用提供实用指南，并强调数据量和感知质量之间的权衡。
> **Abstract**: This study explores a streamlined facial data collection method for conversational contexts, addressing the limitations of existing approaches that often require extensive datasets and prioritize technical metrics over user perception and experience. We systematically investigate which facial expression data are essential for reconstructing photorealistic avatars and how they can be captured efficiently. Our research employs a two-phase methodology to identify efficient facial data collection strategies and evaluate their effectiveness. In the first phase, we conduct facial data acquisition and evaluate reconstruction performance using utterance data and emotional data. In the second phase, we carry out a comprehensive user evaluation comparing three progressive conditions: utterance only, utterance and emotional data, and a control condition involving extensive data. Findings from 24 participants engaged in simulated face-to-face conversations reveal that targeted utterance and emotional data achieve comparable levels of perceived realism, naturalness, and telepresence, while reducing training time and data usage when compared to the extensive data collection approach. These results demonstrate that targeted data inputs can enable efficient avatar face reconstruction, offering practical guidelines for real-time applications such as AR/VR telepresence and highlighting the trade-off between data quantity and perceived quality.

【34】Beyond the Single Turn: Reframing Refusals as Dynamic Experiences Embedded in the Context of Mental Health Support Interactions with LLMs
- **标题**: 超越单一转向：将拒绝重新定义为嵌入心理健康支持与法学硕士互动背景下的动态体验
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01694
> **作者**: Ningjing Tang,Alice Qian,Qiaosi Wang,Esther Howe,Blake Bullwinkel,Paola Pedrelli,Jina Suh,Hoda Heidari,Hong Shen
> **摘要**: 内容警告：本文包含与心理健康挑战、情绪困扰和自杀意念相关的参与者引用和讨论。大语言模型 (LLM) 越来越多地用于心理健康支持，但从用户和心理健康专业人员 (MHP) 的角度来看，模型的保障措施（特别是拒绝参与敏感内容）仍然知之甚少，并且据报道会造成现实世界的伤害。本文介绍了一项连续混合方法研究的结果，该研究探讨了在心理健康支持互动中如何经历和解释法学硕士拒绝。通过对使用LLM进行心理健康支持和MHP的个人进行调查（N=53）和深入访谈（N=16），我们发现拒绝不是孤立的、单轮的系统行为，而是构成动态的、多阶段的经历：拒绝前的期望形成、拒绝的触发和遭遇、拒绝的信息框架、资源转介的提供和拒绝后的结果。我们提供了一个多阶段框架，用于评估二元政策合规准确性之外的拒绝，并为未来的拒绝机制提供设计建议。这些发现表明，理解法学硕士拒绝需要超越单轮互动，认识到它们是嵌入整个法学硕士设计流程和更广泛的心理健康获取现实中的整体体验过程。
> **Abstract**: Content Warning: This paper contains participant quotes and discussions related to mental health challenges, emotional distress, and suicidal ideation. Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for mental health support, yet the model safeguards -- particularly refusals to engage with sensitive content -- remain poorly understood from the perspectives of users and mental health professionals (MHPs) and have been reported to cause real-world harms. This paper presents findings from a sequential mixed-methods study examining how LLM refusals are experienced and interpreted in mental health support interactions. Through surveys (N=53) and in-depth interviews (N=16) with individuals using LLMs for mental health support and MHPs, we reveal that refusals are not isolated, single-turn system behaviors, but rather constitute dynamic, multi-phase experiences: pre-refusal expectation formation, refusal triggering and encounter, refusal message framing, resource referral provision, and post-refusal outcomes. We contribute a multi-phase framework for evaluating refusals beyond binary policy compliance accuracy and design recommendations for future refusal mechanisms. These findings suggest that understanding LLM refusals requires moving beyond single-turn interactions toward recognizing them as holistic experiential processes embedded within the entire LLM design pipeline and the broader realities of mental health access.

【35】AI-Assisted Adaptive Rendering for High-Frequency Security Telemetry in Web Interfaces
- **标题**: 用于 Web 界面中高频安全遥测的人工智能辅助自适应渲染
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01671
> **作者**: Mona Rajhans
> **摘要**: 现代网络安全平台必须实时处理和显示高频遥测数据，例如网络日志、端点事件、警报和策略更改。基于静态分页或固定轮询间隔的传统渲染技术在每秒超过数十万个事件的量条件下会失败，导致 UI 冻结、丢帧或数据过时。本文提出了一种人工智能辅助的自适应渲染框架，该框架可以动态调节视觉更新频率，优先考虑语义相关事件，并使用行为驱动的启发式方法和轻量级设备上机器学习模型有选择地聚合较低优先级的数据。实验验证表明，渲染开销减少了 45-60%，同时保持了分析师对实时响应能力的感知。
> **Abstract**: Modern cybersecurity platforms must process and display high-frequency telemetry such as network logs, endpoint events, alerts, and policy changes in real time. Traditional rendering techniques based on static pagination or fixed polling intervals fail under volume conditions exceeding hundreds of thousands of events per second, leading to UI freezes, dropped frames, or stale data. This paper presents an AI-assisted adaptive rendering framework that dynamically regulates visual update frequency, prioritizes semantically relevant events, and selectively aggregates lower-priority data using behavior-driven heuristics and lightweight on-device machine learning models. Experimental validation demonstrates a 45-60 percent reduction in rendering overhead while maintaining analyst perception of real-time responsiveness.

【36】ASafePlace: User-Led Personalization of VR Relaxation via an Art Therapy Activity
- **标题**: ASafePlace：通过艺术治疗活动实现用户主导的 VR 放松个性化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01579
> **作者**: Chuyang Zhang,Bin Yu,Yuchao Wang,Mansi Yuan,Wanqi Wang,Seungwoo Je,Pengcheng An
> **摘要**: 为了克服标准生物反馈方法缺乏深度个性化的问题，我们引入了 ASafePlace，这是一个利用人工智能驱动、受艺术治疗启发的练习“安全之地”的系统，来创建个性化的 VR 生物反馈体验。在我们的系统中，用户根据记忆勾勒出一个个人庇护所，然后将其转换为定制的 360 度虚拟环境，并提供个性化的音频指导以进行放松训练。一项针对 52 名参与者的研究表明，这种方法有效地减少了焦虑并增加了用户的存在感，而艺术疗法启发的活动和生物反馈的结合产生了生理放松的显着改善（通过心率变异性和呼吸频率来衡量）。定性结果表明，参与者的熟悉感和存在感如何通过自传记忆中创建的象征元素和自然保护区得到增强。我们的研究结果表明，受艺术治疗启发的活动是创造高效和个性化放松体验的强大工具，可以自然地将虚拟环境与用户的核心记忆和情感联系起来。
> **Abstract**: To overcome the lack of deep personalization in standard biofeedback methods, we introduce ASafePlace, a system utilizing an AI-powered, art-therapy-inspired exercise called The Safe Place, to create a personalized VR biofeedback experience. In our system, users sketch a personal sanctuary from memory, which is then transformed into a customized 360 virtual environment with personalized audio guidance for relaxation training. A study with 52 participants showed this approach effectively reduced anxiety and increased user presence, while the integration of art-therapy-inspired activity and biofeedback produced strong improvements in physiological relaxation, measured by heart rate variability and respiration rate. Qualitative results showed how participants' sense of familiarity and presence was enhanced by the symbolic elements and natural sanctuaries created from their autobiographical memories. Our findings demonstrate that art-therapy-inspired activity is a powerful tool for creating highly effective and individualized relaxation experiences, naturally connecting the virtual environment to a user's core memories and emotions.

【37】Toward a Machine Bertin: Why Visualization Needs Design Principles for Machine Cognition
- **标题**: 走向机器 Bertin：为什么可视化需要机器认知的设计原则
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01527
> **作者**: Brian Keith-Norambuena
> **摘要**: 可视化的设计知识有效性排名、编码指南、颜色模型、前注意处理规则——源自六十年对人类视觉的心理物理学研究。然而，视觉语言模型 (VLM) 越来越多地在自动分析管道中消耗图表图像，并且越来越多的基准证据表明，这种以人为中心的知识库并不能直接转移到机器受众。机器表现出不同的编码性能模式，通过基于补丁的标记化而不是整体感知来处理图像，并且在对人类来说不构成任何困难的设计模式上失败，但偶尔会在人类挣扎的地方取得成功。目前的方法主要通过完全绕过视觉，将图表转换为数据表或结构化文本来解决这一差距。我们认为，这种回应排除了一个更基本的问题：什么样的视觉表示实际上可以很好地服务于机器认知？本文认为可视化领域需要将面向机器的视觉设计作为一个独特的研究问题进行研究。我们综合了 VLM 基准、视觉推理研究和可视化素养研究的证据，表明人机感知差异是定性的，而不仅仅是定量的，并批判性地审视了普遍存在的绕过方法。我们提出了以人为本和以机器为导向的可视化之间的概念区别——不是作为一种工程架构，而是作为一种认识，不同的受众可能需要根本不同的设计基础——并概述了一个研究议程，用于开发该领域目前缺乏的经验基础：“机器 Bertin”的开始，以补充该领域已经拥有的以人为中心的知识。
> **Abstract**: Visualization's design knowledge-effectiveness rankings, encoding guidelines, color models, preattentive processing rules -- derives from six decades of psychophysical studies of human vision. Yet vision-language models (VLMs) increasingly consume chart images in automated analysis pipelines, and a growing body of benchmark evidence indicates that this human-centered knowledge base does not straightforwardly transfer to machine audiences. Machines exhibit different encoding performance patterns, process images through patch-based tokenization rather than holistic perception, and fail on design patterns that pose no difficulty for humans-while occasionally succeeding where humans struggle. Current approaches address this gap primarily by bypassing vision entirely, converting charts to data tables or structured text. We argue that this response forecloses a more fundamental question: what visual representations would actually serve machine cognition well? This paper makes the case that the visualization field needs to investigate machine-oriented visual design as a distinct research problem. We synthesize evidence from VLM benchmarks, visual reasoning research, and visualization literacy studies to show that the human-machine perceptual divergence is qualitative, not merely quantitative, and critically examine the prevailing bypassing approach. We propose a conceptual distinction between human-oriented and machine-oriented visualization-not as an engineering architecture but as a recognition that different audiences may require fundamentally different design foundations-and outline a research agenda for developing the empirical foundations the field currently lacks: the beginnings of a "machine Bertin" to complement the human-centered knowledge the field already possesses.

【38】How Notations Evolve: A Historical Analysis with Implications for Supporting User-Defined Abstractions
- **标题**: 符号如何演变：历史分析及其对支持用户定义抽象的影响
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01525
> **作者**: Jingyue Zhang,J. D. Zamfirescu-Pereira,Elena L. Glassman,Damien Masson,Ian Arawjo
> **摘要**: 传统的人机交互是通过结构化 UI 和编程语言等正式指定的系统进行的。最近的人工智能系统有望通过自然语言和其他符号形式与计算机进行一系列新的非正式交互。这些非正式的互动可以导致正式的表示，但取决于人类和人工智能已知的预先存在的形式主义。新颖的形式主义和符号又如何呢？随着时间的推移，新的抽象是如何创建、演化和逐步形式化的——以及新系统又如何明确设计来支持这些过程？我们对符号发展进行比较历史分析，以确定一些相关特征。其中包括符号发展的三个社会阶段：发明与孵化、分散与分歧、制度化与神圣化，以及三个功能阶段：描述性、生成性和评价性。在这些阶段内和跨这些阶段，我们详细介绍了几种模式，例如连接和基础隐喻的作用、有意义的变化的维度以及类比对齐。最后，我们提供了一些对设计的启示。
> **Abstract**: Traditional human-computer interaction takes place through formally-specified systems like structured UIs and programming languages. Recent AI systems promise a new set of informal interactions with computers through natural language and other notational forms. These informal interactions can then lead to formal representations, but depend upon pre-existing formalisms known to both humans and AI. What about novel formalisms and notations? How are new abstractions created, evolved, and incrementally formalized over time -- and how might new systems, in turn, be explicitly designed to support these processes? We conduct a comparative historical analysis of notation development to identify some relevant characteristics. These include three social stages of notation development: invention & incubation, dispersion & divergence, and institutionalization & sanctification, as well as three functional stages: descriptive, generative, and evaluative. Within and across these stages, we detail several patterns, such as the role of linking and grounding metaphors, dimensions of meaningful variation, and analogical alignment. Finally, we offer some implications for design.

【39】Data Repair
- **标题**: 数据修复
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01517
> **作者**: ATM Mizanur Rahman,Syed Ishtiaque Ahmed,Sharifa Sultana
> **摘要**: 本文通过孟加拉国为期六个月的民族志研究来调查数据修复实践。我们对数据修复者和相关利益相关者的采访和实地观察发现，除了缺乏高精度机械和先进软件之外，数据修复工作还受到跨语言学习资源以及记录、策划和当地同行之间分享经验和知识的保护性质的限制。求助于外国论坛和法学硕士等外部资源的维修人员也透露了他们令人沮丧的经历以及他们遇到的后殖民道德紧张局势。我们注意到，在为数据修复工作定价时考虑了预期的技术劳动力和数据的情感，这有助于他们的市场可持续性战略。通过参与修复、基础设施和数据贫困讨论，我们认为数据修复实践对于 HCI 来说是推动全球数据公平努力的关键挑战和机遇。
> **Abstract**: This paper investigates data repair practices through a six-month-long ethnographic study in Bangladesh. Our interviews and field observations with data repairers and related stakeholders found that, alongside the scarcity of high-precision machinery and access to advanced software, data repair work is constrained by cross-language learning resources and the protective nature of documenting, curating, and sharing the experiences and knowledge among local peers. Repairers turning to external resources such as foreign forums and LLMs also revealed their frustrating experiences and the postcolonial ethical tensions they encountered. We noted that both anticipated technical labor and the emotionality of data were taken into account for pricing the data repair job, which contributed to their market sustainability strategies. Engaging with repair, infrastructure, and data poverty discourse, we argue that data repair practices represent a crucial challenge and opportunity for HCI in advancing global efforts toward data equity.

【40】Draw2Learn: A Human-AI Collaborative Tool for Drawing-Based Science Learning
- **标题**: Draw2Learn：基于绘图的科学学习的人机协作工具
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01494
> **作者**: Yuqi Hang
> **摘要**: 绘画通过外化心理模型来支持学习，但提供大规模的及时反馈仍然具有挑战性。我们推出了 Draw2Learn，这是一个探索人工智能如何在基于绘画的学习过程中充当支持性队友的系统。该设计将学习原则转化为具体的交互模式：人工智能生成结构化绘图任务，提供可选的视觉支架，监控进度并提供多维反馈。我们在系统开发过程中收集了形成性的用户反馈和开放式评论。反馈显示了对可用性、有用性和用户体验的积极评价，主题强调人工智能支架的价值和学习者的自主性。这项工作为生成学习中面向队友的人工智能提供了一个设计框架，并确定了未来研究的关键考虑因素。
> **Abstract**: Drawing supports learning by externalizing mental models, but providing timely feedback at scale remains challenging. We present Draw2Learn, a system that explores how AI can act as a supportive teammate during drawing-based learning. The design translates learning principles into concrete interaction patterns: AI generates structured drawing quests, provides optional visual scaffolds, monitors progress, and delivers multidimensional feedback. We collected formative user feedback during system development and open-ended comments. Feedback showed positive ratings for usability, usefulness, and user experience, with themes highlighting AI scaffolding value and learner autonomy. This work contributes a design framework for teammate-oriented AI in generative learning and identifies key considerations for future research.

【41】How Users Perceive Mixed-Initiative AI: Attitudes Toward Assistance in Problem Solving
- **标题**: 用户如何看待混合主动人工智能：对帮助解决问题的态度
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01481
> **作者**: Yunhao Luo,Arthur Caetano,Avinash Ajit Nargund,Tobias Höllerer,Misha Sra
> **摘要**: 在混合主动系统中，人工智能援助提供的模式可能与援助本身一样重要。我们研究了两种帮助提供模式：按需帮助（用户通过按钮请求）和预先安排的帮助（按照用户选择的时间间隔提供帮助，用户操作重置计时器）。为了评估这些模式，我们选择“尖峰时刻”谜题作为人机协作任务，因为它们捕捉了现实世界问题解决的要素，例如分析、资源管理和约束下的决策。为了增强生态有效性，我们对时间和人工智能援助施加了货币成本，模拟人们必须平衡隐性或显性权衡的场景，例如时间压力、财务限制或机会成本。尽管不同模式下的任务表现相当，但使用预先安排（计时器）模式的参与者对人工智能的看法更为积极，即使他们的最终预算较低。这表明援助交付模式可以塑造独立于任务结果的用户体验，这表明人类人工智能系统可能需要考虑如何在提高任务绩效的同时交付人工智能援助。
> **Abstract**: In mixed-initiative systems, the mode of AI assistance delivery can be as consequential as the assistance itself. We investigated two assistance delivery modes: on-demand help (users request via Button) and pre-scheduled help (assistance delivered at user-selected intervals, with user actions resetting the Timer). To evaluate these modes, we selected Rush Hour puzzles as the human-AI collaborative task because they capture elements of real-world problem solving such as analysis, resource management, and decision-making under constraints. To enhance ecological validity, we imposed monetary costs for both time and AI assistance, simulating scenarios where people must balance implicit or explicit trade-offs such as time pressure, financial limitations, or opportunity costs. Although task performance was comparable across modes, participants who used the pre-scheduled (Timer) mode reported more positive perceptions of the AI, even when their ending budget was low. This suggests that assistance delivery mode can shape user experience independent of task outcomes, indicating that human-AI systems may need to consider how AI assistance is delivered alongside improving task performance.

【42】The Algorithmic Self-Portrait: Deconstructing Memory in ChatGPT
- **标题**: 算法自画像：解构 ChatGPT 中的内存
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01450
> **作者**: Abhisek Dash,Soumi Das,Elisabeth Kirsten,Qinyuan Wu,Sai Keerthana Karnam,Krishna P. Gummadi,Thorsten Holz,Muhammad Bilal Zafar,Savvas Zannettou
> **摘要**: 为了实现个性化和上下文感知交互，对话式人工智能系统引入了一种新机制：记忆。记忆创造了我们所说的算法自画像——一种新的个性化形式，源自用户在私人对话中泄露的自我披露信息。虽然记忆可以实现更连贯的交换，但记忆创建的底层过程仍然不透明，引发了有关数据敏感性、用户代理和最终肖像的保真度的关键问题。为了弥补这一研究差距，我们分析了来自 80 个真实 ChatGPT 用户的 2,050 个内存条目。我们的分析揭示了三个关键发现：（1）我们数据集中惊人的 96% 的记忆是由对话系统单方面创建的，这可能会转移用户的代理权； (2) 在我们的数据集中，记忆包含丰富的 GDPR 定义的个人数据（在 28% 的记忆中）以及有关参与者的心理洞察（在 52% 的记忆中）； (3)~绝大多数记忆（84%）直接基于用户上下文，表明对话的忠实再现。最后，我们引入了一个框架 - 归因盾 - 它可以预测这些推论，对潜在敏感的记忆推论发出警报，并建议重新制定查询以在不牺牲实用性的情况下保护个人信息。
> **Abstract**: To enable personalized and context-aware interactions, conversational AI systems have introduced a new mechanism: Memory. Memory creates what we refer to as the Algorithmic Self-portrait - a new form of personalization derived from users' self-disclosed information divulged within private conversations. While memory enables more coherent exchanges, the underlying processes of memory creation remain opaque, raising critical questions about data sensitivity, user agency, and the fidelity of the resulting portrait. To bridge this research gap, we analyze 2,050 memory entries from 80 real-world ChatGPT users. Our analyses reveal three key findings: (1) A striking 96% of memories in our dataset are created unilaterally by the conversational system, potentially shifting agency away from the user; (2) Memories, in our dataset, contain a rich mix of GDPR-defined personal data (in 28% memories) along with psychological insights about participants (in 52% memories); and (3)~A significant majority of the memories (84%) are directly grounded in user context, indicating faithful representation of the conversations. Finally, we introduce a framework-Attribution Shield-that anticipates these inferences, alerts about potentially sensitive memory inferences, and suggests query reformulations to protect personal information without sacrificing utility.

【43】From One World to Another: Interfaces for Efficiently Transitioning Between Virtual Environments
- **标题**: 从一个世界到另一个世界：在虚拟环境之间高效转换的接口
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01423
> **作者**: Matt Gottsacker,Yahya Hmaiti,Mykola Maslych,Hiroshi Furuya,Jasmine Joyce DeGuzman,Gerd Bruder,Gregory F. Welch,Joseph J. LaViola Jr
> **摘要**: 个人计算机和手持设备提供键盘快捷键和滑动手势，使用户能够在应用程序之间高效切换，而当今的虚拟现实 (VR) 系统则不具备这种功能。在这项工作中，我们对用户界面方面进行了探索性研究，以支持 VR 世界之间的高效切换。我们创建了八个界面，可以预览并从可用的虚拟世界中进行选择，包括使用门户和微型世界 (WiM) 的方法。为了评估这些方法，我们进行了一项受控的受试者内实证实验（N=22），参与者经常在六种不同的环境之间转换以完成对象收集任务。我们的定量和定性结果表明，WiM 支持在搜索时快速获取高级空间信息，并且被参与者认为是最有效的，而门户提供快速预先定位。最后，我们对我们探索的 VR 世界切换方法的适用性、可用性和有效性提出了见解，并为其应用和未来上下文/世界切换技术和界面提供了建议。
> **Abstract**: Personal computers and handheld devices provide keyboard shortcuts and swipe gestures to enable users to efficiently switch between applications, whereas today's virtual reality (VR) systems do not. In this work, we present an exploratory study on user interface aspects to support efficient switching between worlds in VR. We created eight interfaces that afford previewing and selecting from the available virtual worlds, including methods using portals and worlds-in-miniature (WiMs). To evaluate these methods, we conducted a controlled within-subjects empirical experiment (N=22) where participants frequently transitioned between six different environments to complete an object collection task. Our quantitative and qualitative results show that WiMs supported rapid acquisition of high-level spatial information while searching and were deemed most efficient by participants while portals provided fast pre-orientation. Finally, we present insights into the applicability, usability, and effectiveness of the VR world switching methods we explored, and provide recommendations for their application and future context/world switching techniques and interfaces.

【44】Feedback by Design: Understanding and Overcoming User Feedback Barriers in Conversational Agents
- **标题**: 设计反馈：理解和克服会话代理中的用户反馈障碍
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01405
> **作者**: Nikhil Sharma,Zheng Zhang,Daniel Lee,Namita Krishnan,Guang-Jie Ren,Ziang Xiao,Yunyao Li
> **摘要**: 高质量的反馈对于有效的人机交互至关重要。它弥合了知识差距、纠正离题并塑造系统行为；在交互期间和整个模型开发过程中。然而，尽管人工智能很重要，但人类对人工智能的反馈往往并不频繁且质量较低。这种差距促使我们对人类在与人工智能交互过程中的反馈进行严格的检查。为了了解并克服阻碍用户提供高质量反馈的挑战，我们进行了两项研究，检查人类和会话代理 (CA) 之间的反馈动态。我们的形成性研究通过格莱斯格言的视角，确定了四个反馈障碍——共同点、可验证性、沟通和信息性——阻碍用户提供高质量的反馈。基于这些发现，我们得出了三个设计需求，并表明包含与这些需求一致的支架的系统使用户能够提供更高质量的反馈。最后，我们详细呼吁更广泛的人工智能社区采取行动，推动大型语言模型功能的进步，以克服反馈障碍。
> **Abstract**: High-quality feedback is essential for effective human-AI interaction. It bridges knowledge gaps, corrects digressions, and shapes system behavior; both during interaction and throughout model development. Yet despite its importance, human feedback to AI is often infrequent and low quality. This gap motivates a critical examination of human feedback during interactions with AIs. To understand and overcome the challenges preventing users from giving high-quality feedback, we conducted two studies examining feedback dynamics between humans and conversational agents (CAs). Our formative study, through the lens of Grice's maxims, identified four Feedback Barriers -- Common Ground, Verifiability, Communication, and Informativeness -- that prevent high-quality feedback by users. Building on these findings, we derive three design desiderata and show that systems incorporating scaffolds aligned with these desiderata enabled users to provide higher-quality feedback. Finally, we detail a call for action to the broader AI community for advances in Large Language Models capabilities to overcome Feedback Barriers.

【45】Living Contracts: Beyond Document-Centric Interaction with Legal Agreements
- **标题**: 活合同：超越以文档为中心的与法律协议的交互
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01396
> **作者**: Ziheng Huang,Robin Kar,Hari Sundaram,Tal August
> **摘要**: 用户与法律合同的交互仅限于文档阅读，而复杂、模糊的法律语言往往使文档阅读变得复杂。我们探索未来可能的合同界面超越单一文档界面，以（1）教育用户拥有合同中未规定的合法权利，（2）将法律语言转换为替代表示形式，以在签署之前、期间和之后帮助完成信息任务，以及（3）在相关时刻主动提供合同信息。我们将这些未来的接口统称为“Living Contracts”。以住宅租赁作为案例研究，我们创建了三个代表不同可能的居住合同的设计探针。一项由三部分组成的定性研究（N=18）揭示了参与者与合同互动的障碍，包括解释复杂的语言、法律权利的不确定性以及快速签署的压力。参与者对调查的反馈强调了生命合约如何有潜力解决这些挑战，并为文档阅读之外的人机交互开辟新的设计机会。
> **Abstract**: User interaction with legal contracts has been limited to document reading, which is often complicated by complex, ambiguous legal language. We explore possible futures where contract interfaces go beyond single document interfaces to (1) educate users with legal rights not stated in the contract, (2) transform legal language into alternative representations to aid information tasks before, during, and after signing, and (3) proactively supply contractual information at relevant moments. We refer to these future interfaces collectively as Living Contracts. Using residential leases as a case study, we created three design probes representing different possible Living Contracts. A three-part qualitative study (N=18) revealed participants' barriers to interacting with contracts, including interpreting complex language, uncertainty about legal rights, and the pressure to sign quickly. Participants' feedback on the probes highlighted how Living Contracts have the potential to address these challenges and open new design opportunities for human-contract interactions beyond document reading.

【46】How well can VLMs rate audio descriptions: A multi-dimensional quantitative assessment framework
- **标题**: VLM 对音频描述的评价效果如何：多维定量评估框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01390
> **作者**: Lana Do,Gio Jung,Juvenal Francisco Barajas,Andrew Taylor Scott,Shasta Ihorn,Alexander Mario Blum,Vassilis Athitsos,Ilmi Yoon
> **摘要**: 数字视频是交流、教育和娱乐的核心，但如果没有音频描述 (AD)，盲人和弱视观众就会被排除在外。虽然众包平台和视觉语言模型 (VLM) 扩大了广告生产，但很少对质量进行系统检查。现有的评估依赖于 NLP 指标和短片指南，留下了关于什么构成完整内容的质量以及如何大规模评估它的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们首先开发了一个不间断的完整视频的多维度评估框架，该框架以专业指南为基础，并由无障碍专家完善。其次，我们利用项目响应理论将该框架集成到一个全面的方法论工作流程中，以根据专家建立的基本事实来评估 VLM 和人类评分者的熟练程度。研究结果表明，虽然 VLM 可以高度一致地近似真实评分，但它们的推理被发现不如人类受访者的可靠和可操作。这些见解显示了混合评估系统的潜力，该系统利用 VLM 和人工监督，为可扩展的 AD 质量控制提供了一条途径。
> **Abstract**: Digital video is central to communication, education, and entertainment, but without audio description (AD), blind and low-vision audiences are excluded. While crowdsourced platforms and vision-language-models (VLMs) expand AD production, quality is rarely checked systematically. Existing evaluations rely on NLP metrics and short-clip guidelines, leaving questions about what constitutes quality for full-length content and how to assess it at scale. To address these questions, we first developed a multi-dimensional assessment framework for uninterrupted, full-length video, grounded in professional guidelines and refined by accessibility specialists. Second, we integrated this framework into a comprehensive methodological workflow, utilizing Item Response Theory, to assess the proficiency of VLM and human raters against expert-established ground truth. Findings suggest that while VLMs can approximate ground-truth ratings with high alignment, their reasoning was found to be less reliable and actionable than that of human respondents. These insights show the potential of hybrid evaluation systems that leverage VLMs alongside human oversight, offering a path towards scalable AD quality control.

【47】Disclose with Care: Designing Privacy Controls in Interview Chatbots
- **标题**: 谨慎披露：在面试聊天机器人中设计隐私控制
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01387
> **作者**: Ziwen Li,Ziang Xiao,Tianshi Li
> **摘要**: 在人机交互中收集敏感主题的数据仍然具有挑战性，因为参与者经常出于隐私问题和社会期望偏见而隐瞒信息。虽然聊天机器人的匿名性可能会减少这些障碍，但矛盾的是，研究表明人们倾向于与聊天机器人过度分享个人或敏感信息。在这项工作中，我们探索聊天机器人采访中的隐私控制以解决这个问题。隐私控制允许参与者在采访结束时修改他们的笔录，有两种设计变体：免费编辑和人工智能辅助编辑。在一项受试者间研究 \red{($N=188$)} 中，我们在基于聊天机器人的采访中就敏感话题比较了无编辑、自由编辑和人工智能辅助编辑条件。我们的结果证实了基于聊天机器人的采访中普遍存在的过度分享问题，并表明人工智能辅助编辑是一种有效的隐私控制机制，可以减少 PII 披露，同时保持数据质量和用户参与度，从而为平衡此类采访中的道德实践和数据质量提供了一种有前景的方法。
> **Abstract**: Collecting data on sensitive topics remains challenging in HCI, as participants often withhold information due to privacy concerns and social desirability bias. While chatbots' perceived anonymity may reduce these barriers, research paradoxically suggests people tend to over-share personal or sensitive information with chatbots. In this work, we explore privacy controls in chatbot interviews to address this problem. The privacy control allows participants to revise their transcripts at the end of the interview, featuring two design variants: free editing and AI-aided editing. In a between-subjects study \red{($N=188$)}, we compared no-editing, free-editing, and AI-aided editing conditions in a chatbot-based interview on a sensitive topic. Our results confirm the prevalent issue of oversharing in chatbot-based interviews and show that AI-aided editing serves as an effective privacy-control mechanism, reducing PII disclosure while maintaining data quality and user engagement, thereby offering a promising approach to balancing ethical practice and data quality in such interviews.

【48】"If You're Very Clever, No One Knows You've Used It": The Social Dynamics of Developing Generative AI Literacy in the Workplace
- **标题**: “如果你很聪明，没有人知道你用过它”：在工作场所培养生成式人工智能素养的社会动力
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01386
> **作者**: Qing,Xia,Marios Constantinides,Advait Sarkar,Duncan Brumby,Anna Cox
> **摘要**: 生成式人工智能 (GenAI) 工具正在迅速改变知识工作，使人工智能素养成为组织的首要任务。然而，关于人工智能素养的研究缺乏对知识工作者对 GenAI 素养的信念如何受到工作场所的社会动态影响以及工人如何学习在这些环境中应用 GenAI 工具的实证洞察。为了弥补这一差距，我们对多个行业的 19 名知识工作者进行了深入访谈，研究他们如何在现实专业环境中培养 GenAI 能力。我们发现，虽然同事的知识共享支持学习，但消除指示 GenAI 使用线索的能力被视为对领域专业知识的验证。这些行为最终减少了通过知识共享进行学习的机会并破坏了透明度。为了提高工作场所人工智能素养，我们主张促进开放对话，提高用户生成知识的可见性，并更加强调协作学习对推动技术快速发展的好处。
> **Abstract**: Generative AI (GenAI) tools are rapidly transforming knowledge work, making AI literacy a critical priority for organizations. However, research on AI literacy lacks empirical insight into how knowledge workers' beliefs around GenAI literacy are shaped by the social dynamics of the workplace, and how workers learn to apply GenAI tools in these environments. To address this gap, we conducted in-depth interviews with 19 knowledge workers across multiple sectors to examine how they develop GenAI competencies in real-world professional contexts. We found that, while knowledge sharing from colleagues supported learning, the ability to remove cues indicating GenAI use was perceived as validation of domain expertise. These behaviours ultimately reduced opportunities for learning via knowledge sharing and undermined transparency. To advance workplace AI literacy, we argue for fostering open dialogue, increasing visibility of user-generated knowledge, and greater emphasis on the benefits of collaborative learning for navigating rapid technological developments.

【49】Trade-offs in Financial AI: Explainability in a Trilemma with Accuracy and Compliance
- **标题**: 金融人工智能的权衡：三难困境中的可解释性与准确性和合规性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01368
> **作者**: Patricia Marcella Evite,Ekaterina Svetlova,Doina Bucur
> **摘要**: 随着人工智能 (AI) 越来越多地融入金融决策，复杂模型的不透明性给专业人士和监管机构带来了重大挑战。虽然可解释人工智能（XAI）领域试图弥合这一差距，但当前的研究通常将实施挑战减少到模型准确性和可解释性之间的二元权衡。本文认为，这种观点对于金融领域来说是不够的，因为在金融领域，算法选择必须适应严格的监管界限、预算限制和延迟要求的复杂社会技术网络。通过对 20 名财务专业人士（从高管和开发人员到多个地区的监管机构）进行半结构化访谈，本研究实证调查了从业者如何相对于四个竞争因素（准确性、合规性、成本和速度）优先考虑可解释性。我们的研究结果表明，这些优先事项的结构不是简单的权衡，而是一个具有不同先决条件和约束的系统。准确性和合规性成为不可协商的“卫生因素”：没有它们，人工智能系统无论其透明度如何都会被视为一种责任。操作杠杆（速度和成本）是决定实际可行性的次要约束，而易于理解则作为采用的门户，决定着人工智能工具在实践中是否值得信任、使用和防御。
> **Abstract**: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) becomes increasingly embedded in financial decision-making, the opacity of complex models presents significant challenges for professionals and regulators. While the field of Explainable AI (XAI) attempts to bridge this gap, current research often reduces the implementation challenge to a binary trade-off between model accuracy and explainability. This paper argues that such a view is insufficient for the financial domain, where algorithmic choices must navigate a complex sociotechnical web of strict regulatory bounds, budget constraints, and latency requirements. Through semi-structured interviews with twenty finance professionals, ranging from C-suite executives and developers to regulators across multiple regions, this study empirically investigates how practitioners prioritize explainability relative to four competing factors: accuracy, compliance, cost, and speed. Our findings reveal that these priorities are structured not as a simple trade-off, but as a system of distinct prerequisites and constraints. Accuracy and compliance emerge as non-negotiable "hygiene factors": without them, an AI system is viewed as a liability regardless of its transparency. Operational levers (speed and cost) serve as secondary constraints that determine practical feasibility, while ease of understanding functions as a gateway to adoption, shaping whether AI tools are trusted, used, and defensible in practice.

【50】Shades of Uncertainty: How AI Uncertainty Visualizations Affect Trust in Alzheimer's Predictions
- **标题**: 不确定性的阴影：人工智能不确定性可视化如何影响对阿尔茨海默病预测的信任
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01264
> **作者**: Jonatan Reyes,Mina Massoumi,Anil Ufuk Batmaz,Marta Kersten-Oertel
> **摘要**: Artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly used to support prognosis in Alzheimer's disease (AD), but adoption remains limited due to a lack of transparency and interpretability, particularly for long-term predictions where uncertainty is intrinsic and outcomes may not be known for years.我们将不确定性可视化定位为一种可解释的人工智能（XAI）技术，并研究当用户解释人工智能生成的对未来认知衰退转变的预测时，它如何塑造信任、信心和依赖。我们进行了两项研究，一项涉及普通参与者 (N=37)，另一项涉及神经影像和神经病学专家 (N=10)，以比较二元（存在/不存在）和连续（饱和）不确定性编码。连续编码提高了感知可靠性并帮助用户认识到模型的局限性，而二进制编码则增加了瞬时置信度，揭示了在高度不确定性下解释未来预测时依赖于专业知识的权衡。这些发现揭示了设计预测人工智能的不确定性表示的关键挑战，并最终形成了一套基于经验的指南，用于创建值得信赖、适合用户的临床决策支持工具。
> **Abstract**: Artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly used to support prognosis in Alzheimer's disease (AD), but adoption remains limited due to a lack of transparency and interpretability, particularly for long-term predictions where uncertainty is intrinsic and outcomes may not be known for years. We position uncertainty visualization as an explainable AI (XAI) technique and examine how it shapes trust, confidence, and reliance when users interpret AI-generated forecasts of future cognitive decline transitions. We conducted two studies, one with general participants (N=37) and one with experts in neuroimaging and neurology (N=10), to compare binary (present/absent) and continuous (saturation) uncertainty encodings. Continuous encodings improved perceived reliability and helped users recognize model limitations, while binary encodings increased momentary confidence, revealing expertise-dependent trade-offs in interpreting future predictions under high uncertainty. These findings surface key challenges in designing uncertainty representations for prognostic AI and culminate in a set of empirically grounded guidelines for creating trustworthy, user-appropriate clinical decision support tools.

【51】LeagueBot: A Voice LLM Companion of Cognitive and Emotional Support for Novice Players in Competitive Games
- **标题**: LeagueBot：语音法学硕士伴侣，为竞技游戏中的新手玩家提供认知和情感支持
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01213
> **作者**: Jungmin Lee,Inhee Cho,Youngjae Yoo
> **摘要**: 竞争性游戏会带来陡峭的学习曲线和强大的社会压力，常常会阻碍新手玩家并限制持续参与。为了应对这些挑战，本研究引入了 LeagueBot，这是一种基于大型语言模型的语音聊天机器人，旨在在英雄联盟（最具竞争力的多人在线竞技场游戏之一）的实时游戏过程中提供信息和情感支持。在对 33 名新手玩家进行的受试者内实验中，发现 LeagueBot 可以减少认知挑战、表演挑战和感知紧张。定性分析进一步确定了三个主题：增强对游戏信息的获取、减轻认知负担和实际限制。参与者指出，LeagueBot 提供了适合情境的指导和情感支持，有助于缓解竞技游戏的陡峭学习曲线和心理压力。总之，这些发现强调了基于语音的法学硕士同伴在竞争环境中帮助新手的潜力，并强调了它们在其他高压环境中提供实时支持的更广泛适用性。
> **Abstract**: Competitive games pose steep learning curves and strong social pressures, often discouraging novice players and limiting sustained engagement. To address these challenges, this study introduces LeagueBot, a large language model-based voice chatbot designed to provide both informational and emotional support during live gameplay in league of legends, one of the most competitive multiplayer online battle arena games. In a within-subjects experiment with 33 novice players, LeagueBot was found to reduce cognitive challenge, performative challenge, and perceived tension. Qualitative analysis further identified three themes: enhanced access to game information, relief from cognitive burden, and practical limitations. Participants noted that LeagueBot offered context-appropriate guidance and emotional support, helping ease the steep learning curve and psychological pressures of competitive gaming. Together, these findings underscore the potential of voice-based LLM companions to assist novice players in competitive environments and highlight their broader applicability for real-time support in other high-pressure contexts.

【52】Talk to Me, Not the Slides: A Real-Time Wearable Assistant for Improving Eye Contact in Presentations
- **标题**: 跟我说话，而不是幻灯片：用于改善演示中目光接触的实时可穿戴助手
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01201
> **作者**: Lingyu Du,Xucong Zhang,Guohao Lan
> **摘要**: 有效的目光接触是成功公开演讲的基石。它增强了演讲者的可信度并促进了听众的参与。然而，管理有效的目光接触是一项需要大量培训和练习的技能，这通常对新手演讲者构成重大挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 SpeakAssis，这是第一个实时现场可穿戴系统，旨在主动协助演讲者在现场演示期间保持有效的眼神交流。 SpeakAssis 利用头戴式眼动仪进行注视和场景视图捕捉，持续监控和分析演讲者在观众和非观众区域的注视分布。当检测到无效的眼神接触模式时，例如眼神接触不足或忽视某些受众群体，SpeakAssis 会通过耳机提供及时的上下文感知音频提示，以指导演讲者的注视行为。我们通过一项涉及 8 名演讲者和 24 名观众的用户研究来评估 SpeakAssis。定量结果表明，SpeakAssis 使演讲者的目光接触持续时间平均增加了 62.5%，并促进了视觉注意力的更平衡分配。此外，基于观众调查的统计分析表明，演讲者目光接触行为的改善可以显着增强观众在演讲过程中的感知参与度和互动性。
> **Abstract**: Effective eye contact is a cornerstone of successful public speaking. It strengthens the speaker's credibility and fosters audience engagement. Yet, managing effective eye contact is a skill that demands extensive training and practice, often posing a significant challenge for novice speakers. In this paper, we present SpeakAssis, the first real-time, in-situ wearable system designed to actively assist speakers in maintaining effective eye contact during live presentations. Leveraging a head-mounted eye tracker for gaze and scene view capture, SpeakAssis continuously monitors and analyzes the speaker's gaze distribution across audience and non-audience regions. When ineffective eye-contact patterns are detected, such as insufficient eye contact, or neglect of certain audience segments, SpeakAssis provides timely, context-aware audio prompts via an earphone to guide the speaker's gaze behavior. We evaluate SpeakAssis through a user study involving eight speakers and 24 audience members. Quantitative results show that SpeakAssis increases speakers' eye-contact duration by 62.5% on average and promotes a more balanced distribution of visual attention. Additionally, statistical analysis based on audience surveys reveals that improvements in speaker's eye-contact behavior significantly enhance the audience's perceived engagement and interactivity during presentations.

【53】Bowling with ChatGPT: On the Evolving User Interactions with Conversational AI Systems
- **标题**: 使用 ChatGPT 打保龄球：论与对话式 AI 系统不断发展的用户交互
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01114
> **作者**: Sai Keerthana Karnam,Abhisek Dash,Krishna Gummadi,Animesh Mukherjee,Ingmar Weber,Savvas Zannettou
> **摘要**: 最近的研究讨论了用户如何越来越多地使用由法学硕士支持的对话式人工智能系统来寻求信息、决策支持甚至情感支持。然而，这些宏观层面的观察对于这些交互的目的如何随着时间的推移而变化、用户如何构建与系统的交互以及这些人机交互中的转向动态如何展开的了解有限。为了研究这些不断变化的动态，我们收集并分析了一个独特的数据集 InVivoGPT：由 300 位用户通过其 GDPR 数据权捐赠的 825K ChatGPT 交互组成。我们的分析揭示了三个关键发现。首先，参与者越来越多地出于更广泛的目的而转向 ChatGPT，包括健康和心理健康等敏感领域的大幅增长。其次，互动变得更加社会化：系统以越来越快的速度将自身拟人化，参与者更频繁地将其视为同伴，个人数据泄露变得更加普遍和多样化。第三，对话引导变得更加突出，尤其是在 GPT-4o 发布之后，参与者遵循模型发起的建议的对话在我们的数据集期间增加了四倍。总体而言，我们的结果表明，对话式人工智能系统正在从功能性工具转向社会合作伙伴，这引发了有关其设计和治理的重要问题。
> **Abstract**: Recent studies have discussed how users are increasingly using conversational AI systems, powered by LLMs, for information seeking, decision support, and even emotional support. However, these macro-level observations offer limited insight into how the purpose of these interactions shifts over time, how users frame their interactions with the system, and how steering dynamics unfold in these human-AI interactions. To examine these evolving dynamics, we gathered and analyzed a unique dataset InVivoGPT: consisting of 825K ChatGPT interactions, donated by 300 users through their GDPR data rights. Our analyses reveal three key findings. First, participants increasingly turn to ChatGPT for a broader range of purposes, including substantial growth in sensitive domains such as health and mental health. Second, interactions become more socially framed: the system anthropomorphizes itself at rising rates, participants more frequently treat it as a companion, and personal data disclosure becomes both more common and more diverse. Third, conversational steering becomes more prominent, especially after the release of GPT-4o, with conversations where the participants followed a model-initiated suggestion quadrupling over the period of our dataset. Overall, our results show that conversational AI systems are shifting from functional tools to social partners, raising important questions about their design and governance.

【54】From Invisible to Actionable: Augmented Reality Interactions with Indoor CO2
- **标题**: 从隐形到可操作：增强现实与室内二氧化碳的交互
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01084
> **作者**: Prasenjit Karmakar,Manjeet Yadav,Swayanshu Rout,Swadhin Pradhan,Sandip Chakraborty
> **摘要**: 室内二氧化碳（CO2）可迅速积聚，形成看不见的污染热点，由于其无味无色的性质，对健康构成重大风险。尽管人们对用于污染物检测的可穿戴或固定传感器越来越感兴趣，但有效地可视化二氧化碳水平并吸引个人仍然是一个持续的挑战。在本文中，我们开发了一种手腕大小的便携式污染传感器，可以在任何室内位置实时检测二氧化碳，并通过突出显示突然的峰值来显示二氧化碳气泡。为了促进更好的通风习惯和用户意识，我们还开发了一款基于智能手机的增强现实（AR）游戏，供用户定位和驱散这些高二氧化碳区域。一项针对 35 名参与者的用户研究表明，参与者的参与度有所提高，并且对二氧化碳对健康的影响有了更深入的了解。我们的系统可用性评估中位数为1.88，表明其实用性很强。
> **Abstract**: Indoor carbon dioxide (CO2) can rapidly accumulate to form invisible pollution hotspots, posing significant health risks due to its odorless and colorless nature. Despite growing interest in wearable or stationary sensors for pollutant detection, effectively visualizing CO2 levels and engaging individuals remains an ongoing challenge. In this paper, we develop a portable wrist-sized pollution sensor that detects CO2 in real time at any indoor location and reveals CO2 bubbles by highlighting sudden spikes. In order to promote better ventilation habits and user awareness, we also develop a smartphone-based augmented reality (AR) game for users to locate and disperse these high-CO2 zones. A user study with 35 participants demonstrated increased engagement and heightened understanding of CO2's health impacts. Our system's usability evaluations yielded a median score of 1.88, indicating its strong practicality.

【55】Direct vs. Score-based Selection: Understanding the Heisenberg Effect in Target Acquisition Across Input Modalities in Virtual Reality
- **标题**: 直接选择与基于分数的选择：了解虚拟现实中跨输入模式的目标获取中的海森堡效应
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01061
> **作者**: Linjie Qiu,Duotun Wang,Boyu Li,Jiawei Li,Yulin Shen,Zeyu Wang,Mingming Fan
> **摘要**: 目标选择是虚拟现实（VR）中的基本交互。但是确认选择的行为（例如按下按钮或捏合）可能会干扰跟踪的姿势并改变预期目标，这被称为海森堡效应。先前的研究主要研究控制器输入。然而，目前尚不清楚这种效果在徒手输入中如何体现，以及基于分数的技术如何减轻不同空间变化中的效果。为了填补这一空白，我们进行了一项受试者内研究，以检查两种输入方式（即控制器和手）和两种选择机制（即直接和基于分数）的海森堡效应。我们的结果表明，手动输入更容易受到海森堡效应的影响，直接选择更受目标宽度的影响，而基于分数的选择对目标密度更敏感。基于之前的面向投票的技术和我们的时间分析，我们引入了加权投票，这是一种基于历史的目标投票意图准确性模型，它重新加权最近的交互意图以抵消输入干扰。我们的评估表明，与基线技术相比，该方法提高了选择准确性。最后，我们讨论自适应选择方法的未来方向。
> **Abstract**: Target selection is a fundamental interaction in virtual reality (VR). But the act of confirming a selection, such as a button press or pinch, can disturb the tracked pose and shift the intended target, which is referred to as the Heisenberg Effect. Prior research has mainly investigated controller input. However, it remains unclear how the effect manifests in the bare-hand input and how score-based techniques may mitigate the effect in different spatial variations. To fill the gap, we conduct a within-subject study to examine the Heisenberg Effect across two input modalities (i.e., controller and hand) and two selection mechanisms (i.e., direct and score-based). Our results show that hand input is more susceptible to the Heisenberg Effect, with direct selection more influenced by target width and score-based selection more sensitive to target density. Based on previous vote-oriented technique and our temporal analysis, we introduce weighted VOTE, a history-based intention accuracy model for target voting, that reweights recent interaction intent to counteract input disturbances. Our evaluation shows the method improves selection accuracy compared to baseline techniques. Finally, we discuss future directions for adaptive selection methods.

【56】Embedded vs. Situated: An Evaluation of AR Facial Training Feedback
- **标题**: 嵌入式与情景式：AR 面部训练反馈的评估
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01050
> **作者**: Avinash Ajit Nargund,Andrea M. Park,Tobias Höllerer,Misha Sra
> **摘要**: 虽然增强现实 (AR) 研究证明了嵌入式可视化对于粗大运动训练的好处，但其在面部锻炼中的适用性仍未得到充分探索。鉴于面部肌肉组织的复杂性，为面部肌肉训练提供有效的实时反馈提出了独特的设计挑战。我们开发了三种与用户的空间关系不同的 AR 反馈方法：定位（屏幕固定）、代理嵌入（在人体模型上）和完全嵌入（覆盖在用户脸上）。在一项受试者内研究 (N=24) 中，我们测量了面部训练任务期间的运动准确性、认知负荷和用户偏好。嵌入式反馈减少了认知负荷并获得了更高的偏好评级，而情境反馈则实现了更精确的纠正和更高的准确性。定性分析揭示了一个关键的设计张力：嵌入的反馈改善了体验，但造成了自我意识和解释困难。我们将这些见解提炼为设计考虑因素，解决面部训练系统的权衡问题，并对康复、表现训练和运动技能习得产生影响。
> **Abstract**: While augmented reality (AR) research demonstrates benefits of embedded visualizations for gross motor training, its applicability to facial exercises remains under-explored. Providing effective real-time feedback for facial muscle training presents unique design challenges, given the complexity of facial musculature. We developed three AR feedback approaches varying in spatial relationship to the user: situated (screen-fixed), proxy-embedded (on a mannequin), and fully embedded (overlaid on the user's face). In a within-subjects study (N=24), we measured exercise accuracy, cognitive load, and user preference during facial training tasks. The embedded feedback reduced cognitive load and received higher preference ratings, while the situated feedback enabled more precise corrections and higher accuracy. Qualitative analysis revealed a key design tension: embedded feedback improved experience but created self-consciousness and interpretive difficulty. We distill these insights into design considerations addressing the trade-offs for facial training systems, with implications for rehabilitation, performance training, and motor skill acquisition.

## 信息检索(cs.IR:Information Retrieval)

【1】Learning to Select: Query-Aware Adaptive Dimension Selection for Dense Retrieval
- **标题**: 学习选择：用于密集检索的查询感知自适应维度选择
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03306
> **作者**: Zhanyu Wu,Richong Zhang,Zhijie Nie
> **摘要**: 密集检索将查询和文档表示为高维嵌入，但这些表示在查询级别可能是冗余的：对于给定的信息需求，只有维度子集始终有助于排名。先前的工作通过基于 007 伪相关反馈 (PRF) 的维度 008 sion 重要性估计解决了这个问题，它可以在没有标记数据的情况下生成 009 查询感知掩码，但 010 通常依赖于噪声伪信号和 heuris-011 tic 测试时间程序。相比之下，super-012 vised 适配器方法利用相关性标签 013 来提高嵌入质量，但它们学习 014 跨查询共享的全局转换 015 并且没有显式建模查询感知的 di-016 提及重要性。我们提出了 Query-017 感知自适应维度选择框架 018 工作，它学习直接从查询嵌入预测每个维度 im-019 的重要性。我们首先使用监督相关标签构建预言维度重要性分布在嵌入维度上，然后训练预测器将查询嵌入映射到这些标签提取的重要性分数。第025章第029章：第030章
> **Abstract**: Dense retrieval represents queries and docu-002 ments as high-dimensional embeddings, but003 these representations can be redundant at the004 query level: for a given information need, only005 a subset of dimensions is consistently help-006 ful for ranking. Prior work addresses this via007 pseudo-relevance feedback (PRF) based dimen-008 sion importance estimation, which can produce009 query-aware masks without labeled data but010 often relies on noisy pseudo signals and heuris-011 tic test-time procedures. In contrast, super-012 vised adapter methods leverage relevance labels013 to improve embedding quality, yet they learn014 global transformations shared across queries015 and do not explicitly model query-aware di-016 mension importance. We propose a Query-017 Aware Adaptive Dimension Selection frame-018 work that learns to predict per-dimension im-019 portance directly from query embedding. We020 first construct oracle dimension importance dis-021 tributions over embedding dimensions using022 supervised relevance labels, and then train a023 predictor to map a query embedding to these024 label-distilled importance scores. At inference,025 the predictor selects a query-aware subset of026 dimensions for similarity computation based027 solely on the query embedding, without pseudo-028 relevance feedback. Experiments across multi-029 ple dense retrievers and benchmarks show that030 our learned dimension selector improves re-031 trieval effectiveness over the full-dimensional032 baseline as well as PRF-based masking and033 supervised adapter baselines.

【2】Distribution-Aware End-to-End Embedding for Streaming Numerical Features in Click-Through Rate Prediction
- **标题**: 点击率预测中流式数值特征的分布感知端到端嵌入
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03223
> **作者**: Jiahao Liu,Hongji Ruan,Weimin Zhang,Ziye Tong,Derick Tang,Zhanpeng Zeng,Qinsong Zeng,Peng Zhang,Tun Lu,Ning Gu
> **摘要**: 本文探讨了流媒体环境中点击率预测的有效数值特征嵌入。传统的静态分箱方法依赖于数值分布的离线统计；然而，这种固有的两阶段过程通常会在 bin 边界更新期间引发语义漂移。虽然神经嵌入方法可以实现端到端学习，但它们通常会丢弃显式的分布信息。端到端集成此类信息具有挑战性，因为流媒体功能通常违反独立同分布 (i.i.d)。假设，排除通过顺序统计的期望对人口分布进行无偏估计。此外，数值分布的关键上下文依赖性常常被忽略。为此，我们提出了 DAES，这是一种端到端框架，旨在通过将分布式信息与自适应调制机制相集成来解决流训练场景中的数值特征嵌入问题。具体来说，我们引入了一种有效的基于油藏采样的分布估计方法和两种场感知分布调制策略来捕获流分布和场相关语义。通过广泛的离线和在线实验证明，DAES 显着优于现有方法，并且已完全部署在拥有数亿日活跃用户的领先短视频平台上。
> **Abstract**: This paper explores effective numerical feature embedding for Click-Through Rate prediction in streaming environments. Conventional static binning methods rely on offline statistics of numerical distributions; however, this inherently two-stage process often triggers semantic drift during bin boundary updates. While neural embedding methods enable end-to-end learning, they often discard explicit distributional information. Integrating such information end-to-end is challenging because streaming features often violate the i.i.d. assumption, precluding unbiased estimation of the population distribution via the expectation of order statistics. Furthermore, the critical context dependency of numerical distributions is often neglected. To this end, we propose DAES, an end-to-end framework designed to tackle numerical feature embedding in streaming training scenarios by integrating distributional information with an adaptive modulation mechanism. Specifically, we introduce an efficient reservoir-sampling-based distribution estimation method and two field-aware distribution modulation strategies to capture streaming distributions and field-dependent semantics. DAES significantly outperforms existing approaches as demonstrated by extensive offline and online experiments and has been fully deployed on a leading short-video platform with hundreds of millions of daily active users.

【3】RANKVIDEO: Reasoning Reranking for Text-to-Video Retrieval
- **标题**: RANKVIDEO：文本到视频检索的推理重排序
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02444
> **作者**: Tyler Skow,Alexander Martin,Benjamin Van Durme,Rama Chellappa,Reno Kriz
> **摘要**: 重新排序是现代检索系统的关键组成部分，通常将高效的第一阶段检索器与更具表现力的模型配对以细化结果。虽然大型推理模型推动了以文本为中心的重新排名的快速进步，但基于推理的视频检索重新排名仍然没有得到充分探索。为了解决这一差距，我们引入了 RANKVIDEO，这是一种基于推理的视频检索重排序器，它使用视频内容对查询视频对进行显式推理以评估相关性。 RANKVIDEO 使用两阶段课程进行训练，包括基于感知的监督微调，然后是结合点式、成对式和教师置信度蒸馏目标的重新排名训练，并得到数据合成管道的支持，用于构建推理密集型查询视频对。大规模 MultiVENT 2.0 基准测试表明，RANKVIDEO 在两阶段框架内持续提高检索性能，在 nDCG@10 上平均提高 31%，优于纯文本和视觉语言重新排名替代方案，同时效率更高。
> **Abstract**: Reranking is a critical component of modern retrieval systems, which typically pair an efficient first-stage retriever with a more expressive model to refine results. While large reasoning models have driven rapid progress in text-centric reranking, reasoning-based reranking for video retrieval remains underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce RANKVIDEO, a reasoning-based reranker for video retrieval that explicitly reasons over query-video pairs using video content to assess relevance. RANKVIDEO is trained using a two-stage curriculum consisting of perception-grounded supervised fine-tuning followed by reranking training that combines pointwise, pairwise, and teacher confidence distillation objectives, and is supported by a data synthesis pipeline for constructing reasoning-intensive query-video pairs. Experiments on the large-scale MultiVENT 2.0 benchmark demonstrate that RANKVIDEO consistently improves retrieval performance within a two-stage framework, yielding an average improvement of 31% on nDCG@10 and outperforming text-only and vision-language reranking alternatives, while more efficient.

【4】Rethinking Generative Recommender Tokenizer: Recsys-Native Encoding and Semantic Quantization Beyond LLMs
- **标题**: 重新思考生成推荐分词器：LLM 之外的 Recsys-Native 编码和语义量化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02338
> **作者**: Yu Liang,Zhongjin Zhang,Yuxuan Zhu,Kerui Zhang,Zhiluohan Guo,Wenhang Zhou,Zonqi Yang,Kangle Wu,Yabo Ni,Anxiang Zeng,Cong Fu,Jianxin Wang,Jiazhi Xia
> **摘要**: 基于语义 ID (SID) 的推荐是扩展顺序推荐系统的一种有前景的范例，但现有方法很大程度上遵循以语义为中心的流程：项目嵌入是从基础模型中学习的，并使用通用量化方案进行离散化。这种设计与生成推荐目标不一致：语义嵌入与协作预测的耦合较弱，并且通用量化在减少自回归建模的顺序不确定性方面效率低下。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 ReSID，这是一种原生推荐、有原则的 SID 框架，它从信息保存和顺序可预测性的角度重新思考表示学习和量化，而不依赖于法学硕士。 ReSID 由两个组件组成：(i) 场感知掩码自动编码 (FAMAE)，它从结构化特征中学习足够预测的项目表示；(ii) 全局对齐正交量化 (GAOQ)，它通过共同减少语义模糊性和前缀条件不确定性来生成紧凑且可预测的 SID 序列。十个数据集的理论分析和广泛实验证明了 ReSID 的有效性。 ReSID 始终优于强大的顺序和基于 SID 的生成基线，平均超过 10%，同时将标记化成本降低高达 122 倍。代码可在 https://github.com/FuCongResearchSquad/ReSID 获取。
> **Abstract**: Semantic ID (SID)-based recommendation is a promising paradigm for scaling sequential recommender systems, but existing methods largely follow a semantic-centric pipeline: item embeddings are learned from foundation models and discretized using generic quantization schemes. This design is misaligned with generative recommendation objectives: semantic embeddings are weakly coupled with collaborative prediction, and generic quantization is inefficient at reducing sequential uncertainty for autoregressive modeling. To address these, we propose ReSID, a recommendation-native, principled SID framework that rethinks representation learning and quantization from the perspective of information preservation and sequential predictability, without relying on LLMs. ReSID consists of two components: (i) Field-Aware Masked Auto-Encoding (FAMAE), which learns predictive-sufficient item representations from structured features, and (ii) Globally Aligned Orthogonal Quantization (GAOQ), which produces compact and predictable SID sequences by jointly reducing semantic ambiguity and prefix-conditional uncertainty. Theoretical analysis and extensive experiments across ten datasets show the effectiveness of ReSID. ReSID consistently outperforms strong sequential and SID-based generative baselines by an average of over 10%, while reducing tokenization cost by up to 122x. Code is available at https://github.com/FuCongResearchSquad/ReSID.

【5】GRAB: An LLM-Inspired Sequence-First Click-Through Rate Prediction Modeling Paradigm
- **标题**: GRAB：受法学硕士启发的序列优先点击率预测建模范式
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01865
> **作者**: Shaopeng Chen,Chuyue Xie,Huimin Ren,Shaozong Zhang,Han Zhang,Ruobing Cheng,Zhiqiang Cao,Zehao Ju,Yu Gao,Jie Ding,Xiaodong Chen,Xuewu Jiao,Shuanglong Li,Liu Lin
> **摘要**: 传统的深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）在性能和效率方面面临着越来越多的瓶颈，通常在泛化和长序列建模方面遇到困难。受大型语言模型（LLM）规模化成功的启发，我们提出了百度广告生成排名（GRAB），这是一种用于点击率（CTR）预测的端到端生成框架。 GRAB 集成了一种新颖的因果动作感知多通道注意力 (CamA) 机制，可以有效捕获用户行为序列中的时间动态和特定动作信号。全面在线部署表明，GRAB 的性能显着优于成熟的 DLRM，收入增长了 3.05%，点击率增长了 3.49%。此外，该模型展示了理想的缩放行为：随着使用更长的交互序列，其表达能力显示出单调且近似线性的改进。
> **Abstract**: Traditional Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) face increasing bottlenecks in performance and efficiency, often struggling with generalization and long-sequence modeling. Inspired by the scaling success of Large Language Models (LLMs), we propose Generative Ranking for Ads at Baidu (GRAB), an end-to-end generative framework for Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction. GRAB integrates a novel Causal Action-aware Multi-channel Attention (CamA) mechanism to effectively capture temporal dynamics and specific action signals within user behavior sequences. Full-scale online deployment demonstrates that GRAB significantly outperforms established DLRMs, delivering a 3.05% increase in revenue and a 3.49% rise in CTR. Furthermore, the model demonstrates desirable scaling behavior: its expressive power shows a monotonic and approximately linear improvement as longer interaction sequences are utilized.

【6】Unifying Ranking and Generation in Query Auto-Completion via Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Multi-Objective Alignment
- **标题**: 通过检索增强生成和多目标对齐统一查询自动完成中的排名和生成
