> **摘要**: 边缘人工智能应用越来越需要超低功耗、低延迟的推理。基于事件驱动的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 的神经形态计算提供了一条有吸引力的路径，但在资源受限的设备上的实际部署受到训练难度、硬件映射开销和对时间动态的敏感性的限制。我们推出 NeuEdge，这是一个将自适应 SNN 模型与边缘部署的硬件感知优化相结合的框架。 NeuEdge 使用混合速率和尖峰时序模式的时间编码方案，以减少尖峰活动，同时保持准确性，并使用硬件感知训练程序，共同优化网络结构和片上布局，以提高神经形态处理器的利用率。自适应阈值机制根据输入统计数据调整神经元的兴奋性，从而在不降低性能的情况下减少能耗。在标准视觉和音频基准测试中，NeuEdge 实现了 91-96% 的准确度，边缘硬件上的推理延迟高达 2.3 毫秒，能源效率预计为 847 GOp/s/W。针对自主无人机工作负载的案例研究表明，在保持实时运行的同时，相对于传统深度神经网络可节省高达 312 倍的能源。
> **Abstract**: Edge AI applications increasingly require ultra-low-power, low-latency inference. Neuromorphic computing based on event-driven spiking neural networks (SNNs) offers an attractive path, but practical deployment on resource-constrained devices is limited by training difficulty, hardware-mapping overheads, and sensitivity to temporal dynamics. We present NeuEdge, a framework that combines adaptive SNN models with hardware-aware optimization for edge deployment. NeuEdge uses a temporal coding scheme that blends rate and spike-timing patterns to reduce spike activity while preserving accuracy, and a hardware-aware training procedure that co-optimizes network structure and on-chip placement to improve utilization on neuromorphic processors. An adaptive threshold mechanism adjusts neuron excitability from input statistics, reducing energy consumption without degrading performance. Across standard vision and audio benchmarks, NeuEdge achieves 91-96% accuracy with up to 2.3 ms inference latency on edge hardware and an estimated 847 GOp/s/W energy efficiency. A case study on an autonomous-drone workload shows up to 312x energy savings relative to conventional deep neural networks while maintaining real-time operation.

【4】Introns and Templates Matter: Rethinking Linkage in GP-GOMEA
- **标题**: 内含子和模板很重要：重新思考 GP-GOMEA 中的联系
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02311
> **作者**: Johannes Koch,Tanja Alderliesten,Peter A. N. Bosman
> **摘要**: GP-GOMEA 是符号回归领域最先进的技术之一，特别是在寻找小型且可能可解释的解决方案时。任何 GOMEA 变体中采用的关键机制是利用链接（变量之间的依赖关系）来确保有效的进化。在 GP-GOMEA 中，GP 树中节点位置之间的相互信息迄今为止已被用于学习链接。为此，使用固定的表达式模板。然而，这会导致表达式的内含子小于完整模板。由于内含子对适应性没有影响，因此它们的出现与选择没有直接关系。因此，内含子会对互信息捕获树节点之间的依赖关系的程度产生不利影响。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了两种新的连锁学习措施，一种是明确考虑互信息估计中的内含子，另一种是从灰盒的角度重新审视 GP-GOMEA 中的连锁学习，产生一种不需要从群体中学习而是直接从模板中得出的措施。在五个标准符号回归问题上，GP-GOMEA 使用这两种方法取得了显着的改进。我们还发现，新学习的链接结构密切反映了模板链接结构，并且显式使用模板结构会产生最佳的整体性能。
> **Abstract**: GP-GOMEA is among the state-of-the-art for symbolic regression, especially when it comes to finding small and potentially interpretable solutions. A key mechanism employed in any GOMEA variant is the exploitation of linkage, the dependencies between variables, to ensure efficient evolution. In GP-GOMEA, mutual information between node positions in GP trees has so far been used to learn linkage. For this, a fixed expression template is used. This however leads to introns for expressions smaller than the full template. As introns have no impact on fitness, their occurrences are not directly linked to selection. Consequently, introns can adversely affect the extent to which mutual information captures dependencies between tree nodes. To overcome this, we propose two new measures for linkage learning, one that explicitly considers introns in mutual information estimates, and one that revisits linkage learning in GP-GOMEA from a grey-box perspective, yielding a measure that needs not to be learned from the population but is derived directly from the template. Across five standard symbolic regression problems, GP-GOMEA achieves substantial improvements using both measures. We also find that the newly learned linkage structure closely reflects the template linkage structure, and that explicitly using the template structure yields the best performance overall.

【5】Spark: Modular Spiking Neural Networks
- **标题**: Spark：模块化尖峰神经网络
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02306
> **作者**: Mario Franco,Carlos Gershenson
> **摘要**: 如今，神经网络已成为人工智能的同义词。目前的神经网络模型虽然非常强大，但在数据和能量方面都效率低下。已经提出了几种替代形式的神经网络来解决其中一些问题。具体来说，尖峰神经网络适合高效的硬件实现。然而，尽管人们怀疑有效的可塑性机制可以缓解数据效率问题，但尖峰网络的有效学习算法仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们提出了一个新的尖峰神经网络框架 - Spark - 建立在模块化设计思想的基础上，从简单的组件到整个模型。该框架的目的是为尖峰神经网络提供高效且简化的管道。我们通过用简单的可塑性机制解决稀疏奖励卡特尔问题来展示这个框架。我们希望与传统机器学习管道兼容的框架可以加速该领域的研究，特别是连续和非批量的学习，类似于动物所展示的那样。
> **Abstract**: Nowadays, neural networks act as a synonym for artificial intelligence. Present neural network models, although remarkably powerful, are inefficient both in terms of data and energy. Several alternative forms of neural networks have been proposed to address some of these problems. Specifically, spiking neural networks are suitable for efficient hardware implementations. However, effective learning algorithms for spiking networks remain elusive, although it is suspected that effective plasticity mechanisms could alleviate the problem of data efficiency. Here, we present a new framework for spiking neural networks - Spark - built upon the idea of modular design, from simple components to entire models. The aim of this framework is to provide an efficient and streamlined pipeline for spiking neural networks. We showcase this framework by solving the sparse-reward cartpole problem with simple plasticity mechanisms. We hope that a framework compatible with traditional ML pipelines may accelerate research in the area, specifically for continuous and unbatched learning, akin to the one animals exhibit.

【6】Scale-covariant spiking wavelets
- **标题**: 尺度协变尖峰小波
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02020
> **作者**: Jens Egholm Pedersen,Tony Lindeberg,Peter Gerstoft
> **摘要**: 我们通过尺度空间理论在小波变换和尖峰神经网络之间建立了理论联系。我们依靠泄漏积分和激发神经元中的尺度协变保证来实现近似连续小波的离散母小波。重建实验证明了该方法的可行性，并需要进一步分析以减轻当前的近似误差。我们的工作提出了一种新颖的尖峰信号表示形式，可以实现更节能的信号处理算法。
> **Abstract**: We establish a theoretical connection between wavelet transforms and spiking neural networks through scale-space theory. We rely on the scale-covariant guarantees in the leaky integrate-and-fire neurons to implement discrete mother wavelets that approximate continuous wavelets. A reconstruction experiment demonstrates the feasibility of the approach and warrants further analysis to mitigate current approximation errors. Our work suggests a novel spiking signal representation that could enable more energy-efficient signal processing algorithms.

【7】SpikingGamma: Surrogate-Gradient Free and Temporally Precise Online Training of Spiking Neural Networks with Smoothed Delays
- **标题**: SpikingGamma：具有平滑延迟的尖峰神经网络的无代理梯度和时间精确在线训练
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01978
> **作者**: Roel Koopman,Sebastian Otte,Sander Bohté
> **摘要**: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 的神经形态硬件实现有望通过稀疏、事件驱动的计算实现节能、低延迟的人工智能。然而，在精细时间离散化下训练 SNN 仍然是一个重大挑战，它阻碍了低延迟响应能力以及软件训练的 SNN 到高效硬件的映射。在当前的方法中，尖峰神经元被建模为自循环单元，嵌入到循环网络中以随着时间的推移维持状态，并使用基于代理梯度的 BPTT 或 RTRL 变体进行训练。这些方法在时间分辨率上的扩展性很差，而在线近似通常对长序列表现出不稳定性，并且往往无法精确捕获时间模式。为了解决这些限制，我们开发了具有内部递归记忆结构的尖峰神经元，并将其与 sigma-delta 尖峰编码相结合。我们证明，这种 SpikingGamma 模型支持直接误差反向传播，无需代理梯度，可以在线学习具有最小尖峰的精细时间模式，并将前馈 SNN 扩展到复杂任务和具有竞争精度的基准，同时对模型的时间分辨率不敏感。我们的方法既提供了当前使用代理梯度训练的循环 SNN 的替代方案，也提供了将 SNN 映射到神经形态硬件的直接途径。
> **Abstract**: Neuromorphic hardware implementations of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) promise energy-efficient, low-latency AI through sparse, event-driven computation. Yet, training SNNs under fine temporal discretization remains a major challenge, hindering both low-latency responsiveness and the mapping of software-trained SNNs to efficient hardware. In current approaches, spiking neurons are modeled as self-recurrent units, embedded into recurrent networks to maintain state over time, and trained with BPTT or RTRL variants based on surrogate gradients. These methods scale poorly with temporal resolution, while online approximations often exhibit instability for long sequences and tend to fail at capturing temporal patterns precisely. To address these limitations, we develop spiking neurons with internal recursive memory structures that we combine with sigma-delta spike-coding. We show that this SpikingGamma model supports direct error backpropagation without surrogate gradients, can learn fine temporal patterns with minimal spiking in an online manner, and scale feedforward SNNs to complex tasks and benchmarks with competitive accuracy, all while being insensitive to the temporal resolution of the model. Our approach offers both an alternative to current recurrent SNNs trained with surrogate gradients, and a direct route for mapping SNNs to neuromorphic hardware.

【8】Dynamic Heuristic Neuromorphic Solver for the Edge User Allocation Problem with Bayesian Confidence Propagation Neural Network
- **标题**: 贝叶斯置信传播神经网络边缘用户分配问题的动态启发式神经形态求解器
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01294
> **作者**: Kecheng Zhang,Anders Lansner,Ahsan Javed Awan,Naresh Balaji Ravichandran,Pawel Herman
> **摘要**: 我们提出了一种用于 NP 硬边缘用户分配问题的神经形态求解器，使用具有赢者通吃（WTA）机制的吸引子网络，并通过贝叶斯置信传播神经网络（BCPNN）框架实现。与之前基于能量的吸引子网络不同，我们的求解器使用动态启发式偏差来实时指导分配，并向每个 WTA 主题引入“无分配”状态，以经验上上限的时间步数实现接近最优的性能。该方法与神经形态架构兼容，并且可以提高能源效率。
> **Abstract**: We propose a neuromorphic solver for the NP-hard Edge User Allocation problem using an attractor network with Winner-Takes-All (WTA) mechanism implemented with the Bayesian Confidence Propagation Neural Network (BCPNN) framework. Unlike previous energy-based attractor networks, our solver uses dynamic heuristic biasing to guide allocations in real time and introduces a "no allocation" state to each WTA motif, achieving near-optimal performance with an empirically upper-bounded number of time steps. The approach is compatible with neuromorphic architectures and may offer improvements in energy efficiency.

【9】Unleashing the Potential of Differential Evolution through Individual-Level Strategy Diversity
- **标题**: 通过个体层面的策略多样性释放差异进化的潜力
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01147
> **作者**: Chenchen Feng,Minyang Chen,Zhuozhao Li,Ran Cheng
> **摘要**: 由于差异进化（DE）对策略选择敏感，因此大多数现有变体通过自适应机制或复杂的设计来追求性能。虽然这些方法侧重于随着时间的推移调整战略，但静态战略多样性可能带来的结构性效益在很大程度上仍未得到探索。为了弥补这一差距，我们研究了个体层面策略多样性对 DE 搜索动态和性能的影响，并引入了 iStratDE（具有个体层面策略的 DE），这是一种极简变体，它在初始化时独立地为每个个体分配突变和交叉策略，并在整个进化过程中保持它们固定。通过在没有适应或反馈的情况下在个体层面注入多样性，iStratDE 培养了持久的行为异质性，这对于大量人群尤其有效。此外，其免通信结构具有内在的并发性，从而能够实现高效的并行执行和直接的 GPU 计算扩展。我们进一步在标准可达性假设下提供了 iStratDE 的收敛分析，该分析建立了迄今为止最佳适应度的几乎确定的收敛。对 CEC2022 基准套件和机器人控制任务的大量实验表明，iStratDE 匹配或超越了已建立的自适应 DE 变体。这些结果强调了个人层面的策略分配是提高 DE 绩效的一种简单而有效的机制。 iStratDE 的源代码可公开访问：https://github.com/EMI-Group/istratde。
> **Abstract**: Since Differential Evolution (DE) is sensitive to strategy choice, most existing variants pursue performance through adaptive mechanisms or intricate designs. While these approaches focus on adjusting strategies over time, the structural benefits that static strategy diversity may bring remain largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we study the impact of individual-level strategy diversity on DE's search dynamics and performance, and introduce iStratDE (DE with individual-level strategies), a minimalist variant that assigns mutation and crossover strategies independently to each individual at initialization and keeps them fixed throughout the evolutionary process. By injecting diversity at the individual level without adaptation or feedback, iStratDE cultivates persistent behavioral heterogeneity that is especially effective with large populations. Moreover, its communication-free construction possesses intrinsic concurrency, thereby enabling efficient parallel execution and straightforward scaling for GPU computing. We further provide a convergence analysis of iStratDE under standard reachability assumptions, which establishes the almost-sure convergence of the best-so-far fitness. Extensive experiments on the CEC2022 benchmark suite and robotic control tasks demonstrate that iStratDE matches or surpasses established adaptive DE variants. These results highlight individual-level strategy assignment as a straightforward yet effective mechanism for enhancing DE's performance. The source code of iStratDE is publicly accessible at: https://github.com/EMI-Group/istratde.

【10】Parallel Training in Spiking Neural Networks
- **标题**: 尖峰神经网络的并行训练
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01133
> **作者**: Yanbin Huang,Man Yao,Yuqi Pan,Changze Lv,Siyuan Xu,Xiaoqing Zheng,Bo Xu,Guoqi Li
> **摘要**: 尖峰神经元的仿生集成火力重置机制构成了尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 高效处理的基础。大型模型的最新进展要求尖峰神经元支持高度并行计算，以便在现代 GPU 上有效扩展。这项工作提出了一种新颖的功能视角，为设计并行尖峰神经元提供了一般指导。我们认为应该删除重置机制，因为它会导致复杂的时间依赖性并阻碍并行训练。然而，任何此类修改都应满足两个原则：1）保留重置功能作为核心生物学机制； 2）在不牺牲尖峰神经元的串行推理能力的情况下实现并行训练，这支撑了它们在测试时的效率。为此，我们确定了重置的功能，并分析了如何协调并行训练与串行推理，在此基础上我们提出了动态衰减尖峰神经元。我们对我们的方法进行了全面的测试：1）训练效率和外推能力。在 16k 长度的序列上，我们的训练速度比开创性的并行尖峰神经元提高了 25.6 倍，并且我们在 2k 长度上训练的模型可以稳定地对长达 30k 的序列进行推理。 2）通用性。我们证明了所提出的方法在五个任务类别（图像分类、神经形态事件处理、时间序列预测、语言建模和强化学习）、三种网络架构（尖峰 CNN/Transformer/SSM）和两种尖峰激活模式（尖峰/整数激活）中的一致有效性。 3）能源消耗。我们的神经元的尖峰放电低于普通神经元和现有的平行尖峰神经元。
> **Abstract**: The bio-inspired integrate-fire-reset mechanism of spiking neurons constitutes the foundation for efficient processing in Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs). Recent progress in large models demands that spiking neurons support highly parallel computation to scale efficiently on modern GPUs. This work proposes a novel functional perspective that provides general guidance for designing parallel spiking neurons. We argue that the reset mechanism, which induces complex temporal dependencies and hinders parallel training, should be removed. However, any such modification should satisfy two principles: 1) preserving the functions of reset as a core biological mechanism; and 2) enabling parallel training without sacrificing the serial inference ability of spiking neurons, which underpins their efficiency at test time. To this end, we identify the functions of the reset and analyze how to reconcile parallel training with serial inference, upon which we propose a dynamic decay spiking neuron. We conduct comprehensive testing of our method in terms of: 1) Training efficiency and extrapolation capability. On 16k-length sequences, we achieve a 25.6x training speedup over the pioneering parallel spiking neuron, and our models trained on 2k-length can stably perform inference on sequences as long as 30k. 2) Generality. We demonstrate the consistent effectiveness of the proposed method across five task categories (image classification, neuromorphic event processing, time-series forecasting, language modeling, and reinforcement learning), three network architectures (spiking CNN/Transformer/SSMs), and two spike activation modes (spike/integer activation). 3) Energy consumption. The spiking firing of our neuron is lower than that of vanilla and existing parallel spiking neurons.

【11】The Stacked Autoencoder Evolution Hypothesis
- **标题**: 堆叠式自动编码器进化假设
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01026
> **作者**: Hiroyuki Iizuka
> **摘要**: 这项研究引入了一种新颖的理论框架，即堆叠式自动编码器进化假说，该假设提出生物进化系统通过多层自编码和解码过程进行操作，类似于深度学习中的堆叠式自动编码器。这一假设并没有将进化仅仅视为由突变和选择驱动的渐进变化，而是表明自我复制本质上会跨抽象层次压缩和重建遗传信息。这种分层结构使进化系统不仅能够在序列水平上探索不同的可能性，而且还能跨越逐渐更抽象的表示层，从而使即使是简单的突变也能导航这些高阶空间。这种机制可以解释间断的进化模式和变化，这些模式和变化在自然进化中看起来好像是目标导向的，通过允许更深潜伏层的突变触发突然的、大规模的表型转变。为了说明这种机制的合理性，进行了人工化学模拟，证明了分层自动编码器结构的自发出现。该框架为连续和不连续进化变化背后的信息动态提供了新的视角。
> **Abstract**: This study introduces a novel theoretical framework, the Stacked Autoencoder Evolution Hypothesis, which proposes that biological evolutionary systems operate through multi-layered self-encoding and decoding processes, analogous to stacked autoencoders in deep learning. Rather than viewing evolution solely as gradual changes driven by mutation and selection, this hypothesis suggests that self-replication inherently compresses and reconstructs genetic information across hierarchical layers of abstraction. This layered structure enables evolutionary systems to explore diverse possibilities not only at the sequence level but also across progressively more abstract layers of representation, making it possible for even simple mutations to navigate these higher-order spaces.Such a mechanism may explain punctuated evolutionary patterns and changes that can appear as if they are goal-directed in natural evolution, by allowing mutations at deeper latent layers to trigger sudden, large-scale phenotypic shifts. To illustrate the plausibility of this mechanism, artificial chemistry simulations were conducted, demonstrating the spontaneous emergence of hierarchical autoencoder structures. This framework offers a new perspective on the informational dynamics underlying both continuous and discontinuous evolutionary change.

## 网络和互联网架构(cs.NI:Networking and Internet Architecture)

【1】Evaluating Acoustic Data Transmission Schemes for Ad-Hoc Communication Between Nearby Smart Devices
- **标题**: 评估附近智能设备之间临时通信的声学数据传输方案
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02249
> **作者**: Florentin Putz,Philipp Fortmann,Jan Frank,Christoph Haugwitz,Mario Kupnik,Matthias Hollick
> **摘要**: 通过利用智能手机和物联网设备中无处不在的扬声器和麦克风，声学数据传输为蓝牙和 NFC 提供了一种引人注目的替代方案。然而，该领域的大多数研究依赖于模拟或有限的设备测试，这使得所提出方案的现实可靠性难以评估。我们系统地回顾了 31 项针对商品设备的声学通信研究，发现没有一项提供可访问的源代码。在联系作者并重新实施三个有前途的方案后，我们组装了八个代表性声学通信系统的测试平台。我们在现实的室内环境和电波暗室中使用超过 11000 个智能手机传输，提供了系统且可重复的方法来评估这些方案在现实条件下的可靠性和普遍性。我们的结果表明，许多现有方案在实际使用中面临挑战，这主要是由于室内严重的多径传播以及不同设备型号的音频特性不同。为了支持未来的研究并促进更稳健的评估，我们发布了我们的重新实现以及第一个真实世界声学传输的综合数据集。总的来说，我们的研究结果强调了严格的设备测试的重要性，并强调需要强大的设计策略来弥合模拟结果和可靠的物联网部署之间的差距。
> **Abstract**: Acoustic data transmission offers a compelling alternative to Bluetooth and NFC by leveraging the ubiquitous speakers and microphones in smartphones and IoT devices. However, most research in this field relies on simulations or limited on-device testing, which makes the real-world reliability of proposed schemes difficult to assess. We systematically reviewed 31 acoustic communication studies for commodity devices and found that none provided accessible source code. After contacting authors and re-implementing three promising schemes, we assembled a testbed of eight representative acoustic communication systems. Using over 11000 smartphone transmissions in both realistic indoor environments and an anechoic chamber, we provide a systematic and repeatable methodology for evaluating the reliability and generalizability of these schemes under real-world conditions. Our results show that many existing schemes face challenges in practical usage, largely due to severe multipath propagation indoors and varying audio characteristics across device models. To support future research and foster more robust evaluations, we release our re-implementations alongside the first comprehensive dataset of real-world acoustic transmissions. Overall, our findings highlight the importance of rigorous on-device testing and underscore the need for robust design strategies to bridge the gap between simulation results and reliable IoT deployments.

## 操作系统(cs.OS:Operating Systems)

【1】ProphetKV: User-Query-Driven Selective Recomputation for Efficient KV Cache Reuse in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
- **标题**: ProphetKV：用户查询驱动的选择性重新计算，可在检索增强生成中实现高效的 KV 缓存重用
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02579
> **作者**: Shihao Wang,Jiahao Chen,Yanqi Pan,Hao Huang,Yichen Hao,Xiangyu Zou,Wen Xia,Wentao Zhang,Haitao Wang,Junhong Li,Chongyang Qiu,Pengfei Wang
> **摘要**: 长上下文检索增强生成（RAG）的预填充阶段受到计算开销的严重瓶颈。为了缓解这个问题，最近的方法（通过用户查询）组装检索到的 RAG 文档的预先计算的 KV 缓存，并重新处理选定的令牌以恢复这些预先计算的 KV 缓存之间的交叉注意力。然而，我们在当前的令牌选择标准中发现了一个基本的“挤出效应”：全局显着但与用户查询无关的令牌饱和了有限的重新计算预算，取代了对于回答用户查询真正重要的令牌并降低了推理准确性。我们提出了ProphetKV，一种用于RAG场景的用户查询驱动的KV缓存重用方法。 ProphetKV 根据令牌与用户查询的语义相关性动态地确定令牌的优先级，并采用双阶段重新计算管道将分层注意力指标融合到高实用性集合中。通过确保重新计算预算专用于弥合检索到的上下文和用户查询之间的信息差距，ProphetKV 以最小的开销实现了高保真注意力恢复。我们广泛的评估结果表明，与最先进的方法（例如 CacheBlend、EPIC 和 KVShare）相比，ProphetKV 保留了 96%-101% 的完全预填充精度，而重新计算率仅为 20%，同时在 RULER 上实现了 8.8%-24.9% 的精度提升，在 LongBench 上实现了 18.6%-50.9% 的精度提升。
> **Abstract**: The prefill stage of long-context Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is severely bottlenecked by computational overhead. To mitigate this, recent methods assemble pre-calculated KV caches of retrieved RAG documents (by a user query) and reprocess selected tokens to recover cross-attention between these pre-calculated KV caches. However, we identify a fundamental "crowding-out effect" in current token selection criteria: globally salient but user-query-irrelevant tokens saturate the limited recomputation budget, displacing the tokens truly essential for answering the user query and degrading inference accuracy. We propose ProphetKV, a user-query-driven KV Cache reuse method for RAG scenarios. ProphetKV dynamically prioritizes tokens based on their semantic relevance to the user query and employs a dual-stage recomputation pipeline to fuse layer-wise attention metrics into a high-utility set. By ensuring the recomputation budget is dedicated to bridging the informational gap between retrieved context and the user query, ProphetKV achieves high-fidelity attention recovery with minimal overhead. Our extensive evaluation results show that ProphetKV retains 96%-101% of full-prefill accuracy with only a 20% recomputation ratio, while achieving accuracy improvements of 8.8%-24.9% on RULER and 18.6%-50.9% on LongBench over the state-of-the-art approaches (e.g., CacheBlend, EPIC, and KVShare).

## 机器人技术(cs.RO:Robotics)

【1】HetroD: A High-Fidelity Drone Dataset and Benchmark for Autonomous Driving in Heterogeneous Traffic
- **标题**: HetroD：异构交通中自动驾驶的高保真无人机数据集和基准
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03447
> **作者**: Yu-Hsiang Chen,Wei-Jer Chang,Christian Kotulla,Thomas Keutgens,Steffen Runde,Tobias Moers,Christoph Klas,Wei Zhan,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Yi-Ting Chen
> **摘要**: 我们推出 HetroD，这是一个用于在异构环境中开发自动驾驶系统的数据集和基准。 HetroD 的目标是应对由弱势道路使用者 (VRU) 主导的现实世界异构交通的严峻挑战，其中包括与车辆互动的行人、骑自行车的人和骑摩托车的人。这些混合代理类型表现出复杂的行为，例如弯道、分道和非正式的路权协商。这些行为给自动驾驶汽车带来了重大挑战，但在专注于结构化、车道管制交通的现有数据集中仍然代表性不足。为了弥补这一差距，我们收集了基于无人机的大规模数据集，通过厘米级精确的注释、高清地图和交通信号状态来提供对交通场景的整体观察。我们进一步开发了一个模块化工具包，用于提取每个代理场景以支持下游任务开发。该数据集总共包含超过 65.4k 个高保真智能体轨迹，其中 70% 来自 VRU。 HetroD 支持对密集、异构流量中的 VRU 行为进行建模，并为预测、规划和模拟任务提供标准化基准。评估结果表明，最先进的预测和规划模型正在努力应对我们的数据集带来的挑战：它们无法预测横向 VRU 运动，无法处理非结构化操作，并且在密集和多智能体场景中表现出有限的性能，这凸显了对异构流量更强大的方法的需求。有关更多示例，请参阅我们的项目页面：https://hetroddata.github.io/HetroD/
> **Abstract**: We present HetroD, a dataset and benchmark for developing autonomous driving systems in heterogeneous environments. HetroD targets the critical challenge of navi- gating real-world heterogeneous traffic dominated by vulner- able road users (VRUs), including pedestrians, cyclists, and motorcyclists that interact with vehicles. These mixed agent types exhibit complex behaviors such as hook turns, lane splitting, and informal right-of-way negotiation. Such behaviors pose significant challenges for autonomous vehicles but remain underrepresented in existing datasets focused on structured, lane-disciplined traffic. To bridge the gap, we collect a large- scale drone-based dataset to provide a holistic observation of traffic scenes with centimeter-accurate annotations, HD maps, and traffic signal states. We further develop a modular toolkit for extracting per-agent scenarios to support downstream task development. In total, the dataset comprises over 65.4k high- fidelity agent trajectories, 70% of which are from VRUs. HetroD supports modeling of VRU behaviors in dense, het- erogeneous traffic and provides standardized benchmarks for forecasting, planning, and simulation tasks. Evaluation results reveal that state-of-the-art prediction and planning models struggle with the challenges presented by our dataset: they fail to predict lateral VRU movements, cannot handle unstructured maneuvers, and exhibit limited performance in dense and multi-agent scenarios, highlighting the need for more robust approaches to heterogeneous traffic. See our project page for more examples: https://hetroddata.github.io/HetroD/

【2】Model-based Optimal Control for Rigid-Soft Underactuated Systems
- **标题**: 刚软欠驱动系统的基于模型的最优控制
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03435
> **作者**: Daniele Caradonna,Nikhil Nair,Anup Teejo Mathew,Daniel Feliu Talegón,Imran Afgan,Egidio Falotico,Cosimo Della Santina,Federico Renda
> **摘要**: 连续软机器人本质上是欠驱动的，并且受到内在输入约束，使得动态控制特别具有挑战性，特别是在混合刚软机器人中。虽然大多数现有方法侧重于准静态行为，但诸如摆动之类的动态任务需要准确利用连续动态。这导致了对简单低阶模板系统的研究，这些系统通常无法捕获真实连续变形的复杂性。基于模型的最优控制提供了系统的解决方案；然而，它在刚软机器人中的应用常常受到计算成本和高维模型数值微分不准确的限制。这项工作以支持解析导数的几何可变应变模型的最新进展为基础，研究了欠驱动软系统的三种最佳控制策略——直接搭配、微分动态规划和非线性模型预测控制——以执行动态摆动任务。为了解决刚性连续动力学和约束驱动问题，采用隐式积分方案和热启动策略来提高数值鲁棒性和计算效率。这些方法在三个刚软和高阶软基准系统（Soft Cart-Pole、Soft Pendubot 和 Soft Furuta Pendulum）上进行了仿真评估，突出了它们的性能和计算权衡。
> **Abstract**: Continuum soft robots are inherently underactuated and subject to intrinsic input constraints, making dynamic control particularly challenging, especially in hybrid rigid-soft robots. While most existing methods focus on quasi-static behaviors, dynamic tasks such as swing-up require accurate exploitation of continuum dynamics. This has led to studies on simple low-order template systems that often fail to capture the complexity of real continuum deformations. Model-based optimal control offers a systematic solution; however, its application to rigid-soft robots is often limited by the computational cost and inaccuracy of numerical differentiation for high-dimensional models. Building on recent advances in the Geometric Variable Strain model that enable analytical derivatives, this work investigates three optimal control strategies for underactuated soft systems-Direct Collocation, Differential Dynamic Programming, and Nonlinear Model Predictive Control-to perform dynamic swing-up tasks. To address stiff continuum dynamics and constrained actuation, implicit integration schemes and warm-start strategies are employed to improve numerical robustness and computational efficiency. The methods are evaluated in simulation on three Rigid-Soft and high-order soft benchmark systems-the Soft Cart-Pole, the Soft Pendubot, and the Soft Furuta Pendulum- highlighting their performance and computational trade-offs.

【3】ProAct: A Benchmark and Multimodal Framework for Structure-Aware Proactive Response
- **标题**: ProAct：结构感知主动响应的基准和多模式框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03430
> **作者**: Xiaomeng Zhu,Fengming Zhu,Weijie Zhou,Ye Tian,Zhenlin Hu,Yufei Huang,Yuchun Guo,Xinyu Wu,Zhengyou Zhang,Fangzhen Lin,Xuantang Xiong
> **摘要**: 被动代理仅遵循指令，而主动代理则与更高级别的目标保持一致，例如通过持续监控环境以确定何时以及如何采取行动来提供援助和安全。然而，由于缺乏专业资源，开发主动代理受到阻碍。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 ProAct-75，这是一个基准，旨在培训和评估跨不同领域的主动代理，包括援助、维护和安全监控。我们的数据集涵盖 75 个任务，具有 91,581 个步骤级注释，并通过显式任务图进行了丰富。这些图编码了步骤依赖性和并行执行的可能性，为复杂决策提供了必要的结构基础。在此基准的基础上，我们提出了 ProAct-Helper，这是一个由多模态大型语言模型 (MLLM) 提供支持的参考基线，为状态检测中的决策奠定了基础，并利用任务图来启用熵驱动的启发式搜索以进行操作选择，从而允许代理独立执行并行线程，而不是镜像人类的下一步。大量实验表明，ProAct-Helper 的性能优于强闭源模型，触发检测 mF1 提高了 6.21%，在线一步决策节省了 0.25 个步骤，并行动作率提高了 15.58%。
> **Abstract**: While passive agents merely follow instructions, proactive agents align with higher-level objectives, such as assistance and safety by continuously monitoring the environment to determine when and how to act. However, developing proactive agents is hindered by the lack of specialized resources. To address this, we introduce ProAct-75, a benchmark designed to train and evaluate proactive agents across diverse domains, including assistance, maintenance, and safety monitoring. Spanning 75 tasks, our dataset features 91,581 step-level annotations enriched with explicit task graphs. These graphs encode step dependencies and parallel execution possibilities, providing the structural grounding necessary for complex decision-making. Building on this benchmark, we propose ProAct-Helper, a reference baseline powered by a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) that grounds decision-making in state detection, and leveraging task graphs to enable entropy-driven heuristic search for action selection, allowing agents to execute parallel threads independently rather than mirroring the human's next step. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ProAct-Helper outperforms strong closed-source models, improving trigger detection mF1 by 6.21%, saving 0.25 more steps in online one-step decision, and increasing the rate of parallel actions by 15.58%.

【4】Learning-based Initialization of Trajectory Optimization for Path-following Problems of Redundant Manipulators
- **标题**: 基于学习的冗余机械臂路径跟踪问题轨迹优化初始化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03418
> **作者**: Minsung Yoon,Mincheul Kang,Daehyung Park,Sung-Eui Yoon
> **摘要**: 轨迹优化 (TO) 是一种有效的工具，可生成遵循 6 维笛卡尔路径的冗余机械臂关节轨迹。优化性能很大程度上取决于初始轨迹的质量。然而，由于解轨迹空间极大且缺乏有关配置空间中任务约束的先验知识，选择高质量初始轨迹并非易事，并且需要相当多的时间预算。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于学习的初始轨迹生成方法，通过采用示例引导的强化学习，在短时间内生成高质量的初始轨迹。此外，我们建议零空间投影模仿奖励，通过有效学习专家演示中捕获的运动学上可行的运动来考虑零空间约束。我们在模拟中的统计评估表明，与其他三个基线相比，当我们插入我们的方法的输出时，TO 的最优性、效率和适用性得到了提高。我们还通过七自由度机械臂的实际实验展示了性能改进和可行性。
> **Abstract**: Trajectory optimization (TO) is an efficient tool to generate a redundant manipulator's joint trajectory following a 6-dimensional Cartesian path. The optimization performance largely depends on the quality of initial trajectories. However, the selection of a high-quality initial trajectory is non-trivial and requires a considerable time budget due to the extremely large space of the solution trajectories and the lack of prior knowledge about task constraints in configuration space. To alleviate the issue, we present a learning-based initial trajectory generation method that generates high-quality initial trajectories in a short time budget by adopting example-guided reinforcement learning. In addition, we suggest a null-space projected imitation reward to consider null-space constraints by efficiently learning kinematically feasible motion captured in expert demonstrations. Our statistical evaluation in simulation shows the improved optimality, efficiency, and applicability of TO when we plug in our method's output, compared with three other baselines. We also show the performance improvement and feasibility via real-world experiments with a seven-degree-of-freedom manipulator.

【5】Deep-Learning-Based Control of a Decoupled Two-Segment Continuum Robot for Endoscopic Submucosal Dissection
- **标题**: 基于深度学习的内窥镜粘膜下剥离二段连续体解耦机器人控制
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03406
> **作者**: Yuancheng Shao,Yao Zhang,Jia Gu,Zixi Chen,Di Wu,Yuqiao Chen,Bo Lu,Wenjie Liu,Cesare Stefanini,Peng Qi
> **摘要**: 手动内窥镜粘膜下剥离术（ESD）技术要求很高，而现有的单节机器人工具的灵活性有限。这些限制促使人们开发出更先进的解决方案。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中开发了 DESectBot，这是一种新型双段连续体机器人，具有解耦结构和集成手术钳，可实现 6 自由度 (DoF) 尖端灵活性，以改善 ESD 中的病变靶向。提出了基于门控循环单元（GRU）的深度学习控制器，用于同步尖端位置和方向控制，有效处理连续体段之间的非线性耦合。 GRU 控制器针对基于雅可比行列式的逆运动学、模型预测控制 (MPC)、前馈神经网络 (FNN) 和长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络进行了基准测试。在嵌套矩形和利萨如轨迹跟踪任务中，GRU 实现了最低的位置/方向 RMSE：分别为 1.11 mm/4.62° 和 0.81 mm/2.59°。对于固定位置（四个目标姿势）的方向控制，GRU 的平均 RMSE 为 0.14 毫米和 0.72°，优于所有替代方案。在挂钩转移任务中，GRU 实现了 100% 的成功率（120 次成功/120 次尝试），平均转移时间为 11.8 秒，STD 明显优于新手控制系统。此外，当手术刀完成切割时，体外 ESD 演示抓取、提升和切除组织，证实 DESectBot 提供足够的刚度来分割厚胃粘膜，并提供足以处理大病变的手术工作空间。这些结果证实，基于 GRU 的控制显着提高了 ESD 手术训练场景的精度、可靠性和可用性。
> **Abstract**: Manual endoscopic submucosal dissection (ESD) is technically demanding, and existing single-segment robotic tools offer limited dexterity. These limitations motivate the development of more advanced solutions. To address this, DESectBot, a novel dual segment continuum robot with a decoupled structure and integrated surgical forceps, enabling 6 degrees of freedom (DoFs) tip dexterity for improved lesion targeting in ESD, was developed in this work. Deep learning controllers based on gated recurrent units (GRUs) for simultaneous tip position and orientation control, effectively handling the nonlinear coupling between continuum segments, were proposed. The GRU controller was benchmarked against Jacobian based inverse kinematics, model predictive control (MPC), a feedforward neural network (FNN), and a long short-term memory (LSTM) network. In nested-rectangle and Lissajous trajectory tracking tasks, the GRU achieved the lowest position/orientation RMSEs: 1.11 mm/ 4.62° and 0.81 mm/ 2.59°, respectively. For orientation control at a fixed position (four target poses), the GRU attained a mean RMSE of 0.14 mm and 0.72°, outperforming all alternatives. In a peg transfer task, the GRU achieved a 100% success rate (120 success/120 attempts) with an average transfer time of 11.8s, the STD significantly outperforms novice-controlled systems. Additionally, an ex vivo ESD demonstration grasping, elevating, and resecting tissue as the scalpel completed the cut confirmed that DESectBot provides sufficient stiffness to divide thick gastric mucosa and an operative workspace adequate for large lesions.These results confirm that GRU-based control significantly enhances precision, reliability, and usability in ESD surgical training scenarios.

【6】Enhancing Navigation Efficiency of Quadruped Robots via Leveraging Personal Transportation Platforms
- **标题**: 利用个人交通平台提高四足机器人的导航效率
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03397
> **作者**: Minsung Yoon,Sung-Eui Yoon
> **摘要**: 四足机器人由于依赖腿部，因此在远距离导航效率方面面临限制。为了改善这些限制，我们引入了一种基于强化学习的主动运输车骑行方法（\textit{RL-ATR}），该方法受到人类使用个人运输车（包括赛格威）的启发。 \textit{RL-ATR} 具有运输器乘坐策略和两个状态估计器。该策略根据运输车特定的控制动力学设计适当的机动策略，而估计器通过推断不可观察的机器人和运输车状态来解决非惯性框架中的传感器模糊性。仿真中的综合评估验证了各种运输机器人模型的熟练命令跟踪能力，并且与腿式运动相比降低了能耗。此外，我们进行消融研究来量化 \textit{RL-ATR} 中各个成分的贡献。这种骑行能力可以拓宽四足机器人的运动方式，从而有可能扩大操作范围和效率。
> **Abstract**: Quadruped robots face limitations in long-range navigation efficiency due to their reliance on legs. To ameliorate the limitations, we introduce a Reinforcement Learning-based Active Transporter Riding method (\textit{RL-ATR}), inspired by humans' utilization of personal transporters, including Segways. The \textit{RL-ATR} features a transporter riding policy and two state estimators. The policy devises adequate maneuvering strategies according to transporter-specific control dynamics, while the estimators resolve sensor ambiguities in non-inertial frames by inferring unobservable robot and transporter states. Comprehensive evaluations in simulation validate proficient command tracking abilities across various transporter-robot models and reduced energy consumption compared to legged locomotion. Moreover, we conduct ablation studies to quantify individual component contributions within the \textit{RL-ATR}. This riding ability could broaden the locomotion modalities of quadruped robots, potentially expanding the operational range and efficiency.

【7】PlanTRansformer: Unified Prediction and Planning with Goal-conditioned Transformer
- **标题**: PlanTRansformer：使用目标条件变压器进行统一预测和规划
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03376
> **作者**: Constantin Selzer,Fabina B. Flohr
> **摘要**: 轨迹预测和规划是自动驾驶中基本但互不相关的组成部分。预测模型预测未知意图下的周围代理运动，产生多模态分布，而规划假设已知的自我目标并生成确定性轨迹。这种不匹配造成了一个关键瓶颈：预测缺乏对代理意图的监督，而规划则需要这些信息。现有的预测模型尽管具有强大的基准测试性能，但通常仍然与避免碰撞和动态可行性等规划约束脱节。我们引入了 Plan TRansformer (PTR)，这是一个统一的高斯混合变压器框架，集成了目标条件预测、动态可行性、交互感知和车道级拓扑推理。师生训练策略在训练过程中逐步掩盖周围的智能体命令，以与智能体意图不可用的推理条件保持一致。与基线 Motion Transformer (MTR) 相比，PTR 的边际/联合 mAP 提高了 4.3%/3.5%，与 GameFormer 相比，5 秒范围内的规划误差减少了 15.5%。与架构无关的设计可以应用于各种基于 Transformer 的预测模型。项目网站：https://github.com/SelzerConst/PlanTRansformer
> **Abstract**: Trajectory prediction and planning are fundamental yet disconnected components in autonomous driving. Prediction models forecast surrounding agent motion under unknown intentions, producing multimodal distributions, while planning assumes known ego objectives and generates deterministic trajectories. This mismatch creates a critical bottleneck: prediction lacks supervision for agent intentions, while planning requires this information. Existing prediction models, despite strong benchmarking performance, often remain disconnected from planning constraints such as collision avoidance and dynamic feasibility. We introduce Plan TRansformer (PTR), a unified Gaussian Mixture Transformer framework integrating goal-conditioned prediction, dynamic feasibility, interaction awareness, and lane-level topology reasoning. A teacher-student training strategy progressively masks surrounding agent commands during training to align with inference conditions where agent intentions are unavailable. PTR achieves 4.3%/3.5% improvement in marginal/joint mAP compared to the baseline Motion Transformer (MTR) and 15.5% planning error reduction at 5s horizon compared to GameFormer. The architecture-agnostic design enables application to diverse Transformer-based prediction models. Project Website: https://github.com/SelzerConst/PlanTRansformer

【8】Learning-based Adaptive Control of Quadruped Robots for Active Stabilization on Moving Platforms
- **标题**: 基于学习的四足机器人自适应控制，用于移动平台上的主动稳定
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03367
> **作者**: Minsung Yoon,Heechan Shin,Jeil Jeong,Sung-Eui Yoon
> **摘要**: 由于独立的平台运动以及机器人上产生的不同惯性力，四足机器人在地铁、公共汽车、飞机和游艇等六自由度移动平台上面临平衡挑战。为了缓解这些挑战，我们提出了移动平台上基于学习的主动稳定（\textit{LAS-MP}），具有自平衡策略和系统状态估计器。该策略自适应地调整机器人的姿势以响应平台的运动。估计器根据本体感受传感器数据推断机器人和平台状态。对于跨各种平台运动的系统训练方案，我们引入了平台轨迹生成和调度方法。我们的评估表明，与三个基线相比，多个指标具有卓越的平衡性能。此外，我们对 \textit{LAS-MP} 进行了详细分析，包括消融研究和估计器评估，以验证每个组件的有效性。
> **Abstract**: A quadruped robot faces balancing challenges on a six-degrees-of-freedom moving platform, like subways, buses, airplanes, and yachts, due to independent platform motions and resultant diverse inertia forces on the robot. To alleviate these challenges, we present the Learning-based Active Stabilization on Moving Platforms (\textit{LAS-MP}), featuring a self-balancing policy and system state estimators. The policy adaptively adjusts the robot's posture in response to the platform's motion. The estimators infer robot and platform states based on proprioceptive sensor data. For a systematic training scheme across various platform motions, we introduce platform trajectory generation and scheduling methods. Our evaluation demonstrates superior balancing performance across multiple metrics compared to three baselines. Furthermore, we conduct a detailed analysis of the \textit{LAS-MP}, including ablation studies and evaluation of the estimators, to validate the effectiveness of each component.

【9】Manipulation via Force Distribution at Contact
- **标题**: 通过接触处的力分布进行操纵
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03350
> **作者**: Haegu Lee,Yitaek Kim,Casper Hewson Rask,Christoffer Sloth
> **摘要**: 高效且稳健的轨迹在富含接触的操作中发挥着至关重要的作用，这需要对物体与机器人的交互进行准确的建模。由于计算效率较高，许多现有方法都依赖于点接触模型。简单的接触模型计算效率高，但本质上限制了实现类人、接触丰富的操纵，因为它们无法捕获人类操纵中观察到的关键摩擦动力学和扭矩生成。本研究介绍了多接触操作中的力分布线接触 (FDLC) 模型，并将其与传统的点接触模型进行了比较。构建了双层优化框架，其中下层解决接触力计算的优化问题，上层优化应用iLQR进行轨迹优化。通过这个框架，点接触的局限性得到了证明，并且 FDLC 在生成高效且稳健的轨迹方面的优势得到了证实。该方法的有效性通过盒子旋转任务得到验证，证明 FDLC 能够通过沿接触线的非均匀力分布生成轨迹，同时需要较低的控制工作量和较少的机器人运动。
> **Abstract**: Efficient and robust trajectories play a crucial role in contact-rich manipulation, which demands accurate mod- eling of object-robot interactions. Many existing approaches rely on point contact models due to their computational effi- ciency. Simple contact models are computationally efficient but inherently limited for achieving human-like, contact-rich ma- nipulation, as they fail to capture key frictional dynamics and torque generation observed in human manipulation. This study introduces a Force-Distributed Line Contact (FDLC) model in contact-rich manipulation and compares it against conventional point contact models. A bi-level optimization framework is constructed, in which the lower-level solves an optimization problem for contact force computation, and the upper-level optimization applies iLQR for trajectory optimization. Through this framework, the limitations of point contact are demon- strated, and the benefits of the FDLC in generating efficient and robust trajectories are established. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is validated by a box rotating task, demonstrating that FDLC enables trajectories generated via non-uniform force distributions along the contact line, while requiring lower control effort and less motion of the robot.

【10】RDT2: Exploring the Scaling Limit of UMI Data Towards Zero-Shot Cross-Embodiment Generalization
- **标题**: RDT2：探索 UMI 数据的扩展极限以实现零样本跨实施例泛化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03310
> **作者**: Songming Liu,Bangguo Li,Kai Ma,Lingxuan Wu,Hengkai Tan,Xiao Ouyang,Hang Su,Jun Zhu
> **摘要**: 视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 模型为通用机器人带来了希望，但目前面临数据稀缺、架构效率低下以及无法跨不同硬件平台泛化的问题。我们介绍 RDT2，这是一个基于 7B 参数 VLM 构建的机器人基础模型，旨在实现开放词汇任务的新颖实施例的零样本部署。为了实现这一目标，我们收集了最大的开源机器人数据集之一——在不同家庭中进行了超过 10,000 小时的演示——使用增强的、与实施例无关的通用操作接口 (UMI)。我们的方法采用了一种新颖的三阶段训练方法，通过残差矢量量化（RVQ）、流匹配和蒸馏将离散语言知识与连续控制结合起来，以进行实时推理。因此，RDT2 成为第一个同时将零样本推广到看不见的物体、场景、指令甚至机器人平台的模型之一。此外，它在灵巧、远距离和动态下游任务（例如打乒乓球）方面的表现优于最先进的基线。请参阅 https://rdt-robotics.github.io/rdt2/ 了解更多信息。
> **Abstract**: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models hold promise for generalist robotics but currently struggle with data scarcity, architectural inefficiencies, and the inability to generalize across different hardware platforms. We introduce RDT2, a robotic foundation model built upon a 7B parameter VLM designed to enable zero-shot deployment on novel embodiments for open-vocabulary tasks. To achieve this, we collected one of the largest open-source robotic datasets--over 10,000 hours of demonstrations in diverse families--using an enhanced, embodiment-agnostic Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI). Our approach employs a novel three-stage training recipe that aligns discrete linguistic knowledge with continuous control via Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ), flow-matching, and distillation for real-time inference. Consequently, RDT2 becomes one of the first models that simultaneously zero-shot generalizes to unseen objects, scenes, instructions, and even robotic platforms. Besides, it outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in dexterous, long-horizon, and dynamic downstream tasks like playing table tennis. See https://rdt-robotics.github.io/rdt2/ for more information.

【11】Collision Detection with Analytical Derivatives of Contact Kinematics
- **标题**: 利用接触运动学的解析导数进行碰撞检测
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03250
> **作者**: Anup Teejo Mathew,Anees Peringal,Daniele Caradonna,Frederic Boyer,Federico Renda
> **摘要**: 可微接触运动学对于机器人中基于梯度的方法至关重要，但从机器人状态到接触距离、位置和法线的映射在具有零或未定义曲率的形状的简并配置中变得不平滑。我们通过有选择地将此类几何图形正规化为严格凸隐式表示，恢复接触图的唯一性和平滑度来解决这一固有限制。利用这种几何正则化，我们开发了 iDCOL，一种隐式可微碰撞检测和接触运动学框架。 iDCOL 使用严格凸隐式曲面表示碰撞体，并通过求解从基于几何缩放的凸优化公式导出的固定尺寸非线性系统来计算碰撞检测和接触运动学。通过将隐函数定理应用于所得的系统残差，我们推导出接触运动学量的解析导数。我们为 iDCOL 开发了一个基于牛顿的快速求解器，并提供了该框架的开源 C++ 实现。该方法的鲁棒性通过广泛的碰撞模拟和基准测试进行评估，并在基于梯度的运动路径规划和可微接触物理（包括多体刚性碰撞和软机器人交互示例）中证明了其适用性。
> **Abstract**: Differentiable contact kinematics are essential for gradient-based methods in robotics, yet the mapping from robot state to contact distance, location, and normal becomes non-smooth in degenerate configurations of shapes with zero or undefined curvature. We address this inherent limitation by selectively regularizing such geometries into strictly convex implicit representations, restoring uniqueness and smoothness of the contact map. Leveraging this geometric regularization, we develop iDCOL, an implicit differentiable collision detection and contact kinematics framework. iDCOL represents colliding bodies using strictly convex implicit surfaces and computes collision detection and contact kinematics by solving a fixed-size nonlinear system derived from a geometric scaling-based convex optimization formulation. By applying the Implicit Function Theorem to the resulting system residual, we derive analytical derivatives of the contact kinematic quantities. We develop a fast Newton-based solver for iDCOL and provide an open-source C++ implementation of the framework. The robustness of the approach is evaluated through extensive collision simulations and benchmarking, and applicability is demonstrated in gradient-based kinematic path planning and differentiable contact physics, including multi-body rigid collisions and a soft-robot interaction example.

【12】A thin and soft optical tactile sensor for highly sensitive object perception
- **标题**: 薄而柔软的光学触觉传感器，可实现高度灵敏的物体感知
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03248
> **作者**: Yanchen Shen,Kohei Tsuji,Haruto Koizumi,Jiseon Hong,Tomoaki Niiyama,Hiroyuki Kuwabara,Hayato Ishida,Jun Hiramitsu,Mitsuhito Mase,Satoshi Sunada
> **摘要**: 触觉传感对于机器人和可穿戴设备的安全感知和与环境的交互至关重要。光学触觉传感器已成为有前途的解决方案，因为它们不受电磁干扰并且具有高空间分辨率。然而，现有的光学方法，特别是基于视觉的触觉传感器，依赖于涉及镜头和相机的复杂光学组件，导致笨重、刚性和对准敏感的设计。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种薄型、紧凑型、柔软的光学触觉传感器，具有免对准配置。软光学传感器的工作原理是捕获软硅胶材料内产生的变形引起的散斑图案变化，从而通过机器学习实现精确的力测量和纹理识别。实验结果显示，力测量均方根误差为40 mN，对包括麻将牌在内的九类纹理表面的分类精度为93.33%。所提出的基于散斑的方法提供了一个紧凑、易于制造且机械兼容的平台，将光学传感与灵活的形状自适应架构连接起来，从而展示了其作为软机器人和可穿戴触觉界面的新型触觉传感范例的潜力。
> **Abstract**: Tactile sensing is crucial in robotics and wearable devices for safe perception and interaction with the environment. Optical tactile sensors have emerged as promising solutions, as they are immune to electromagnetic interference and have high spatial resolution. However, existing optical approaches, particularly vision-based tactile sensors, rely on complex optical assemblies that involve lenses and cameras, resulting in bulky, rigid, and alignment-sensitive designs. In this study, we present a thin, compact, and soft optical tactile sensor featuring an alignment-free configuration. The soft optical sensor operates by capturing deformation-induced changes in speckle patterns generated within a soft silicone material, thereby enabling precise force measurements and texture recognition via machine learning. The experimental results show a root-mean-square error of 40 mN in the force measurement and a classification accuracy of 93.33% over nine classes of textured surfaces, including Mahjong tiles. The proposed speckle-based approach provides a compact, easily fabricated, and mechanically compliant platform that bridges optical sensing with flexible shape-adaptive architectures, thereby demonstrating its potential as a novel tactile-sensing paradigm for soft robotics and wearable haptic interfaces.

【13】Omnidirectional Solid-State mmWave Radar Perception for UAV Power Line Collision Avoidance
- **标题**: 用于无人机电力线防撞的全向固态毫米波雷达感知
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03229
> **作者**: Nicolaj Haarhøj Malle,Emad Ebeid
> **摘要**: 检测和估计到电力线的距离对于人类无人机飞行员和自主系统来说都是一个挑战，这增加了意外碰撞的风险。我们提出了一种基于毫米波雷达的感知系统，可在小型无人机周围提供球形传感覆盖，以实现强大的电力线检测和规避。该系统集成了多个紧凑型固态毫米波雷达模块，可合成全向视场，同时保持轻量。我们描述了这种全向雷达装置在电力线环境中的传感行为，并开发了针对该行为的强大检测和避免算法。在实际电力线上进行的现场实验表明，在 10 m 范围内进行可靠检测，在飞行速度超过 10 m/s 时成功进行规避操作，并可检测直径细至 1.2 mm 的电线。这些结果表明该方法适合作为自主和手动无人机飞行的附加安全层。
> **Abstract**: Detecting and estimating distances to power lines is a challenge for both human UAV pilots and autonomous systems, which increases the risk of unintended collisions. We present a mmWave radar-based perception system that provides spherical sensing coverage around a small UAV for robust power line detection and avoidance. The system integrates multiple compact solid-state mmWave radar modules to synthesize an omnidirectional field of view while remaining lightweight. We characterize the sensing behavior of this omnidirectional radar arrangement in power line environments and develop a robust detection-and-avoidance algorithm tailored to that behavior. Field experiments on real power lines demonstrate reliable detection at ranges up to 10 m, successful avoidance maneuvers at flight speeds upwards of 10 m/s, and detection of wires as thin as 1.2 mm in diameter. These results indicate the approach's suitability as an additional safety layer for both autonomous and manual UAV flight.

【14】Depth Completion in Unseen Field Robotics Environments Using Extremely Sparse Depth Measurements
- **标题**: 使用极其稀疏的深度测量在看不见的现场机器人环境中完成深度
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03209
> **作者**: Marco Job,Thomas Stastny,Eleni Kelasidi,Roland Siegwart,Michael Pantic
> **摘要**: 在非结构化环境中运行的自主现场机器人需要强大的感知能力，以确保安全可靠的操作。单目深度估计的最新进展证明了低成本相机作为深度传感器的潜力；然而，由于缺乏可靠的尺度线索、模糊或低纹理条件以及大规模数据集的稀缺，它们在现场机器人技术中的采用仍然受到限制。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种深度补全模型，该模型对合成数据进行训练，并使用深度传感器的极其稀疏的测量来预测看不见的现场机器人环境中的密集度量深度。专为现场机器人技术定制的合成数据集生成管道可以创建多个用于训练目的的真实数据集。该数据集生成方法利用来自运动结构的纹理 3D 网格和具有新颖视点合成的真实感渲染来模拟不同的现场机器人场景。我们的方法在 Nvidia Jetson AGX Orin 上实现了每帧 53 毫秒的端到端延迟，从而实现了嵌入式平台上的实时部署。广泛的评估证明了在不同的现实世界现场机器人场景中的竞争性能。
> **Abstract**: Autonomous field robots operating in unstructured environments require robust perception to ensure safe and reliable operations. Recent advances in monocular depth estimation have demonstrated the potential of low-cost cameras as depth sensors; however, their adoption in field robotics remains limited due to the absence of reliable scale cues, ambiguous or low-texture conditions, and the scarcity of large-scale datasets. To address these challenges, we propose a depth completion model that trains on synthetic data and uses extremely sparse measurements from depth sensors to predict dense metric depth in unseen field robotics environments. A synthetic dataset generation pipeline tailored to field robotics enables the creation of multiple realistic datasets for training purposes. This dataset generation approach utilizes textured 3D meshes from Structure from Motion and photorealistic rendering with novel viewpoint synthesis to simulate diverse field robotics scenarios. Our approach achieves an end-to-end latency of 53 ms per frame on a Nvidia Jetson AGX Orin, enabling real-time deployment on embedded platforms. Extensive evaluation demonstrates competitive performance across diverse real-world field robotics scenarios.

【15】HUSKY: Humanoid Skateboarding System via Physics-Aware Whole-Body Control
- **标题**: HUSKY：通过物理感知全身控制的人形滑板系统
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03205
> **作者**: Jinrui Han,Dewei Wang,Chenyun Zhang,Xinzhe Liu,Ping Luo,Chenjia Bai,Xuelong Li
> **摘要**: 虽然当前的人形全身控制框架主要依赖于静态环境假设，但解决以高动态性和复杂交互为特征的任务提出了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们讨论了人形滑板，这是一项极具挑战性的任务，需要在欠驱动轮式平台上进行稳定的动态操纵。该集成系统受到非完整约束和紧密耦合的人机交互的控制。成功执行此任务需要同时掌握机械耦合、动态不稳定滑板上的混合接触动力学和稳健的平衡控制。为了克服上述挑战，我们提出了 HUSKY，这是一种基于学习的框架，集成了人形滑板系统建模和物理感知全身控制。我们首先对板倾斜和卡车转向角之间的耦合关系进行建模，从而对系统动力学进行原理性分析。在此基础上，HUSKY 利用对抗性运动先验 (AMP) 来学习类人的推动运动，并采用物理引导、面向航向的策略来实现倾斜转向行为。此外，轨迹引导机构确保推动和转向之间的平稳过渡。 Unitree G1 人形平台上的实验结果表明，我们的框架能够在现实场景中实现稳定、敏捷的滑板操控。该项目页面可在 https://husky- humanoid.github.io/ 上找到。
> **Abstract**: While current humanoid whole-body control frameworks predominantly rely on the static environment assumptions, addressing tasks characterized by high dynamism and complex interactions presents a formidable challenge. In this paper, we address humanoid skateboarding, a highly challenging task requiring stable dynamic maneuvering on an underactuated wheeled platform. This integrated system is governed by non-holonomic constraints and tightly coupled human-object interactions. Successfully executing this task requires simultaneous mastery of hybrid contact dynamics and robust balance control on a mechanically coupled, dynamically unstable skateboard. To overcome the aforementioned challenges, we propose HUSKY, a learning-based framework that integrates humanoid-skateboard system modeling and physics-aware whole-body control. We first model the coupling relationship between board tilt and truck steering angles, enabling a principled analysis of system dynamics. Building upon this, HUSKY leverages Adversarial Motion Priors (AMP) to learn human-like pushing motions and employs a physics-guided, heading-oriented strategy for lean-to-steer behaviors. Moreover, a trajectory-guided mechanism ensures smooth and stable transitions between pushing and steering. Experimental results on the Unitree G1 humanoid platform demonstrate that our framework enables stable and agile maneuvering on skateboards in real-world scenarios. The project page is available on https://husky-humanoid.github.io/.

【16】Hierarchical Proportion Models for Motion Generation via Integration of Motion Primitives
- **标题**: 通过运动基元集成生成运动的分层比例模型
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03188
> **作者**: Yu-Han Shu,Toshiaki Tsuji,Sho Sakaino
> **摘要**: 模仿学习（IL）使机器人能够从演示中获得类似人类的运动技能，但它仍然需要大量的高质量数据和再训练来处理复杂或长期的任务。为了提高数据效率和适应性，本研究提出了一种分层 IL 框架，将运动基元与基于比例的运动合成相集成。该方法采用两层架构，上层执行长期规划，而一组下层模型学习单独的运动基元，这些基元根据特定的比例组合。引入了三种模型变体来探索学习灵活性、计算成本和适应性之间的不同权衡：基于学习的比例模型、基于采样的比例模型和基于回放的比例模型，它们的不同之处在于比例的确定方式以及上层是否可训练。通过真实的机器人拾放实验，所提出的模型成功生成了原始集中未包含的复杂运动。基于采样和基于回放的比例模型比标准分层模型实现了更稳定和适应性更强的运动生成，证明了基于比例的运动集成对于实际机器人学习的有效性。
> **Abstract**: Imitation learning (IL) enables robots to acquire human-like motion skills from demonstrations, but it still requires extensive high-quality data and retraining to handle complex or long-horizon tasks. To improve data efficiency and adaptability, this study proposes a hierarchical IL framework that integrates motion primitives with proportion-based motion synthesis. The proposed method employs a two-layer architecture, where the upper layer performs long-term planning, while a set of lower-layer models learn individual motion primitives, which are combined according to specific proportions. Three model variants are introduced to explore different trade-offs between learning flexibility, computational cost, and adaptability: a learning-based proportion model, a sampling-based proportion model, and a playback-based proportion model, which differ in how the proportions are determined and whether the upper layer is trainable. Through real-robot pick-and-place experiments, the proposed models successfully generated complex motions not included in the primitive set. The sampling-based and playback-based proportion models achieved more stable and adaptable motion generation than the standard hierarchical model, demonstrating the effectiveness of proportion-based motion integration for practical robot learning.

【17】Estimation of Ground Reaction Forces from Kinematic Data during Locomotion
- **标题**: 根据运动过程中的运动学数据估计地面反作用力
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03177
> **作者**: Gautami Golani,Dong Anh Khoa To,Ananda Sidarta,Arun-Kumar Kaliya-Perumal,Oliver Roberts,Lek Syn Lim,Jim Patton,Domenico Campolo
> **摘要**: 地面反作用力 (GRF) 提供了对人类步态力学的基本了解，并广泛用于评估关节负荷、肢体对称性、平衡控制和运动功能。尽管具有临床相关性，但由于测力板系统的实际限制，GRF 在临床工作流程中仍未得到充分利用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种仅使用基于标记的运动捕捉数据来估计 GRF 的无测力板方法。这种仅用运动学方法来估计和分解 GRF 使其非常适合广泛的临床部署。通过使用十六个身体部位的运动学，我们估计质心 (CoM) 并计算 GRF，随后通过基于最小化的方法将其分解为各个组件。通过这个框架，我们可以识别步态站立阶段，并提供有临床意义的动力学测量，而无需专用的测力台系统。实验结果证明了仅基于运动学数据的 CoM 和 GRF 估计的可行性，支持无测力板步态分析。
> **Abstract**: Ground reaction forces (GRFs) provide fundamental insight into human gait mechanics and are widely used to assess joint loading, limb symmetry, balance control, and motor function. Despite their clinical relevance, the use of GRF remains underutilised in clinical workflows due to the practical limitations of force plate systems. In this work, we present a force-plate-free approach for estimating GRFs using only marker-based motion capture data. This kinematics only method to estimate and decompose GRF makes it well suited for widespread clinical depolyment. By using kinematics from sixteen body segments, we estimate the centre of mass (CoM) and compute GRFs, which are subsequently decomposed into individual components through a minimization-based approach. Through this framework, we can identify gait stance phases and provide access to clinically meaningful kinetic measures without a dedicated force plate system. Experimental results demonstrate the viability of CoM and GRF estimation based solely on kinematic data, supporting force-plate-free gait analysis.

【18】When Attention Betrays: Erasing Backdoor Attacks in Robotic Policies by Reconstructing Visual Tokens
- **标题**: 当注意力被背叛时：通过重构视觉令牌消除机器人策略中的后门攻击
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03153
> **作者**: Xuetao Li,Pinhan Fu,Wenke Huang,Nengyuan Pan,Songhua Yang,Kaiyan Zhao,Guancheng Wan,Mengde Li,Jifeng Xuan,Miao Li
> **摘要**: 视觉语言动作（VLA）模型的下游微调增强了机器人技术，但也使管道面临后门风险。攻击者可以针对有毒数据对 VLA 进行预训练，以植入后门，这些后门保持隐蔽，但可能在推理过程中触发有害行为。然而，现有的防御措施要么缺乏对多模式后门的机械洞察，要么通过全模型再训练施加过高的计算成本。为此，我们发现了一种深层注意力捕获机制：后门重定向后期注意力并在干净流形附近形成紧凑的嵌入集群。利用这一见解，我们引入了 Bera，一个测试时的后门擦除框架，它通过潜在空间定位检测具有异常注意力的令牌，使用深层线索掩盖可疑区域，并重建无触发图像以打破触发不安全动作映射，同时恢复正确的行为。与之前的防御不同，Bera 既不需要重新训练 VLA，也不需要对训练流程进行任何更改。跨多个具体平台和任务的大量实验表明，Bera 有效地保持了标称性能，显着降低了攻击成功率，并持续从后门输出中恢复良性行为，从而为保护机器人系统提供了强大而实用的防御机制。
> **Abstract**: Downstream fine-tuning of vision-language-action (VLA) models enhances robotics, yet exposes the pipeline to backdoor risks. Attackers can pretrain VLAs on poisoned data to implant backdoors that remain stealthy but can trigger harmful behavior during inference. However, existing defenses either lack mechanistic insight into multimodal backdoors or impose prohibitive computational costs via full-model retraining. To this end, we uncover a deep-layer attention grabbing mechanism: backdoors redirect late-stage attention and form compact embedding clusters near the clean manifold. Leveraging this insight, we introduce Bera, a test-time backdoor erasure framework that detects tokens with anomalous attention via latent-space localization, masks suspicious regions using deep-layer cues, and reconstructs a trigger-free image to break the trigger-unsafe-action mapping while restoring correct behavior. Unlike prior defenses, Bera requires neither retraining of VLAs nor any changes to the training pipeline. Extensive experiments across multiple embodied platforms and tasks show that Bera effectively maintains nominal performance, significantly reduces attack success rates, and consistently restores benign behavior from backdoored outputs, thereby offering a robust and practical defense mechanism for securing robotic systems.

【19】Multi-function Robotized Surgical Dissector for Endoscopic Pulmonary Thromboendarterectomy: Preclinical Study and Evaluation
- **标题**: 多功能机器人手术解剖器用于内镜肺血栓内膜切除术：临床前研究与评估
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03147
> **作者**: Runfeng Zhu,Xin Zhong,Qingxiang Zhao,Jing Lin,Zhong Wu,Kang Li
> **摘要**: 患有慢性严重肺血栓栓塞的患者需要进行肺血栓内膜切除术（PTE）以去除位于肺动脉（PA）内的血栓和内膜。在手术过程中，外科医生拿着镊子和解剖器小心地剥离堵塞物，但用于该手术的可用工具是刚性和笔直的，缺乏远端灵巧性来进入 PA 的细分支。因此，这项工作提出了一种基于同心推/拉机器人（CPPR）结构的新型机器人解剖器，能够进入曲折的 PA 的深部细分支。与传统的刚性解剖器相比，我们的设计具有细长和双段弯曲灵巧的特点。由于基于 CPPR 的解剖器具有直径 3.5mm 的细长主体，因此具有中空薄壁结构，中央管腔可容纳两个用于冲洗和尖端工具的通道，以及用于内窥镜摄像机信号线的空间。为了提供精确的手术操作，建立了基于优化的运动学模型，在开环控制策略下实现了尖端工具（60mm长度）的2mm定位精度。这样，有了内窥镜摄像头，传统的PTE就有可能升级为内窥镜PTE。通过实验评估了机器人解剖器的基本物理性能，包括刚度、运动精度和可操作性。离体猪肺的手术模拟也展示了其在PTE中的灵活性和显着优势。
> **Abstract**: Patients suffering chronic severe pulmonary thromboembolism need Pulmonary Thromboendarterectomy (PTE) to remove the thromb and intima located inside pulmonary artery (PA). During the surgery, a surgeon holds tweezers and a dissector to delicately strip the blockage, but available tools for this surgery are rigid and straight, lacking distal dexterity to access into thin branches of PA. Therefore, this work presents a novel robotized dissector based on concentric push/pull robot (CPPR) structure, enabling entering deep thin branch of tortuous PA. Compared with conventional rigid dissectors, our design characterizes slenderness and dual-segment-bending dexterity. Owing to the hollow and thin-walled structure of the CPPR-based dissector as it has a slender body of 3.5mm in diameter, the central lumen accommodates two channels for irrigation and tip tool, and space for endoscopic camera's signal wire. To provide accurate surgical manipulation, optimization-based kinematics model was established, realizing a 2mm accuracy in positioning the tip tool (60mm length) under open-loop control strategy. As such, with the endoscopic camera, traditional PTE is possible to be upgraded as endoscopic PTE. Basic physic performance of the robotized dissector including stiffness, motion accuracy and maneuverability was evaluated through experiments. Surgery simulation on ex vivo porcine lung also demonstrates its dexterity and notable advantages in PTE.

【20】A Unified Candidate Set with Scene-Adaptive Refinement via Diffusion for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
- **标题**: 通过扩散进行场景自适应细化的统一候选集，用于端到端自动驾驶
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03112
> **作者**: Zhengfei Wu,Shuaixi Pan,Shuohan Chen,Shuo Yang,Yanjun Huang
> **摘要**: 端到端自动驾驶越来越多地采用多模式规划范例，该范例生成多个候选轨迹并选择最终计划，这使得候选集设计变得至关重要。固定轨迹词汇在日常驾驶中提供了稳定的覆盖范围，但在复杂的交互中常常会错过最佳解决方案，而场景自适应细化可能会在简单场景中通过不必要地干扰已经很强的词汇轨迹而导致过度校正。我们提出了 CdDrive，它保留了原始候选词汇，并用词汇条件扩散去噪生成的场景自适应候选来增强它们。两种候选类型均由共享选择模块联合评分，从而在常规和高度交互的场景中实现可靠的性能。我们进一步引入 HATNA（地平线感知轨迹噪声适配器），通过时间平滑和地平线感知噪声调制来提高扩散候选的平滑度和几何连续性。 NAVSIM v1 和 NAVSIM v2 上的实验展示了领先的性能，并且消融验证了每个组件的贡献。
> **Abstract**: End-to-end autonomous driving is increasingly adopting a multimodal planning paradigm that generates multiple trajectory candidates and selects the final plan, making candidate-set design critical. A fixed trajectory vocabulary provides stable coverage in routine driving but often misses optimal solutions in complex interactions, while scene-adaptive refinement can cause over-correction in simple scenarios by unnecessarily perturbing already strong vocabulary trajectories.We propose CdDrive, which preserves the original vocabulary candidates and augments them with scene-adaptive candidates generated by vocabulary-conditioned diffusion denoising. Both candidate types are jointly scored by a shared selection module, enabling reliable performance across routine and highly interactive scenarios. We further introduce HATNA (Horizon-Aware Trajectory Noise Adapter) to improve the smoothness and geometric continuity of diffusion candidates via temporal smoothing and horizon-aware noise modulation. Experiments on NAVSIM v1 and NAVSIM v2 demonstrate leading performance, and ablations verify the contribution of each component.

【21】Training and Simulation of Quadrupedal Robot in Adaptive Stair Climbing for Indoor Firefighting: An End-to-End Reinforcement Learning Approach
- **标题**: 室内消防自适应爬楼四足机器人的训练和仿真：一种端到端强化学习方法
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03087
> **作者**: Baixiao Huang,Baiyu Huang,Yu Hou
> **摘要**: 四足机器人用于室内火灾早期阶段的初步搜索。典型的初步搜索包括在危险条件下快速彻底地寻找受害者并监控易燃材料。然而，复杂室内环境中的态势感知和跨越不同楼梯的快速爬楼梯仍然是机器人辅助初步搜索的主要挑战。在这个项目中，我们设计了一种两阶段端到端深度强化学习（RL）方法来优化导航和运动。在第一阶段，四足动物 Unitree Go2 接受训练，在艾萨克实验室的金字塔楼梯地形中爬楼梯。在第二阶段，四足动物接受训练，在 Isaac Lab 引擎中攀爬各种真实的室内楼梯，并从前一阶段转移学到的策略。这些室内楼梯有直形、L形和螺旋形，以支持复杂环境中的攀爬任务。该项目探讨了如何平衡导航和运动，以及端到端强化学习方法如何使四足动物适应不同的楼梯形状。我们的主要贡献是：（1）一个两阶段的端到端强化学习框架，将爬楼梯技能从抽象的金字塔地形转移到现实的室内楼梯拓扑。 （2）基于中心线的导航公式，无需分层规划即可实现导航和运动的统一学习。 (3)仅使用局部高度图感知来演示跨不同楼梯的政策泛化。 (4)对楼梯难度增加下的成功、效率和失败模式进行实证分析。
> **Abstract**: Quadruped robots are used for primary searches during the early stages of indoor fires. A typical primary search involves quickly and thoroughly looking for victims under hazardous conditions and monitoring flammable materials. However, situational awareness in complex indoor environments and rapid stair climbing across different staircases remain the main challenges for robot-assisted primary searches. In this project, we designed a two-stage end-to-end deep reinforcement learning (RL) approach to optimize both navigation and locomotion. In the first stage, the quadrupeds, Unitree Go2, were trained to climb stairs in Isaac Lab's pyramid-stair terrain. In the second stage, the quadrupeds were trained to climb various realistic indoor staircases in the Isaac Lab engine, with the learned policy transferred from the previous stage. These indoor staircases are straight, L-shaped, and spiral, to support climbing tasks in complex environments. This project explores how to balance navigation and locomotion and how end-to-end RL methods can enable quadrupeds to adapt to different stair shapes. Our main contributions are: (1) A two-stage end-to-end RL framework that transfers stair-climbing skills from abstract pyramid terrain to realistic indoor stair topologies. (2) A centerline-based navigation formulation that enables unified learning of navigation and locomotion without hierarchical planning. (3) Demonstration of policy generalization across diverse staircases using only local height-map perception. (4) An empirical analysis of success, efficiency, and failure modes under increasing stair difficulty.

【22】RPL: Learning Robust Humanoid Perceptive Locomotion on Challenging Terrains
- **标题**: RPL：在具有挑战性的地形上学习鲁棒的人形感知运动
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03002
> **作者**: Yuanhang Zhang,Younggyo Seo,Juyue Chen,Yifu Yuan,Koushil Sreenath,Pieter Abbeel,Carmelo Sferrazza,Karen Liu,Rocky Duan,Guanya Shi
> **摘要**: 人形感知运动已经取得了重大进展并显示出巨大的前景，但在复杂地形上实现稳健的多向运动仍有待探索。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 RPL，这是一种两阶段训练框架，可在具有挑战性的地形上实现多向运动，并在有效负载下保持鲁棒性。 RPL 首先使用特权高度图观测来训练针对特定地形的专家策略，以掌握跨不同地形的解耦运动和操纵技能，然后将其提炼为变压器策略，利用多个深度相机来覆盖广泛的视图。在蒸馏过程中，我们引入了两种技术来增强多向运动、基于速度命令的深度特征缩放和随机侧面掩蔽，这对于不对称深度观测和不可见的地形宽度至关重要。为了实现可扩展的深度蒸馏，我们开发了一种高效的多深度系统，该系统可以在大规模并行环境中针对动态机器人网格和静态地形网格进行光线投射，从而在现有模拟器中的深度渲染管道上实现 5 倍的加速，同时对真实的传感器延迟、噪声和丢失进行建模。广泛的现实世界实验证明了有效负载（2公斤）在具有挑战性的地形上的稳健多向运动，包括20°斜坡、不同步长（22厘米、25厘米、30厘米）的楼梯，以及间隔60厘米间隙的25厘米×25厘米踏脚石。
> **Abstract**: Humanoid perceptive locomotion has made significant progress and shows great promise, yet achieving robust multi-directional locomotion on complex terrains remains underexplored. To tackle this challenge, we propose RPL, a two-stage training framework that enables multi-directional locomotion on challenging terrains, and remains robust with payloads. RPL first trains terrain-specific expert policies with privileged height map observations to master decoupled locomotion and manipulation skills across different terrains, and then distills them into a transformer policy that leverages multiple depth cameras to cover a wide range of views. During distillation, we introduce two techniques to robustify multi-directional locomotion, depth feature scaling based on velocity commands and random side masking, which are critical for asymmetric depth observations and unseen widths of terrains. For scalable depth distillation, we develop an efficient multi-depth system that ray-casts against both dynamic robot meshes and static terrain meshes in massively parallel environments, achieving a 5-times speedup over the depth rendering pipelines in existing simulators while modeling realistic sensor latency, noise, and dropout. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate robust multi-directional locomotion with payloads (2kg) across challenging terrains, including 20° slopes, staircases with different step lengths (22 cm, 25 cm, 30 cm), and 25 cm by 25 cm stepping stones separated by 60 cm gaps.

【23】Embodiment-Aware Generalist Specialist Distillation for Unified Humanoid Whole-Body Control
- **标题**: 用于统一人形全身控制的具体化感知通才专家蒸馏
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02960
> **作者**: Quanquan Peng,Yunfeng Lin,Yufei Xue,Jiangmiao Pang,Weinan Zhang
> **摘要**: 经过强化学习 (RL) 训练的人形全身控制器最近取得了显着的性能，但许多控制器都针对单个机器人实施例。动力学、自由度 (DoF) 和运动学拓扑的变化仍然阻碍单一策略指挥不同的人形机器人。此外，获得一种不仅可以跨实施例转移而且支持更丰富的行为（从简单的步行到蹲下、倾斜）的通用策略仍然特别具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们通过引入 EAGLE 来解决这些障碍，EAGLE 是一种迭代的通才-专家蒸馏框架，它产生一个统一的策略来控制多个异构类人机器人，而无需对每个机器人进行奖励调整。在每个周期中，特定实施例的专家从当前的多面手中分叉出来，在各自的机器人上进行改进，并且通过对汇集的实施例集进行训练，将新技能提炼回多面手。重复此循环，直到性能收敛为止，生成一个在 Unitree H1、G1 和 Fourier N1 等机器人上经过验证的强大全身控制器。我们在模拟中对五个不同的机器人进行了实验，在现实环境中对四个不同的机器人进行了实验。通过定量评估，与其他方法相比，EAGLE 实现了较高的跟踪精度和鲁棒性，标志着向可扩展的车队级人形控制迈出了一步。请访问 https://eagle-wbc.github.io/ 查看更多详细信息
> **Abstract**: Humanoid Whole-Body Controllers trained with reinforcement learning (RL) have recently achieved remarkable performance, yet many target a single robot embodiment. Variations in dynamics, degrees of freedom (DoFs), and kinematic topology still hinder a single policy from commanding diverse humanoids. Moreover, obtaining a generalist policy that not only transfers across embodiments but also supports richer behaviors-beyond simple walking to squatting, leaning-remains especially challenging. In this work, we tackle these obstacles by introducing EAGLE, an iterative generalist-specialist distillation framework that produces a single unified policy that controls multiple heterogeneous humanoids without per-robot reward tuning. During each cycle, embodiment-specific specialists are forked from the current generalist, refined on their respective robots, and new skills are distilled back into the generalist by training on the pooled embodiment set. Repeating this loop until performance convergence produces a robust Whole-Body Controller validated on robots such as Unitree H1, G1, and Fourier N1. We conducted experiments on five different robots in simulation and four in real-world settings. Through quantitative evaluations, EAGLE achieves high tracking accuracy and robustness compared to other methods, marking a step toward scalable, fleet-level humanoid control. See more details at https://eagle-wbc.github.io/

【24】Modular Isoperimetric Soft Robotic Truss for Lunar Applications
- **标题**: 用于月球应用的模块化等周软机器人桁架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02915
> **作者**: Mihai Stanciu,Isaac Weaver,Adam Rose,James Wade,Kaden Paxton,Chris Paul,Spencer Stowell,Nathan Usevitch
> **摘要**: 我们推出了一种大型机器人系统，该系统设计为轻量级、模块化和可重构结构，适用于月球应用。该系统由桁架状机器人三角形组成，三角形机器人三角形由连续充气织物管组成，这些织物管穿过两个机器人滚筒单元和一个连接单元。新开发的球形接头最多可以在一个顶点连接三个三角形，从而可以构建超出单个八面体的桁架组件。放气时，三角形会压缩到大约为滚轮单元的体积，从而实现 1:18.3 的收起与展开体积比。充气后，滚轮单元夹紧管子，局部降低弯曲刚度以形成有效的接头。然后，电动机沿着管子平移滚轮单元，通过延长一个边缘同时以相同的速率缩短另一个边缘来移动夹点，从而保持恒定的周长（等周长）。这种形状改变过程不需要额外的压缩空气，因此可以在初始充气后进行不受束缚的操作。我们将该系统演示为能够倾斜达 60 度和扫描 360 度的 12 自由度太阳能电池阵列，以及使用步进和滑动步态的 14 自由度运动装置。这种模块化的形状自适应系统解决了可持续月球操作和未来太空任务的关键挑战。
> **Abstract**: We introduce a large-scale robotic system designed as a lightweight, modular, and reconfigurable structure for lunar applications. The system consists of truss-like robotic triangles formed by continuous inflated fabric tubes routed through two robotic roller units and a connecting unit. A newly developed spherical joint enables up to three triangles to connect at a vertex, allowing construction of truss assemblies beyond a single octahedron. When deflated, the triangles compact to approximately the volume of the roller units, achieving a stowed-to-deployed volume ratio of 1:18.3. Upon inflation, the roller units pinch the tubes, locally reducing bending stiffness to form effective joints. Electric motors then translate the roller units along the tube, shifting the pinch point by lengthening one edge while shortening another at the same rate, thereby preserving a constant perimeter (isoperimetric). This shape-changing process requires no additional compressed air, enabling untethered operation after initial inflation. We demonstrate the system as a 12-degree-of-freedom solar array capable of tilting up to 60 degrees and sweeping 360 degrees, and as a 14-degree-of-freedom locomotion device using a step-and-slide gait. This modular, shape-adaptive system addresses key challenges for sustainable lunar operations and future space missions.

【25】Moving On, Even When You're Broken: Fail-Active Trajectory Generation via Diffusion Policies Conditioned on Embodiment and Task
- **标题**: 即使你崩溃了，也要继续前进：通过以体现和任务为条件的扩散策略生成故障主动轨迹
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02895
> **作者**: Gilberto G. Briscoe-Martinez,Yaashia Gautam,Rahul Shetty,Anuj Pasricha,Marco M. Nicotra,Alessandro Roncone
> **摘要**: 机器人故障是有害且具有破坏性的，通常需要人工干预才能恢复。在受损情况下保持安全运行以完成任务，即故障主动运行，是我们的目标。针对驱动故障，我们引入了 DEFT，一种基于扩散的轨迹生成器，以机器人当前的实施例和任务约束为条件。 DEFT 概括了各种故障类型，支持受约束和无约束运动，并能够在任意故障下完成任务。我们使用 7-DoF 机械臂在模拟和现实场景中评估了 DEFT。在跨多个任务的数千个联合故障案例的模拟中，DEFT 的性能比基线高出多达 2 倍。对于训练期间未见的故障，它继续优于基线，这表明模拟具有强大的泛化能力。此外，我们对抽屉操作和白板擦除这两个多步骤任务进行了实际评估。这些实验证明 DEFT 在经典方法失败的任务上取得了成功。我们的结果表明，DEFT 实现了跨任意故障配置和实际部署的故障主动操作。
> **Abstract**: Robot failure is detrimental and disruptive, often requiring human intervention to recover. Maintaining safe operation under impairment to achieve task completion, i.e. fail-active operation, is our target. Focusing on actuation failures, we introduce DEFT, a diffusion-based trajectory generator conditioned on the robot's current embodiment and task constraints. DEFT generalizes across failure types, supports constrained and unconstrained motions, and enables task completion under arbitrary failure. We evaluated DEFT in both simulation and real-world scenarios using a 7-DoF robotic arm. In simulation over thousands of joint-failure cases across multiple tasks, DEFT outperformed the baseline by up to 2 times. On failures unseen during training, it continued to outperform the baseline, indicating robust generalization in simulation. Further, we performed real-world evaluations on two multi-step tasks, drawer manipulation and whiteboard erasing. These experiments demonstrated DEFT succeeding on tasks where classical methods failed. Our results show that DEFT achieves fail-active manipulation across arbitrary failure configurations and real-world deployments.

【26】Accelerating Structured Chain-of-Thought in Autonomous Vehicles
- **标题**: 加速自动驾驶汽车的结构化思维链
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02864
> **作者**: Yi Gu,Yan Wang,Yuxiao Chen,Yurong You,Wenjie Luo,Yue Wang,Wenhao Ding,Boyi Li,Heng Yang,Boris Ivanovic,Marco Pavone
> **摘要**: 思想链（CoT）推理增强了自动驾驶中视觉-语言-动作模型的决策能力，但其自回归性质引入了显着的推理延迟，使其对于实时应用来说不切实际。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 FastDriveCoT，这是一种新颖的并行解码方法，可以加速模板结构的 CoT。我们的方法将推理过程分解为不同子任务的依赖图，例如识别关键对象和总结交通规则，其中一些可以并行生成。通过在单个前向传递中同时生成多个独立推理步骤，我们显着减少了顺序计算的数量。实验表明，CoT 生成速度提高了 3-4 倍，各种模型架构的端到端延迟显着减少，同时保留了通过合并 CoT 推理带来的原始下游任务改进。
> **Abstract**: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning enhances the decision-making capabilities of vision-language-action models in autonomous driving, but its autoregressive nature introduces significant inference latency, making it impractical for real-time applications. To address this, we introduce FastDriveCoT, a novel parallel decoding method that accelerates template-structured CoT. Our approach decomposes the reasoning process into a dependency graph of distinct sub-tasks, such as identifying critical objects and summarizing traffic rules, some of which can be generated in parallel. By generating multiple independent reasoning steps concurrently within a single forward pass, we significantly reduce the number of sequential computations. Experiments demonstrate a 3-4$\times$ speedup in CoT generation and a substantial reduction in end-to-end latency across various model architectures, all while preserving the original downstream task improvements brought by incorporating CoT reasoning.

【27】IMAGINE: Intelligent Multi-Agent Godot-based Indoor Networked Exploration
- **标题**: IMAGINE：基于智能多智能体 Godot 的室内网络探索
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02858
> **作者**: Tiago Leite,Maria Conceição,António Grilo
> **摘要**: 由具有自主通信意识和协作能力的无人机 (UAV) 组成的小组探索未知的、全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 无法识别的环境，这在协调、感知和分散决策方面提出了重大挑战。本文使用高保真游戏引擎模拟 (Godot) 和连续动作空间，实现多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 来应对 2D 室内环境中的这些挑战。政策培训旨在使用网络分布式部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（ND-POMDP）在不确定性下实现紧急协作行为和决策。每架无人机都配备了光探测和测距（LiDAR）传感器，可以与邻近代理共享数据（传感器测量值和本地占用图）。代理间通信限制包括有限的范围、带宽和延迟。广泛的消融研究评估了 MARL 训练范式、奖励函数、通信系统、神经网络 (NN) 架构、记忆机制和 POMDP 公式。这项工作共同解决了先前研究中的几个关键限制，即对离散动作的依赖、单代理或集中式表述、先验知识和永久连接的假设、无法处理动态障碍、短期规划范围和循环神经网络/变压器的架构复杂性。结果表明，可扩展的训练范例与简化的架构相结合，可以实现室内区域的快速自主探索。课程学习（五个日益复杂的级别）的实施也实现了更快、更强大的培训。高保真模拟、MARL 公式和计算效率的结合为在物理机器人系统中部署学习的合作策略奠定了坚实的基础。
> **Abstract**: The exploration of unknown, Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) denied environments by an autonomous communication-aware and collaborative group of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) presents significant challenges in coordination, perception, and decentralized decision-making. This paper implements Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) to address these challenges in a 2D indoor environment, using high-fidelity game-engine simulations (Godot) and continuous action spaces. Policy training aims to achieve emergent collaborative behaviours and decision-making under uncertainty using Network-Distributed Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (ND-POMDPs). Each UAV is equipped with a Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) sensor and can share data (sensor measurements and a local occupancy map) with neighbouring agents. Inter-agent communication constraints include limited range, bandwidth and latency. Extensive ablation studies evaluated MARL training paradigms, reward function, communication system, neural network (NN) architecture, memory mechanisms, and POMDP formulations. This work jointly addresses several key limitations in prior research, namely reliance on discrete actions, single-agent or centralized formulations, assumptions of a priori knowledge and permanent connectivity, inability to handle dynamic obstacles, short planning horizons and architectural complexity in Recurrent NNs/Transformers. Results show that the scalable training paradigm, combined with a simplified architecture, enables rapid autonomous exploration of an indoor area. The implementation of Curriculum-Learning (five increasingly complex levels) also enabled faster, more robust training. This combination of high-fidelity simulation, MARL formulation, and computational efficiency establishes a strong foundation for deploying learned cooperative strategies in physical robotic systems.

【28】Latent Perspective-Taking via a Schrödinger Bridge in Influence-Augmented Local Models
- **标题**: 通过影响增强局部模型中的薛定谔桥进行潜在视角获取
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02857
> **作者**: Kevin Alcedo,Pedro U. Lima,Rachid Alami
> **摘要**: 在与人类一起的环境中运行需要机器人在不确定的情况下做出决策。除了外生动力之外，他们还必须推理他人隐藏的心理模型和心理状态。虽然交互式 POMDP 和贝叶斯心理理论公式是有原则的，但精确的嵌套信念推理很棘手，并且手工指定的模型在开放世界环境中很脆弱。我们通过学习结构化心理模型和他人心理状态的估计来解决这两个问题。在基于影响力的抽象的基础上，我们实例化了影响力增强局部模型，将具有社交意识的机器人任务分解为局部动态、社会影响和外生因素。我们提出（a）一个神经符号世界模型，实例化一个分解的、离散的动态贝叶斯网络，以及（b）一个透视转换算子，建模为学习局部动力学上的摊销薛定谔桥，将分解的自我中心信念传输到以他人为中心的信念。我们表明，这种架构使代理能够通过决策时心理状态规划（信念空间中的薛定谔桥）在基于模型的强化学习中综合社会意识策略，并在 MiniGrid 社会导航任务中取得初步结果。
> **Abstract**: Operating in environments alongside humans requires robots to make decisions under uncertainty. In addition to exogenous dynamics, they must reason over others' hidden mental-models and mental-states. While Interactive POMDPs and Bayesian Theory of Mind formulations are principled, exact nested-belief inference is intractable, and hand-specified models are brittle in open-world settings. We address both by learning structured mental-models and an estimator of others' mental-states. Building on the Influence-Based Abstraction, we instantiate an Influence-Augmented Local Model to decompose socially-aware robot tasks into local dynamics, social influences, and exogenous factors. We propose (a) a neuro-symbolic world model instantiating a factored, discrete Dynamic Bayesian Network, and (b) a perspective-shift operator modeled as an amortized Schrödinger Bridge over the learned local dynamics that transports factored egocentric beliefs into other-centric beliefs. We show that this architecture enables agents to synthesize socially-aware policies in model-based reinforcement learning, via decision-time mental-state planning (a Schrödinger Bridge in belief space), with preliminary results in a MiniGrid social navigation task.

【29】Kino-PAX$^+$: Near-Optimal Massively Parallel Kinodynamic Sampling-based Motion Planner
- **标题**: Kino-PAX$^+$：近乎最优的基于运动动力学采样的大规模并行运动规划器
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02846
> **作者**: Nicolas Perrault,Qi Heng Ho,Morteza Lahijanian
> **摘要**: 基于采样的运动规划器（SBMP）广泛用于高维空间中具有复杂运动动力学约束的机器人运动规划，但由于其串行计算设计，它们很难实现\emph{实时}性能。最近并行 SBMP 的努力在寻找可行解决方案方面取得了显着的加速；然而，它们不能保证优化目标函数。我们引入 Kino-PAX$^{+}$，一种具有渐进近最优保证的大规模并行运动动力学 SBMP。 Kino-PAX$^{+}$ 通过将传统串行操作分解为三个大规模并行子例程来构建动态可行轨迹的稀疏树。该算法将计算集中在局部邻域内最有希望的节点上，以进行传播和细化，从而能够快速提高解决方案成本。我们证明，在保持概率 $δ$ 鲁棒完整性的同时，对有前途节点的关注确保了渐近 $δ$ 鲁棒接近最优。我们的结果表明，Kino-PAX$^{+}$ 找到解决方案的速度比现有串行方法快三个数量级，并且比最先进的基于 GPU 的规划器实现更低的解决方案成本。
> **Abstract**: Sampling-based motion planners (SBMPs) are widely used for robot motion planning with complex kinodynamic constraints in high-dimensional spaces, yet they struggle to achieve \emph{real-time} performance due to their serial computation design. Recent efforts to parallelize SBMPs have achieved significant speedups in finding feasible solutions; however, they provide no guarantees of optimizing an objective function. We introduce Kino-PAX$^{+}$, a massively parallel kinodynamic SBMP with asymptotic near-optimal guarantees. Kino-PAX$^{+}$ builds a sparse tree of dynamically feasible trajectories by decomposing traditionally serial operations into three massively parallel subroutines. The algorithm focuses computation on the most promising nodes within local neighborhoods for propagation and refinement, enabling rapid improvement of solution cost. We prove that, while maintaining probabilistic $δ$-robust completeness, this focus on promising nodes ensures asymptotic $δ$-robust near-optimality. Our results show that Kino-PAX$^{+}$ finds solutions up to three orders of magnitude faster than existing serial methods and achieves lower solution costs than a state-of-the-art GPU-based planner.

【30】Language Movement Primitives: Grounding Language Models in Robot Motion
- **标题**: 语言运动原语：机器人运动语言模型的基础
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02839
> **作者**: Yinlong Dai,Benjamin A. Christie,Daniel J. Evans,Dylan P. Losey,Simon Stepputtis
