【72】AgenticLab: A Real-World Robot Agent Platform that Can See, Think, and Act
- **标题**: AgenticLab：一个可以看到、思考和行动的现实世界机器人代理平台
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01662
> **作者**: Pengyuan Guo,Zhonghao Mai,Zhengtong Xu,Kaidi Zhang,Heng Zhang,Zichen Miao,Arash Ajoudani,Zachary Kingston,Qiang Qiu,Yu She
> **摘要**: 大型视觉语言模型（VLM）的最新进展已经证明了可推广的开放词汇感知和推理，但它们的真实机器人操纵能力对于非结构化、野外环境中的长视野、闭环执行仍不清楚。先前基于 VLM 的操作流程很难在不同研究小组的设置之间进行比较，并且许多评估依赖于模拟、特权状态或专门设计的设置。我们推出 AgenticLab，一个与模型无关的机器人代理平台和开放世界操作的基准。 AgenticLab提供了一个闭环的代理管道，用于感知、任务分解、在线验证和重新规划。使用 AgenticLab，我们在非结构化环境中的真实机器人任务上对最先进的基于 VLM 的代理进行基准测试。我们的基准测试揭示了离线视觉语言测试（例如，VQA 和静态图像理解）无法捕获的几种故障模式，包括多步接地一致性故障、遮挡和场景变化下的对象接地以及可靠操作的空间推理不足。我们将发布完整的硬件和软件堆栈，以支持可重复的评估并加速通用机器人代理的研究。
> **Abstract**: Recent advances in large vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated generalizable open-vocabulary perception and reasoning, yet their real-robot manipulation capability remains unclear for long-horizon, closed-loop execution in unstructured, in-the-wild environments. Prior VLM-based manipulation pipelines are difficult to compare across different research groups' setups, and many evaluations rely on simulation, privileged state, or specially designed setups. We present AgenticLab, a model-agnostic robot agent platform and benchmark for open-world manipulation. AgenticLab provides a closed-loop agent pipeline for perception, task decomposition, online verification, and replanning. Using AgenticLab, we benchmark state-of-the-art VLM-based agents on real-robot tasks in unstructured environments. Our benchmark reveals several failure modes that offline vision-language tests (e.g., VQA and static image understanding) fail to capture, including breakdowns in multi-step grounding consistency, object grounding under occlusion and scene changes, and insufficient spatial reasoning for reliable manipulation. We will release the full hardware and software stack to support reproducible evaluation and accelerate research on general-purpose robot agents.

【73】A Closed-Form Geometric Retargeting Solver for Upper Body Humanoid Robot Teleoperation
- **标题**: 用于上半身人形机器人远程操作的闭式几何重定向求解器
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01632
> **作者**: Chuizheng Kong,Yunho Cho,Wonsuhk Jung,Idris Wibowo,Parth Shinde,Sundhar Vinodh-Sangeetha,Long Kiu Chung,Zhenyang Chen,Andrew Mattei,Advaith Nidumukkala,Alexander Elias,Danfei Xu,Taylor Higgins,Shreyas Kousik
> **摘要**: 将人体运动重新定位到机器人姿势是远程操作双手人形机器人手臂的一种实用方法，但现有方法可能不是最佳且缓慢，通常会导致不良运动或延迟。这是由于优化以使机器人末端执行器与人手的位置和方向相匹配，这也会将机器人的工作空间限制为人类的工作空间。相反，本文将重定向重新定义为方向对齐问题，从而实现具有最优性保证的封闭式几何求解算法。关键思想是将机器人手臂与人类的上臂和下臂方向对齐，如从肩、肘和腕 (SEW) 关键点识别的那样；因此，该方法被称为SEW-Mimic。该方法在标准商用CPU上具有快速推理（3 kHz），为下游应用程序留下计算开销；本文的一个例子是避免双手自碰撞的安全过滤器。该方法适合大多数七自由度机械臂和类人机器人，并且与输入关键点源无关。实验表明，SEW-Mimic 在计算时间和准确性方面优于其他重定向方法。一项试点用户研究表明，该方法可以提高远程操作任务的成功率。初步分析表明，使用 SEW-Mimic 收集的数据由于更加平滑而改善了策略学习。 SEW-Mimic 还被证明是加速全身人形重定向的一种简便方法。最后，硬件演示说明了SEW-Mimic的实用性。结果强调了 SEW-Mimic 作为双手机器人操作和人形机器人远程操作的基本构建模块的实用性。
> **Abstract**: Retargeting human motion to robot poses is a practical approach for teleoperating bimanual humanoid robot arms, but existing methods can be suboptimal and slow, often causing undesirable motion or latency. This is due to optimizing to match robot end-effector to human hand position and orientation, which can also limit the robot's workspace to that of the human. Instead, this paper reframes retargeting as an orientation alignment problem, enabling a closed-form, geometric solution algorithm with an optimality guarantee. The key idea is to align a robot arm to a human's upper and lower arm orientations, as identified from shoulder, elbow, and wrist (SEW) keypoints; hence, the method is called SEW-Mimic. The method has fast inference (3 kHz) on standard commercial CPUs, leaving computational overhead for downstream applications; an example in this paper is a safety filter to avoid bimanual self-collision. The method suits most 7-degree-of-freedom robot arms and humanoids, and is agnostic to input keypoint source. Experiments show that SEW-Mimic outperforms other retargeting methods in computation time and accuracy. A pilot user study suggests that the method improves teleoperation task success. Preliminary analysis indicates that data collected with SEW-Mimic improves policy learning due to being smoother. SEW-Mimic is also shown to be a drop-in way to accelerate full-body humanoid retargeting. Finally, hardware demonstrations illustrate SEW-Mimic's practicality. The results emphasize the utility of SEW-Mimic as a fundamental building block for bimanual robot manipulation and humanoid robot teleoperation.

【74】UniDWM: Towards a Unified Driving World Model via Multifaceted Representation Learning
- **标题**: UniDWM：通过多方面表示学习迈向统一的驾驶世界模型
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01536
> **作者**: Shuai Liu,Siheng Ren,Xiaoyao Zhu,Quanmin Liang,Zefeng Li,Qiang Li,Xin Hu,Kai Huang
> **摘要**: 在复杂的驾驶环境中实现可靠、高效的规划需要一个能够推理场景的几何形状、外观和动态的模型。我们提出了 UniDWM，这是一种统一的驾驶世界模型，可通过多方面的表示学习来推进自动驾驶。 UniDWM 构建了一个结构和动态感知的潜在世界表示，作为物理接地状态空间，实现跨感知、预测和规划的一致推理。具体来说，联合重建路径学习恢复场景的结构，包括几何和视觉纹理，而协作生成框架则利用条件扩散变换器来预测潜在空间内的未来世界演化。此外，我们表明我们的 UniDWM 可以被视为 VAE 的变体，它为多方面表示学习提供了理论指导。大量实验证明了 UniDWM 在轨迹规划、4D 重建和生成方面的有效性，凸显了多方面世界表示作为统一驾驶智能基础的潜力。该代码将在 https://github.com/Say2L/UniDWM 上公开提供。
> **Abstract**: Achieving reliable and efficient planning in complex driving environments requires a model that can reason over the scene's geometry, appearance, and dynamics. We present UniDWM, a unified driving world model that advances autonomous driving through multifaceted representation learning. UniDWM constructs a structure- and dynamic-aware latent world representation that serves as a physically grounded state space, enabling consistent reasoning across perception, prediction, and planning. Specifically, a joint reconstruction pathway learns to recover the scene's structure, including geometry and visual texture, while a collaborative generation framework leverages a conditional diffusion transformer to forecast future world evolution within the latent space. Furthermore, we show that our UniDWM can be deemed as a variation of VAE, which provides theoretical guidance for the multifaceted representation learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of UniDWM in trajectory planning, 4D reconstruction and generation, highlighting the potential of multifaceted world representations as a foundation for unified driving intelligence. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/Say2L/UniDWM.

【75】Co-Design of Rover Wheels and Control using Bayesian Optimization and Rover-Terrain Simulations
- **标题**: 使用贝叶斯优化和流动站地形仿真联合设计流动站车轮和控制
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01535
> **作者**: Huzaifa Mustafa Unjhawala,Khizar Shaikh,Luning Bakke,Radu Serban,Dan Negrut
> **摘要**: 虽然仿真对于优化机器人系统至关重要，但对可变形地形进行建模的成本长期以来限制了其在越野自主移动性整车研究中的使用。例如，离散元法 (DEM) 模拟通常仅限于单轮测试，这模糊了车轮-车辆-控制器的耦合交互，并阻碍了机械设计和控制的联合优化。本文提出了一种贝叶斯优化框架，该框架使用可变形地形上的高保真全车辆闭环仿真来共同设计流动车车轮几何形状和转向控制器参数。利用地形力学连续体表示模型 (CRM) 的效率和可扩展性，我们在牵引固定负载的同时评估不同复杂性轨迹上的候选设计。优化器在平衡行驶速度、跟踪误差和能耗的多目标公式下调整车轮参数（半径、宽度和履带齿特征）和转向 PID 增益。我们比较了两种策略：车轮和控制器参数的同时协同优化与解耦机械和控制设计的顺序方法。我们分析性能和计算成本的权衡。在 3,000 次整车模拟中，活动在 5 到 9 天内完成，而该团队早期基于 DEM 的工作流程需要几个月的时间。最后，初步的硬件研究表明，仿真优化的车轮设计保留了物理流动站的相对性能趋势。总之，这些结果表明，可扩展的高保真度仿真可以实现变形地形上越野车辆的车轮设计和控制的实际协同优化，而无需依赖昂贵的 DEM 研究。模拟基础设施（脚本和模型）在公共存储库中作为开源发布，以支持可重复性和进一步研究。
> **Abstract**: While simulation is vital for optimizing robotic systems, the cost of modeling deformable terrain has long limited its use in full-vehicle studies of off-road autonomous mobility. For example, Discrete Element Method (DEM) simulations are often confined to single-wheel tests, which obscures coupled wheel-vehicle-controller interactions and prevents joint optimization of mechanical design and control. This paper presents a Bayesian optimization framework that co-designs rover wheel geometry and steering controller parameters using high-fidelity, full-vehicle closed-loop simulations on deformable terrain. Using the efficiency and scalability of a continuum-representation model (CRM) for terramechanics, we evaluate candidate designs on trajectories of varying complexity while towing a fixed load. The optimizer tunes wheel parameters (radius, width, and grouser features) and steering PID gains under a multi-objective formulation that balances traversal speed, tracking error, and energy consumption. We compare two strategies: simultaneous co-optimization of wheel and controller parameters versus a sequential approach that decouples mechanical and control design. We analyze trade-offs in performance and computational cost. Across 3,000 full-vehicle simulations, campaigns finish in five to nine days, versus months with the group's earlier DEM-based workflow. Finally, a preliminary hardware study suggests the simulation-optimized wheel designs preserve relative performance trends on the physical rover. Together, these results show that scalable, high-fidelity simulation can enable practical co-optimization of wheel design and control for off-road vehicles on deformable terrain without relying on prohibitively expensive DEM studies. The simulation infrastructure (scripts and models) is released as open source in a public repository to support reproducibility and further research.

【76】RAPT: Model-Predictive Out-of-Distribution Detection and Failure Diagnosis for Sim-to-Real Humanoid Robots
- **标题**: RAPT：模拟到真实人形机器人的模型预测分布外检测和故障诊断
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01515
> **作者**: Humphrey Munn,Brendan Tidd,Peter Bohm,Marcus Gallagher,David Howard
> **摘要**: 在人形机器人上部署学习的控制策略具有挑战性：在模拟中表现出稳健的策略可以在 Sim-to-Real 传输后在分布外 (OOD) 状态下自信地执行，从而导致无声故障，从而导致硬件损坏。尽管异常检测可以减轻这些故障，但现有方法通常与高速率控制不兼容，在实际部署所需的极低误报率下校准不佳，或者作为提供二进制停止信号的黑匣子运行，而没有解释机器人偏离标称行为的原因。我们推出了 RAPT，这是一种轻量级、自我监督的部署时间监视器，用于 50Hz 人形控制。 RAPT 从模拟中学习标称执行的概率时空流形，并将执行时间预测偏差评估为校准的每维信号。这产生了（i）在严格的误报约束下可靠的在线 OOD 检测，以及（ii）连续的、可解释的 Sim-to-Real 不匹配测量，可以随着时间的推移进行跟踪，以量化部署与训练的偏差程度。除了检测之外，我们还引入了一种自动化的事后根本原因分析管道，该管道将源自 RAPT 重建目标的基于梯度的时间显着性与以显着性和联合运动学为条件的基于 LLM 的推理相结合，以在零样本设置中生成语义故障诊断。我们在模拟和物理硬件上的四个复杂任务中评估了 Unitree G1 人形机器人上的 RAPT。在大规模模拟中，在 0.5% 的固定事件级假阳性率下，RAPT 将真阳性率 (TPR) 比最强基线提高了 37%。在实际部署中，RAPT 实现了 12.5% 的 TPR 改进，并提供了可操作的解释性，仅使用本体感受数据就在 16 个实际故障中达到了 75% 的根本原因分类准确率。
> **Abstract**: Deploying learned control policies on humanoid robots is challenging: policies that appear robust in simulation can execute confidently in out-of-distribution (OOD) states after Sim-to-Real transfer, leading to silent failures that risk hardware damage. Although anomaly detection can mitigate these failures, prior methods are often incompatible with high-rate control, poorly calibrated at the extremely low false-positive rates required for practical deployment, or operate as black boxes that provide a binary stop signal without explaining why the robot drifted from nominal behavior. We present RAPT, a lightweight, self-supervised deployment-time monitor for 50Hz humanoid control. RAPT learns a probabilistic spatio-temporal manifold of nominal execution from simulation and evaluates execution-time predictive deviation as a calibrated, per-dimension signal. This yields (i) reliable online OOD detection under strict false-positive constraints and (ii) a continuous, interpretable measure of Sim-to-Real mismatch that can be tracked over time to quantify how far deployment has drifted from training. Beyond detection, we introduce an automated post-hoc root-cause analysis pipeline that combines gradient-based temporal saliency derived from RAPT's reconstruction objective with LLM-based reasoning conditioned on saliency and joint kinematics to produce semantic failure diagnoses in a zero-shot setting. We evaluate RAPT on a Unitree G1 humanoid across four complex tasks in simulation and on physical hardware. In large-scale simulation, RAPT improves True Positive Rate (TPR) by 37% over the strongest baseline at a fixed episode-level false positive rate of 0.5%. On real-world deployments, RAPT achieves a 12.5% TPR improvement and provides actionable interpretability, reaching 75% root-cause classification accuracy across 16 real-world failures using only proprioceptive data.

【77】TreeLoc: 6-DoF LiDAR Global Localization in Forests via Inter-Tree Geometric Matching
- **标题**: TreeLoc：通过树间几何匹配进行森林中的 6-DoF LiDAR 全球定位
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01501
> **作者**: Minwoo Jung,Nived Chebrolu,Lucas Carvalho de Lima,Haedam Oh,Maurice Fallon,Ayoung Kim
> **摘要**: 可靠的定位对于森林中的导航至关重要，因为在森林中，GPS 的性能经常下降，LiDAR 测量重复、遮挡且结构复杂。这些条件削弱了传统以城市为中心的定位方法的假设，该方法假设独特的结构模式产生一致的特征，因此需要以森林为中心的解决方案才能在这些环境中实现稳健性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 TreeLoc，这是一种基于 LiDAR 的森林全球定位框架，可处理位置识别和 6-DoF 姿态估计。我们使用树干及其胸高直径 (DBH) 来表示场景，这些树干通过其轴与公共参考系对齐，并使用树分布直方图 (TDH) 进行概括以进行粗匹配，然后使用 2D 三角形描述符进行精细匹配。最后，通过两步几何验证实现位姿估计。在不同的森林基准上，TreeLoc 的表现优于基线，实现了精确定位。消融研究验证了每个组件的贡献。我们还提出使用紧凑的全球树木数据库中的描述符进行长期森林管理的应用程序。 TreeLoc 是为机器人社区开源的，网址为 https://github.com/minwoo0611/TreeLoc。
> **Abstract**: Reliable localization is crucial for navigation in forests, where GPS is often degraded and LiDAR measurements are repetitive, occluded, and structurally complex. These conditions weaken the assumptions of traditional urban-centric localization methods, which assume that consistent features arise from unique structural patterns, necessitating forest-centric solutions to achieve robustness in these environments. To address these challenges, we propose TreeLoc, a LiDAR-based global localization framework for forests that handles place recognition and 6-DoF pose estimation. We represent scenes using tree stems and their Diameter at Breast Height (DBH), which are aligned to a common reference frame via their axes and summarized using the tree distribution histogram (TDH) for coarse matching, followed by fine matching with a 2D triangle descriptor. Finally, pose estimation is achieved through a two-step geometric verification. On diverse forest benchmarks, TreeLoc outperforms baselines, achieving precise localization. Ablation studies validate the contribution of each component. We also propose applications for long-term forest management using descriptors from a compact global tree database. TreeLoc is open-sourced for the robotics community at https://github.com/minwoo0611/TreeLoc.

【78】Towards a Novel Wearable Robotic Vest for Hemorrhage Suppression
- **标题**: 新型可穿戴式止血机器人背心
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01448
> **作者**: Harshith Jella,Pejman Kheradmand,Joseph Klein,Behnam Moradkhani,Yash Chitalia
> **摘要**: 本文介绍了一种新颖的机器人系统，旨在处理紧急情况下的严重出血，包括空间站等独特环境。该机器人具有形状可调节的“环机构”，可从圆形结构转变为椭圆形结构，以调整不同解剖区域的伤口覆盖范围。我们为这种环形机构开发了各种具有不同灵活性的手臂，以提高应用于身体非四肢（腹部、背部、颈部等）时的适应性。为了在伤口上施加均匀且恒定的压力，我们开发了一种与这种变形环机制兼容的充气环和气囊。一系列实验的重点是评估各种环臂配置以表征其弯曲刚度。随后的实验使用数字秤测量了气囊系统施加的力。尽管其性能很有前途，但仍存在与覆盖范围相关的某些局限性。该装置的变形效果仅限于涉及部分充气或放气的气囊气球的场景，并且不能完全符合复杂的解剖区域。最后，该设备在伤亡模拟套件上进行了测试，成功证明了其控制模拟出血的能力。
> **Abstract**: This paper introduces a novel robotic system designed to manage severe bleeding in emergency scenarios, including unique environments like space stations. The robot features a shape-adjustable "ring mechanism", transitioning from a circular to an elliptical configuration to adjust wound coverage across various anatomical regions. We developed various arms for this ring mechanism with varying flexibilities to improve adaptability when applied to non-extremities of the body (abdomen, back, neck, etc.). To apply equal and constant pressure across the wound, we developed an inflatable ring and airbag balloon that are compatible with this shape-changing ring mechanism. A series of experiments focused on evaluating various ring arm configurations to characterize their bending stiffness. Subsequent experiments measured the force exerted by the airbag balloon system using a digital scale. Despite its promising performance, certain limitations related to coverage area are identified. The shape-changing effect of the device is limited to scenarios involving partially inflated or deflated airbag balloons, and cannot fully conform to complex anatomical regions. Finally, the device was tested on casualty simulation kits, where it successfully demonstrated its ability to control simulated bleeding.

【79】Sem-NaVAE: Semantically-Guided Outdoor Mapless Navigation via Generative Trajectory Priors
- **标题**: Sem-NaVAE：通过生成轨迹先验进行语义引导的户外无地图导航
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01429
> **作者**: Gonzalo Olguin,Javier Ruiz-del-Solar
> **摘要**: 这项工作提出了一种适用于户外应用的无地图全球导航方法。它结合了条件变分自动编码器 (CVAE) 的探索能力来生成轨迹，以及轻量级视觉语言模型 (VLM) 的语义分割功能来选择要执行的轨迹。开放词汇分割用于根据自然语言对生成的轨迹进行评分和选择，并且最先进的局部规划器执行速度命令。该方法的关键特征之一是它能够生成大量变化的轨迹并实时选择和导航。该方法通过现实世界的户外导航实验进行了验证，与最先进的方法相比，实现了卓越的性能。显示系统实验运行的视频可以在 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i3R5ey5O2yk 中找到。
> **Abstract**: This work presents a mapless global navigation approach for outdoor applications. It combines the exploratory capacity of conditional variational autoencoders (CVAEs) to generate trajectories and the semantic segmentation capabilities of a lightweight visual language model (VLM) to select the trajectory to execute. Open-vocabulary segmentation is used to score and select the generated trajectories based on natural language, and a state-of-the-art local planner executes velocity commands. One of the key features of the proposed approach is its ability to generate a large variability of trajectories and to select them and navigate in real-time. The approach was validated through real-world outdoor navigation experiments, achieving superior performance compared to state-of-the-art methods. A video showing an experimental run of the system can be found in https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i3R5ey5O2yk.

【80】Instance-Guided Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Robotic Semantic Segmentation
- **标题**: 用于机器人语义分割的实例引导无监督域适应
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01389
> **作者**: Michele Antonazzi,Lorenzo Signorelli,Matteo Luperto,Nicola Basilico
> **摘要**: 对于机器人感知至关重要的语义分割网络，当部署环境的视觉分布与训练它们的源数据集的视觉分布不同时，通常会出现性能下降的情况。无监督域适应（UDA）通过在没有外部监督的情况下使网络适应机器人的目标环境，利用机器人在长期操作过程中自然收集的大量数据来解决这一挑战。在此类设置中，UDA 方法可以利用环境地图中的多视图一致性，以无监督的方式微调模型并减轻域转移。然而，这些方法仍然对跨视图实例级不一致敏感。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种从体积 3D 地图开始生成多视图一致伪标签的方法。然后，我们使用基础模型的零样本实例分割功能来细化这些标签，从而增强实例级的一致性。精细的注释可以作为自我监督微调的监督，使机器人能够在部署时调整其感知系统。对真实世界数据的实验表明，我们的方法基于多视图一致性，持续提高了最先进的 UDA 基线的性能，而不需要目标域中的任何真实标签。
> **Abstract**: Semantic segmentation networks, which are essential for robotic perception, often suffer from performance degradation when the visual distribution of the deployment environment differs from that of the source dataset on which they were trained. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) addresses this challenge by adapting the network to the robot's target environment without external supervision, leveraging the large amounts of data a robot might naturally collect during long-term operation. In such settings, UDA methods can exploit multi-view consistency across the environment's map to fine-tune the model in an unsupervised fashion and mitigate domain shift. However, these approaches remain sensitive to cross-view instance-level inconsistencies. In this work, we propose a method that starts from a volumetric 3D map to generate multi-view consistent pseudo-labels. We then refine these labels using the zero-shot instance segmentation capabilities of a foundation model, enforcing instance-level coherence. The refined annotations serve as supervision for self-supervised fine-tuning, enabling the robot to adapt its perception system at deployment time. Experiments on real-world data demonstrate that our approach consistently improves performance over state-of-the-art UDA baselines based on multi-view consistency, without requiring any ground-truth labels in the target domain.

【81】TriphiBot: A Triphibious Robot Combining FOC-based Propulsion with Eccentric Design
- **标题**: TriphiBot：结合基于 FOC 的推进与偏心设计的三足机器人
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01385
> **作者**: Xiangyu Li,Mingwei Lai,Mengke Zhang,Junxiao Lin,Tiancheng Lai,Junping Zhi,Chao Xu,Fei Gao,Yanjun Cao
> **摘要**: 能够进行多域运动和跨域转换的三足机器人有望处理跨不同环境的复杂任务。然而，现有设计主要集中在双模平台，一些设计机械复杂性高或推进效率低，限制了其应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新型三足机器人，通过将四轴飞行器结构与两个被动轮相结合的极简设计，能够进行空中、陆地和水中运动，无需额外的执行器。为了解决四轴飞行器设计中地面支撑运动（在陆地/海底移动）效率低下的问题，我们引入了偏心重心 (CoG) 设计，该设计本质上使推力与运动对齐，无需专门的机械转换设计即可提高效率。此外，为了解决不同流体（空气和水）引起的运动控制的巨大差异，我们开发了基于磁场定向控制（FOC）的统一推进系统。该方法解决了扭矩匹配问题，并能够在不同介质上实现精确、快速的双向推力。我们从生存条件和地面支撑的角度出发，分析机器人的动力学，提出一种混合非线性模型预测控制（HNMPC）-PID控制系统，以确保稳定的多域运动和无缝过渡。实验结果验证了机器人的多域运动和跨模式转换能力，以及所提出的推进系统的效率和适应性。
> **Abstract**: Triphibious robots capable of multi-domain motion and cross-domain transitions are promising to handle complex tasks across diverse environments. However, existing designs primarily focus on dual-mode platforms, and some designs suffer from high mechanical complexity or low propulsion efficiency, which limits their application. In this paper, we propose a novel triphibious robot capable of aerial, terrestrial, and aquatic motion, by a minimalist design combining a quadcopter structure with two passive wheels, without extra actuators. To address inefficiency of ground-support motion (moving on land/seabed) for quadcopter based designs, we introduce an eccentric Center of Gravity (CoG) design that inherently aligns thrust with motion, enhancing efficiency without specialized mechanical transformation designs. Furthermore, to address the drastic differences in motion control caused by different fluids (air and water), we develop a unified propulsion system based on Field-Oriented Control (FOC). This method resolves torque matching issues and enables precise, rapid bidirectional thrust across different mediums. Grounded in the perspective of living condition and ground support, we analyse the robot's dynamics and propose a Hybrid Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (HNMPC)-PID control system to ensure stable multi-domain motion and seamless transitions. Experimental results validate the robot's multi-domain motion and cross-mode transition capability, along with the efficiency and adaptability of the proposed propulsion system.

【82】Reinforcement Learning for Active Perception in Autonomous Navigation
- **标题**: 自主导航中主动感知的强化学习
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01266
> **作者**: Grzegorz Malczyk,Mihir Kulkarni,Kostas Alexis
> **摘要**: 本文解决了复杂、未知环境中自主导航主动感知的挑战。重新审视主动感知的基本原理，我们引入了一种端到端的强化学习框架，在该框架中，机器人不仅必须在避开障碍物的同时达到目标，而且还必须主动控制其机载摄像头以增强态势感知。该策略接收包括机器人状态、当前深度框架以及根据深度读数的简短历史构建的特定局部几何表示的观察结果。为了将无碰撞运动规划与信息驱动的主动相机控制结合起来，我们使用基于体素的信息度量来增强导航奖励。这使得空中机器人能够学习稳健的策略，平衡目标导向运动与探索性传感。广泛的评估表明，与使用固定的、非驱动的相机基线相比，我们的策略实现了更安全的飞行，同时还诱导了内在的探索行为。
> **Abstract**: This paper addresses the challenge of active perception within autonomous navigation in complex, unknown environments. Revisiting the foundational principles of active perception, we introduce an end-to-end reinforcement learning framework in which a robot must not only reach a goal while avoiding obstacles, but also actively control its onboard camera to enhance situational awareness. The policy receives observations comprising the robot state, the current depth frame, and a particularly local geometry representation built from a short history of depth readings. To couple collision-free motion planning with information-driven active camera control, we augment the navigation reward with a voxel-based information metric. This enables an aerial robot to learn a robust policy that balances goal-directed motion with exploratory sensing. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that our strategy achieves safer flight compared to using fixed, non-actuated camera baselines while also inducing intrinsic exploratory behaviors.

【83】SkySim: A ROS2-based Simulation Environment for Natural Language Control of Drone Swarms using Large Language Models
- **标题**: SkySim：基于 ROS2 的仿真环境，使用大型语言模型对无人机群进行自然语言控制
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01226
> **作者**: Aditya Shibu,Marah Saleh,Mohamed Al-Musleh,Nidhal Abdulaziz
> **摘要**: 无人机群在物流、农业和监视领域提供多种应用，但控制它们需要安全性和可行性方面的专业知识。传统的静态方法限制了适应性，而大型语言模型（LLM）可以实现自然语言控制，但由于缺乏物理基础而产生不安全的轨迹。本文介绍了 SkySim，这是 Gazebo 中基于 ROS2 的仿真框架，可将 LLM 高层规划与低层安全执行分离开来。使用 Gemini 3.5 Pro，SkySim 将用户命令（例如“围成一个圆圈”）转换为空间路径点，并由实时无人机状态通知。人工势场 (APF) 安全滤波器对避免碰撞、运动限制和地理围栏进行最小程度的调整，确保在 20 Hz 下可行的执行。使用 3、10 和 30 架 Crazyflie 无人机群进行的实验验证了空间推理准确性（在测试的几何基元中为 100%）、实时碰撞预防和可扩展性。 SkySim 使非专家能够迭代地完善行为，将人工智能认知与动态环境的机器人安全联系起来。未来的工作目标是硬件集成。
> **Abstract**: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) swarms offer versatile applications in logistics, agriculture, and surveillance, yet controlling them requires expert knowledge for safety and feasibility. Traditional static methods limit adaptability, while Large Language Models (LLMs) enable natural language control but generate unsafe trajectories due to lacking physical grounding. This paper introduces SkySim, a ROS2-based simulation framework in Gazebo that decouples LLM high-level planning from low-level safety enforcement. Using Gemini 3.5 Pro, SkySim translates user commands (e.g., "Form a circle") into spatial waypoints, informed by real-time drone states. An Artificial Potential Field (APF) safety filter applies minimal adjustments for collision avoidance, kinematic limits, and geo-fencing, ensuring feasible execution at 20 Hz. Experiments with swarms of 3, 10, and 30 Crazyflie drones validate spatial reasoning accuracy (100% across tested geometric primitives), real-time collision prevention, and scalability. SkySim empowers non-experts to iteratively refine behaviors, bridging AI cognition with robotic safety for dynamic environments. Future work targets hardware integration.

【84】SPOT: Spatio-Temporal Obstacle-free Trajectory Planning for UAVs in an Unknown Dynamic Environment
- **标题**: SPOT：未知动态环境下无人机时空无障碍轨迹规划
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01189
> **作者**: Astik Srivastava,Thomas J Chackenkulam. Bitla Bhanu Teja,Antony Thomas,Madhava Krishna
> **摘要**: 我们解决了在具有动态障碍的未知环境中运行的四旋翼飞行器的反应运动规划问题。我们的方法利用 4 维时空规划器，与基于视觉的安全飞行走廊 (SFC) 生成和轨迹优化相集成。与依赖地图融合的先前方法不同，我们的框架是无地图的，可以直接从感知中避免碰撞，同时减少计算开销。使用基于视觉的对象分割和跟踪管道检测和跟踪动态障碍物，从而可以对场景中的静态元素和动态元素进行稳健分类。为了进一步增强鲁棒性，我们引入了一个备份规划模块，当没有到达目标的直接路径可用时，该模块可以反应性地避开动态障碍物，从而降低死锁情况下发生碰撞的风险。我们在模拟和现实世界的硬件实验中广泛验证了我们的方法，并将其与最先进的方法进行基准测试，显示出动态、未知环境中反应式无人机导航的显着优势。
> **Abstract**: We address the problem of reactive motion planning for quadrotors operating in unknown environments with dynamic obstacles. Our approach leverages a 4-dimensional spatio-temporal planner, integrated with vision-based Safe Flight Corridor (SFC) generation and trajectory optimization. Unlike prior methods that rely on map fusion, our framework is mapless, enabling collision avoidance directly from perception while reducing computational overhead. Dynamic obstacles are detected and tracked using a vision-based object segmentation and tracking pipeline, allowing robust classification of static versus dynamic elements in the scene. To further enhance robustness, we introduce a backup planning module that reactively avoids dynamic obstacles when no direct path to the goal is available, mitigating the risk of collisions during deadlock situations. We validate our method extensively in both simulation and real-world hardware experiments, and benchmark it against state-of-the-art approaches, showing significant advantages for reactive UAV navigation in dynamic, unknown environments.

【85】Latent Reasoning VLA: Latent Thinking and Prediction for Vision-Language-Action Models
- **标题**: 潜在推理 VLA：视觉-语言-动作模型的潜在思维和预测
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01166
> **作者**: Shuanghao Bai,Jing Lyu,Wanqi Zhou,Zhe Li,Dakai Wang,Lei Xing,Xiaoguang Zhao,Pengwei Wang,Zhongyuan Wang,Cheng Chi,Badong Chen,Shanghang Zhang
> **摘要**: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型受益于思想链（CoT）推理，但现有方法会产生高推理开销，并且依赖于与连续感知和控制不匹配的离散推理表示。我们提出了潜在推理 VLA (\textbf{LaRA-VLA})，这是一个统一的 VLA 框架，它将多模态 CoT 推理内化为具体动作的连续潜在表示。 LaRA-VLA performs unified reasoning and prediction in latent space, eliminating explicit CoT generation at inference time and enabling efficient, action-oriented control.为了实现潜在的体现推理，我们引入了一种基于课程的训练范式，逐步从明确的文本和视觉 CoT 监督过渡到潜在推理，并最终使潜在推理动态适应条件动作生成。我们构建了两个结构化 CoT 数据集，并在模拟基准和长期真实机器人操作任务上评估 LaRA-VLA。实验结果表明，与基于 CoT 的显式方法相比，LaRA-VLA 始终优于最先进的 VLA 方法，同时将推理延迟减少高达 90%，证明潜在推理是实时体现控制的有效且高效的范例。项目页面：\href{https://loveju1y.github.io/Latent-Reasoning-VLA/}{LaRA-VLA 网站}。
> **Abstract**: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models benefit from chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, but existing approaches incur high inference overhead and rely on discrete reasoning representations that mismatch continuous perception and control. We propose Latent Reasoning VLA (\textbf{LaRA-VLA}), a unified VLA framework that internalizes multi-modal CoT reasoning into continuous latent representations for embodied action. LaRA-VLA performs unified reasoning and prediction in latent space, eliminating explicit CoT generation at inference time and enabling efficient, action-oriented control. To realize latent embodied reasoning, we introduce a curriculum-based training paradigm that progressively transitions from explicit textual and visual CoT supervision to latent reasoning, and finally adapts latent reasoning dynamics to condition action generation. We construct two structured CoT datasets and evaluate LaRA-VLA on both simulation benchmarks and long-horizon real-robot manipulation tasks. Experimental results show that LaRA-VLA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art VLA methods while reducing inference latency by up to 90\% compared to explicit CoT-based approaches, demonstrating latent reasoning as an effective and efficient paradigm for real-time embodied control. Project Page: \href{https://loveju1y.github.io/Latent-Reasoning-VLA/}{LaRA-VLA Website}.

【86】UniForce: A Unified Latent Force Model for Robot Manipulation with Diverse Tactile Sensors
- **标题**: UniForce：用于具有多种触觉传感器的机器人操纵的统一潜在力模型
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01153
> **作者**: Zhuo Chen,Fei Ni,Kaiyao Luo,Zhiyuan Wu,Xuyang Zhang,Emmanouil Spyrakos-Papastavridis,Lorenzo Jamone,Nathan F. Lepora,Jiankang Deng,Shan Luo
> **摘要**: 力感应对于灵巧的机器人操作至关重要，但触觉传感器的异质性阻碍了力感知策略学习的扩展。传感原理（例如，光学与磁性）、形状因素和材料的差异通常需要特定于传感器的数据收集、校准和模型训练，从而限制了通用性。我们提出了 UniForce，一种新颖的统一触觉表示学习框架，可以学习跨不同触觉传感器的共享潜在力空间。 UniForce 通过联合建模逆向动力学（图像到力）和正向动力学（力到图像）来减少跨传感器域偏移，并受到力平衡和图像重建损失的约束，以产生基于力的表示。为了避免依赖昂贵的外力/扭矩（F/T）传感器，我们利用静态平衡并通过直接传感器-物体-传感器相互作用收集力配对数据，从而实现与接触力的跨传感器对准。由此产生的通用触觉编码器可以通过零次传输插入下游力感知机器人操纵任务，无需重新训练或微调。对包括 GelSight、TacTip 和 uSkin 在内的异构触觉传感器进行的大量实验表明，与之前的方法相比，力估计方面取得了持续改进，并在机器人擦拭任务的视觉-触觉-语言-动作 (VTLA) 模型中实现了有效的跨传感器协调。代码和数据集将被发布。
> **Abstract**: Force sensing is essential for dexterous robot manipulation, but scaling force-aware policy learning is hindered by the heterogeneity of tactile sensors. Differences in sensing principles (e.g., optical vs. magnetic), form factors, and materials typically require sensor-specific data collection, calibration, and model training, thereby limiting generalisability. We propose UniForce, a novel unified tactile representation learning framework that learns a shared latent force space across diverse tactile sensors. UniForce reduces cross-sensor domain shift by jointly modeling inverse dynamics (image-to-force) and forward dynamics (force-to-image), constrained by force equilibrium and image reconstruction losses to produce force-grounded representations. To avoid reliance on expensive external force/torque (F/T) sensors, we exploit static equilibrium and collect force-paired data via direct sensor--object--sensor interactions, enabling cross-sensor alignment with contact force. The resulting universal tactile encoder can be plugged into downstream force-aware robot manipulation tasks with zero-shot transfer, without retraining or finetuning. Extensive experiments on heterogeneous tactile sensors including GelSight, TacTip, and uSkin, demonstrate consistent improvements in force estimation over prior methods, and enable effective cross-sensor coordination in Vision-Tactile-Language-Action (VTLA) models for a robotic wiping task. Code and datasets will be released.

【87】KAN We Flow? Advancing Robotic Manipulation with 3D Flow Matching via KAN & RWKV
- **标题**: KAN 我们流动？通过 KAN 和 RWKV 通过 3D 流程匹配推进机器人操作
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01115
> **作者**: Zhihao Chen,Yiyuan Ge,Ziyang Wang
> **摘要**: 基于扩散的视觉运动策略擅长对动作分布进行建模，但推理效率低下，因为从噪声到策略的递归去噪需要许多步骤和沉重的 UNet 主干网，这阻碍了在资源受限的机器人上的部署。流匹配通过学习一步向量场减轻了采样负担，但之前的实现仍然继承了大型 UNet 风格的架构。在这项工作中，我们提出了 KAN-We-Flow，一种流匹配策略，它利用接收加权键值 (RWKV) 和 Kolmogorov-Arnold 网络 (KAN) 的最新进展，从视觉上构建一个轻量级且高度表达的 3D 操作骨干网。具体来说，我们引入了 RWKV-KAN 块：RWKV 首先执行有效的时间/通道混合来传播任务上下文，随后的 GroupKAN 层应用基于可学习样条的分组函数映射来对 RWKV 输出上的动作映射执行特征非线性校准。此外，我们引入了动作一致性正则化（ACR），这是一种轻量级辅助损失，通过欧拉外推法强制预测动作轨迹和专家演示之间的一致性，提供额外的监督来稳定训练并提高策略精度。在不诉诸大型 UNet 的情况下，我们的设计将参数减少了 86.8%，保持快速运行时间，并在 Adroit、Meta-World 和 DexArt 基准测试中实现了最先进的成功率。我们的项目页面可以在 \href{https://zhihaochen-2003.github.io/KAN-We-Flow.github.io/}{\textcolor{red}{link}} 查看
> **Abstract**: Diffusion-based visuomotor policies excel at modeling action distributions but are inference-inefficient, since recursively denoising from noise to policy requires many steps and heavy UNet backbones, which hinders deployment on resource-constrained robots. Flow matching alleviates the sampling burden by learning a one-step vector field, yet prior implementations still inherit large UNet-style architectures. In this work, we present KAN-We-Flow, a flow-matching policy that draws on recent advances in Receptance Weighted Key Value (RWKV) and Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KAN) from vision to build a lightweight and highly expressive backbone for 3D manipulation. Concretely, we introduce an RWKV-KAN block: an RWKV first performs efficient time/channel mixing to propagate task context, and a subsequent GroupKAN layer applies learnable spline-based, groupwise functional mappings to perform feature-wise nonlinear calibration of the action mapping on RWKV outputs. Moreover, we introduce an Action Consistency Regularization (ACR), a lightweight auxiliary loss that enforces alignment between predicted action trajectories and expert demonstrations via Euler extrapolation, providing additional supervision to stabilize training and improve policy precision. Without resorting to large UNets, our design reduces parameters by 86.8\%, maintains fast runtime, and achieves state-of-the-art success rates on Adroit, Meta-World, and DexArt benchmarks. Our project page can be viewed in \href{https://zhihaochen-2003.github.io/KAN-We-Flow.github.io/}{\textcolor{red}{link}}

【88】StreamVLA: Breaking the Reason-Act Cycle via Completion-State Gating
- **标题**: StreamVLA：通过完成状态门控打破原因-行动循环
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01100
> **作者**: Hang Wu,Tongqing Chen,Jiasen Wang,Xiaotao Li,Lu Fang
> **摘要**: 长视野机器人操纵需要弥合高层规划（系统 2）和低层控制（系统 1）之间的差距。当前的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型经常纠缠这些过程，在每个时间步执行冗余的多模态推理，这导致高延迟和目标不稳定。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 StreamVLA，这是一种双系统架构，它将文本任务分解、视觉目标想象和连续动作生成统一在一个参数高效的主干中。我们引入了“锁定和门控”机制来智能地调节计算：仅当检测到子任务转换时，模型才会触发缓慢思维来生成文本指令并想象特定的视觉完成状态，而不是通用的未来帧。至关重要的是，这种完成状态充当时不变的目标锚，使策略对执行速度变化具有鲁棒性。在稳定执行期间，这些高级意图被锁定以调节流匹配动作头，从而允许模型在 72% 的时间步长内绕过昂贵的自回归解码。这种分层抽象确保了子目标的重点，同时显着减少了推理延迟。广泛的评估表明，StreamVLA 实现了最先进的性能，在 LIBERO 基准上具有 98.5% 的成功率，在现实干扰场景中具有强大的恢复能力，与完全推理基准相比，延迟降低了 48%。
> **Abstract**: Long-horizon robotic manipulation requires bridging the gap between high-level planning (System 2) and low-level control (System 1). Current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often entangle these processes, performing redundant multimodal reasoning at every timestep, which leads to high latency and goal instability. To address this, we present StreamVLA, a dual-system architecture that unifies textual task decomposition, visual goal imagination, and continuous action generation within a single parameter-efficient backbone. We introduce a "Lock-and-Gated" mechanism to intelligently modulate computation: only when a sub-task transition is detected, the model triggers slow thinking to generate a textual instruction and imagines the specific visual completion state, rather than generic future frames. Crucially, this completion state serves as a time-invariant goal anchor, making the policy robust to execution speed variations. During steady execution, these high-level intents are locked to condition a Flow Matching action head, allowing the model to bypass expensive autoregressive decoding for 72% of timesteps. This hierarchical abstraction ensures sub-goal focus while significantly reducing inference latency. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that StreamVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance, with a 98.5% success rate on the LIBERO benchmark and robust recovery in real-world interference scenarios, achieving a 48% reduction in latency compared to full-reasoning baselines.

【89】Failure-Aware Bimanual Teleoperation via Conservative Value Guided Assistance
- **标题**: 通过保守价值引导辅助进行故障感知双手远程操作
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01092
> **作者**: Peng Zhou,Zhongxuan Li,Jinsong Wu,Jiaming Qi,Jun Hu,David Navarro-Alarcon,Jia Pan,Lihua Xie,Shiyao Zhang,Zeqing Zhang
> **摘要**: 高精度操纵的远程操作受到严格的成功公差和复杂的接触动力学的限制，这使得人类操作员难以在部分可观察性的情况下预测即将发生的故障。本文提出了一种价值引导、故障感知的双手远程操作框架，该框架提供合规的触觉帮助，同时保持持续的人类权威。该框架完全根据包含成功和失败执行的异构离线远程操作数据进行训练。任务可行性被建模为通过保守价值学习学习到的保守成功分数，产生在分布转移下仍然可靠的风险敏感估计。在在线操作期间，学习到的成功分数调节辅助水平，而学习到的参与者提供纠正运动方向。两者都通过主控侧的关节空间阻抗接口进行集成，产生连续的指导，引导操作员远离容易发生故障的操作，而不会超越意图。与传统远程操作和共享自主基线相比，接触丰富的操作任务的实验结果表明，任务成功率提高，操作员工作量减少，这表明保守价值学习提供了一种将故障意识嵌入双边远程操作的有效机制。实验视频位于 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XDTsvzEkDRE
> **Abstract**: Teleoperation of high-precision manipulation is con-strained by tight success tolerances and complex contact dy-namics, which make impending failures difficult for human operators to anticipate under partial observability. This paper proposes a value-guided, failure-aware framework for bimanual teleoperation that provides compliant haptic assistance while pre-serving continuous human authority. The framework is trained entirely from heterogeneous offline teleoperation data containing both successful and failed executions. Task feasibility is mod-eled as a conservative success score learned via Conservative Value Learning, yielding a risk-sensitive estimate that remains reliable under distribution shift. During online operation, the learned success score regulates the level of assistance, while a learned actor provides a corrective motion direction. Both are integrated through a joint-space impedance interface on the master side, yielding continuous guidance that steers the operator away from failure-prone actions without overriding intent. Experimental results on contact-rich manipulation tasks demonstrate improved task success rates and reduced operator workload compared to conventional teleoperation and shared-autonomy baselines, indicating that conservative value learning provides an effective mechanism for embedding failure awareness into bilateral teleoperation. Experimental videos are available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XDTsvzEkDRE

【90】Estimating Force Interactions of Deformable Linear Objects from their Shapes
- **标题**: 从形状估计可变形线性物体的力相互作用
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01085
> **作者**: Qi Jing Chen,Shilin Shan,Timothy Bretl,Quang-Cuong Pham
> **摘要**: 这项工作介绍了一种分析方法，仅使用观察到的形状来检测和估计作用在可变形线性物体 (DLO) 上的外力。在许多机器人线交互任务中，接触不是发生在末端执行器处，而是发生在机器人身体的其他点处。当机器人间接操纵电线（例如通过轻推）或当电线充当环境中的被动障碍物时，就会出现这种情况。准确识别这些相互作用对于安全高效的轨迹规划至关重要，有助于防止电线损坏、避免机器人运动受限并减轻潜在危险。现有方法通常依赖于昂贵的外部力扭矩传感器或在末端执行器处发生接触来进行精确的力估计。使用从深度相机获取的线形状信息，并假设线处于或接近其静态平衡，我们的方法无需额外的先验知识即可估计外力的位置和大小。这是通过利用导出的一致性条件并求解基于沿线的力-扭矩平衡的线性方程组来实现的。该方法通过模拟进行了验证，在模拟中实现了高精度，并通过现实世界的实验进行了验证，在选定的交互场景中证明了准确的估计。
> **Abstract**: This work introduces an analytical approach for detecting and estimating external forces acting on deformable linear objects (DLOs) using only their observed shapes. In many robot-wire interaction tasks, contact occurs not at the end-effector but at other points along the robot's body. Such scenarios arise when robots manipulate wires indirectly (e.g., by nudging) or when wires act as passive obstacles in the environment. Accurately identifying these interactions is crucial for safe and efficient trajectory planning, helping to prevent wire damage, avoid restricted robot motions, and mitigate potential hazards. Existing approaches often rely on expensive external force-torque sensor or that contacts occur at the end-effector for accurate force estimation. Using wire shape information acquired from a depth camera and under the assumption that the wire is in or near its static equilibrium, our method estimates both the location and magnitude of external forces without additional prior knowledge. This is achieved by exploiting derived consistency conditions and solving a system of linear equations based on force-torque balance along the wire. The approach was validated through simulation, where it achieved high accuracy, and through real-world experiments, where accurate estimation was demonstrated in selected interaction scenarios.

【91】A Systematic Study of Data Modalities and Strategies for Co-training Large Behavior Models for Robot Manipulation
- **标题**: 机器人操作协同训练大型行为模型的数据模式和策略的系统研究
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01067
> **作者**: Fanqi Lin,Kushal Arora,Jean Mercat,Haruki Nishimura,Paarth Shah,Chen Xu,Mengchao Zhang,Mark Zolotas,Maya Angeles,Owen Pfannenstiehl,Andrew Beaulieu,Jose Barreiros
> **摘要**: 通过将模仿学习扩展到多任务机器人数据的大规模训练，大型行为模型显示出强大的灵巧操作能力，但其泛化仍然受到机器人数据覆盖不足的限制。为了扩大覆盖范围而不需要昂贵的额外数据收集，最近的工作依赖于协同训练：从目标机器人数据和异构数据模式中联合学习。然而，不同的协同训练数据模式和策略如何影响政策绩效仍然知之甚少。我们提出了一项大规模实证研究，检查了五种协同训练数据模式：标准视觉语言数据、机器人轨迹的密集语言注释、跨实体机器人数据、人类视频以及跨单阶段和多阶段训练策略的离散机器人动作标记。我们的研究利用 4,000 小时的机器人和人类操作数据以及 5000 万个视觉语言样本来训练视觉语言动作策略。我们评估了 58,000 次模拟部署和 2,835 次实际部署中的 89 项政策。我们的结果表明，与视觉语言和跨实体机器人数据形式的联合训练大大提高了对分布变化、看不见的任务和语言跟随的泛化，而离散的动作标记变体没有产生显着的好处。结合有效的方式可以产生累积收益，并通过微调能够快速适应看不见的长期灵巧任务。专门针对机器人数据的训练会降低对视觉语言模型主干的视觉语言理解，而与有效模式的联合训练则可以恢复这些能力。根据从协同训练数据中学习到的思想链轨迹来显式调节动作生成并不能提高我们的模拟基准测试的性能。总之，这些结果为构建可扩展的通用机器人策略提供了实用指导。
> **Abstract**: Large behavior models have shown strong dexterous manipulation capabilities by extending imitation learning to large-scale training on multi-task robot data, yet their generalization remains limited by the insufficient robot data coverage. To expand this coverage without costly additional data collection, recent work relies on co-training: jointly learning from target robot data and heterogeneous data modalities. However, how different co-training data modalities and strategies affect policy performance remains poorly understood. We present a large-scale empirical study examining five co-training data modalities: standard vision-language data, dense language annotations for robot trajectories, cross-embodiment robot data, human videos, and discrete robot action tokens across single- and multi-phase training strategies. Our study leverages 4,000 hours of robot and human manipulation data and 50M vision-language samples to train vision-language-action policies. We evaluate 89 policies over 58,000 simulation rollouts and 2,835 real-world rollouts. Our results show that co-training with forms of vision-language and cross-embodiment robot data substantially improves generalization to distribution shifts, unseen tasks, and language following, while discrete action token variants yield no significant benefits. Combining effective modalities produces cumulative gains and enables rapid adaptation to unseen long-horizon dexterous tasks via fine-tuning. Training exclusively on robot data degrades the visiolinguistic understanding of the vision-language model backbone, while co-training with effective modalities restores these capabilities. Explicitly conditioning action generation on chain-of-thought traces learned from co-training data does not improve performance in our simulation benchmark. Together, these results provide practical guidance for building scalable generalist robot policies.

【92】LLM-Based Behavior Tree Generation for Construction Machinery
- **标题**: 基于法学硕士的工程机械行为树生成
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01041
> **作者**: Akinosuke Tsutsumi,Tomoya Itsuka,Yuichiro Kasahara,Tomoya Kouno,Kota Akinari,Genki Yamauchi,Daisuke Endo,Taro Abe,Takeshi Hashimoto,Keiji Nagatani,Ryo Kurazume
> **摘要**: 土方作业面临着日益增长的需求，而劳动力老龄化和技能流失则迫切需要自动化。 ROS2-TMS for Construction是一个旨在协调建筑机械的信息物理系统框架，已被提出用于自主操作；然而，它对手动设计的行为树（BT）的依赖限制了可扩展性，特别是在涉及异构机器协作的场景中。大语言模型 (LLM) 的最新进展为任务规划和 BT 生成提供了新的机会。然而，大多数现有方法仍然局限于模拟或简单的操纵器，在现实环境中展示的应用相对较少，例如涉及多台机器的复杂建筑工地。本文提出了一种基于 LLM 的 BT 生成工作流程，引入同步标志以实现安全和协作操作。该工作流程由两个步骤组成：高级规划（LLM 生成同步标志）和使用结构化模板生成 BT。通过使用系统数据库中存储的参数进行规划来确保安全。所提出的方法在模拟中得到验证，并通过现实世界的实验进一步证明，突显了其推进土木工程自动化的潜力。
> **Abstract**: Earthwork operations are facing an increasing demand, while workforce aging and skill loss create a pressing need for automation. ROS2-TMS for Construction, a Cyber-Physical System framework designed to coordinate construction machinery, has been proposed for autonomous operation; however, its reliance on manually designed Behavior Trees (BTs) limits scalability, particularly in scenarios involving heterogeneous machine cooperation. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) offer new opportunities for task planning and BT generation. However, most existing approaches remain confined to simulations or simple manipulators, with relatively few applications demonstrated in real-world contexts, such as complex construction sites involving multiple machines. This paper proposes an LLM-based workflow for BT generation, introducing synchronization flags to enable safe and cooperative operation. The workflow consists of two steps: high-level planning, where the LLM generates synchronization flags, and BT generation using structured templates. Safety is ensured by planning with parameters stored in the system database. The proposed method is validated in simulation and further demonstrated through real-world experiments, highlighting its potential to advance automation in civil engineering.

【93】Learning Adaptive Cross-Embodiment Visuomotor Policy with Contrastive Prompt Orchestration
- **标题**: 通过对比提示编排学习自适应跨体视觉运动策略
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01040
> **作者**: Yuhang Zhang,Chao Yan,Jiaxi Yu,Jiaping Xiao,Mir Feroskhan
> **摘要**: 学习具体代理的自适应视觉运动策略仍然是一个艰巨的挑战，特别是在面临跨具体变化（例如不同的传感器配置和动态属性）时。传统的学习方法通​​常难以将与任务相关的特征与特定领域的变化（例如照明、视野和旋转）分开，从而导致样本效率低下和在不可见的环境中发生灾难性故障。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了对比提示编排（CAPO），这是一种学习视觉运动策略的新方法，它将对比提示学习和自适应提示编排相结合。对于提示学习，我们设计了一种混合对比学习策略，该策略集成了视觉、时间动作和文本目标，以建立一个可学习提示池，其中每个提示都会引发封装细粒度域因素的视觉表示。基于这些学习到的提示，我们引入了一种自适应提示编排机制，可以根据当前观察动态聚合这些提示。这使得代理能够通过即时识别主导域因素来自适应地构建最佳状态表示。因此，策略优化有效地免受无关干扰，防止了对源域过度拟合的常见问题。大量实验表明，CAPO 在样本效率和渐近性能方面显着优于最先进的基线。至关重要的是，它在以剧烈的环境（例如照明）和物理变化（例如视野和旋转）为特征的看不见的目标域中表现出卓越的零镜头适应能力，验证了其作为跨实施例视觉运动策略适应的可行解决方案的有效性。
> **Abstract**: Learning adaptive visuomotor policies for embodied agents remains a formidable challenge, particularly when facing cross-embodiment variations such as diverse sensor configurations and dynamic properties. Conventional learning approaches often struggle to separate task-relevant features from domain-specific variations (e.g., lighting, field-of-view, and rotation), leading to poor sample efficiency and catastrophic failure in unseen environments. To bridge this gap, we propose ContrAstive Prompt Orchestration (CAPO), a novel approach for learning visuomotor policies that integrates contrastive prompt learning and adaptive prompt orchestration. For prompt learning, we devise a hybrid contrastive learning strategy that integrates visual, temporal action, and text objectives to establish a pool of learnable prompts, where each prompt induces a visual representation encapsulating fine-grained domain factors. Based on these learned prompts, we introduce an adaptive prompt orchestration mechanism that dynamically aggregates these prompts conditioned on current observations. This enables the agent to adaptively construct optimal state representations by identifying dominant domain factors instantaneously. Consequently, the policy optimization is effectively shielded from irrelevant interference, preventing the common issue of overfitting to source domains. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CAPO significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in sample efficiency and asymptotic performance. Crucially, it exhibits superior zero-shot adaptation across unseen target domains characterized by drastic environmental (e.g., illumination) and physical shifts (e.g., field-of-view and rotation), validating its effectiveness as a viable solution for cross-embodiment visuomotor policy adaptation.

【94】Offline Discovery of Interpretable Skills from Multi-Task Trajectories
- **标题**: 从多任务轨迹中离线发现可解释的技能
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01018
> **作者**: Chongyu Zhu,Mithun Vanniasinghe,Jiayu Chen,Chi-Guhn Lee
> **摘要**: 分层模仿学习是从演示中获取复杂机器人行为的强大范例。然而，一个核心挑战在于从长期、多任务离线数据中发现可重用的技能，特别是当数据缺乏明确的奖励或子任务注释时。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 LOKI，这是一个专为离线技能发现和分层模仿而设计的三阶段端到端学习框架。该框架从一个两阶段的弱监督技能发现过程开始：第一阶段通过采用由弱任务标签引导的对齐强制矢量量化 VAE 来执行粗略的任务感知宏观分割。然后，第二阶段使用自监督顺序模型在微观层面上细化这些细分，然后进行迭代聚类过程以巩固技能边界。然后，第三阶段利用这些精确的边界在基于选项的框架内构建分层策略，并提供用于显式技能切换的学习终止条件 beta。 LOKI 在具有挑战性的 D4RL Kitchen 基准测试中取得了很高的成功率，并且优于标准 HIL 基准。此外，我们证明所发现的技能在语义上是有意义的，与人类直觉一致，并通过成功地对它们进行排序以解决新的、看不见的任务来展示组合性。
> **Abstract**: Hierarchical Imitation Learning is a powerful paradigm for acquiring complex robot behaviors from demonstrations. A central challenge, however, lies in discovering reusable skills from long-horizon, multi-task offline data, especially when the data lacks explicit rewards or subtask annotations. In this work, we introduce LOKI, a three-stage end-to-end learning framework designed for offline skill discovery and hierarchical imitation. The framework commences with a two-stage, weakly supervised skill discovery process: Stage one performs coarse, task-aware macro-segmentation by employing an alignment-enforced Vector Quantized VAE guided by weak task labels. Stage two then refines these segments at a micro-level using a self-supervised sequential model, followed by an iterative clustering process to consolidate skill boundaries. The third stage then leverages these precise boundaries to construct a hierarchical policy within an option-based framework-complete with a learned termination condition beta for explicit skill switching. LOKI achieves high success rates on the challenging D4RL Kitchen benchmark and outperforms standard HIL baselines. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the discovered skills are semantically meaningful, aligning with human intuition, and exhibit compositionality by successfully sequencing them to solve a novel, unseen task.

【95】HERMES: A Holistic End-to-End Risk-Aware Multimodal Embodied System with Vision-Language Models for Long-Tail Autonomous Driving
- **标题**: HERMES：具有长尾自动驾驶视觉语言模型的整体端到端风险感知多模态体现系统
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.00993
> **作者**: Weizhe Tang,Junwei You,Jiaxi Liu,Zhaoyi Wang,Rui Gan,Zilin Huang,Feng Wei,Bin Ran
> **摘要**: 端到端自动驾驶模型越来越多地受益于用于语义理解的大视觉语言模型，但确保长尾条件下的安全和准确操作仍然具有挑战性。这些挑战在长尾混合交通场景中尤为突出，其中自动驾驶汽车必须在复杂和不确定的条件下与异构道路使用者（包括人类驾驶车辆和弱势道路使用者）进行交互。本文提出了 HERMES，这是一种整体风险感知的端到端多模式驾驶框架，旨在将明确的长尾风险线索注入轨迹规划中。 HERMES 采用基础模型辅助注释管道来生成结构化的长尾场景上下文和长尾规划上下文，捕获以危险为中心的线索以及机动意图和安全偏好，并使用这些信号来指导端到端规划。 HERMES还引入了三模态驾驶模块，融合多视图感知、历史运动线索和语义引导，确保长尾场景下具有风险意识的准确轨迹规划。对现实世界长尾数据集的实验表明，在长尾混合流量场景下，HERMES 始终优于代表性的端到端和 VLM 驱动的基线。消融研究验证了关键组成部分的互补贡献。
> **Abstract**: End-to-end autonomous driving models increasingly benefit from large vision--language models for semantic understanding, yet ensuring safe and accurate operation under long-tail conditions remains challenging. These challenges are particularly prominent in long-tail mixed-traffic scenarios, where autonomous vehicles must interact with heterogeneous road users, including human-driven vehicles and vulnerable road users, under complex and uncertain conditions. This paper proposes HERMES, a holistic risk-aware end-to-end multimodal driving framework designed to inject explicit long-tail risk cues into trajectory planning. HERMES employs a foundation-model-assisted annotation pipeline to produce structured Long-Tail Scene Context and Long-Tail Planning Context, capturing hazard-centric cues together with maneuver intent and safety preference, and uses these signals to guide end-to-end planning. HERMES further introduces a Tri-Modal Driving Module that fuses multi-view perception, historical motion cues, and semantic guidance, ensuring risk-aware accurate trajectory planning under long-tail scenarios. Experiments on the real-world long-tail dataset demonstrate that HERMES consistently outperforms representative end-to-end and VLM-driven baselines under long-tail mixed-traffic scenarios. Ablation studies verify the complementary contributions of key components.

【96】Geometry-Aware Sampling-Based Motion Planning on Riemannian Manifolds
- **标题**: 黎曼流形上基于几何感知采样的运动规划
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.00992
> **作者**: Phone Thiha Kyaw,Jonathan Kelly
> **摘要**: 在许多机器人运动规划问题中，任务目标和物理约束会在配置空间上引入非欧几里德几何，但许多规划者使用忽略此结构的欧几里德距离进行操作。我们解决了规划无碰撞运动的问题，该运动在与配置相关的黎曼度量下最小化长度，对应于配置流形上的测地线。用于计算此类路径的传统数值方法不能很好地扩展到高维系统，而基于采样的规划器则以可扩展性换取几何保真度。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种基于采样的运动规划框架，该框架直接在黎曼流形上运行。我们引入了一种计算高效的基于中点的黎曼测地距离近似，并证明它与真实的黎曼距离具有三阶精度相匹配。在此近似的基础上，我们设计了一个局部规划器，它使用黎曼自然梯度引导的一阶回缩来追踪流形。在动能度量下对二连杆平面臂和 7-DoF Franka 机械臂进行的实验，以及在具有非完整运动约束的 $\mathrm{SE}(2)$ 中进行的刚体规划的实验表明，我们的方法始终能够比基于欧几里得的规划器和经典数值测地线求解器基线产生更低成本的轨迹。
> **Abstract**: In many robot motion planning problems, task objectives and physical constraints induce non-Euclidean geometry on the configuration space, yet many planners operate using Euclidean distances that ignore this structure. We address the problem of planning collision-free motions that minimize length under configuration-dependent Riemannian metrics, corresponding to geodesics on the configuration manifold. Conventional numerical methods for computing such paths do not scale well to high-dimensional systems, while sampling-based planners trade scalability for geometric fidelity. To bridge this gap, we propose a sampling-based motion planning framework that operates directly on Riemannian manifolds. We introduce a computationally efficient midpoint-based approximation of the Riemannian geodesic distance and prove that it matches the true Riemannian distance with third-order accuracy. Building on this approximation, we design a local planner that traces the manifold using first-order retractions guided by Riemannian natural gradients. Experiments on a two-link planar arm and a 7-DoF Franka manipulator under a kinetic-energy metric, as well as on rigid-body planning in $\mathrm{SE}(2)$ with non-holonomic motion constraints, demonstrate that our approach consistently produces lower-cost trajectories than Euclidean-based planners and classical numerical geodesic-solver baselines.

## 声音(cs.SD:Sound)

【1】CoCoEmo: Composable and Controllable Human-Like Emotional TTS via Activation Steering
- **标题**: CoCoEmo：通过激活引导可组合且可控的类人情感 TTS
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03420
> **作者**: Siyi Wang,Shihong Tan,Siyi Liu,Hong Jia,Gongping Huang,James Bailey,Ting Dang
> **摘要**: 人类言语中的情感表达是细致入微且具有组合性的，通常涉及多种有时相互冲突的情感线索，这些线索可能与语言内容有所不同。相比之下，大多数富有表现力的文本到语音系统都会强制执行单一的话语级情感，从而破坏情感多样性并抑制混合或文本情感不一致的表达。虽然通过潜在方向向量的激活控制提供了一个有前途的解决方案，但目前尚不清楚情感表示在 TTS 中是否可线性控制、应在混合 TTS 架构中应用控制，以及如何评估此类复杂的情感行为。本文首次系统分析了混合 TTS 模型中情绪控制的激活转向，引入了定量、可控的转向框架和多评估者评估协议，可实现可组合的混合情绪合成和可靠的文本情绪失配合成。我们的结果首次证明，情感韵律和表达变异性主要是由 TTS 语言模块而不是流程匹配模块合成的，并且还提供了一种轻量级的引导方法来生成自然的、类似人类的情感语音。
> **Abstract**: Emotional expression in human speech is nuanced and compositional, often involving multiple, sometimes conflicting, affective cues that may diverge from linguistic content. In contrast, most expressive text-to-speech systems enforce a single utterance-level emotion, collapsing affective diversity and suppressing mixed or text-emotion-misaligned expression. While activation steering via latent direction vectors offers a promising solution, it remains unclear whether emotion representations are linearly steerable in TTS, where steering should be applied within hybrid TTS architectures, and how such complex emotion behaviors should be evaluated. This paper presents the first systematic analysis of activation steering for emotional control in hybrid TTS models, introducing a quantitative, controllable steering framework, and multi-rater evaluation protocols that enable composable mixed-emotion synthesis and reliable text-emotion mismatch synthesis. Our results demonstrate, for the first time, that emotional prosody and expressive variability are primarily synthesized by the TTS language module instead of the flow-matching module, and also provide a lightweight steering approach for generating natural, human-like emotional speech.

【2】PACE: Pretrained Audio Continual Learning
- **标题**: PACE：预训练音频持续学习
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03355
> **作者**: Chang Li,Kanglei Zhou,Liyuan Wang
> **摘要**: 音频是分析语音、音乐和环境声音的基本方式。尽管预训练的音频模型具有显着先进的音频理解能力，但它们在数据分布随时间变化的现实环境中仍然脆弱。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个带有预训练模型（PTM）的音频持续学习（CL）的系统基准，并对其独特的挑战进行了全面分析。与视觉领域不同，参数高效微调 (PEFT) 已被证明对 CL 有效，直接将此类策略转移到音频会导致性能不佳。这源于音频主干的一个基本属性：它们专注于低级频谱细节而不是结构化语义，导致严重的上下游错位。通过广泛的实证研究，我们确定具有首次会话适应（FSA）的分析分类器是一个有前途的方向，但也揭示了两个主要局限性：粗粒度场景中的表示饱和和细粒度场景中的表示漂移。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 PACE，这是一种通过正则化分析分类器增强 FSA 的新方法，并通过自适应子空间正交 PEFT 实现多会话适应，以改进语义对齐。此外，我们引入了基于频谱图的边界感知扰动，以减轻表示重叠并提高稳定性。对六种不同的音频 CL 基准进行的实验表明，PACE 的性能大大优于最先进的基线，标志着通过 PTM 实现稳健且可扩展的音频持续学习迈出了重要一步。
> **Abstract**: Audio is a fundamental modality for analyzing speech, music, and environmental sounds. Although pretrained audio models have significantly advanced audio understanding, they remain fragile in real-world settings where data distributions shift over time. In this work, we present the first systematic benchmark for audio continual learning (CL) with pretrained models (PTMs), together with a comprehensive analysis of its unique challenges. Unlike in vision, where parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has proven effective for CL, directly transferring such strategies to audio leads to poor performance. This stems from a fundamental property of audio backbones: they focus on low-level spectral details rather than structured semantics, causing severe upstream-downstream misalignment. Through extensive empirical study, we identify analytic classifiers with first-session adaptation (FSA) as a promising direction, but also reveal two major limitations: representation saturation in coarse-grained scenarios and representation drift in fine-grained scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose PACE, a novel method that enhances FSA via a regularized analytic classifier and enables multi-session adaptation through adaptive subspace-orthogonal PEFT for improved semantic alignment. In addition, we introduce spectrogram-based boundary-aware perturbations to mitigate representation overlap and improve stability. Experiments on six diverse audio CL benchmarks demonstrate that PACE substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, marking an important step toward robust and scalable audio continual learning with PTMs.

【3】GRAM: Spatial general-purpose audio representations for real-world environments
- **标题**: GRAM：现实世界环境的空间通用音频表示
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03307
> **作者**: Goksenin Yuksel,Marcel van Gerven,Kiki van der Heijden
> **摘要**: 音频基础模型学习通用音频表示，以促进各种下游任务。虽然这些模型的性能对于传统的单通道、干音频剪辑来说已经大大提高，但它们在具有混响和噪声的现实声学环境中的成功是有限的。此外，大多数音频基础模型忽略了现实世界声学环境的空间维度，排除了涉及声音定位的任务。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 GRAM：一种通用的现实世界音频模型，它采用多通道屏蔽自动编码器来有效地学习空间音频表示。我们以标准化方式对自然空间声学环境的高质量模拟以及真实环境的录音评估了 GRAM 和其他音频基础模型，并发布了这两个互补的基准任务套件：NatHEAR 和 RealSELD。我们的结果表明，GRAM 的性能优于 NatHEAR 和干净的单通道版本 HEAR 上所有最先进的自监督音频基础模型，同时仅使用一小部分训练数据。 GRAM 还在模拟环境中展示了最先进的本地化性能，并有效地推广到 RealSELD 中的真实记录。总而言之，GRAM 为现实世界环境提供了强大的空间音频基础模型的重大进步。
> **Abstract**: Audio foundation models learn general-purpose audio representations that facilitate a wide range of downstream tasks. While the performance of these models has greatly increased for conventional single-channel, dry audio clips, their success in real-world acoustic environments with reverberation and noise is limited. Furthermore, most audio foundation models ignore the spatial dimension of real-world acoustic environments, ruling out tasks involving sound localization. To address these limitations, we propose GRAM: a general-purpose real-world audio model that employs a multi-channel masked autoencoder to efficiently learn spatial audio representations. We evaluated GRAM and other audio foundation models in a standardized manner on high-quality simulations of naturalistic, spatial acoustic environments as well as recordings of real-world environments and release these two complementary benchmark task suites: NatHEAR and RealSELD. Our results demonstrate that GRAM outperforms all state-of-the-art self-supervised audio foundation models on NatHEAR and the clean, single-channel version HEAR, while using only a fraction of the training data. GRAM also shows state-of-the-art localization performance in simulated environments and generalizes efficiently to real-world recordings in RealSELD. Taken together, GRAM presents a significant advance toward robust spatial audio foundation models for real-world environments.

【4】Rethinking Music Captioning with Music Metadata LLMs
- **标题**: 用音乐元数据法学硕士重新思考音乐字幕
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03023
> **作者**: Irmak Bukey,Zhepei Wang,Chris Donahue,Nicholas J. Bryan
> **摘要**: 音乐字幕，或者生成音乐的自然语言描述的任务，对于音乐理解和可控音乐生成都很有用。然而，训练字幕模型通常需要高质量的音乐字幕数据，而与元数据（例如流派、情绪等）相比，这些数据是稀缺的。因此，通常使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 从元数据合成字幕，为字幕模型生成训练数据，尽管此过程强加了固定的风格并将事实信息与自然语言风格纠缠在一起。作为一种更直接的方法，我们提出基于元数据的字幕。我们训练一个元数据预测模型，从音频中推断出详细的音乐元数据，然后在推理时通过预先训练的 LLM 将其转换为富有表现力的字幕。与在从元数据派生的 LLM 生成的字幕上训练的强大端到端基线相比，我们的方法：(1) 在更少的训练时间内实现了与端到端字幕生成器相当的性能，(2) 提供了在训练后轻松更改样式化的灵活性，使输出字幕能够根据特定的风格和质量要求进行定制，(3) 可以使用音频和部分元数据进行提示，以实现强大的元数据插补或填充——这是组织音乐数据的常见任务。
> **Abstract**: Music captioning, or the task of generating a natural language description of music, is useful for both music understanding and controllable music generation. Training captioning models, however, typically requires high-quality music caption data which is scarce compared to metadata (e.g., genre, mood, etc.). As a result, it is common to use large language models (LLMs) to synthesize captions from metadata to generate training data for captioning models, though this process imposes a fixed stylization and entangles factual information with natural language style. As a more direct approach, we propose metadata-based captioning. We train a metadata prediction model to infer detailed music metadata from audio and then convert it into expressive captions via pre-trained LLMs at inference time. Compared to a strong end-to-end baseline trained on LLM-generated captions derived from metadata, our method: (1) achieves comparable performance in less training time over end-to-end captioners, (2) offers flexibility to easily change stylization post-training, enabling output captions to be tailored to specific stylistic and quality requirements, and (3) can be prompted with audio and partial metadata to enable powerful metadata imputation or in-filling--a common task for organizing music data.

【5】Synthetic Data Augmentation for Medical Audio Classification: A Preliminary Evaluation
- **标题**: 用于医疗音频分类的综合数据增强：初步评估
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02955
> **作者**: David McShannon,Anthony Mella,Nicholas Dietrich
> **摘要**: 由于低信噪比、微妙的区分特征和大量的类内变异性，并且通常因类不平衡和有限的训练数据而加剧，医疗音频分类仍然具有挑战性。合成数据增强已被提议作为减轻这些限制的潜在策略；然而，先前的研究报告了不一致的方法方法和混合的实证结果。在这项初步研究中，我们使用在适度不平衡数据集 (73%:27%) 上训练的基线深度卷积神经网络来探索合成增强对呼吸音分类的影响。在受控实验条件下评估了三种生成增强策略（变分自动编码器、生成对抗网络和扩散模型）。没有增强的基线模型的 F1 分数为 0.645。在各个增强策略中，没有观察到性能提升，一些配置表现出中性或退化的分类性能。只有增强模型的集合在 F1 分数 (0.664) 上产生了适度的改进。这些发现表明，对于医疗音频分类，合成增强在应用于标准 CNN 分类器时可能无法始终如一地提高性能。未来的工作应侧重于描述特定于任务的数据特征、模型增强兼容性以及合成增强在医疗音频应用中有效所需的评估框架。
> **Abstract**: Medical audio classification remains challenging due to low signal-to-noise ratios, subtle discriminative features, and substantial intra-class variability, often compounded by class imbalance and limited training data. Synthetic data augmentation has been proposed as a potential strategy to mitigate these constraints; however, prior studies report inconsistent methodological approaches and mixed empirical results. In this preliminary study, we explore the impact of synthetic augmentation on respiratory sound classification using a baseline deep convolutional neural network trained on a moderately imbalanced dataset (73%:27%). Three generative augmentation strategies (variational autoencoders, generative adversarial networks, and diffusion models) were assessed under controlled experimental conditions. The baseline model without augmentation achieved an F1-score of 0.645. Across individual augmentation strategies, performance gains were not observed, with several configurations demonstrating neutral or degraded classification performance. Only an ensemble of augmented models yielded a modest improvement in F1-score (0.664). These findings suggest that, for medical audio classification, synthetic augmentation may not consistently enhance performance when applied to a standard CNN classifier. Future work should focus on delineating task-specific data characteristics, model-augmentation compatibility, and evaluation frameworks necessary for synthetic augmentation to be effective in medical audio applications.

【6】When Noise Lowers The Loss: Rethinking Likelihood-Based Evaluation in Music Large Language Models
- **标题**: 当噪声降低损失时：重新思考音乐大语言模型中基于似然的评估
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02738
> **作者**: Xiaosha Li,Chun Liu,Ziyu Wang
> **摘要**: 音乐大语言模型（LLM）的兴起需要强大的方法来评估输出质量，特别是在区分高质量作品和“垃圾音乐”方面。奇怪的是，我们观察到，当模型遇到系统性损坏的音乐时，标准交叉熵损失（核心训练指标）通常会下降，从而削弱了其作为独立质量指标的有效性。为了研究这个悖论，我们引入了噪声注入实验，其中不同长度的受控噪声信号被注入到音乐环境中。我们假设模型的损失对这些扰动做出积极的反应，特别是短注入的急剧增加（“峰值”区域），可以作为其辨别音乐完整性的能力的代理。在音频波形域中使用 MusicGen 模型进行的实验证实，音乐法学硕士对局部纹理级中断的响应比对全局语义损坏的响应更强烈。除了揭示这种偏差之外，我们的结果还强调了一个新原则：损失曲线的形状（而不是其绝对值）编码有关生成内容质量（即模型行为）的关键信息。我们将这种基于档案的评估设想为一种无标签、模型内在的框架，用于评估音乐质量——为更有原则的培训目标和更清晰的基准打开了大门。
> **Abstract**: The rise of music large language models (LLMs) demands robust methods of evaluating output quality, especially in distinguishing high-quality compositions from "garbage music". Curiously, we observe that the standard cross-entropy loss -- a core training metric -- often decrease when models encounter systematically corrupted music, undermining its validity as a standalone quality indicator. To investigate this paradox, we introduce noise injection experiment, where controlled noise signal of varying lengths are injected into musical contexts. We hypothesize that a model's loss reacting positively to these perturbations, specifically a sharp increase ("Peak" area) for short injection, can serve as a proxy for its ability to discern musical integrity. Experiments with MusicGen models in the audio waveform domain confirm that Music LLMs respond more strongly to local, texture-level disruptions than to global semantic corruption. Beyond exposing this bias, our results highlight a new principle: the shape of the loss curve -- rather than its absolute value -- encodes critical information about the quality of the generated content (i.e., model behavior). We envision this profile-based evaluation as a label-free, model-intrinsic framework for assessing musical quality -- opening the door to more principled training objectives and sharper benchmarks.

【7】VividVoice: A Unified Framework for Scene-Aware Visually-Driven Speech Synthesis
- **标题**: VividVoice：场景感知视觉驱动语音合成的统一框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02591
> **作者**: Chengyuan Ma,Jiawei Jin,Ruijie Xiong,Chunxiang Jin,Canxiang Yan,Wenming Yang
> **摘要**: 我们引入并定义了一项新颖的任务——场景感知视觉驱动语音合成，旨在解决现有语音生成模型在创建与真实物理世界相符的沉浸式听觉体验方面的局限性。为了解决数据稀缺和模态解耦这两个核心挑战，我们提出了 VividVoice，一个统一的生成框架。首先，我们构建了一个大规模、高质量的混合多模态数据集 Vivid-210K，它通过创新的程序化管道，首次在视觉场景、说话者身份和音频之间建立了强相关性。其次，我们设计了一个核心对齐模块D-MSVA，它利用解耦的内存库架构和跨模态混合监督策略来实现从视觉场景到音色和环境声学特征的细粒度对齐。主观和客观实验结果都提供了强有力的证据，表明 VividVoice 在音频保真度、内容清晰度和多模态一致性方面显着优于现有的基线模型。我们的演示位于 https://hengyuann.github.io/VividVoice/。
> **Abstract**: We introduce and define a novel task-Scene-Aware Visually-Driven Speech Synthesis, aimed at addressing the limitations of existing speech generation models in creating immersive auditory experiences that align with the real physical world. To tackle the two core challenges of data scarcity and modality decoupling, we propose VividVoice, a unified generative framework. First, we constructed a large-scale, high-quality hybrid multimodal dataset, Vivid-210K, which, through an innovative programmatic pipeline, establishes a strong correlation between visual scenes, speaker identity, and audio for the first time. Second, we designed a core alignment module, D-MSVA, which leverages a decoupled memory bank architecture and a cross-modal hybrid supervision strategy to achieve fine-grained alignment from visual scenes to timbre and environmental acoustic features. Both subjective and objective experimental results provide strong evidence that VividVoice significantly outperforms existing baseline models in terms of audio fidelity, content clarity, and multimodal consistency. Our demo is available at https://chengyuann.github.io/VividVoice/.

【8】Masked Autoencoders as Universal Speech Enhancer
- **标题**: 作为通用语音增强器的掩码自动编码器
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02413
> **作者**: Rajalaxmi Rajagopalan,Ritwik Giri,Zhiqiang Tang,Kyu Han
> **摘要**: 有监督的语音增强方法非常成功。然而，在实际场景中，缺乏干净的语音，因此需要一种基于自监督学习（SSL）的语音增强方法，该方法能够提供可比的增强性能，并且可以应用于其他语音相关的下游应用。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种基于掩码自动编码器的通用语音增强器，它与影响语音的失真类型无关，可以同时处理多种失真，并以自我监督的方式进行训练。增强堆栈进一步增加了噪声输入数据的失真。屏蔽自动编码器模型学习消除添加的失真，并在预训练期间重建频谱图的屏蔽区域。然后，通过针对特定下游任务的少量配对数据训练的微调模型来使用预训练的嵌入。我们评估用于降噪和去混响下游任务的预训练特征。我们探索预训练增强堆栈中的不同增强（例如单扬声器或多扬声器）以及不同噪声输入特征表示（例如 $log1p$ 压缩）对预训练嵌入和下游微调增强性能的影响。我们表明，所提出的方法不仅优于基线，而且在域内和域外评估数据集上都实现了最先进的性能。
> **Abstract**: Supervised speech enhancement methods have been very successful. However, in practical scenarios, there is a lack of clean speech, and self-supervised learning-based (SSL) speech enhancement methods that offer comparable enhancement performance and can be applied to other speech-related downstream applications are desired. In this work, we develop a masked autoencoder based universal speech enhancer that is agnostic to the type of distortion affecting speech, can handle multiple distortions simultaneously, and is trained in a self-supervised manner. An augmentation stack adds further distortions to the noisy input data. The masked autoencoder model learns to remove the added distortions along with reconstructing the masked regions of the spectrogram during pre-training. The pre-trained embeddings are then used by fine-tuning models trained on a small amount of paired data for specific downstream tasks. We evaluate the pre-trained features for denoising and dereverberation downstream tasks. We explore different augmentations (like single or multi-speaker) in the pre-training augmentation stack and the effect of different noisy input feature representations (like $log1p$ compression) on pre-trained embeddings and downstream fine-tuning enhancement performance. We show that the proposed method not only outperforms the baseline but also achieves state-of-the-art performance for both in-domain and out-of-domain evaluation datasets.

【9】DFKI-Speech System for WildSpoof Challenge: A robust framework for SASV In-the-Wild
- **标题**: WildSpoof 挑战赛的 DFKI-语音系统：SASV In-the-Wild 的强大框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02286
> **作者**: Arnab Das,Yassine El Kheir,Enes Erdem Erdogan,Feidi Kallel,Tim Polzehl,Sebastian Moeller
> **摘要**: 本文介绍了在欺骗感知自动说话人验证 (SASV) 轨道下为 WildSpoof 挑战赛开发的 DFKI-Speech 系统。我们提出了一个强大的 SASV 框架，其中欺骗检测器和说话人验证（SV）网络协同运行。欺骗检测器采用自监督语音嵌入提取器作为前端，并结合最先进的图神经网络后端。此外，基于顶层 3 层的专家混合 (MoE) 用于融合高级和低级特征，以实现有效的欺骗性话语检测。对于说话人验证，我们采用了低复杂度的卷积神经网络，该网络在多个尺度上融合 2D 和 1D 特征，并使用 SphereFace 损失进行训练。此外，对比圆损失应用于每个训练批次中自适应地对正负对进行加权，使网络能够更好地区分困难样本对和简单样本对。最后，使用基于固定冒名顶替者队列的 AS Norm 评分归一化和模型集成来进一步增强说话人验证系统的判别能力。
> **Abstract**: This paper presents the DFKI-Speech system developed for the WildSpoof Challenge under the Spoofing aware Automatic Speaker Verification (SASV) track. We propose a robust SASV framework in which a spoofing detector and a speaker verification (SV) network operate in tandem. The spoofing detector employs a self-supervised speech embedding extractor as the frontend, combined with a state-of-the-art graph neural network backend. In addition, a top-3 layer based mixture-of-experts (MoE) is used to fuse high-level and low-level features for effective spoofed utterance detection. For speaker verification, we adapt a low-complexity convolutional neural network that fuses 2D and 1D features at multiple scales, trained with the SphereFace loss. Additionally, contrastive circle loss is applied to adaptively weight positive and negative pairs within each training batch, enabling the network to better distinguish between hard and easy sample pairs. Finally, fixed imposter cohort based AS Norm score normalization and model ensembling are used to further enhance the discriminative capability of the speaker verification system.

【10】LipSody: Lip-to-Speech Synthesis with Enhanced Prosody Consistency
- **标题**: LipSody：增强韵律一致性的唇语合成
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01908
> **作者**: Jaejun Lee,Yoori Oh,Kyogu Lee
> **摘要**: 唇语合成旨在通过从嘴唇运动重建语言内容，直接从无声面部视频生成语音音频，在音频信号不可用或质量下降的情况下提供有价值的应用。虽然最近基于扩散的模型（例如 LipVoicer）在重建语言内容方面表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，但它们通常缺乏韵律一致性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LipSody，这是一种增强韵律一致性的唇语框架。 LipSody 引入了一种韵律引导策略，该策略利用三个互补的线索：从面部图像中提取的说话者身份、从嘴唇运动中得出的语言内容以及从面部视频中推断出的情感背景。实验结果表明，与之前的方法相比，LipSody 显着改善了韵律相关的指标，包括全局和局部音高偏差、能量一致性和说话人相似度。
> **Abstract**: Lip-to-speech synthesis aims to generate speech audio directly from silent facial video by reconstructing linguistic content from lip movements, providing valuable applications in situations where audio signals are unavailable or degraded. While recent diffusion-based models such as LipVoicer have demonstrated impressive performance in reconstructing linguistic content, they often lack prosodic consistency. In this work, we propose LipSody, a lip-to-speech framework enhanced for prosody consistency. LipSody introduces a prosody-guiding strategy that leverages three complementary cues: speaker identity extracted from facial images, linguistic content derived from lip movements, and emotional context inferred from face video. Experimental results demonstrate that LipSody substantially improves prosody-related metrics, including global and local pitch deviations, energy consistency, and speaker similarity, compared to prior approaches.

【11】Speaking Without Sound: Multi-speaker Silent Speech Voicing with Facial Inputs Only
- **标题**: 无声说话：仅通过面部输入进行多扬声器无声语音发声
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01879
> **作者**: Jaejun Lee,Yoori Oh,Kyogu Lee
> **摘要**: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的框架，用于在不依赖任何声音输入的情况下生成多说话者语音。我们的方法利用无声肌电图 (EMG) 信号来捕获语言内容，同时使用面部图像来匹配目标说话者的声音身份。值得注意的是，我们提出了一种音调解缠的内容嵌入，可以增强从 EMG 信号中提取语言内容。广泛的分析表明，我们的方法可以在没有任何声音输入的情况下生成多说话者语音，并证实了所提出的音调解缠方法的有效性。
> **Abstract**: In this paper, we introduce a novel framework for generating multi-speaker speech without relying on any audible inputs. Our approach leverages silent electromyography (EMG) signals to capture linguistic content, while facial images are used to match with the vocal identity of the target speaker. Notably, we present a pitch-disentangled content embedding that enhances the extraction of linguistic content from EMG signals. Extensive analysis demonstrates that our method can generate multi-speaker speech without any audible inputs and confirms the effectiveness of the proposed pitch-disentanglement approach.

【12】ParaGSE: Parallel Generative Speech Enhancement with Group-Vector-Quantization-based Neural Speech Codec
- **标题**: ParaGSE：使用基于组矢量量化的神经语音编解码器进行并行生成语音增强
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01793
> **作者**: Fei Liu,Yang Ai
> **摘要**: 最近，生成语音增强引起了人们极大的兴趣。然而，现有方法受到过度复杂性、有限效率和次优语音质量的阻碍。为了克服这些挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的并行生成语音增强（ParaGSE）框架，该框架利用基于组矢量量化（GVQ）的神经语音编解码器。基于 GVQ 的编解码器采用单独的 VQ 来生成相互独立的令牌，从而在 ParaGSE 中实现高效的并行令牌预测。具体来说，ParaGSE 利用基于 GVQ 的编解码器将降级语音编码为不同的令牌，通过以降级频谱特征为条件的并行分支预测相应的干净令牌，并最终通过编解码器重建干净的语音。实验结果表明，在各种失真（包括噪声、混响、频带限制及其混合）的情况下，与判别基线和生成基线相比，ParaGSE 始终能够产生卓越的增强语音。此外，在令牌预测并行计算的支持下，与串行生成语音增强方法相比，ParaGSE 在 CPU 上的生成效率提高了约 1.5 倍。
> **Abstract**: Recently, generative speech enhancement has garnered considerable interest; however, existing approaches are hindered by excessive complexity, limited efficiency, and suboptimal speech quality. To overcome these challenges, this paper proposes a novel parallel generative speech enhancement (ParaGSE) framework that leverages a group vector quantization (GVQ)-based neural speech codec. The GVQ-based codec adopts separate VQs to produce mutually independent tokens, enabling efficient parallel token prediction in ParaGSE. Specifically, ParaGSE leverages the GVQ-based codec to encode degraded speech into distinct tokens, predicts the corresponding clean tokens through parallel branches conditioned on degraded spectral features, and ultimately reconstructs clean speech via the codec decoder. Experimental results demonstrate that ParaGSE consistently produces superior enhanced speech compared to both discriminative and generative baselines, under a wide range of distortions including noise, reverberation, band-limiting, and their mixtures. Furthermore, empowered by parallel computation in token prediction, ParaGSE attains about a 1.5-fold improvement in generation efficiency on CPU compared with serial generative speech enhancement approaches.

【13】Voting-based Pitch Estimation with Temporal and Frequential Alignment and Correlation Aware Selection
- **标题**: 基于投票的音调估计，具有时间和频率对齐以及相关性感知选择
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01727
> **作者**: Junya Koguchi,Tomoki Koriyama
> **摘要**: 投票法是一种用于基频估计的集成方法，在经验上因其稳健性而闻名，但缺乏彻底的研究。本文对该技术进行了原理性分析和改进。首先，我们为其有效性提供理论基础，解释基频估计的误差方差减少，并调用孔多塞陪审团定理来实现浊音/清音检测精度。为了解决其实际局限性，我们提出了两项​​关键改进：1）预投票对齐程序，用于纠正估计器之间的时间和频率偏差；2）贪心算法，用于根据误差相关性选择紧凑但有效的估计器子集。对语音、歌唱和音乐的不同数据集的实验表明，我们提出的对齐方法在干净的条件下优于单个最先进的估计器，并在噪声环境中保持稳健的有声/无声检测。
> **Abstract**: The voting method, an ensemble approach for fundamental frequency estimation, is empirically known for its robustness but lacks thorough investigation. This paper provides a principled analysis and improvement of this technique. First, we offer a theoretical basis for its effectiveness, explaining the error variance reduction for fundamental frequency estimation and invoking Condorcet's jury theorem for voiced/unvoiced detection accuracy. To address its practical limitations, we propose two key improvements: 1) a pre-voting alignment procedure to correct temporal and frequential biases among estimators, and 2) a greedy algorithm to select a compact yet effective subset of estimators based on error correlation. Experiments on a diverse dataset of speech, singing, and music show that our proposed method with alignment outperforms individual state-of-the-art estimators in clean conditions and maintains robust voiced/unvoiced detection in noisy environments.

【14】Membership Inference Attack Against Music Diffusion Models via Generative Manifold Perturbation
- **标题**: 通过生成流形扰动对音乐扩散模型进行成员推理攻击
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01645
> **作者**: Yuxuan Liu,Peihong Zhang,Rui Sang,Zhixin Li,Yizhou Tan,Yiqiang Cai,Shengchen Li
> **摘要**: 成员推理攻击 (MIA) 测试特定音频片段是否用于训练模型，使其成为审核生成音乐模型版权合规性的关键工具。然而，基于丢失的信号（例如重建误差）在实践中与人类感知的一致性很弱，在取证所需的低假阳性率（FPR）下产生较差的可分离性。我们提出了潜在稳定性对抗探针（LSA-Probe），这是一种测量反向扩散的几何特性的白盒方法：在中间扩散状态下跨越固定感知退化阈值所需的最小时间归一化扰动预算。我们发现，居住在更稳定地区的培训成员表现出明显更高的退化成本。
> **Abstract**: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) test whether a specific audio clip was used to train a model, making them a key tool for auditing generative music models for copyright compliance. However, loss-based signals (e.g., reconstruction error) are weakly aligned with human perception in practice, yielding poor separability at the low false-positive rates (FPRs) required for forensics. We propose the Latent Stability Adversarial Probe (LSA-Probe), a white-box method that measures a geometric property of the reverse diffusion: the minimal time-normalized perturbation budget needed to cross a fixed perceptual degradation threshold at an intermediate diffusion state. We show that training members, residing in more stable regions, exhibit a significantly higher degradation cost.

【15】Attention-weighted Centered Kernel Alignment for Knowledge Distillation in Large Audio-Language Models Applied to Speech Emotion Recognition
- **标题**: 用于语音情感识别的大型音频语言模型中知识蒸馏的注意力加权中心核对齐
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01547
> **作者**: Qingran Yang,Botao Zhao,Zuheng Kang,Xue Li,Yayun He,Chuhang Liu,Xulong Zhang,Xiaoyang Qu,Junqing Peng,Jianzong Wang
