> **摘要**: 大型音频语言模型 (LALM) 的出现促进了语音情感识别 (SER) 的发展，但其规模限制了在资源有限的环境中的部署。虽然知识蒸馏对于 LALM 压缩是有效的，但现有方法在蒸馏跨模态投影模块 (Projector) 方面仍未得到充分探索，并且由于特征维度的差异而经常难以对齐。我们提出了 PL-Distill，这是一种 KD 框架，它结合了投影仪级蒸馏 (PDist) 来对齐音频嵌入和逻辑级蒸馏 (LDist) 来对齐输出逻辑。 PDist 引入了注意力加权中心核对齐，这是我们提出的一种新颖方法，用于突出重要的时间步骤并解决维度不匹配问题。同时，LDist 最大限度地减少了音频和文本模式中教师和学生逻辑之间的 Kullback-Leibler 差异。在 IEMOCAP、RAVDESS 和 SAVEE 上，PL-Distill 将 8.4B 参数的教师压缩为紧凑的 1.1B 参数的学生，在所有指标上始终优于教师、最先进的预训练模型和其他 KD 基线。
> **Abstract**: The emergence of Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) has advanced Speech Emotion Recognition (SER), but their size limits deployment in resource-constrained environments. While Knowledge Distillation is effective for LALM compression, existing methods remain underexplored in distilling the cross-modal projection module (Projector), and often struggle with alignment due to differences in feature dimensions. We propose PL-Distill, a KD framework that combines Projector-Level Distillation (PDist) to align audio embeddings and Logits-Level Distillation (LDist) to align output logits. PDist introduces Attention-weighted Centered Kernel Alignment, a novel approach we propose to highlight important time steps and address dimension mismatches. Meanwhile, LDist minimizes the Kullback-Leibler divergence between teacher and student logits from audio and text modalities. On IEMOCAP, RAVDESS, and SAVEE, PL-Distill compresses an 8.4B-parameter teacher to a compact 1.1B-parameter student, consistently outperforming the teacher, state-of-the-art pretrained models, and other KD baselines across all metrics.

【16】Causally Disentangled Contrastive Learning for Multilingual Speaker Embeddings
- **标题**: 多语言说话人嵌入的因果解开对比学习
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01363
> **作者**: Mariëtte Olijslager,Seyed Sahand Mohammadi Ziabari,Ali Mohammed Mansoor Alsahag
> **摘要**: 自监督说话人嵌入广泛用于说话人验证系统，但之前的工作表明，它们经常对敏感的人口统计属性进行编码，引发公平和隐私问题。本文研究了 SimCLR 训练的说话人嵌入中存在人口统计信息（特别是性别、年龄和口音）的程度，以及是否可以在不严重降低说话人验证性能的情况下减轻这种泄漏。我们研究了两种去偏差策略：通过梯度反转进行对抗性训练，以及明确区分人口统计信息和残留信息的因果瓶颈架构。使用线性和非线性探测分类器量化人口统计泄漏，同时使用 ROC-AUC 和 EER 评估说话者验证性能。我们的结果表明，性别信息在基线嵌入中被强烈且线性地编码，而年龄和口音则较弱并且主要以非线性表示。对抗性去偏见减少了性别泄漏，但对年龄和口音的影响有限，并且在验证准确性方面引入了明显的权衡。因果瓶颈进一步抑制了人口统计信息，特别是在剩余表示中，但会导致性能大幅下降。这些发现强调了减轻自监督说话人嵌入中的人口统计泄漏的根本局限性，并澄清了当前去偏差方法中固有的权衡。
> **Abstract**: Self-supervised speaker embeddings are widely used in speaker verification systems, but prior work has shown that they often encode sensitive demographic attributes, raising fairness and privacy concerns. This paper investigates the extent to which demographic information, specifically gender, age, and accent, is present in SimCLR-trained speaker embeddings and whether such leakage can be mitigated without severely degrading speaker verification performance. We study two debiasing strategies: adversarial training through gradient reversal and a causal bottleneck architecture that explicitly separates demographic and residual information. Demographic leakage is quantified using both linear and nonlinear probing classifiers, while speaker verification performance is evaluated using ROC-AUC and EER. Our results show that gender information is strongly and linearly encoded in baseline embeddings, whereas age and accent are weaker and primarily nonlinearly represented. Adversarial debiasing reduces gender leakage but has limited effect on age and accent and introduces a clear trade-off with verification accuracy. The causal bottleneck further suppresses demographic information, particularly in the residual representation, but incurs substantial performance degradation. These findings highlight fundamental limitations in mitigating demographic leakage in self-supervised speaker embeddings and clarify the trade-offs inherent in current debiasing approaches.

【17】TLDiffGAN: A Latent Diffusion-GAN Framework with Temporal Information Fusion for Anomalous Sound Detection
- **标题**: TLDiffGAN：用于异常声音检测的具有时间信息融合的潜在扩散 GAN 框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01060
> **作者**: Chengyuan Ma,Peng Jia,Hongyue Guo,Wenming Yang
> **摘要**: 现有的无监督异常声音检测生成模型由于无法完全捕获正常声音的复杂特征分布而受到限制，而该领域强大的扩散模型的潜力在很大程度上尚未得到开发。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个新颖的框架 TLDiffGAN，它由两个互补的分支组成。其中一个分支将潜在扩散模型合并到 GAN 生成器中进行对抗训练，从而使判别器的任务更具挑战性，并提高生成样本的质量。另一个分支利用预训练的音频模型编码器直接从原始音频波形中提取特征以进行辅助区分。该框架有效地从原始音频和梅尔声谱图中捕获正常声音的特征表示。此外，我们引入了 TMixup 频谱图增强技术，以增强对经常被忽视的微妙和局部时间模式的敏感性。在 DCASE 2020 Challenge Task 2 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了 TLDiffGAN 卓越的检测性能以及异常时频定位的强大能力。
> **Abstract**: Existing generative models for unsupervised anomalous sound detection are limited by their inability to fully capture the complex feature distribution of normal sounds, while the potential of powerful diffusion models in this domain remains largely unexplored. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework, TLDiffGAN, which consists of two complementary branches. One branch incorporates a latent diffusion model into the GAN generator for adversarial training, thereby making the discriminator's task more challenging and improving the quality of generated samples. The other branch leverages pretrained audio model encoders to extract features directly from raw audio waveforms for auxiliary discrimination. This framework effectively captures feature representations of normal sounds from both raw audio and Mel spectrograms. Moreover, we introduce a TMixup spectrogram augmentation technique to enhance sensitivity to subtle and localized temporal patterns that are often overlooked. Extensive experiments on the DCASE 2020 Challenge Task 2 dataset demonstrate the superior detection performance of TLDiffGAN, as well as its strong capability in anomalous time-frequency localization.

【18】HierCon: Hierarchical Contrastive Attention for Audio Deepfake Detection
- **标题**: HierCon：音频 Deepfake 检测的分层对比注意
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01032
> **作者**: Zhili Nicholas Liang,Soyeon Caren Han,Qizhou Wang,Christopher Leckie
> **摘要**: 现代 TTS 和语音转换系统生成的音频深度伪造越来越难以与真实语音区分开来，这给安全和在线信任带来了严重风险。虽然最先进的自监督模型提供了丰富的多层表示，但现有的检测器独立处理各层，并忽略了对于识别合成伪影至关重要的时间和层次依赖性。我们提出了 HierCon，一种分层层注意力框架，与基于边缘的对比学习相结合，对时间帧、相邻层和层组之间的依赖关系进行建模，同时鼓励域不变嵌入。在 ASVspoof 2021 DF 和 In-the-Wild 数据集上进行评估，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能（1.93% 和 6.87% EER），比独立层权重分别提高了 36.6% 和 22.5%。结果和注意力可视化证实，分层建模增强了跨域生成技术和记录条件的泛化。
> **Abstract**: Audio deepfakes generated by modern TTS and voice conversion systems are increasingly difficult to distinguish from real speech, raising serious risks for security and online trust. While state-of-the-art self-supervised models provide rich multi-layer representations, existing detectors treat layers independently and overlook temporal and hierarchical dependencies critical for identifying synthetic artefacts. We propose HierCon, a hierarchical layer attention framework combined with margin-based contrastive learning that models dependencies across temporal frames, neighbouring layers, and layer groups, while encouraging domain-invariant embeddings. Evaluated on ASVspoof 2021 DF and In-the-Wild datasets, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance (1.93% and 6.87% EER), improving over independent layer weighting by 36.6% and 22.5% respectively. The results and attention visualisations confirm that hierarchical modelling enhances generalisation to cross-domain generation techniques and recording conditions.

## 软件工程(cs.SE:Software Engineering)

【1】Precision in Practice: Knowledge Guided Code Summarizing Grounded in Industrial Expectations
- **标题**: 实践精准：基于行业期望的知识引导代码总结
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03400
> **作者**: Jintai Li,Songqiang Chen,Shuo Jin,Xiaoyuan Xie
> **摘要**: 代码摘要对于帮助开发人员理解代码功能以及降低维护和协作成本至关重要。尽管大型语言模型 (LLM) 的最新进展显着改进了自动代码摘要，但生成的摘要在工业环境中的实际用途仍未得到充分探索。我们与工业鸿蒙项目的文档专家合作进行了问卷调查，结果显示，超过 57.4% 的采用最先进方法生成的代码摘要因违反开发者对工业文档的期望而被拒绝。除了与参考摘要的语义相似性之外，开发人员还强调其他要求，包括使用适当的领域术语、显式函数分类以及避免冗余的实现细节。为了满足这些期望，我们提出了 ExpSum，这是一种期望感知的代码摘要方法，它集成了函数元数据抽象、信息元数据过滤、上下文感知的领域知识检索和约束驱动的提示，以指导法学硕士生成结构化的、与期望一致的摘要。我们在 HarmonyOS 项目和广泛使用的代码摘要基准上评估 ExpSum。实验结果表明，ExpSum 始终优于所有基线，在 HarmonyOS 上的 BLEU-4 中实现了高达 26.71% 的改进，在 ROUGE-L 中实现了 20.10% 的改进。此外，基于 LLM 的评估表明，ExpSum 生成的摘要更好地符合开发人员对其他项目的期望，证明了其对工业代码文档的有效性。
> **Abstract**: Code summaries are essential for helping developers understand code functionality and reducing maintenance and collaboration costs. Although recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have significantly improved automatic code summarization, the practical usefulness of generated summaries in industrial settings remains insufficiently explored. In collaboration with documentation experts from the industrial HarmonyOS project, we conducted a questionnaire study showing that over 57.4% of code summaries produced by state-of-the-art approaches were rejected due to violations of developers' expectations for industrial documentation. Beyond semantic similarity to reference summaries, developers emphasize additional requirements, including the use of appropriate domain terminology, explicit function categorization, and the avoidance of redundant implementation details. To address these expectations, we propose ExpSum, an expectation-aware code summarization approach that integrates function metadata abstraction, informative metadata filtering, context-aware domain knowledge retrieval, and constraint-driven prompting to guide LLMs in generating structured, expectation-aligned summaries. We evaluate ExpSum on the HarmonyOS project and widely used code summarization benchmarks. Experimental results show that ExpSum consistently outperforms all baselines, achieving improvements of up to 26.71% in BLEU-4 and 20.10% in ROUGE-L on HarmonyOS. Furthermore, LLM-based evaluations indicate that ExpSum-generated summaries better align with developer expectations across other projects, demonstrating its effectiveness for industrial code documentation.

【2】Learning-Infused Formal Reasoning: From Contract Synthesis to Artifact Reuse and Formal Semantics
- **标题**: 注入学习的形式推理：从契约综合到工件重用和形式语义
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02881
> **作者**: Arshad Beg,Diarmuid O'Donoghue,Rosemary Monahan
> **摘要**: 这份愿景文件阐明了与人工智能交叉的正式方法的长期研究议程，概述了多个概念和技术维度，并报告了我们为实现这一议程而正在进行的工作。它基于自动化合约合成、语义工件重用和基于细化的理论的集成，提出了对下一代形式化方法的前瞻性视角。我们认为，未来的验证系统必须超越孤立的正确性证明，转向累积的、知识驱动的范式，其中规范、契约和证明不断合成并跨系统传输。为了支持这种转变，我们概述了一个混合框架，将大型语言模型与基于图的表示相结合，以实现可扩展的语义匹配和验证工件的原则性重用。基于学习的组件提供跨异构符号和抽象级别的语义指导，而符号匹配则确保形式的健全性。这一愿景以组合推理为基础，指向系统发展的验证生态系统，利用过去的验证工作来加速未来的保证。
> **Abstract**: This vision paper articulates a long-term research agenda for formal methods at the intersection with artificial intelligence, outlining multiple conceptual and technical dimensions and reporting on our ongoing work toward realising this agenda. It advances a forward-looking perspective on the next generation of formal methods based on the integration of automated contract synthesis, semantic artifact reuse, and refinement-based theory. We argue that future verification systems must move beyond isolated correctness proofs toward a cumulative, knowledge-driven paradigm in which specifications, contracts, and proofs are continuously synthesised and transferred across systems. To support this shift, we outline a hybrid framework combining large language models with graph-based representations to enable scalable semantic matching and principled reuse of verification artifacts. Learning-based components provide semantic guidance across heterogeneous notations and abstraction levels, while symbolic matching ensures formal soundness. Grounded in compositional reasoning, this vision points toward verification ecosystems that evolve systematically, leveraging past verification efforts to accelerate future assurance.

【3】Testing Storage-System Correctness: Challenges, Fuzzing Limitations, and AI-Augmented Opportunities
- **标题**: 测试存储系统的正确性：挑战、模糊测试限制和人工智能增强的机会
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02614
> **作者**: Ying Wang,Jiahui Chen,Dejun Jiang
> **摘要**: 存储系统是现代计算基础设施的基础，但确保其正确性在实践中仍然具有挑战性。尽管对系统测试进行了数十年的研究，但许多存储系统故障（包括耐久性、排序、恢复和一致性违规）仍然难以系统地暴露。这种困难主要不是源于测试工具不足，而是源于存储系统执行的内在属性，包括非确定性交错、长期状态演化以及跨越多个层和执行阶段的正确性语义。这项调查采用以存储为中心的系统测试视图，并根据其目标的执行属性和故障机制来组织现有技术。我们回顾了广泛的方法，从并发测试和长时间运行的工作负载到崩溃一致性分析、硬件级语义验证和分布式故障注入，并分析了它们的基本优点和局限性。在此框架内，我们将模糊测试作为一种自动化测试范式进行研究，强调传统模糊测试假设和存储系统语义之间的系统不匹配，并讨论最新的人工智能进步如何通过状态感知和语义指导来补充模糊测试。总的来说，这项调查提供了存储系统正确性测试的统一视角，并概述了主要挑战
> **Abstract**: Storage systems are fundamental to modern computing infrastructures, yet ensuring their correctness remains challenging in practice. Despite decades of research on system testing, many storage-system failures (including durability, ordering, recovery, and consistency violations) remain difficult to expose systematically. This difficulty stems not primarily from insufficient testing tooling, but from intrinsic properties of storage-system execution, including nondeterministic interleavings, long-horizon state evolution, and correctness semantics that span multiple layers and execution phases. This survey adopts a storage-centric view of system testing and organizes existing techniques according to the execution properties and failure mechanisms they target. We review a broad spectrum of approaches, ranging from concurrency testing and long-running workloads to crash-consistency analysis, hardware-level semantic validation, and distributed fault injection, and analyze their fundamental strengths and limitations. Within this framework, we examine fuzzing as an automated testing paradigm, highlighting systematic mismatches between conventional fuzzing assumptions and storage-system semantics, and discuss how recent artificial intelligence advances may complement fuzzing through state-aware and semantic guidance. Overall, this survey provides a unified perspective on storage-system correctness testing and outlines key challenges

【4】Agentic Observability: Automated Alert Triage for Adobe E-Commerce
- **标题**: 代理可观察性：Adobe 电子商务的自动警报分类
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02585
> **作者**: Aprameya Bharadwaj,Kyle Tu
> **摘要**: 现代企业系统表现出复杂的相互依赖性，这使得可观察性和事件响应变得越来越具有挑战性。手动警报分类通常涉及日志检查、API 验证和交叉引用操作知识库，仍然是减少平均恢复时间 (MTTR) 的主要瓶颈。本文提出了一个部署在 Adob​​e 电子商务基础设施内的代理可观察性框架，该框架使用 ReAct 范例自动执行警报分类。检测到警报后，代理动态识别受影响的服务，检索和分析分布式系统中的相关日志，并计划与上下文相关的操作，例如手册咨询、运行手册执行或最近部署的代码的检索增强分析。生产部署的经验结果表明，与手动分类相比，平均洞察时间缩短了 90%，同时保持了相当的诊断准确性。我们的结果表明，代理人工智能可以使分类延迟减少一个数量级，并提高分辨率精度，标志着企业运营中向自主可观察性的关键转变。
> **Abstract**: Modern enterprise systems exhibit complex interdependencies that make observability and incident response increasingly challenging. Manual alert triage, which typically involves log inspection, API verification, and cross-referencing operational knowledge bases, remains a major bottleneck in reducing mean recovery time (MTTR). This paper presents an agentic observability framework deployed within Adobe's e-commerce infrastructure that autonomously performs alert triage using a ReAct paradigm. Upon alert detection, the agent dynamically identifies the affected service, retrieves and analyzes correlated logs across distributed systems, and plans context-dependent actions such as handbook consultation, runbook execution, or retrieval-augmented analysis of recently deployed code. Empirical results from production deployment indicate a 90% reduction in mean time to insight compared to manual triage, while maintaining comparable diagnostic accuracy. Our results show that agentic AI enables an order-of-magnitude reduction in triage latency and a step-change in resolution accuracy, marking a pivotal shift toward autonomous observability in enterprise operations.

【5】Constitutional Spec-Driven Development: Enforcing Security by Construction in AI-Assisted Code Generation
- **标题**: 宪法规范驱动的发展：通过构建人工智能辅助代码生成来增强安全性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02584
> **作者**: Srinivas Rao Marri
> **摘要**: 人工智能辅助的“vibe 编码”的激增实现了快速的软件开发，但也带来了重大的安全风险，因为大型语言模型 (LLM) 优先考虑功能正确性而不是安全性。我们提出了宪法规范驱动开发，这是一种将不可协商的安全原则嵌入规范层的方法，确保人工智能生成的代码通过构造而不是检查来遵守安全要求。我们的方法引入了一个宪法：一个版本化的、机器可读的文档，编码源自常见弱点枚举 (CWE)/MITRE Top 25 漏洞和监管框架的安全约束。我们通过银行微服务应用程序演示了该方法，由于其严格的监管和安全要求，该应用程序被选为代表性示例域，实现客户管理、帐户操作和交易处理。该方法本身与领域无关。该实施通过宪法约束解决了 10 个关键的 CWE 漏洞，并具有从原理到代码位置的完全可追溯性。我们的案例研究表明，与不受约束的 AI 生成相比，宪法约束将安全缺陷减少了 73%，同时保持了开发人员的速度。我们提供了一个正式的宪法安全框架、完整的开发方法以及经验证据，证明主动安全规范在人工智能辅助开发工作流程中优于被动安全验证。
> **Abstract**: The proliferation of AI-assisted "vibe coding" enables rapid software development but introduces significant security risks, as Large Language Models (LLMs) prioritize functional correctness over security. We present Constitutional Spec-Driven Development, a methodology that embeds non-negotiable security principles into the specification layer, ensuring AI-generated code adheres to security requirements by construction rather than inspection. Our approach introduces a Constitution: a versioned, machine-readable document encoding security constraints derived from Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE)/MITRE Top 25 vulnerabilities and regulatory frameworks. We demonstrate the methodology through a banking microservices application, selected as a representative example domain due to its stringent regulatory and security requirements, implementing customer management, account operations, and transaction processing. The methodology itself is domain-agnostic. The implementation addresses 10 critical CWE vulnerabilities through constitutional constraints with full traceability from principles to code locations. Our case study shows that constitutional constraints reduce security defects by 73% compared to unconstrained AI generation while maintaining developer velocity. We contribute a formal framework for constitutional security, a complete development methodology, and empirical evidence that proactive security specification outperforms reactive security verification in AI-assisted development workflows.

【6】SWE-Universe: Scale Real-World Verifiable Environments to Millions
- **标题**: SWE-Universe：将真实世界的可验证环境扩展到数百万个
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02361
> **作者**: Mouxiang Chen,Lei Zhang,Yunlong Feng,Xuwu Wang,Wenting Zhao,Ruisheng Cao,Jiaxi Yang,Jiawei Chen,Mingze Li,Zeyao Ma,Hao Ge,Zongmeng Zhang,Zeyu Cui,Dayiheng Liu,Jingren Zhou,Jianling Sun,Junyang Lin,Binyuan Hui
> **摘要**: 我们提出了 SWE-Universe，这是一个可扩展且高效的框架，用于从 GitHub 拉取请求 (PR) 自动构建真实世界的软件工程 (SWE) 可验证环境。为了克服自动构建的普遍挑战，例如低产量、弱验证器和高昂的成本，我们的框架采用了由高效的定制训练模型支持的构建代理。该代理采用迭代自我验证和内循环黑客检测来确保可靠生成高保真、可验证的任务。使用这种方法，我们将现实世界的多语言 SWE 环境的数量扩展到百万级 (807,693)。我们通过大规模代理中期训练和强化学习展示了我们环境的深刻价值。最后，我们将该技术应用于 Qwen3-Max-Thinking，并在 SWE-Bench Verified 上取得了 75.3% 的分数。我们的工作提供了关键资源和强大的方法来推进下一代编码代理。
> **Abstract**: We propose SWE-Universe, a scalable and efficient framework for automatically constructing real-world software engineering (SWE) verifiable environments from GitHub pull requests (PRs). To overcome the prevalent challenges of automatic building, such as low production yield, weak verifiers, and prohibitive cost, our framework utilizes a building agent powered by an efficient custom-trained model. This agent employs iterative self-verification and in-loop hacking detection to ensure the reliable generation of high-fidelity, verifiable tasks. Using this method, we scale the number of real-world multilingual SWE environments to a million scale (807,693). We demonstrate the profound value of our environments through large-scale agentic mid-training and reinforcement learning. Finally, we applied this technique to Qwen3-Max-Thinking and achieved a score of 75.3% on SWE-Bench Verified. Our work provides both a critical resource and a robust methodology to advance the next generation of coding agents.

【7】Before Autonomy Takes Control: Software Testing in Robotics
- **标题**: 在自主控制之前：机器人软件测试
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02293
> **作者**: Nils Chur,Thiago Santos de Moura,Argentina Ortega,Sven Peldszus,Thorsten Berger,Nico Hochgeschwender,Yannic Noller
> **摘要**: 机器人系统是复杂且安全关键的软件系统。因此，它们需要经过彻底的测试。不幸的是，与传统软件相比，机器人软件本质上很难测试，主要是因为软件需要与硬件密切交互，考虑其操作环境的不确定性，处理干扰并高度自主地行动。然而，考虑到机器人运行的空间很大，在设计测试时预测可能出现的故障具有挑战性。本文通过考虑机器人测试论文并将其与软件测试理论联系起来，提出了一项映射研究。我们考虑了 247 篇机器人测试论文，并将它们映射到软件测试，通过示例讨论了机器人领域最先进的软件测试，并讨论了当前的挑战。为向机器人和软件工程社区介绍软件测试挑战奠定了基础。最后，我们确定悬而未决的问题和经验教训。
> **Abstract**: Robotic systems are complex and safety-critical software systems. As such, they need to be tested thoroughly. Unfortunately, robot software is intrinsically hard to test compared to traditional software, mainly since the software needs to closely interact with hardware, account for uncertainty in its operational environment, handle disturbances, and act highly autonomously. However, given the large space in which robots operate, anticipating possible failures when designing tests is challenging. This paper presents a mapping study by considering robotics testing papers and relating them to the software testing theory. We consider 247 robotics testing papers and map them to software testing, discussing the state-of-the-art software testing in robotics with an illustrated example, and discuss current challenges. Forming the basis to introduce both the robotics and software engineering communities to software testing challenges. Finally, we identify open questions and lessons learned.

【8】RACA: Representation-Aware Coverage Criteria for LLM Safety Testing
- **标题**: RACA：LLM 安全测试的表示意识覆盖标准
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02280
> **作者**: Zeming Wei,Zhixin Zhang,Chengcan Wu,Yihao Zhang,Xiaokun Luan,Meng Sun
> **摘要**: 法学硕士的最新进展导致各种人工智能应用取得了重大突破。然而，它们复杂的功能也带​​来了严重的安全问题，特别是通过越狱攻击生成有害内容。当前法学硕士的安全测试通常依赖于静态数据集，并且缺乏系统标准来评估这些测试的质量和充分性。虽然覆盖标准对于较小的神经网络有效，但由于可扩展性问题和不同的目标，它们并不直接适用于法学硕士。为了应对这些挑战，本文介绍了 RACA，这是一套专门为 LLM 安全测试设计的新颖的覆盖标准。 RACA 利用表示工程来关注法学硕士内的安全关键概念，从而降低维度并过滤掉不相关的信息。该框架分三个阶段运行：首先，它使用专家策划的小型越狱提示校准集来识别安全关键的表示。其次，它根据这些表示计算给定测试套件的概念激活分数。最后，它使用评估个体和组合安全概念的六个子标准来计算覆盖结果。我们进行了全面的实验来验证 RACA 的有效性、适用性和泛化性，结果表明 RACA 成功识别了高质量的越狱提示，并且优于传统的神经元级标准。我们还展示了它在现实场景中的实际应用，例如测试集优先级和攻击提示采样。此外，我们的研究结果证实了 RACA 对各种场景的泛化及其在各种配置中的稳健性。总体而言，RACA 提供了一个评估法学硕士安全性的新框架，为人工智能测试领域贡献了宝贵的技术。
> **Abstract**: Recent advancements in LLMs have led to significant breakthroughs in various AI applications. However, their sophisticated capabilities also introduce severe safety concerns, particularly the generation of harmful content through jailbreak attacks. Current safety testing for LLMs often relies on static datasets and lacks systematic criteria to evaluate the quality and adequacy of these tests. While coverage criteria have been effective for smaller neural networks, they are not directly applicable to LLMs due to scalability issues and differing objectives. To address these challenges, this paper introduces RACA, a novel set of coverage criteria specifically designed for LLM safety testing. RACA leverages representation engineering to focus on safety-critical concepts within LLMs, thereby reducing dimensionality and filtering out irrelevant information. The framework operates in three stages: first, it identifies safety-critical representations using a small, expert-curated calibration set of jailbreak prompts. Second, it calculates conceptual activation scores for a given test suite based on these representations. Finally, it computes coverage results using six sub-criteria that assess both individual and compositional safety concepts. We conduct comprehensive experiments to validate RACA's effectiveness, applicability, and generalization, where the results demonstrate that RACA successfully identifies high-quality jailbreak prompts and is superior to traditional neuron-level criteria. We also showcase its practical application in real-world scenarios, such as test set prioritization and attack prompt sampling. Furthermore, our findings confirm RACA's generalization to various scenarios and its robustness across various configurations. Overall, RACA provides a new framework for evaluating the safety of LLMs, contributing a valuable technique to the field of testing for AI.

【9】OmniCode: A Benchmark for Evaluating Software Engineering Agents
- **标题**: OmniCode：评估软件工程代理的基准
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02262
> **作者**: Atharv Sonwane,Eng-Shen Tu,Wei-Chung Lu,Claas Beger,Carter Larsen,Debjit Dhar,Rachel Chen,Ronit Pattanayak,Tuan Anh Dang,Guohao Chen,Gloria Geng,Kevin Ellis,Saikat Dutta
> **摘要**: 由法学硕士支持的编码代理正在重新定义现实世界软件的开发方式。为了推动更好的编码代理的研究，我们需要具有挑战性的基准，可以严格评估此类代理执行各种软件工程任务的能力。然而，流行的编码基准（例如 HumanEval 和 SWE-Bench）专注于范围狭窄的任务，例如竞争编程和补丁生成。事实上，软件工程师必须处理更广泛的现实软件开发任务。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了 OmniCode，这是一种新颖的软件工程基准，其中包含除代码或补丁生成之外更广泛、更多样化的任务类别。总体而言，OmniCode 包含 1794 个任务，涵盖三种编程语言（Python、Java 和 C++）和四个关键类别：错误修复、测试生成、代码审查修复和样式修复。与之前的软件工程基准相比，OmniCode 中的任务是 (1) 手动验证以消除不明确的问题，以及 (2) 综合设计或最近策划的以避免数据泄漏问题，提供了一个新框架，用于从有限的现实世界数据综合生成各种软件任务。我们使用流行的代理框架（例如 SWE-Agent）评估 OmniCode，结果表明，虽然它们在 Python 错误修复方面表现良好，但在测试生成等任务以及 C++ 和 Java 等语言中表现不佳。例如，SWE-Agent 在 Java 测试生成任务上使用 DeepSeek-V3.1 实现了最高 20.9% 的成绩。 OmniCode 旨在成为一个强大的基准，并促进能够在软件开发的不同方面表现良好的代理的开发。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/seal-research/OmniCode 获取。
> **Abstract**: LLM-powered coding agents are redefining how real-world software is developed. To drive the research towards better coding agents, we require challenging benchmarks that can rigorously evaluate the ability of such agents to perform various software engineering tasks. However, popular coding benchmarks such as HumanEval and SWE-Bench focus on narrowly scoped tasks such as competition programming and patch generation. In reality, software engineers have to handle a broader set of tasks for real-world software development. To address this gap, we propose OmniCode, a novel software engineering benchmark that contains a broader and more diverse set of task categories beyond code or patch generation. Overall, OmniCode contains 1794 tasks spanning three programming languages (Python, Java, and C++) and four key categories: bug fixing, test generation, code review fixing, and style fixing. In contrast to prior software engineering benchmarks, the tasks in OmniCode are (1) manually validated to eliminate ill-defined problems, and (2) synthetically crafted or recently curated to avoid data leakage issues, presenting a new framework for synthetically generating diverse software tasks from limited real-world data. We evaluate OmniCode with popular agent frameworks such as SWE-Agent and show that while they may perform well on bug fixing for Python, they fall short on tasks such as Test Generation and in languages such as C++ and Java. For instance, SWE-Agent achieves a maximum of 20.9% with DeepSeek-V3.1 on Java Test Generation tasks. OmniCode aims to serve as a robust benchmark and spur the development of agents that can perform well across different aspects of software development. Code and data are available at https://github.com/seal-research/OmniCode.

【10】CAM: A Causality-based Analysis Framework for Multi-Agent Code Generation Systems
- **标题**: CAM：多代理代码生成系统的基于因果关系的分析框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02138
> **作者**: Lyu Zongyi,Ji Zhenlan,Chen Songqiang,Wang Liwen,Huang Yuheng,Wang Shuai,Cheung Shing-Chi
> **摘要**: 尽管多代理代码生成系统（MACGS）取得了巨大的成功，但多代理架构固有的复杂性会产生大量的中间输出。迄今为止，这些中间输出对系统正确性的重要性仍然不透明，这阻碍了 MACGS 设计的有针对性的优化。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 CAM，这是第一个基于 \textbf{C}ausality 的 \textbf{A}ACGS 分析框架，它系统地量化了不同中间特征对系统正确性的贡献。通过对中间输出进行全面分类并系统地模拟中间特征的现实错误，我们确定了系统正确性的重要特征并汇总了它们的重要性排名。我们对确定的重要性排名进行了广泛的实证分析。我们的分析揭示了有趣的发现：首先，我们发现了上下文相关的特征\textemdash 特征，其重要性主要通过与其他特征的交互而出现，揭示了 MACGS 的质量保证应纳入跨特征一致性检查；其次，我们揭示了根据相对强度分配不同后端 LLM 的混合后端 MACGS 实现了高达 7.2% Pass@1 的改进，强调混合架构是未来 MACGS 设计的一个有前途的方向。我们通过两个应用进一步证明了 CAM 的实用性：(1) 故障修复，通过优化重要性排名前 3 的特征，实现了 73.3% 的成功率；(2) 特征修剪，在保持生成性能的同时，减少了高达 66.8% 的中间令牌消耗。我们的工作为 MACGS 设计和部署提供了可行的见解，将因果关系分析建立为理解和改进 MACGS 的强大方法。
> **Abstract**: Despite the remarkable success that Multi-Agent Code Generation Systems (MACGS) have achieved, the inherent complexity of multi-agent architectures produces substantial volumes of intermediate outputs. To date, the individual importance of these intermediate outputs to the system correctness remains opaque, which impedes targeted optimization of MACGS designs. To address this challenge, we propose CAM, the first \textbf{C}ausality-based \textbf{A}nalysis framework for \textbf{M}ACGS that systematically quantifies the contribution of different intermediate features for system correctness. By comprehensively categorizing intermediate outputs and systematically simulating realistic errors on intermediate features, we identify the important features for system correctness and aggregate their importance rankings. We conduct extensive empirical analysis on the identified importance rankings. Our analysis reveals intriguing findings: first, we uncover context-dependent features\textemdash features whose importance emerges mainly through interactions with other features, revealing that quality assurance for MACGS should incorporate cross-feature consistency checks; second, we reveal that hybrid backend MACGS with different backend LLMs assigned according to their relative strength achieves up to 7.2\% Pass@1 improvement, underscoring hybrid architectures as a promising direction for future MACGS design. We further demonstrate CAM's practical utility through two applications: (1) failure repair which achieves a 73.3\% success rate by optimizing top-3 importance-ranked features and (2) feature pruning that reduces up to 66.8\% intermediate token consumption while maintaining generation performance. Our work provides actionable insights for MACGS design and deployment, establishing causality analysis as a powerful approach for understanding and improving MACGS.

【11】Autoregressive, Yet Revisable: In Decoding Revision for Secure Code Generation
- **标题**: 自回归但可修改：用于安全代码生成的解码修订
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01187
> **作者**: Chengran Yang,Zichao Wei,Heminghao Deng,Jinfeng Jiang,Zhensu Sun,Ting Zhang,Tianyi Wu,Ming Wen,David Lo
> **摘要**: 基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的代码生成主要被制定为严格单调的过程，将标记线性附加到不可变的前缀。这种表述与编程的认知过程形成鲜明对比，编程的认知过程本质上与前向生成和即时修订交织在一起。虽然之前的工作尝试通过事后代理或外部静态工具引入修订，但它们要么遭受高延迟，要么无法利用模型的内在语义推理。在本文中，我们提出了修订流，这是一种范式转变，通过利用模型的内在功能，将代码生成从单调流提升为动态、自我校正的轨迹。我们引入了特定的操作令牌，使模型能够在单个前向传递中无缝回溯和编辑其自己的历史记录。通过内部化修订循环，我们的框架修订流允许模型及时激活其潜在功能，而无需外部依赖。安全代码生成的实证结果表明，修订流以最小的推理开销显着减少了漏洞。
> **Abstract**: Large Language Model (LLM) based code generation is predominantly formulated as a strictly monotonic process, appending tokens linearly to an immutable prefix. This formulation contrasts to the cognitive process of programming, which is inherently interleaved with forward generation and on-the-fly revision. While prior works attempt to introduce revision via post-hoc agents or external static tools, they either suffer from high latency or fail to leverage the model's intrinsic semantic reasoning. In this paper, we propose Stream of Revision, a paradigm shift that elevates code generation from a monotonic stream to a dynamic, self-correcting trajectory by leveraging model's intrinsic capabilities. We introduce specific action tokens that enable the model to seamlessly backtrack and edit its own history within a single forward pass. By internalizing the revision loop, our framework Stream of Revision allows the model to activate its latent capabilities just-in-time without external dependencies. Empirical results on secure code generation show that Stream of Revision significantly reduces vulnerabilities with minimal inference overhead.

【12】SPELL: Synthesis of Programmatic Edits using LLMs
- **标题**: SPELL：使用法学硕士进行程序化编辑的综合
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01107
> **作者**: Daniel Ramos,Catarina Gamboa,Inês Lynce,Vasco Manquinho,Ruben Martins,Claire Le Goues
> **摘要**: 库迁移是软件开发中常见但容易出错的任务。由于需求变化或许可变更等原因，开发人员可能需要将一个库替换为另一个库。迁移通常需要手动更新和重写源代码。尽管存在自动迁移工具，但大多数工具都依赖于已经经历过类似迁移的现实项目中的挖掘示例。然而，这些数据很少，并且为任意对的库收集它们是很困难的。此外，这些迁移工具经常错过利用现代代码转换基础设施的机会。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动 API 迁移的新方法，可以避开上述限制。我们没有依赖现有的迁移数据或直接使用LLM进行转换，而是使用LLM来提取迁移示例。接下来，我们使用代理将这些示例概括为现代代码转换工具 PolyglotPiranha 中的可重用转换脚本。我们的方法将法学硕士的潜在迁移知识提炼为结构化、可测试和可重复的迁移逻辑，而不需要预先存在的语料库或手动工程工作。 Python 库的实验结果表明，我们的系统可以生成各种迁移示例并合成可推广到现实世界代码库的转换脚本。
> **Abstract**: Library migration is a common but error-prone task in software development. Developers may need to replace one library with another due to reasons like changing requirements or licensing changes. Migration typically entails updating and rewriting source code manually. While automated migration tools exist, most rely on mining examples from real-world projects that have already undergone similar migrations. However, these data are scarce, and collecting them for arbitrary pairs of libraries is difficult. Moreover, these migration tools often miss out on leveraging modern code transformation infrastructure. In this paper, we present a new approach to automated API migration that sidesteps the limitations described above. Instead of relying on existing migration data or using LLMs directly for transformation, we use LLMs to extract migration examples. Next, we use an Agent to generalize those examples to reusable transformation scripts in PolyglotPiranha, a modern code transformation tool. Our method distills latent migration knowledge from LLMs into structured, testable, and repeatable migration logic, without requiring preexisting corpora or manual engineering effort. Experimental results across Python libraries show that our system can generate diverse migration examples and synthesize transformation scripts that generalize to real-world codebases.

## 社交和信息网络(cs.SI:Social and Information Networks)

【1】Recommender system in X inadvertently profiles ideological positions of users
- **标题**: X中的推荐系统无意中描述了用户的意识形态立场
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02624
> **作者**: Paul Bouchaud,Pedro Ramaciotti
> **摘要**: 对社交媒体推荐的研究主要分析了推荐项目的质量（例如，其多样性或偏见）和推荐政策的影响（例如，与纯粹按时间顺序排列的政策进行比较）。我们使用数据捐赠计划，在一年多的时间里收集了 X 上向 682 名志愿者提出的超过 250 万条朋友推荐，以研究现实世界的推荐者如何在所谓的人工智能系统黑匣子中学习、表示和处理用户的政治和社会属性。利用有关推荐器架构的公开知识，我们推断了推荐用户在其嵌入空间中的位置。利用政治调查数据校准的意识形态尺度，我们分析了研究中用户的政治立场（志愿者和推荐联系人中的 N = 26,509 人）在年龄和性别等多个属性中的政治立场。我们的结果表明，该平台的推荐系统产生的用户空间排序与用户的左右位置高度相关（Pearson rho=0.887，p 值 < 0.0001），并且无法用社会人口统计属性来解释。这些结果为研究人类与人工智能系统之间的交互开辟了新的可能性。他们还通过模糊主动和被动分析之间的界限，提出了与数据隐私监管中算法分析的法律定义相关的重要问题。我们探索由我们的结果启用的新的受限推荐方法，限制推荐器中的政治信息，作为能够保留推荐相关性的隐私合规性的潜在工具。
> **Abstract**: Studies on recommendations in social media have mainly analyzed the quality of recommended items (e.g., their diversity or biases) and the impact of recommendation policies (e.g., in comparison with purely chronological policies). We use a data donation program, collecting more than 2.5 million friend recommendations made to 682 volunteers on X over a year, to study instead how real-world recommenders learn, represent and process political and social attributes of users inside the so-called black boxes of AI systems. Using publicly available knowledge on the architecture of the recommender, we inferred the positions of recommended users in its embedding space. Leveraging ideology scaling calibrated with political survey data, we analyzed the political position of users in our study (N=26,509 among volunteers and recommended contacts) among several attributes, including age and gender. Our results show that the platform's recommender system produces a spatial ordering of users that is highly correlated with their Left-Right positions (Pearson rho=0.887, p-value < 0.0001), and that cannot be explained by socio-demographic attributes. These results open new possibilities for studying the interaction between human and AI systems. They also raise important questions linked to the legal definition of algorithmic profiling in data privacy regulation by blurring the line between active and passive profiling. We explore new constrained recommendation methods enabled by our results, limiting the political information in the recommender as a potential tool for privacy compliance capable of preserving recommendation relevance.

【2】Gender Dynamics and Homophily in a Social Network of LLM Agents
- **标题**: LLM代理人社交网络中的性别动态和同质性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02606
> **作者**: Faezeh Fadaei,Jenny Carla Moran,Taha Yasseri
> **摘要**: 生成式人工智能和大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地部署在交互环境中，但我们对它们在大规模网络中交互时的身份性能如何发展知之甚少。我们通过研究 Chirper.ai 来解决这个问题，Chirper.ai 是一个类似于 X 的社交媒体平台，但完全由自主人工智能聊天机器人组成。我们的数据集包含超过 70,000 个代理、大约 1.4 亿条帖子以及一年来不断发展的关注网络。根据代理的文本生成，我们每周为每个代理分配性别分数。结果表明，每个代理人的性别表现是流动的而不是固定的。尽管存在这种流动性，但该网络显示出强烈的基于性别的同质性，因为代理始终遵循表现相似性别的其他人。最后，我们研究这些同质联系是否源于社会选择，即代理人选择关注相似的账户，或者来自社会影响，即随着时间的推移，代理人与他们的追随者变得更加相似。与人类社交网络一致，我们发现证据表明这两种机制塑造了法学硕士之间互动的结构和演变。我们的研究结果表明，即使在没有身体的情况下，性别表现的文化引导也会导致基于性别的分类。这对于法学硕士在合成混合群体、社会模拟和决策支持中的应用具有重要意义。
> **Abstract**: Generative artificial intelligence and large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in interactive settings, yet we know little about how their identity performance develops when they interact within large-scale networks. We address this by examining Chirper.ai, a social media platform similar to X but composed entirely of autonomous AI chatbots. Our dataset comprises over 70,000 agents, approximately 140 million posts, and the evolving followership network over one year. Based on agents' text production, we assign weekly gender scores to each agent. Results suggest that each agent's gender performance is fluid rather than fixed. Despite this fluidity, the network displays strong gender-based homophily, as agents consistently follow others performing gender similarly. Finally, we investigate whether these homophilic connections arise from social selection, in which agents choose to follow similar accounts, or from social influence, in which agents become more similar to their followees over time. Consistent with human social networks, we find evidence that both mechanisms shape the structure and evolution of interactions among LLMs. Our findings suggest that, even in the absence of bodies, cultural entraining of gender performance leads to gender-based sorting. This has important implications for LLM applications in synthetic hybrid populations, social simulations, and decision support.

【3】CaST: Causal Discovery via Spatio-Temporal Graphs in Disaster Tweets
- **标题**: CaST：通过灾难推文中的时空图发现因果关系
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02601
> **作者**: Hieu Duong,Eugene Levin,Todd Gary,Long Nguyen
> **摘要**: 了解社交媒体中现实世界事件之间的因果关系对于态势感知至关重要，但现有的因果发现方法常常忽视语义、空间和时间背景之间的相互作用。我们提出了 CaST：通过时空图进行因果发现，这是一个在灾难领域进行因果发现的统一框架，它使用在灾难数据集上预训练的大型语言模型（LLM）集成了语义相似性和时空邻近性。 CaST 为每个推文窗口构建一个事件图。从推文中提取的每个事件都表示为一个节点嵌入，该节点嵌入丰富了其上下文语义、地理坐标和时间特征。然后将这些事件节点连接起来形成时空事件图，使用多头图注意网络（GAT）\cite{gat}对其进行处理以学习有向因果关系。我们构建了一个内部数据集，其中包含在飓风哈维期间收集的大约 167K 条与灾难相关的推文，并按照 MAVEN-ERE 模式进行注释。实验结果表明，CaST 的性能优于传统方法和最先进的方法。消融研究进一步证实，结合空间和时间信号可以大大提高训练过程中的召回率和稳定性。总体而言，CaST 表明，将时空推理集成到事件图中可以在与灾难相关的社交媒体文本中实现更强大和可解释的因果发现。
> **Abstract**: Understanding causality between real-world events from social media is essential for situational awareness, yet existing causal discovery methods often overlook the interplay between semantic, spatial, and temporal contexts. We propose CaST: Causal Discovery via Spatio-Temporal Graphs, a unified framework for causal discovery in disaster domain that integrates semantic similarity and spatio-temporal proximity using Large Language Models (LLMs) pretrained on disaster datasets. CaST constructs an event graph for each window of tweets. Each event extracted from tweets is represented as a node embedding enriched with its contextual semantics, geographic coordinates, and temporal features. These event nodes are then connected to form a spatio-temporal event graph, which is processed using a multi-head Graph Attention Network (GAT) \cite{gat} to learn directed causal relationships. We construct an in-house dataset of approximately 167K disaster-related tweets collected during Hurricane Harvey and annotated following the MAVEN-ERE schema. Experimental results show that CaST achieves superior performance over both traditional and state-of-the-art methods. Ablation studies further confirm that incorporating spatial and temporal signals substantially improves both recall and stability during training. Overall, CaST demonstrates that integrating spatio-temporal reasoning into event graphs enables more robust and interpretable causal discovery in disaster-related social media text.

【4】Community Norms in the Spotlight: Enabling Task-Agnostic Unsupervised Pre-Training to Benefit Online Social Media
- **标题**: 聚光灯下的社区规范：启用与任务无关的无监督预训练以使在线社交媒体受益
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02525
> **作者**: Liam Hebert,Lucas Kopp,Robin Cohen
> **摘要**: 对在线社交平台的复杂动态进行建模对于解决仇恨言论和错误信息等挑战至关重要。虽然将对话建模为图形结构的讨论变压器已成为一种有前景的架构，但其潜力受到对高质量、人工标记数据集的依赖的严重限制。在本文中，我们主张从针对特定任务的微调到无监督预训练的范式转变，其基础是对社区规范的全新考虑。我们认为该框架不仅可以缓解数据稀缺性，还可以解释此类人工智能系统决策背后的社会规范。最终，我们相信这个方向为人工智能造福社会提供了许多机会。
> **Abstract**: Modelling the complex dynamics of online social platforms is critical for addressing challenges such as hate speech and misinformation. While Discussion Transformers, which model conversations as graph structures, have emerged as a promising architecture, their potential is severely constrained by reliance on high-quality, human-labelled datasets. In this paper, we advocate a paradigm shift from task-specific fine-tuning to unsupervised pretraining, grounded in an entirely novel consideration of community norms. We posit that this framework not only mitigates data scarcity but also enables interpretation of the social norms underlying the decisions made by such an AI system. Ultimately, we believe that this direction offers many opportunities for AI for Social Good.

【5】GASTON: Graph-Aware Social Transformer for Online Networks
- **标题**: GASTON：在线网络的图形感知社交转换器
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02524
> **作者**: Olha Wloch,Liam Hebert,Robin Cohen,Lukasz Golab
> **摘要**: 在线社区已成为社交和支持的重要场所，但它们也具有毒性、回声室和错误信息。检测这种有害内容很困难，因为在线交互的含义源于所写内容（文本内容）和发布位置（社会规范）。我们提出了 GASTON（在线网络图感知社交变压器），它学习基于本地规范的文本和用户嵌入，为下游任务提供必要的上下文。我们解决方案的核心是对比初始化策略，该策略根据用户成员资格模式预训练社区嵌入，在处理任何文本之前捕获社区的用户群。这使得 GASTON 能够根据谁在那里互动来区分社区（例如，支持团体与仇恨团体），即使他们共享相似的词汇。对压力检测、毒性评分和规范违规等任务的实验表明，GASTON 生成的嵌入优于最先进的基线。
> **Abstract**: Online communities have become essential places for socialization and support, yet they also possess toxicity, echo chambers, and misinformation. Detecting this harmful content is difficult because the meaning of an online interaction stems from both what is written (textual content) and where it is posted (social norms). We propose GASTON (Graph-Aware Social Transformer for Online Networks), which learns text and user embeddings that are grounded in their local norms, providing the necessary context for downstream tasks. The heart of our solution is a contrastive initialization strategy that pretrains community embeddings based on user membership patterns, capturing a community's user base before processing any text. This allows GASTON to distinguish between communities (e.g., a support group vs. a hate group) based on who interacts there, even if they share similar vocabulary. Experiments on tasks such as stress detection, toxicity scoring, and norm violation demonstrate that the embeddings produced by GASTON outperform state-of-the-art baselines.

【6】Efficient Edge Rewiring Strategies for Enhancing PageRank Fairness
- **标题**: 提高 PageRank 公平性的有效边缘重新布线策略
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02512
> **作者**: Changan Liu,Haoxin Sun,Ahad N. Zehmakan,Zhongzhi Zhang
> **摘要**: 我们研究社交网络中不公平​​的概念，其中男性主导行业中的女性等群体在获取重要信息（例如，社交网络）方面处于不利地位。职位发布，因为他们在网络中的职位不太有利。我们研究了一种完善的基于网络的公平性表述，称为 PageRank 公平性，它指的是不同组之间 PageRank 权重的公平分配。我们的目标是通过修改底层网络结构来增强PageRank的公平性。更准确地说，当我们被允许重新连接网络中固定数量的边时，我们研究了最大化 PageRank 对于弱势群体的公平性的问题。基于贪婪方法，我们利用有根跨越森林的快速采样技术来为该问题设计有效的线性时间算法。为了评估我们提出的算法的准确性和性能，我们对各种现实世界的网络数据进行了大量的实验。我们的实验表明，所提出的算法明显优于现有算法。我们的算法能够在短短几分钟内为数百万个节点的网络生成准确的解决方案。
> **Abstract**: We study the notion of unfairness in social networks, where a group such as females in a male-dominated industry are disadvantaged in access to important information, e.g. job posts, due to their less favorable positions in the network. We investigate a well-established network-based formulation of fairness called PageRank fairness, which refers to a fair allocation of the PageRank weights among distinct groups. Our goal is to enhance the PageRank fairness by modifying the underlying network structure. More precisely, we study the problem of maximizing PageRank fairness with respect to a disadvantaged group, when we are permitted to rewire a fixed number of edges in the network. Building on a greedy approach, we leverage techniques from fast sampling of rooted spanning forests to devise an effective linear-time algorithm for this problem. To evaluate the accuracy and performance of our proposed algorithm, we conduct a large set of experiments on various real-world network data. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm significantly outperforms the existing ones. Our algorithm is capable of generating accurate solutions for networks of million nodes in just a few minutes.

【7】DREAMS: A Social Exchange Theory-Informed Modeling of Misinformation Engagement on Social Media
- **标题**: 梦想：社交媒体上错误信息参与的基于社会交换理论的建模
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01567
> **作者**: Lin Tian,Marian-Andrei Rizoiu
> **摘要**: 社交媒体参与度预测是计算社会科学的一个核心挑战，特别是在理解用户如何与错误信息互动方面。现有的方法通常将参与度视为同质的时间序列信号，而忽视了影响错误信息传播方式的异构社会机制和平台设计。在这项工作中，我们问：“神经架构能否仅从行为数据中发现社交交换原则？”我们引入了 \textsc{Dreams} （\underline{D}isentangled \underline{R} 表示和 \underline{E}pisodic \underline{A}daptive \underline{M}用于 \underline{S}社交媒体错误信息参与的建模），这是一种社会交换理论指导的框架，它将错误信息参与建模为社会交换的动态过程。 \textsc{Dreams} 没有将参与度视为静态结果，而是将其建模为序列到序列的适应问题，其中每个动作都反映了用户努力和受平台环境限制的社交奖励之间不断变化的协商。它集成了自适应机制，以了解情感和情境信号如何随时间和跨平台传播。在涵盖 7 美元平台和 2021 年至 2025 年间收集的 237 万条帖子的跨平台数据集上，\textsc{Dreams} 在预测错误信息参与方面实现了最先进的性能，平均绝对百分比误差为 19.25$\%。这比最强基线提高了 43.6$\%。除了预测收益之外，该模型还揭示了与社会交换原则相一致的一致的跨平台模式，这表明整合行为理论可以增强在线错误信息参与的实证模型。源代码位于：https://github.com/ltian678/DREAMS。
> **Abstract**: Social media engagement prediction is a central challenge in computational social science, particularly for understanding how users interact with misinformation. Existing approaches often treat engagement as a homogeneous time-series signal, overlooking the heterogeneous social mechanisms and platform designs that shape how misinformation spreads. In this work, we ask: ``Can neural architectures discover social exchange principles from behavioral data alone?'' We introduce \textsc{Dreams} (\underline{D}isentangled \underline{R}epresentations and \underline{E}pisodic \underline{A}daptive \underline{M}odeling for \underline{S}ocial media misinformation engagements), a social exchange theory-guided framework that models misinformation engagement as a dynamic process of social exchange. Rather than treating engagement as a static outcome, \textsc{Dreams} models it as a sequence-to-sequence adaptation problem, where each action reflects an evolving negotiation between user effort and social reward conditioned by platform context. It integrates adaptive mechanisms to learn how emotional and contextual signals propagate through time and across platforms. On a cross-platform dataset spanning $7$ platforms and 2.37M posts collected between 2021 and 2025, \textsc{Dreams} achieves state-of-the-art performance in predicting misinformation engagements, reaching a mean absolute percentage error of $19.25$\%. This is a $43.6$\% improvement over the strongest baseline. Beyond predictive gains, the model reveals consistent cross-platform patterns that align with social exchange principles, suggesting that integrating behavioral theory can enhance empirical modeling of online misinformation engagement. The source code is available at: https://github.com/ltian678/DREAMS.

【8】Profit Maximization in Closed Social Networks
- **标题**: 封闭社交网络中的利润最大化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01232
> **作者**: Poonam Sharma,Suman Banerjee
> **摘要**: 信息、创新和思想的传播是社交网络中的一个重要现象。信息通过网络传播并从一个人传到另一个人。在许多设置中，限制扩散是有意义的，以便每个节点只能将信息传播到其有限数量的邻居而不是所有邻居。这样的社交网络被称为封闭社交网络。近年来，社交媒体平台已成为商业实体的有效媒介，其目标是利润最大化。在本文中，我们研究了病毒式营销背景下封闭社交网络（PMCSN）中的利润最大化问题。问题的输入是一个封闭的社交网络和两个正整数$\ell$和$B$。该问题要求在给定的预算$B$内选择种子节点；在扩散过程中，限制每个节点最多选择$\ell$个出站链路进行信息扩散；目标是使种子组赚取的利润最大化。 PMCSN 问题概括了影响最大化问题，该问题是 NP 困难的。我们提出了 PMCSN 的两种解决方法：基于采样的近似解决方案和基于边际增益的启发式解决方案。我们分析了所提出方法的样本复杂性、运行时间和空间要求。我们对现实世界中公开的社交网络数据集进行实验。结果表明，我们的方法选择的种子集和扩散链接比基线方法产生更高的利润。实现和数据可在 \texttt{https://github.com/PoonamSharma-PY/ClosedNetwork} 获取。
> **Abstract**: Diffusion of information, innovation, and ideas is an important phenomenon in social networks. Information propagates through the network and reaches from one person to the next. In many settings, it is meaningful to restrict diffusion so that each node can spread information to only a limited number of its neighbors rather than to all of them. Such social networks are called closed social networks. In recent years, social media platforms have emerged as an effective medium for commercial entities, where the objective is to maximize profit. In this paper, we study the Profit Maximization in Closed Social Networks (PMCSN) problem in the context of viral marketing. The input to the problem is a closed social network and two positive integers $\ell$ and $B$. The problem asks to select seed nodes within a given budget $B$; during the diffusion process, each node is restricted to choose at most $\ell$ outgoing links for information diffusion; and the objective is to maximize the profit earned by the seed set. The PMCSN problem generalizes the Influence Maximization problem, which is NP-hard. We propose two solution approaches for PMCSN: a sampling-based approximate solution and a marginal-gain-based heuristic solution. We analyze the sample complexity, running time, and space requirements of the proposed approaches. We conduct experiments on real-world, publicly available social network datasets. The results show that the seed sets and diffusion links chosen by our methods yield higher profit than baseline methods. The implementation and data are available at \texttt{https://github.com/PoonamSharma-PY/ClosedNetwork}.

## 计量经济学(econ.EM:Econometrics)

【1】AI Assisted Economics Measurement From Survey: Evidence from Public Employee Pension Choice
- **标题**: 人工智能辅助经济调查测量：公共雇员养老金选择的证据
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02604
> **作者**: Tiancheng Wang,Krishna Sharma
> **摘要**: 我们开发了一个经济衡量的迭代框架，利用大型语言模型直接从调查工具中提取衡量结构。该方法通过我们所说的软映射将调查项目映射到潜在结构上的稀疏分布，将统一的响应聚合到受访者级别的子维度分数中，并通过样本外增量有效性测试和判别性有效性诊断来规范所得的分类。该框架明确地将迭代集成到测量构建过程中。重叠和冗余诊断触发有针对性的分类细化和受限重新映射，确保只有在提供稳定的样本外性能增益时才能保留增加的测量灵活性。该框架应用于大规模公共雇员退休计划调查，确定了哪些语义成分包含行为信号，并阐明了对退休选择至关重要的经济机制，例如信念与约束。该方法提供了对调查工具的便携式测量审核，可以指导实证分析和调查设计。
> **Abstract**: We develop an iterative framework for economic measurement that leverages large language models to extract measurement structure directly from survey instruments. The approach maps survey items to a sparse distribution over latent constructs through what we term a soft mapping, aggregates harmonized responses into respondent level sub dimension scores, and disciplines the resulting taxonomy through out of sample incremental validity tests and discriminant validity diagnostics. The framework explicitly integrates iteration into the measurement construction process. Overlap and redundancy diagnostics trigger targeted taxonomy refinement and constrained remapping, ensuring that added measurement flexibility is retained only when it delivers stable out of sample performance gains. Applied to a large scale public employee retirement plan survey, the framework identifies which semantic components contain behavioral signal and clarifies the economic mechanisms, such as beliefs versus constraints, that matter for retirement choices. The methodology provides a portable measurement audit of survey instruments that can guide both empirical analysis and survey design.

## 普通经济学(econ.GN:General Economics)

【1】The Strategic Foresight of LLMs: Evidence from a Fully Prospective Venture Tournament
- **标题**: 法学硕士的战略远见：来自完全前瞻性风险锦标赛的证据
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01684
> **作者**: Felipe A. Csaszar,Aticus Peterson,Daniel Wilde
> **摘要**: 人工智能能否在战略远见方面超越人类——即在不确定的、高风险的结果发生之前对其做出准确判断的能力？我们通过使用现场 Kickstarter 众筹项目的完全前瞻性预测锦标赛来解决这个问题。所有研究模型的训练截止后成立的 30 家美国科技企业在融资仍在进行中且结果未知的情况下进行了评估。一套多样化的前沿和开放权重大型语言模型 (LLM) 完成了 870 次配对比较，生成了预测筹款成功的完整排名。我们将这些预测与通过 Prolific 招募的 346 名经验丰富的经理以及在受监控条件下工作的三名受过 MBA 培训的投资者进行了比较。结果令人震惊：人类评估者与实际结果的排名相关性在 0.04 到 0.45 之间，而一些前沿法学硕士的排名相关性超过了 0.60，其中最好的（Gemini 2.5 Pro）达到了 0.74——每五个风险投资对中几乎有四个正确排序。这些差异在多个性能指标和稳健性检查中仍然存在。集体智慧和人类与人工智能混合团队的表现都无法超越最好的独立模型。
> **Abstract**: Can artificial intelligence outperform humans at strategic foresight -- the capacity to form accurate judgments about uncertain, high-stakes outcomes before they unfold? We address this question through a fully prospective prediction tournament using live Kickstarter crowdfunding projects. Thirty U.S.-based technology ventures, launched after the training cutoffs of all models studied, were evaluated while fundraising remained in progress and outcomes were unknown. A diverse suite of frontier and open-weight large language models (LLMs) completed 870 pairwise comparisons, producing complete rankings of predicted fundraising success. We benchmarked these forecasts against 346 experienced managers recruited via Prolific and three MBA-trained investors working under monitored conditions. The results are striking: human evaluators achieved rank correlations with actual outcomes between 0.04 and 0.45, while several frontier LLMs exceeded 0.60, with the best (Gemini 2.5 Pro) reaching 0.74 -- correctly ordering nearly four of every five venture pairs. These differences persist across multiple performance metrics and robustness checks. Neither wisdom-of-the-crowd ensembles nor human-AI hybrid teams outperformed the best standalone model.

【2】Calibrating Behavioral Parameters with Large Language Models
- **标题**: 使用大型语言模型校准行为参数
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01022
> **作者**: Brandon Yee,Krishna Sharma
> **摘要**: 损失厌恶、羊群效应和外推等行为参数是资产定价模型的核心，但仍然难以可靠测量。我们开发了一个框架，将大型语言模型（LLM）视为行为参数的校准测量工具。使用四个模型和 24{,}000 个代理场景对，我们记录了基线 LLM 行为中的系统理性偏差，包括减弱的损失厌恶、弱羊群效应以及相对于人类基准的接近零的处置效应。基于轮廓的校准会导致多个参数产生大的、稳定的、理论上一致的变化，校准后的损失厌恶、羊群效应、外推法和锚定达到或超过基准幅度。为了评估外部有效性，我们将校准参数嵌入到基于代理的资产定价模型中，其中校准外推产生与经验证据一致的短期动量和长期反转模式。我们的结果为八种典型行为偏差建立了测量范围、校准函数和明确的界限。
> **Abstract**: Behavioral parameters such as loss aversion, herding, and extrapolation are central to asset pricing models but remain difficult to measure reliably. We develop a framework that treats large language models (LLMs) as calibrated measurement instruments for behavioral parameters. Using four models and 24{,}000 agent--scenario pairs, we document systematic rationality bias in baseline LLM behavior, including attenuated loss aversion, weak herding, and near-zero disposition effects relative to human benchmarks. Profile-based calibration induces large, stable, and theoretically coherent shifts in several parameters, with calibrated loss aversion, herding, extrapolation, and anchoring reaching or exceeding benchmark magnitudes. To assess external validity, we embed calibrated parameters in an agent-based asset pricing model, where calibrated extrapolation generates short-horizon momentum and long-horizon reversal patterns consistent with empirical evidence. Our results establish measurement ranges, calibration functions, and explicit boundaries for eight canonical behavioral biases.

## 音频和语音处理(eess.AS:Audio and Speech Processing)

【1】Mići Princ -- A Little Boy Teaching Speech Technologies the Chakavian Dialect
- **标题**: Mići Princ——一个用查卡维亚方言教授语音技术的小男孩
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03245
> **作者**: Nikola Ljubešić,Peter Rupnik,Tea Perinčić
> **摘要**: 本文记录了我们发布著名小说《小王子》查卡维亚方言翻译的印刷版和有声读物的努力，作为计算机可读、人工智能就绪的数据集，两个版本的文本和音频组件现在在每个书面和口头单词的级别上保持一致。我们开发此版本的动机是多方面的。第一个是我们希望保留除印刷版和有声读物之外的非常有价值和具体的内容。随着数据集在 CLARIN.SI 存储库中发布，从现在开始，任何感兴趣的个人都可以轻松获取该内容。第二个动机是使数据可用于各种人工智能相关的使用场景，例如我们在本文中已经介绍的场景 - 将 Whisper-large-v3 开放式自动语音识别模型（在标准克罗地亚语上具有良好的性能）改编为 Chakavian 方言语音。我们可以高兴地报告，通过调整模型，所选测试数据的单词错误率已降低到一半，同时我们成功消除了多达三分之二的字符级别错误。除了我们已经进行的一组实验之外，我们还设想该数据集的更多用途，包括人工智能研究和应用以及方言研究的任务。此次发布的第三个动机是我们希望这个高度结构化的数据集能够转化为这项工作的数字在线版本，让研究和技术社区之外的个人能够欣赏沙漠中小男孩通过查卡维亚方言的壮观棱镜所传达的信息之美。
> **Abstract**: This paper documents our efforts in releasing the printed and audio book of the translation of the famous novel The Little Prince into the Chakavian dialect, as a computer-readable, AI-ready dataset, with the textual and the audio components of the two releases now aligned on the level of each written and spoken word. Our motivation for working on this release is multiple. The first one is our wish to preserve the highly valuable and specific content beyond the small editions of the printed and the audio book. With the dataset published in the CLARIN.SI repository, this content is from now on at the fingertips of any interested individual. The second motivation is to make the data available for various artificial-intelligence-related usage scenarios, such as the one we follow upon inside this paper already -- adapting the Whisper-large-v3 open automatic speech recognition model, with decent performance on standard Croatian, to Chakavian dialectal speech. We can happily report that with adapting the model, the word error rate on the selected test data has being reduced to a half, while we managed to remove up to two thirds of the error on character level. We envision many more usages of this dataset beyond the set of experiments we have already performed, both on tasks of artificial intelligence research and application, as well as dialectal research. The third motivation for this release is our hope that this, now highly structured dataset, will be transformed into a digital online edition of this work, allowing individuals beyond the research and technology communities to enjoy the beauty of the message of the little boy in the desert, told through the spectacular prism of the Chakavian dialect.

【2】WST-X Series: Wavelet Scattering Transform for Interpretable Speech Deepfake Detection
- **标题**: WST-X 系列：用于可解释语音深度伪造检测的小波散射变换
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02980
> **作者**: Xi Xuan,Davide Carbone,Ruchi Pandey,Wenxin Zhang,Tomi H. Kinnunen
> **摘要**: 语音深度伪造检测器的前端设计主要关注两类。手工制作的滤波器组特征是透明的，但在捕获高级语义细节方面受到限制，与自监督（SSL）特征相比，通常会导致性能差距。反过来，SSL 特征缺乏可解释性，并且可能会忽略细粒度的光谱异常。我们提出了 WST-X 系列，这是一个新颖的特征提取器系列，它通过小波散射变换 (WST) 结合了两全其美，将小波与类似于深度卷积网络的非线性集成在一起。我们研究一维和二维 WST 来分别提取声学细节和高阶结构异常。最近具有挑战性的 Deepfake-Eval-2024 数据集的实验结果表明，WST-X 的性能大幅优于现有前端。我们的分析表明，较小的平均尺度 ($J$) 与高频和方向分辨率 ($Q、L$) 相结合对于捕捉细微的伪影至关重要。这强调了平移不变和变形稳定特征对于鲁棒且可解释的语音深度伪造检测的价值。
> **Abstract**: Designing front-ends for speech deepfake detectors primarily focuses on two categories. Hand-crafted filterbank features are transparent but are limited in capturing high-level semantic details, often resulting in performance gaps compared to self-supervised (SSL) features. SSL features, in turn, lack interpretability and may overlook fine-grained spectral anomalies. We propose the WST-X series, a novel family of feature extractors that combines the best of both worlds via the wavelet scattering transform (WST), integrating wavelets with nonlinearities analogous to deep convolutional networks. We investigate 1D and 2D WSTs to extract acoustic details and higher-order structural anomalies, respectively. Experimental results on the recent and challenging Deepfake-Eval-2024 dataset indicate that WST-X outperforms existing front-ends by a wide margin. Our analysis reveals that a small averaging scale ($J$), combined with high-frequency and directional resolutions ($Q, L$), is critical for capturing subtle artifacts. This underscores the value of translation-invariant and deformation-stable features for robust and interpretable speech deepfake detection.

【3】WAXAL: A Large-Scale Multilingual African Language Speech Corpus
- **标题**: WAXAL：大规模多语言非洲语言语音语料库
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02734
> **作者**: Abdoulaye Diack,Perry Nelson,Kwaku Agbesi,Angela Nakalembe,MohamedElfatih MohamedKhair,Vusumuzi Dube,Tavonga Siyavora,Subhashini Venugopalan,Jason Hickey,Uche Okonkwo,Abhishek Bapna,Isaac Wiafe,Raynard Dodzi Helegah,Elikem Doe Atsakpo,Charles Nutrokpor,Fiifi Baffoe Payin Winful,Kafui Kwashie Solaga,Jamal-Deen Abdulai,Akon Obu Ekpezu,Audace Niyonkuru,Samuel Rutunda,Boris Ishimwe,Michael Melese,Engineer Bainomugisha,Joyce Nakatumba-Nabende, et al. (18 additional authors not shown)
> **摘要**: 语音技术的进步主要有利于高资源语言，为大多数撒哈拉以南非洲语言的使用者造成了巨大的数字鸿沟。为了解决这一差距，我们引入了 WAXAL，这是一个大规模、可公开访问的语音数据集，包含代表超过 1 亿使用者的 21 种语言。该集合由两个主要部分组成：自动语音识别 (ASR) 数据集，其中包含来自不同说话者的大约 1,250 小时的转录自然语音，以及文本转语音 (TTS) 数据集，其中包含超过 180 小时的高质量、单说话人读取语音平衡脚本的录音。本文详细介绍了我们的数据收集、注释和质量控制方法，其中涉及与四个非洲学术和社区组织的合作。我们提供了数据集的详细统计概述，并讨论了其潜在的局限性和道德考虑。 WAXAL 数据集在 CC-BY-4.0 许可下在 https://huggingface.co/datasets/google/WaxalNLP 上发布，以促进研究、促进包容性技术的开发，并作为这些语言的数字保存的重要资源。
> **Abstract**: The advancement of speech technology has predominantly favored high-resource languages, creating a significant digital divide for speakers of most Sub-Saharan African languages. To address this gap, we introduce WAXAL, a large-scale, openly accessible speech dataset for 21 languages representing over 100 million speakers. The collection consists of two main components: an Automated Speech Recognition (ASR) dataset containing approximately 1,250 hours of transcribed, natural speech from a diverse range of speakers, and a Text-to-Speech (TTS) dataset with over 180 hours of high-quality, single-speaker recordings reading phonetically balanced scripts. This paper details our methodology for data collection, annotation, and quality control, which involved partnerships with four African academic and community organizations. We provide a detailed statistical overview of the dataset and discuss its potential limitations and ethical considerations. The WAXAL datasets are released at https://huggingface.co/datasets/google/WaxalNLP under the permissive CC-BY-4.0 license to catalyze research, enable the development of inclusive technologies, and serve as a vital resource for the digital preservation of these languages.

【4】RIR-Former: Coordinate-Guided Transformer for Continuous Reconstruction of Room Impulse Responses
- **标题**: RIR-Former：用于连续重建房间脉冲响应的坐标引导变压器
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01861
> **作者**: Shaoheng Xu,Chunyi Sun,Jihui Zhang,Prasanga N. Samarasinghe,Thushara D. Abhayapala
> **摘要**: 房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 对于许多声学信号处理任务至关重要，但跨空间密集测量它们通常是不切实际的。在这项工作中，我们提出了 RIR-Former，一种用于 RIR 重建的无网格、单步前馈模型。通过将正弦编码模块引入变压器骨干中，我们的方法有效地结合了麦克风位置信息，从而能够在任意阵列位置进行插值。此外，分段多分支解码器旨在单独处理早期反射和后期混响，从而改善整个 RIR 的重建。对各种模拟声学环境的实验表明，在不同的丢失率和阵列配置下，RIR-Former 在归一化均方误差 (NMSE) 和余弦距离 (CD) 方面始终优于最先进的基线。这些结果凸显了我们的方法在实际部署中的潜力，并激发了未来从随机间隔的线​​性阵列扩展到复杂的阵列几何形状、动态声学场景和现实环境的工作。
> **Abstract**: Room impulse responses (RIRs) are essential for many acoustic signal processing tasks, yet measuring them densely across space is often impractical. In this work, we propose RIR-Former, a grid-free, one-step feed-forward model for RIR reconstruction. By introducing a sinusoidal encoding module into a transformer backbone, our method effectively incorporates microphone position information, enabling interpolation at arbitrary array locations. Furthermore, a segmented multi-branch decoder is designed to separately handle early reflections and late reverberation, improving reconstruction across the entire RIR. Experiments on diverse simulated acoustic environments demonstrate that RIR-Former consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in terms of normalized mean square error (NMSE) and cosine distance (CD), under varying missing rates and array configurations. These results highlight the potential of our approach for practical deployment and motivate future work on scaling from randomly spaced linear arrays to complex array geometries, dynamic acoustic scenes, and real-world environments.

【5】HuPER: A Human-Inspired Framework for Phonetic Perception
- **标题**: HuPER：受人类启发的语音感知框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01634
> **作者**: Chenxu Guo,Jiachen Lian,Yisi Liu,Baihe Huang,Shriyaa Narayanan,Cheol Jun Cho,Gopala Anumanchipalli
> **摘要**: 我们提出了 HuPER，一个受人类启发的框架，它将语音感知建模为对声学语音证据和语言知识的自适应推理。仅用 100 小时的训练数据，HuPER 在 5 个英语基准测试中就实现了最先进的语音错误率，并对 95 种未见过的语言进行了强大的零样本迁移。 HuPER 也是第一个在不同声学条件下实现自适应、多路径语音感知的框架。所有训练数据、模型和代码都是开源的。代码和演示可在 https://github.com/HuPER29/HuPER 获取。
> **Abstract**: We propose HuPER, a human-inspired framework that models phonetic perception as adaptive inference over acoustic-phonetics evidence and linguistic knowledge. With only 100 hours of training data, HuPER achieves state-of-the-art phonetic error rates on five English benchmarks and strong zero-shot transfer to 95 unseen languages. HuPER is also the first framework to enable adaptive, multi-path phonetic perception under diverse acoustic conditions. All training data, models, and code are open-sourced. Code and demo avaliable at https://github.com/HuPER29/HuPER.

【6】SSNAPS: Audio-Visual Separation of Speech and Background Noise with Diffusion Inverse Sampling
- **标题**: SSNAPS：通过扩散逆采样实现语音和背景噪声的视听分离
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01394
> **作者**: Yochai Yemini,Yoav Ellinson,Rami Ben-Ari,Sharon Gannot,Ethan Fetaya
> **摘要**: This paper addresses the challenge of audio-visual single-microphone speech separation and enhancement in the presence of real-world environmental noise.我们的方法基于生成逆采样，我们使用专用的扩散先验对干净的语音和环境噪声进行建模，并联合利用它们来恢复所有潜在的源。为了实现这一目标，我们重新制定了最近的逆采样器以匹配我们的设置。我们对 1、2 和 3 个带有噪声的说话者的混合进行评估，结果表明，尽管完全不受监督，我们的方法在所有条件下的 \ac{WER} 中始终优于领先的监督基线。我们进一步扩展我们的框架来处理屏幕外扬声器分离。此外，分离的噪声分量的高保真度使其适合下游声学场景检测。演示页面：https://ssnapsicml.github.io/ssnapsicml2026/
> **Abstract**: This paper addresses the challenge of audio-visual single-microphone speech separation and enhancement in the presence of real-world environmental noise. Our approach is based on generative inverse sampling, where we model clean speech and ambient noise with dedicated diffusion priors and jointly leverage them to recover all underlying sources. To achieve this, we reformulate a recent inverse sampler to match our setting. We evaluate on mixtures of 1, 2, and 3 speakers with noise and show that, despite being entirely unsupervised, our method consistently outperforms leading supervised baselines in \ac{WER} across all conditions. We further extend our framework to handle off-screen speaker separation. Moreover, the high fidelity of the separated noise component makes it suitable for downstream acoustic scene detection. Demo page: https://ssnapsicml.github.io/ssnapsicml2026/

【7】Adapting Where It Matters: Depth-Aware Adaptation for Efficient Multilingual Speech Recognition in Low-Resource Languages
- **标题**: 在重要的地方进行调整：深度感知适应，以实现低资源语言中的高效多语言语音识别
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01008
> **作者**: Yang Xiao,Eun-Jung Holden,Ting Dang
> **摘要**: 最近的语音基础模型在高资源语言的多语言自动语音识别（ASR）方面表现出色，但由于数据稀缺和效率限制，使其适应低资源语言仍然具有挑战性。全模型微调的计算成本很高，并且容易出现过度拟合，而像 LoRA 这样的参数高效方法会跨层统一应用自适应，忽略内部表示，从而影响有效性和效率。我们分析多语言 ASR 模型并揭示了 U 形适应性模式：早期层和后期层是特定于语言的，需要更多的适应性，而中间层保留共享语义，需要的适应性更少。基于这一观察，我们提出了 DAMA，一种深度感知模型适应框架，可根据每一层的角色分配适应能力。 DAMA also introduces Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)-based initialization to constrain adaptation and preserve the U-shaped pattern, as well as a frozen middle-layer basis for further efficiency.通过对两个基准数据集的 18 种低资源语言进行评估，DAMA 达到或超过了最先进的精度，可训练参数减少了 80%，在极端数据稀缺的情况下实现了 29% 的错误减少，并且与基线相比显着提高了内存、训练时间和计算效率。这些结果凸显了结构感知适应对于高效、可扩展的多语言 ASR 的好处。
> **Abstract**: Recent speech foundation models excel at multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR) for high-resource languages, but adapting them to low-resource languages remains challenging due to data scarcity and efficiency constraints. Full-model fine-tuning is computationally expensive and prone to overfitting, while parameter-efficient methods like LoRA apply adaptation uniformly across layers, overlooking internal representations thus compromising effectiveness and efficiency. We analyze multilingual ASR models and reveal a U-shaped adaptability pattern: early and late layers are language-specific and require more adaptation, while intermediate layers retain shared semantics and need less. Building on this observation, we propose DAMA, a Depth-Aware Model Adaptation framework that allocates adaptation capacity according to each layer's role. DAMA also introduces Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)-based initialization to constrain adaptation and preserve the U-shaped pattern, as well as a frozen middle-layer basis for further efficiency. Evaluated on 18 low-resource languages across two benchmark datasets, DAMA matches or surpasses state-of-the-art accuracy with 80% fewer trainable parameters, achieves a 29% error reduction under extreme data scarcity, and significantly improves memory, training time, and computational efficiency over baselines. These results highlight the benefits of structure-aware adaptation for efficient, scalable multilingual ASR.

## 图像和视频处理(eess.IV:Image and Video Processing)

【1】Real-time topology-aware M-mode OCT segmentation for robotic deep anterior lamellar keratoplasty (DALK) guidance
- **标题**: 用于机器人深前板层角膜移植术 (DALK) 指导的实时拓扑感知 M 模式 OCT 分割
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02798
> **作者**: Rosalinda Xiong,Jinglun Yu,Yaning Wang,Ziyi Huang,Jin U. Kang
> **摘要**: 机器人深前板层角膜移植术 (DALK) 需要准确的实时深度反馈，以接近后弹力层 (DM) 而不会穿孔。 M 模式术中光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 提供高时间分辨率深度轨迹，但散斑噪声、衰减和仪器引起的阴影通常会导致不连续或模糊的层界面，从而在部署帧速率下挑战解剖学上一致的分割。我们提出了一种基于 UNeXt 的轻量级拓扑感知 M 模式分割管道，它结合了解剖拓扑正则化，以在低信噪比条件下稳定边界连续性和层排序。所提出的系统在单个 GPU 上的完整预处理推理叠加管道上测得的端到端吞吐量超过 80 Hz，展示了超越仅模型计时的实用实时指导。此操作余量提供了时间余量来拒绝低质量或丢失帧，同时保持稳定的有效深度更新率。使用已建立的基线协议​​对标准兔眼 M 模式数据集进行的评估表明，与拓扑无关的控制相比，定性边界稳定性得到了改善，同时保留了可部署的实时性能。
> **Abstract**: Robotic deep anterior lamellar keratoplasty (DALK) requires accurate real time depth feedback to approach Descemet's membrane (DM) without perforation. M-mode intraoperative optical coherence tomography (OCT) provides high temporal resolution depth traces, but speckle noise, attenuation, and instrument induced shadowing often result in discontinuous or ambiguous layer interfaces that challenge anatomically consistent segmentation at deployment frame rates. We present a lightweight, topology aware M-mode segmentation pipeline based on UNeXt that incorporates anatomical topology regularization to stabilize boundary continuity and layer ordering under low signal to noise ratio conditions. The proposed system achieves end to end throughput exceeding 80 Hz measured over the complete preprocessing inference overlay pipeline on a single GPU, demonstrating practical real time guidance beyond model only timing. This operating margin provides temporal headroom to reject low quality or dropout frames while maintaining a stable effective depth update rate. Evaluation on a standard rabbit eye M-mode dataset using an established baseline protocol shows improved qualitative boundary stability compared with topology agnostic controls, while preserving deployable real time performance.

【2】Physics-based generation of multilayer corneal OCT data via Gaussian modeling and MCML for AI-driven diagnostic and surgical guidance applications
- **标题**: 通过高斯建模和 MCML 基于物理生成多层角膜 OCT 数据，用于 AI 驱动的诊断和手术指导应用
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02755
> **作者**: Jinglun Yu,Yaning Wang,Rosalinda Xiong,Ziyi Huang,Kristina Irsch,Jin U. Kang
> **摘要**: 用于角膜光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 成像的深度学习模型的训练受到大型且注释良好的数据集的可用性的限制。我们提出了一个可配置的蒙特卡罗模拟框架，该框架可生成合成角膜 B 扫描光学 OCT 图像，并具有直接从模拟几何形状导出的像素级五层分割标签。具有高斯表面的五层角膜模型可捕捉健康眼睛和圆锥角膜眼睛的曲率和厚度变化。每层都根据文献分配光学属性，并使用多层组织中光传输的蒙特卡罗模型 (MCML) 来模拟光传输，同时结合共焦 PSF 和灵敏度滚降等系统功能。该方法可生成超过 10,000 个高分辨率 (1024x1024) 图像标签对，并支持几何形状、光子计数、噪声和系统参数的定制。由此产生的数据集能够在受控的真实条件下对人工智能模型进行系统训练、验证和基准测试，提供可重复和可扩展的资源，以支持图像引导眼科诊断和手术指导应用的开发。
> **Abstract**: Training deep learning models for corneal optical coherence tomography (OCT) imaging is limited by the availability of large, well-annotated datasets. We present a configurable Monte Carlo simulation framework that generates synthetic corneal B-scan optical OCT images with pixel-level five-layer segmentation labels derived directly from the simulation geometry. A five-layer corneal model with Gaussian surfaces captures curvature and thickness variability in healthy and keratoconic eyes. Each layer is assigned optical properties from the literature and light transport is simulated using Monte Carlo modeling of light transport in multi-layered tissues (MCML), while incorporating system features such as the confocal PSF and sensitivity roll-off. This approach produces over 10,000 high-resolution (1024x1024) image-label pairs and supports customization of geometry, photon count, noise, and system parameters. The resulting dataset enables systematic training, validation, and benchmarking of AI models under controlled, ground-truth conditions, providing a reproducible and scalable resource to support the development of diagnostic and surgical guidance applications in image-guided ophthalmology.

【3】EchoJEPA: A Latent Predictive Foundation Model for Echocardiography
- **标题**: EchoJEPA：超声心动图的潜在预测基础模型
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02603
> **作者**: Alif Munim,Adibvafa Fallahpour,Teodora Szasz,Ahmadreza Attarpour,River Jiang,Brana Sooriyakanthan,Maala Sooriyakanthan,Heather Whitney,Jeremy Slivnick,Barry Rubin,Wendy Tsang,Bo Wang
> **摘要**: 超声心动图的基础模型有望通过从大型未标记视频档案中学习通用表示来减少注释负担并提高诊断一致性。然而，当前的方法无法将解剖信号与主导超声图像的随机散斑和采集伪影分开。我们推出了 EchoJEPA，这是一种超声心动图基础模型，经过 30 万患者的 1800 万张超声心动图训练，是迄今为止该模式最大的预训练语料库。我们还引入了一种新颖的多视图探测框架，该框架具有分解的流嵌入，可以标准化冻结主干下的评估。与之前的方法相比，EchoJEPA 将左心室射血分数估计误差减少了 19%，视图分类准确率达到 87.4%。 EchoJEPA 表现出强大的样本效率，仅使用 1% 的标记数据即可达到 78.6% 的准确率，而在 100% 训练的最佳基线上准确率达到 42.1%。在声学扰动下，EchoJEPA 的性能下降仅为 2.3%，而次佳模型的性能为 16.8%，并且将零样本转移给儿科患者，误差比次优模型低 15%，优于所有微调基线。这些结果将潜在预测确立为超声基础模型的优越范例。
> **Abstract**: Foundation models for echocardiography promise to reduce annotation burden and improve diagnostic consistency by learning generalizable representations from large unlabeled video archives. However, current approaches fail to disentangle anatomical signal from the stochastic speckle and acquisition artifacts that dominate ultrasound imagery. We present EchoJEPA, a foundation model for echocardiography trained on 18 million echocardiograms across 300K patients, the largest pretraining corpus for this modality to date. We also introduce a novel multi-view probing framework with factorized stream embeddings that standardizes evaluation under frozen backbones. Compared to prior methods, EchoJEPA reduces left ventricular ejection fraction estimation error by 19% and achieves 87.4% view classification accuracy. EchoJEPA exhibits strong sample efficiency, reaching 78.6% accuracy with only 1% of labeled data versus 42.1% for the best baseline trained on 100%. Under acoustic perturbations, EchoJEPA degrades by only 2.3% compared to 16.8% for the next best model, and transfers zero-shot to pediatric patients with 15% lower error than the next best model, outperforming all fine-tuned baselines. These results establish latent prediction as a superior paradigm for ultrasound foundation models.

【4】Super-résolution non supervisée d'images hyperspectrales de télédétection utilisant un entraînement entièrement synthétique
- **标题**: 利用整体合成技术实现电视探测超分辨率非监督图像高光谱
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02552
> **作者**: Xinxin Xu,Yann Gousseau,Christophe Kervazo,Saïd Ladjal
> **摘要**: 高光谱单图像超分辨率（SISR）旨在增强空间分辨率，同时保留高光谱图像丰富的光谱信息。大多数现有方法依赖于高分辨率地面实况数据的监督学习，而这在实践中通常是不可用的。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种基于合成丰度数据的无监督学习方法。高光谱图像首先通过高光谱解混合分解为端元和丰度图。然后训练神经网络，使用死叶模型生成的数据来超解析这些图，该模型复制了真实丰度的统计特性。通过将超分辨率丰度图与端元重新组合来重建最终的超分辨率高光谱图像。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性以及合成数据与训练的相关性。
> **Abstract**: Hyperspectral single image super-resolution (SISR) aims to enhance spatial resolution while preserving the rich spectral information of hyperspectral images. Most existing methods rely on supervised learning with high-resolution ground truth data, which is often unavailable in practice. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised learning approach based on synthetic abundance data. The hyperspectral image is first decomposed into endmembers and abundance maps through hyperspectral unmixing. A neural network is then trained to super-resolve these maps using data generated with the dead leaves model, which replicates the statistical properties of real abundances. The final super-resolution hyperspectral image is reconstructed by recombining the super-resolved abundance maps with the endmembers. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and the relevance of synthetic data for training.

【5】Hyperspectral Image Fusion with Spectral-Band and Fusion-Scale Agnosticism
- **标题**: 具有光谱带和融合尺度不可知论的高光谱图像融合
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01681
> **作者**: Yu-Jie Liang,Zihan Cao,Liang-Jian Deng,Yang Yang,Malu Zhang
> **摘要**: 当前的多光谱和高光谱图像融合（MS/HS 融合）深度学习模型通常是针对固定光谱带和空间尺度而设计的，这限制了它们在不同传感器之间的可转移性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 SSA，这是一种具有光谱带和融合规模不可知论的 MS/HS 融合的通用框架。具体来说，我们引入了 Matryoshka Kernel (MK)，这是一种新颖的算子，可以使单个模型适应任意数量的光谱通道。同时，我们在隐式神经表示 (INR) 主干上构建 SSA，将 HS 信号建模为连续函数，从而能够以任意空间分辨率进行重建。这两种形式的不可知论共同实现了一个单一的 MS/HS 融合模型，该模型可以有效地推广到看不见的传感器和空间尺度。大量的实验表明，我们的单一模型实现了最先进的性能，同时很好地推广到看不见的传感器和秤，为未来的 HS 基础模型铺平了道路。
> **Abstract**: Current deep learning models for Multispectral and Hyperspectral Image Fusion (MS/HS fusion) are typically designed for fixed spectral bands and spatial scales, which limits their transferability across diverse sensors. To address this, we propose SSA, a universal framework for MS/HS fusion with spectral-band and fusion-scale agnosticism. Specifically, we introduce Matryoshka Kernel (MK), a novel operator that enables a single model to adapt to arbitrary numbers of spectral channels. Meanwhile, we build SSA upon an Implicit Neural Representation (INR) backbone that models the HS signal as a continuous function, enabling reconstruction at arbitrary spatial resolutions. Together, these two forms of agnosticism enable a single MS/HS fusion model that generalizes effectively to unseen sensors and spatial scales. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our single model achieves state-of-the-art performance while generalizing well to unseen sensors and scales, paving the way toward future HS foundation models.

【6】MarkCleaner: High-Fidelity Watermark Removal via Imperceptible Micro-Geometric Perturbation
- **标题**: MarkCleaner：通过难以察觉的微观几何扰动去除高保真水印
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01513
> **作者**: Xiaoxi Kong,Jieyu Yuan,Pengdi Chen,Yuanlin Zhang,Chongyi Li,Bin Li
> **摘要**: 语义水印对传统的图像空间攻击表现出很强的鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们表明这种鲁棒性在微观几何扰动下无法生存：空间位移可以通过破坏相位对齐来去除水印。受这一观察的启发，我们引入了 MarkCleaner，这是一个水印去除框架，可以避免基于再生的水印去除引起的语义漂移。具体来说，MarkCleaner 接受了微观几何扰动监督的训练，这鼓励模型将语义内容与严格的空间对齐分开，并在细微的几何位移下实现稳健的重建。该框架采用了一个掩模引导的编码器，可以学习显式的空间表示，以及一个基于 2D 高斯分布的解码器，可以显式地参数化几何扰动，同时保留语义内容。大量实验表明，MarkCleaner 在水印去除效果和视觉保真度方面均实现了卓越的性能，同时实现了高效的实时推理。我们的代码将在接受后提供。
> **Abstract**: Semantic watermarks exhibit strong robustness against conventional image-space attacks. In this work, we show that such robustness does not survive under micro-geometric perturbations: spatial displacements can remove watermarks by breaking the phase alignment. Motivated by this observation, we introduce MarkCleaner, a watermark removal framework that avoids semantic drift caused by regeneration-based watermark removal. Specifically, MarkCleaner is trained with micro-geometry-perturbed supervision, which encourages the model to separate semantic content from strict spatial alignment and enables robust reconstruction under subtle geometric displacements. The framework adopts a mask-guided encoder that learns explicit spatial representations and a 2D Gaussian Splatting-based decoder that explicitly parameterizes geometric perturbations while preserving semantic content. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MarkCleaner achieves superior performance in both watermark removal effectiveness and visual fidelity, while enabling efficient real-time inference. Our code will be made available upon acceptance.

【7】A texture-based framework for foundational ultrasound models
- **标题**: 用于基础超声模型的基于纹理的框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.01444
> **作者**: Tal Grutman,Carmel Shinar,Tali Ilovitsh
> **摘要**: 超声波是最广泛使用的医学成像方式，但它产生的图像从根本上来说是独特的，由组织相关的散射、反射和声速变化产生，这些变化产生一组受限制的特征纹理，与自然图像统计数据明显不同。这些声学驱动的模式使得超声波对于最初为自然图像设计的算法提出了挑战。为了弥补这一差距，该领域越来越多地转向基础模型，希望利用它们的泛化能力。然而，这些模型在超声应用中常常会出现问题，因为它们不是为超声物理而设计的，它们只是根据超声数据进行训练。因此，有必要将超声特定领域知识整合到既定的学习框架中。我们通过将自监督学习重新表述为纹理分析问题并引入纹理超声语义分析（TUSA）来实现这一目标。使用 TUSA，模型学习利用高度可扩展的对比方法直接从简单的 B 模式图像中提取真实的特定领域表示。我们结合开源数据、模拟数据和体内数据来训练 TUSA 模型。将潜在空间与几个较大的基础模型进行比较，表明我们的方法使 TUSA 模型具有更好的通用性，可以在独特的在线数据集以及为本研究收集的临床眼数据集上完成困难的下游任务。我们的模型在检测新冠肺炎 (70%)、脊髓血肿 (100%) 和玻璃体出血 (97%) 方面实现了更高的准确度，并且与肝脂肪变性 (r = 0.83)、射血分数 (r = 0.63) 和氧饱和度 (r = 0.38) 等定量参数的相关性更密切。我们开源模型权重和训练脚本：https://github.com/talg2324/tusa
